title: Mitigating the Memory Bottleneck with Machine Learning-Driven and Data-Aware Microarchitectural Techniques
summary:
Modern applications process massive data volumes that overwhelm the storage and retrieval capabilities of memory systems, making memory the primary performance and energy-efficiency bottleneck of computing systems. Although many microarchitectural techniques attempt to hide or tolerate long memory access latency, rapidly growing data footprints continue to outpace technology scaling, requiring more effective solutions. This dissertation shows that modern processors observe large amounts of application and system data during execution, yet many microarchitectural mechanisms make decisions largely independent of this information. Through four case studies, we demonstrate that such data-agnostic design leads to substantial missed opportunities for improving performance and energy efficiency.
  To address this limitation, this dissertation advocates shifting microarchitecture design from data-agnostic to data-informed. We propose mechanisms that (1) learn policies from observed execution behavior (data-driven design) and (2) exploit semantic characteristics of application data (data-aware design). We apply lightweight machine learning techniques and previously underexplored data characteristics across four processor components: a reinforcement learning-based hardware data prefetcher that learns memory access patterns online; a perceptron predictor that identifies memory requests likely to access off-chip memory; a reinforcement learning mechanism that coordinates data prefetching and off-chip prediction; and a mechanism that exploits repeatability in memory addresses and loaded values to eliminate predictable load instructions.
  Our extensive evaluation shows that the proposed techniques significantly improve performance and energy efficiency compared to prior state-of-the-art approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文主张将微架构设计从数据无关转变为数据知情，通过数据驱动和数据感知的方法，利用轻量级机器学习技术和数据语义特征优化处理器组件，显著提升性能和能效。
AI.motivation: 现代应用处理海量数据，导致内存系统成为计算系统主要的性能和能效瓶颈。尽管现有微架构技术试图隐藏或容忍内存访问延迟，但快速增长的数据足迹仍超出技术扩展速度。作者发现现代处理器在执行期间观察到大量应用和系统数据，但许多微架构机制在决策时很大程度上独立于这些信息，这种数据无关的设计错失了提升性能和能效的重要机会。
AI.method: 提出从数据无关设计转向数据知情设计的范式转变，包括：(1)从观察到的执行行为中学习策略的数据驱动设计；(2)利用应用数据语义特征的数据感知设计。通过四个案例研究实现具体机制：基于强化学习的硬件数据预取器（在线学习内存访问模式）；感知器预测器（识别可能访问片外内存的请求）；强化学习机制（协调数据预取和片外预测）；利用内存地址和加载值可重复性的机制（消除可预测的加载指令）。
AI.result: 大量评估表明，所提出的技术与现有最先进方法相比，显著提升了处理器性能和能效。
AI.conclusion: 通过将微架构设计从数据无关转变为数据知情，并应用轻量级机器学习技术和数据语义特征，可以有效解决内存系统瓶颈问题，为未来处理器设计提供了新的方向。

title: Structured Gossip: A Partition-Resilient DNS for Internet-Scale Dynamic Networks
comment: Rejected from ACM SIGMOD 2026 Demo Track
summary: Network partitions pose fundamental challenges to distributed name resolution in mobile ad-hoc networks (MANETs) and edge computing. Existing solutions either require active coordination that fails to scale, or use unstructured gossip with excessive overhead. We present \textit{Structured Gossip DNS}, exploiting DHT finger tables to achieve partition resilience through \textbf{passive stabilization}. Our approach reduces message complexity from $O(n)$ to $O(n/\log n)$ while maintaining $O(\log^2 n)$ convergence. Unlike active protocols requiring synchronous agreement, our passive approach guarantees eventual consistency through commutative operations that converge regardless of message ordering. The system handles arbitrary concurrent partitions via version vectors, eliminating global coordination and enabling billion-node deployments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Structured Gossip DNS，一种利用DHT指状表实现分区恢复的分布式名称解析方案。该方法通过被动稳定化将消息复杂度从O(n)降至O(n/log n)，收敛复杂度保持在O(log² n)，并支持任意并发分区场景下的最终一致性，适用于十亿节点规模的MANETs和边缘计算环境。
AI.motivation: 在移动自组织网络（MANETs）和边缘计算场景中，网络分区对分布式名称解析构成根本性挑战。现有方案存在两难困境：主动协调方案无法有效扩展，而非结构化Gossip协议则产生过高开销。因此需要一种既能保证可扩展性又能高效处理分区的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出Structured Gossip DNS方案，核心技术包括：（1）利用分布式哈希表（DHT）的指状表结构；（2）采用被动稳定化机制替代主动协议，通过可交换操作实现无需消息排序保证的收敛；（3）使用版本向量处理任意并发分区，消除全局协调需求，确保最终一致性。
AI.result: 理论分析表明，该方法将消息复杂度从传统O(n)降低至O(n/log n)，同时保持O(log² n)的收敛复杂度。与需要同步协议的主动方案不同，被动方法通过可交换操作实现了对消息顺序不敏感的收敛保证，支持十亿节点规模的部署。
AI.conclusion: Structured Gossip DNS成功解决了MANETs和边缘计算中分布式名称解析的网络分区问题，通过DHT结构和被动稳定化机制实现了可扩展性、低开销和最终一致性的统一，为大规模分布式系统提供了实用的分区恢复方案。

title: RISCBench: Benchmarking RISC-V Orchestration Efficiency in FPGA and FPGA-Like Computing Engines
comment: Appears in The ACM/SIGDA International Symposium on Field-Programmable Gate Arrays conference, FPGA 2026 | February 22-24, 2026 | Seaside, CA, USA. KEYWORDS: Efficiency; Orchestration; RISC-V; AI Inference; Sustainability; SWaP-C
summary:
Heterogeneous systems increasingly rely on RISC-V cores as orchestration engines to manage data movement, synchronization, and scheduling across accelerators and reconfigurable fabrics. Conventional performance metrics, such as FLOPs, TOPS/W, or energy per operation, do not capture orchestration efficiency, even though it often dictates sustained system behavior. This gap is increasingly relevant as systems evolve toward tightly coupled heterogeneous fabrics and co-packaged accelerators, where control-plane behavior determines whether these platforms achieve their promised performance.
  We present RISCBench, a kernel benchmark suite and open methodology for quantifying orchestration efficiency. RISCBench introduces the Sustained Instantaneous Throughput (SIT) metric, which accumulates instantaneous throughput over near-aggregate execution intervals, capturing sustained efficiency beyond peak rates. The methodology is evaluated across representative platforms spanning soft and hard RISC-V orchestration engines, including FPGA-based prototyping and accelerator-class implementations. Results highlight synchronization and data residency driven tradeoffs that limit realized throughput beyond peak performance, motivating SIT as a practical, platform-independent descriptor for evaluating orchestration efficiency in heterogeneous systems and AI inference applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RISCBench，一个用于量化异构系统中RISC-V核心编排效率的内核基准测试套件，并引入了持续瞬时吞吐量（SIT）指标，以捕捉峰值性能之外的持续效率。
AI.motivation: 随着异构系统向紧密耦合的异构架构和共封装加速器演进，RISC-V核心作为编排引擎负责管理数据移动、同步和调度。然而，传统的性能指标（如FLOPs、TOPS/W或每次操作的能耗）无法捕捉编排效率，而编排效率往往决定了系统的持续行为。这一差距在控制平面行为决定平台能否实现其承诺性能的背景下愈发重要。
AI.method: 提出了RISCBench，这是一个内核基准测试套件和开源方法论，用于量化编排效率。引入了持续瞬时吞吐量（SIT）指标，该指标在接近聚合执行间隔内累积瞬时吞吐量，从而捕捉峰值速率之外的持续效率。该方法论在代表性平台上进行了评估，涵盖软核和硬核RISC-V编排引擎，包括基于FPGA的原型和加速器级实现。
AI.result: 结果揭示了由同步和数据驻留驱动的权衡如何限制峰值性能之外的实现吞吐量，证明了SIT作为评估异构系统和AI推理应用中编排效率的实用、平台无关描述符的有效性。
AI.conclusion: RISCBench和SIT指标填补了传统性能指标无法捕捉编排效率的空白，为异构系统和AI推理应用提供了一个实用的、平台无关的编排效率评估方法，激励了进一步的研究和实践应用。

title: Multi-Agent DRL for V2X Resource Allocation: Disentangling Challenges and Benchmarking Solutions
summary: Multi-agent deep reinforcement learning (DRL) has emerged as a promising approach for radio resource allocation (RRA) in cellular vehicle-to-everything (C-V2X) networks. However, the multifaceted challenges inherent to multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) - including non-stationarity, coordination difficulty, large action spaces, partial observability, and limited robustness and generalization - are often intertwined, making it difficult to understand their individual impact on performance in vehicular environments. Moreover, existing studies typically rely on different baseline MARL algorithms, and a systematic comparison of their capabilities in addressing specific challenges in C-V2X RRA remains lacking. In this paper, we bridge this gap by formulating C-V2X RRA as a sequence of multi-agent interference games with progressively increasing complexity, each designed to isolate a key MARL challenge. Based on these formulations, we construct a suite of learning tasks that enable controlled evaluation of performance degradation attributable to each challenge. We further develop large-scale, diverse training and testing datasets using SUMO-generated highway traces to capture a wide range of vehicular topologies and corresponding interference patterns. Through extensive benchmarking of representative MARL algorithms, we identify policy robustness and generalization across diverse vehicular topologies as the dominant challenge in C-V2X RRA. We further show that, on the most challenging task, the best-performing actor-critic method outperforms the value-based approach by 42%. By emphasizing the need for zero-shot policy transfer to both seen and unseen topologies at runtime, and by open-sourcing the code, datasets, and interference-game benchmark suite, this work provides a systematic and reproducible foundation for evaluating and advancing MARL algorithms in vehicular networks.

AI.tldr: 本文针对C-V2X网络资源分配中MARL面临的挑战，构建了一套渐进式干扰博弈基准测试套件，系统评估了非平稳性、协调困难、动作空间大、部分可观测性及策略鲁棒性等关键问题，发现策略跨拓扑的鲁棒性与泛化能力是主要瓶颈，且actor-critic方法在最具挑战任务上优于value-based方法42%。
AI.motivation: 多智能体深度强化学习在C-V2X资源分配中面临非平稳性、协调困难、大动作空间、部分可观测性、鲁棒性与泛化能力不足等多重交织挑战，难以单独评估各因素影响；现有研究基于不同基线算法，缺乏对各类MARL算法应对特定挑战能力的系统性比较。
AI.method: 将C-V2X资源分配建模为一系列复杂度递增的多智能体干扰博弈，每个博弈隔离一个关键MARL挑战；构建可控评估任务以量化各挑战带来的性能下降；利用SUMO生成大规模高速公路轨迹数据集，覆盖多样化车辆拓扑与干扰模式；对代表性MARL算法进行广泛基准测试。
AI.result: 系统识别出策略跨多样化车辆拓扑的鲁棒性与泛化能力是C-V2X资源分配的主导挑战；在最复杂任务中，最优actor-critic方法性能超越value-based方法42%；开源了代码、数据集及干扰博弈基准套件，为可复现研究提供基础。
AI.conclusion: 强调运行时零样本策略迁移至已见与未见拓扑的必要性，所提供的基准套件为系统评估与推进车载网络中MARL算法奠定了可复现的基础，指明未来研究应聚焦提升策略跨拓扑泛化能力。

title: Configurable Runtime Orchestration for Dynamic Data Retrieval in Distributed Systems
comment: 11 pages, 1 architecture diagram, execution pseudocode, and system comparison table
summary: Modern enterprise platforms increasingly depend on distributed microservices, analytical data platforms, and external APIs to construct composite responses for applications. Orchestrating data retrieval across these heterogeneous systems is challenging because many workflow platforms rely on predefined workflows or state-machine definitions. Systems such as Apache Airflow, AWS Step Functions, and Temporal provide powerful orchestration capabilities but typically assume workflows are defined prior to execution. This paper presents a configuration-driven runtime orchestration framework for dynamic data retrieval in distributed systems. The framework generates execution graphs dynamically from configuration at request time, enabling low-latency orchestration without redeploying workflow code when integrations evolve. The execution planner performs dependency-aware scheduling and parallel execution of independent tasks, allowing efficient aggregation across distributed services. The paper describes the architecture, execution model, and operational tradeoffs of this framework, and presents a representative enterprise case study for Customer 360 retrieval. The approach demonstrates how runtime configuration can enable flexible and scalable orchestration in rapidly evolving integration environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种配置驱动的运行时编排框架，用于分布式系统中的动态数据检索。该框架能够在请求时根据配置动态生成执行图，实现依赖感知的调度与并行执行，从而在集成不断演进的环境中实现灵活、可扩展且低延迟的编排，无需重新部署工作流代码。
AI.motivation: 现代企业平台依赖分布式微服务、数据分析平台和外部API来构建复合响应，但现有的工作流编排系统（如Apache Airflow、AWS Step Functions、Temporal）通常假设工作流在执行前已预定义，难以应对异构系统中数据检索编排的动态性需求。当集成发生变化时，往往需要重新部署工作流代码，缺乏灵活性。
AI.method: 提出一种配置驱动的运行时编排框架。该框架在请求时根据配置动态生成执行图（execution graph），执行规划器（execution planner）执行依赖感知的任务调度，对独立任务进行并行执行，从而高效地聚合来自分布式服务的数据。架构支持无需重新部署代码即可适应集成的演进。
AI.result: 描述了框架的架构、执行模型和运维权衡，并通过一个具有代表性的企业案例研究（Customer 360检索）进行了验证。该框架实现了低延迟编排，展示了运行时配置如何在快速演进的集成环境中实现灵活且可扩展的编排。
AI.conclusion: 运行时配置驱动的编排方法能够有效解决分布式系统中动态数据检索的挑战，为快速演进的企业集成环境提供了一种灵活、可扩展且高效的解决方案。

title: Performance Comparison of IBN orchestration using LLM and SLMs
comment: Accepted for presentation at IEEE International Conference on Communications 2026
summary: The evolution of both 5G and 6G networks is driving the advancement of fully autonomous network management, placing Intent-Based Networking at the centre of this transformation. This paper introduces a novel framework for 5G and 6G IBN orchestration that leverages a stateful, hierarchical multi-agent architecture to achieve full automation using both SLMs and LLMs. Both models have been evaluated for translation accuracy using metrics such as BLEU, METEOR, and ROUGE-L, as well as computational complexity. Experimental results show that both models exhibit similar accuracy. However, result shows that SLMs can improve the overall completion speed of the IBN lifecycle by 20%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向5G/6G意图驱动网络编排的新型框架，采用有状态分层多智能体架构，通过对比实验发现小语言模型在保持准确率的同时可将生命周期完成速度提升20%。
AI.motivation: 随着5G和6G网络向全自主网络管理演进，意图驱动网络成为核心推动力。为解决网络管理复杂性和自动化需求，亟需一种能够充分利用大语言模型和小语言模型的智能编排框架。
AI.method: 提出一种新颖的框架，采用有状态分层多智能体架构实现5G/6G IBN编排的全自动化。框架同时利用大语言模型和小语言模型，并通过BLEU、METEOR和ROUGE-L等指标评估翻译准确率，同时分析计算复杂度。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，大语言模型和小语言模型在翻译准确率方面表现相似。然而，小语言模型能将IBN生命周期的整体完成速度提升20%。
AI.conclusion: 小语言模型在意图驱动网络编排场景中具有显著优势，能够在保持准确率的同时大幅提升系统响应速度，为未来网络自动化提供了高效的解决方案。

title: A Pivot-Based Kirigami Utensil for Hand-Held and Robot-Assisted Feeding
summary: Eating is a daily challenge for over 60 million adults with essential tremors and other mobility limitations. For these users, traditional utensils like forks or spoons are difficult to manipulate -- resulting in accidental spills and restricting the types of food that can be consumed. Prior work has developed rigid, hand-held utensils that often fail to secure food, as well as soft, shape-changing utensils made strictly for robot-assisted feeding. To assist a broader range of users, we introduce a re-designed kiri-spoon that can be leveraged as either a hand-held utensil or a robot-mounted attachment. Our key idea -- developed in collaboration with stakeholders -- is a pivot-based design. With this design the kiri-spoon behaves like a pair of pliers: users squeeze the handles to change the shape of the utensil and enclose food morsels. In practice, users can apply this kiri-spoon as either a spoon (that scoops food) or as a fork (that pinches food); when the handles are closed, the utensil wraps around the morsel and prevents it from accidentally falling. We characterize the amount of force required to open or close the kiri-spoon, and show how designers can modify this force through kinematic or material changes. A highlight of our design is its accessibility: the hand-held version consists of just four 3D printed parts that snap together. By adding a servo motor, we can extend this same kinematic structure to robot-assisted feeding. Across our user studies, adults with disabilities and elderly adults with Parkinson's reported that the kiri-spoon better met their needs and provided a more effective means of spill prevention than existing alternatives. See a video of our kiri-spoon here: https://youtu.be/FFIomm5RL98

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于枢轴设计的Kiri-Spoon餐具，可通过挤压手柄改变形状来包裹食物，既可作为手持餐具也可作为机器人辅助喂食附件，有效防止食物掉落，帮助震颤和行动障碍用户独立进食。
AI.motivation: 超过6000万成年人受特发性震颤和其他行动障碍困扰，难以使用传统餐具（叉子或勺子），导致食物泼洒和饮食受限。现有刚性手持餐具难以固定食物，而软性形状改变餐具仅适用于机器人辅助喂食。需要一种能够服务更广泛用户群体的多功能餐具解决方案。
AI.method: 与利益相关者合作开发了基于枢轴设计的Kiri-Spoon餐具。该设计类似钳子：用户挤压手柄即可改变餐具形状并包裹食物。可作为勺子舀取食物或作为叉子夹取食物，闭合时餐具包裹食物防止意外掉落。手持版本由四个可卡扣连接的3D打印部件组成，通过添加伺服电机可扩展至机器人辅助喂食。量化了开合力需求，并通过运动学或材料改变来调整该力。
AI.result: 通过用户研究，残疾人士和帕金森病老年用户报告Kiri-Spoon比现有替代品更好地满足其需求，并提供更有效的防泼洒措施。该设计具有高可及性，结构简单，成本较低，可适应不同使用场景。
AI.conclusion: Kiri-Spoon提供了一种低成本、易制造、高可及性的解决方案，能有效帮助行动障碍用户独立进食，减少食物泼洒，其模块化设计使其能够灵活应用于手持使用和机器人辅助喂食两种场景。

title: vLLM Hook v0: A Plug-in for Programming Model Internals on vLLM
summary: Modern artificial intelligence (AI) models are deployed on inference engines to optimize runtime efficiency and resource allocation, particularly for transformer-based large language models (LLMs). The vLLM project is a major open-source library to support model serving and inference. However, the current implementation of vLLM limits programmability of the internal states of deployed models. This prevents the use of popular test-time model alignment and enhancement methods. For example, it prevents the detection of adversarial prompts based on attention patterns or the adjustment of model responses based on activation steering. To bridge this critical gap, we present vLLM Hook, an opensource plug-in to enable the programming of internal states for vLLM models. Based on a configuration file specifying which internal states to capture, vLLM Hook provides seamless integration to vLLM and supports two essential features: passive programming and active programming. For passive programming, vLLM Hook probes the selected internal states for subsequent analysis, while keeping the model generation intact. For active programming, vLLM Hook enables efficient intervention of model generation by altering the selected internal states. In addition to presenting the core functions of vLLM Hook, in version 0, we demonstrate 3 use cases including prompt injection detection, enhanced retrieval-augmented retrieval (RAG), and activation steering. Finally, we welcome the community's contribution to improve vLLM Hook via https://github.com/ibm/vllm-hook.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了vLLM Hook，一个针对vLLM推理引擎的开源插件，通过支持内部状态的被动和主动编程，解决了现有vLLM无法灵活操作模型内部状态的问题，实现了对抗性提示检测、RAG增强和激活引导等高级模型对齐与增强方法。
AI.motivation: 当前vLLM作为主流开源LLM推理引擎，限制了部署模型内部状态的可编程性，阻碍了基于注意力模式的对抗性提示检测和基于激活引导的模型响应调整等测试时模型对齐与增强方法的应用，亟需弥补这一关键功能缺失。
AI.method: 设计并实现了vLLM Hook开源插件，基于配置文件指定需捕获的内部状态，无缝集成至vLLM。支持两种核心编程模式：被动编程（探查选定内部状态用于后续分析，保持生成不变）和主动编程（通过修改选定内部状态干预模型生成过程）。
AI.result: 成功实现vLLM Hook核心功能，并在论文中展示了3个实际用例：提示注入检测、增强型检索增强生成（RAG）、激活引导，验证了该方法的有效性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: vLLM Hook填补了vLLM生态中内部状态可编程性的空白，为测试时模型对齐与增强方法提供了灵活高效的基础设施，并通过开源方式邀请社区共同完善该工具。

title: Autonomous AI Agents for Option Hedging: Enhancing Financial Stability through Shortfall Aware Reinforcement Learning
summary: The deployment of autonomous AI agents in derivatives markets has widened a practical gap between static model calibration and realized hedging outcomes. We introduce two reinforcement learning frameworks, a novel Replication Learning of Option Pricing (RLOP) approach and an adaptive extension of Q-learner in Black-Scholes (QLBS), that prioritize shortfall probability and align learning objectives with downside sensitive hedging. Using listed SPY and XOP options, we evaluate models using realized path delta hedging outcome distributions, shortfall probability, and tail risk measures such as Expected Shortfall. Empirically, RLOP reduces shortfall frequency in most slices and shows the clearest tail-risk improvements in stress, while implied volatility fit often favors parametric models yet poorly predicts after-cost hedging performance. This friction-aware RL framework supports a practical approach to autonomous derivatives risk management as AI-augmented trading systems scale.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了两种强化学习框架（RLOP和QLBS），用于自主AI代理在衍生品市场中的对冲操作，优先考虑短缺概率并关注下行风险，实证表明RLOP在压力情景下显著改善尾部风险。
AI.motivation: 随着自主AI代理在衍生品市场的部署，静态模型校准与实际对冲结果之间的实际差距日益扩大，传统模型难以有效应对交易成本和下行风险。
AI.method: 提出两种强化学习框架：(1)创新的期权定价复制学习（RLOP）方法；(2)Black-Scholes中Q学习器的自适应扩展（QLBS）。这些框架优先考虑短缺概率，并将学习目标与下行敏感对齐。使用SPY和XOP上市期权，通过实现路径Delta对冲结果分布、短缺概率和Expected Shortfall等尾部风险度量进行评估。
AI.result: 实证结果显示，RLOP在大多数切片中降低了短缺频率，在压力情景下表现出最明显的尾部风险改善；隐含波动率拟合通常有利于参数模型，但在预测考虑成本的对冲性能方面表现较差。
AI.conclusion: 这种考虑摩擦的强化学习框架为自主衍生品风险管理提供了实用方法，支持AI增强交易系统的规模化应用。

title: Converting Binary Floating-Point Numbers to Shortest Decimal Strings: An Experimental Review
summary: When sharing or logging numerical data, we must convert binary floating-point numbers into their decimal string representations. For example, the number $π$ might become 3.1415927. Engineers have perfected many algorithms for producing such accurate, short strings. We present an empirical comparison across diverse hardware architectures and datasets. Cutting-edge techniques like Schubfach and Dragonbox achieve up to a tenfold speedup over Steele and White's Dragon4, executing as few as 210 instructions per conversion compared to Dragon4's 1500-5000 instructions. Often per their specification, none of the implementations we surveyed consistently produced the shortest possible strings-some generate outputs up to 30% longer than optimal. We find that standard library implementations in languages such as C++ and Swift execute significantly more instructions than the fastest methods, with performance gaps varying across CPU architectures and compilers. We suggest some optimization targets for future research.

AI.tldr: 本文对二进制浮点数转十进制字符串的算法进行了跨硬件架构和数据集的实证比较，发现Schubfach和Dragonbox等现代算法相比经典的Dragon4可实现最高10倍加速，但标准库实现仍有显著性能差距，且多数算法未能持续生成最短字符串。
AI.motivation: 在共享或记录数值数据时，需要将二进制浮点数转换为十进制字符串表示。尽管已有多种算法可生成准确且简短的字符串，但缺乏跨硬件和数据集的系统性性能比较，且标准库实现的效率有待评估。
AI.method: 对多种浮点数转字符串算法（包括Dragon4、Schubfach、Dragonbox等）在不同硬件架构和数据集上进行实证性能测试，统计指令执行数量，并分析输出字符串长度与最优解的偏差。
AI.result: Schubfach和Dragonbox等前沿算法相比Dragon4实现高达10倍加速，每次转换仅需约210条指令（Dragon4需1500-5000条）。C++和Swift等语言的标准库实现执行指令数显著多于最快方法。多数实现无法持续生成最短字符串，部分输出比最优解长30%。性能差距因CPU架构和编译器而异。
AI.conclusion: 现有浮点数转字符串算法在速度和输出简洁性上存在显著差异，标准库实现存在优化空间。建议未来研究关注特定优化目标以进一步提升性能和输出质量。

title: Evaluating Multi-Agent LLM Architectures for Rare Disease Diagnosis
summary: While large language models are capable diagnostic tools, the impact of multi-agent topology on diagnostic accuracy remains underexplored. This study evaluates four agent topologies, Control (single agent), Hierarchical, Adversarial, and Collaborative, across 302 cases spanning 33 rare disease categories. We introduce a Reasoning Gap metric to quantify the difference between internal knowledge retrieval and final diagnostic accuracy. Results indicate that the Hierarchical topology (50.0% accuracy) marginally outperforms Collaborative (49.8%) and Control (48.5%) configurations. In contrast, the Adversarial model significantly degrades performance (27.3%), exhibiting a massive Reasoning Gap where valid diagnoses were rejected due to artificial doubt. Across all architectures, performance was strongest in Allergic diseases and Toxic Effects categories but poorest in Cardiac Malformation and Respiratory cases. Critically, while the single-agent baseline was generally robust, all multi-agent systems, including the Adversarial model, yielded superior accuracy in Bone and Thoracic disease categories. These findings demonstrate that increasing system complexity does not guarantee better reasoning, supporting a shift toward dynamic topology selection.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了四种智能体拓扑结构（单智能体、层次式、对抗式、协作式）对大语言模型诊断准确性的影响，发现层次式拓扑表现最佳（50.0%），对抗式显著降低性能（27.3%），表明系统复杂性增加并不保证更好的推理效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型是有效的诊断工具，但多智能体拓扑结构对诊断准确性的影响仍未被充分探索，需要系统性地评估不同拓扑结构的性能差异。
AI.method: 研究评估了四种智能体拓扑结构（控制/单智能体、层次式、对抗式、协作式），涵盖33个罕见疾病类别的302个病例，并引入了Reasoning Gap（推理差距）指标来量化内部知识检索与最终诊断准确性之间的差异。
AI.result: 层次式拓扑准确率最高（50.0%），略优于协作式（49.8%）和控制组（48.5%）。对抗式模型表现显著下降（27.3%），存在巨大的推理差距，有效诊断因人为怀疑被拒绝。所有架构在过敏性疾病和中毒效应类别表现最佳，在心脏畸形和呼吸系统病例表现最差。所有多智能体系统在骨骼和胸腔疾病类别均优于单智能体基线。
AI.conclusion: 增加系统复杂性并不保证更好的推理能力，支持向动态拓扑选择转变的方法，应根据具体任务和疾病类别选择合适的智能体拓扑结构。

title: AIReSim: A Discrete Event Simulator for Large-scale AI Cluster Reliability Modeling
summary:
Failures in clusters running large-scale AI workloads can result in decreased utilization. Because the cost of a failure in such AI workloads is high (as it requires restarting the entire job from a previous checkpoint), there are many mechanisms in place to ensure that the failures are mitigated, and the impact of a failure is minimized. However, these mechanisms have many knobs and parameters, all of which must be carefully tuned based on the system and cluster's characteristics. We built AIReSim, a discrete event simulator to evaluate the different design choices during the failure, recovery, scheduling and repair processes for a cluster running a large-scale AI workload.
  AIReSim allows the system designer to systematically evaluate the effects of the different knobs and parameters on the overall end-to-end reliability of the system. Further, AIReSim can be used to identify which knobs or parameters are important in order to prioritize the investment of effort in improving the system. AIReSim also allows tuning of the knobs for achieving different tradeoffs in the system, as well as to consider various ``what-if'' scenarios. We present a case study of applying AIReSim for capacity planning for large-scale clusters running AI workloads.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AIReSim，一个针对运行大规模AI工作负载集群的离散事件模拟器，用于评估故障、恢复、调度和修复过程中的不同设计选择，帮助系统设计者优化参数配置以提升系统可靠性。
AI.motivation: 在大规模AI工作负载集群中，故障会导致利用率下降且代价高昂（需要从检查点重启整个作业）。现有的故障缓解机制包含许多需要根据系统和集群特性进行精细调优的参数，但缺乏系统化的评估工具来指导这些参数的配置和优化。
AI.method: 开发了AIReSim离散事件模拟器，能够模拟集群运行大规模AI工作负载时的故障、恢复、调度和修复过程。该模拟器允许系统设计者系统性地评估不同参数对系统端到端可靠性的影响，识别关键参数以优化投入优先级，并支持调整参数以实现不同的系统权衡以及各种"假设"场景的分析。
AI.result: 通过AIReSim，系统设计者可以系统性地评估各种参数对系统整体端到端可靠性的影响，识别重要的参数以优先投入改进 effort，调整参数以实现系统中的不同权衡，以及考虑各种假设场景。论文还展示了将AIReSim应用于运行AI工作负载的大规模集群容量规划的案例研究。
AI.conclusion: AIReSim为大规模AI工作负载集群提供了一个有效的工具，使系统设计者能够科学地评估和优化故障处理机制的参数配置，从而在容量规划、可靠性提升和资源投入决策方面做出更明智的选择。

title: Digital Twin-Enabled Mobility-Aware Cooperative Caching in Vehicular Edge Computing
summary: With the advancement of vehicle-to-vehicle (V2V) ad hoc networks and wireless communication technologies, mobile edge caching has become a key enabler for enhancing network performance and user experience. However, traditional federated learning-based collaborative caching approaches in vehicular scenarios suffer from inadequate client selection mechanisms and limited prediction accuracy, which result in suboptimal cache hit ratios and increased content transmission latency. To address these challenges, we propose a Digital Twin-based Asynchronous Federated Learning-driven Predictive Edge Caching with Deep Reinforcement Learning (DAPR) framework. DAPR employs an intelligent client selection strategy based on asynchronous federated learning, which leverages mobility prediction and data quality assessment to avoid selecting highly mobile clients or clients with low-quality data, thereby significantly improving model convergence efficiency. In addition, we design a GRU-VAE prediction model that uses a Variational Autoencoder (VAE) to capture latent data distribution features and Gated Recurrent Units (GRUs) to model temporal dependencies, thereby substantially enhancing the accuracy of content request prediction. The predicted content popularities are then fed into a deep reinforcement learning-driven caching decision engine to dynamically optimize edge caching resource allocation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DAPR achieves superior performance in terms of average reward, cache hit ratio, and transmission latency, thereby effectively improving the overall efficiency of vehicular edge caching systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于数字孪生的异步联邦学习驱动预测边缘缓存框架（DAPR），通过智能客户端选择策略和GRU-VAE预测模型，结合深度强化学习优化缓存决策，有效提升了车载边缘缓存系统的缓存命中率和传输延迟性能。
AI.motivation: 随着车联网（V2V）技术的发展，移动边缘缓存成为提升网络性能的关键技术。然而，传统基于联邦学习的协作缓存方法在车载场景中存在客户端选择机制不完善和预测精度有限的问题，导致缓存命中率低和内容传输延迟高。
AI.method: 提出DAPR框架，包含三个核心组件：(1)基于异步联邦学习的智能客户端选择策略，利用移动性预测和数据质量评估避免选择高移动性或低质量数据的客户端；(2)GRU-VAE预测模型，使用变分自编码器（VAE）捕获潜在数据分布特征，使用门控循环单元（GRU）建模时序依赖关系，提升内容请求预测准确性；(3)深度强化学习驱动的缓存决策引擎，根据预测的内容热度动态优化边缘缓存资源分配。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，DAPR框架在平均奖励、缓存命中率和传输延迟方面均取得优越性能，有效提升了车载边缘缓存系统的整体效率。
AI.conclusion: DAPR框架通过融合数字孪生、异步联邦学习、深度学习和强化学习技术，成功解决了车载边缘缓存场景中的客户端选择和内容预测难题，为提升车联网缓存性能提供了有效的解决方案。

title: Dynamic Targeting of Satellite Observations Using Supplemental Geostationary Satellite Data and Hierarchical Planning
comment: Appears in the proceedings of the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation
summary: The Dynamic Targeting (DT) mission concept is an approach to satellite observation in which a lookahead sensor gathers information about the upcoming environment and uses this information to intelligently plan observations. Previous work has shown that DT has the potential to increase the science return across applications. However, DT mission concepts must address challenges, such as the limited spatial extent of onboard lookahead data and instrument mobility, data throughput, and onboard computation constraints. In this work, we show how the performance of DT systems can be improved by using supplementary data streamed from geostationary satellites that provide lookahead information up to 35 minutes ahead of time rather than the 1 minute latency from an onboard lookahead sensor. While there is a greater volume of geostationary data, the search space for observation planning explodes exponentially with the size of the horizon. To address this, we introduce a hierarchical planning approach in which the geostationary data is used to plan a long-term observation blueprint in polynomial time, then the onboard lookahead data is leveraged to refine that plan over short-term horizons. We compare the performance of our approach to that of traditional DT planners relying on onboard lookahead data across four different problem instances: three cloud avoidance variations and a storm hunting scenario. We show that our hierarchical planner outperforms the traditional DT planners by up to 41% and examine the features of the scenarios that affect the performance of our approach. We demonstrate that incorporating geostationary satellite data is most effective for dynamic problem instances in which the targets of interest are sparsely distributed throughout the overflight.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的动态目标定位(DT)任务概念，通过引入地球静止卫星数据作为长期观测规划的先验信息，并采用分层规划方法，在四个问题实例中将观测性能提升了最多41%。
AI.motivation: 传统的动态目标定位任务依赖于星载前瞻传感器获取环境信息，但受限于有限的空间范围、约1分钟的数据延迟以及计算资源约束，限制了科学回报的进一步提升。作者希望利用地球静止卫星数据提供长达35分钟的前瞻信息，来克服这些局限性。
AI.method: 提出了一种分层规划方法：首先利用地球静止卫星流式传输的数据，在多项式时间内生成长期观测蓝图；然后结合星载前瞻数据，在短期规划层面上细化该蓝图，从而解决随着规划视野增大而呈指数级爆炸的搜索空间问题。
AI.result: 在四个问题实例（三种云层规避变体和一个风暴追踪场景）的对比实验中，该分层规划器的性能相比传统DT规划器提升了最多41%。研究发现，当感兴趣目标在过境飞行中呈稀疏分布时，引入地球静止卫星数据最为有效。
AI.conclusion: 将地球静止卫星数据与分层规划方法相结合，能够显著提升动态目标定位系统的观测性能，特别是对于目标稀疏分布的动态问题实例效果最佳，为未来卫星观测任务提供了新的优化方向。

title: How Attention Sinks Emerge in Large Language Models: An Interpretability Perspective
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) often allocate disproportionate attention to specific tokens, a phenomenon commonly referred to as the attention sink. While such sinks are generally considered detrimental, prior studies have identified a notable exception: the model's consistent emphasis on the first token of the input sequence. This structural bias can influence a wide range of downstream applications and warrants careful consideration. Despite its prevalence, the precise mechanisms underlying the emergence and persistence of attention sinks remain poorly understood. In this work, we trace the formation of attention sinks around the first token of the input. We identify a simple mechanism, referred to as the P0 Sink Circuit, that enables the model to recognize token at position zero and induce an attention sink within two transformer blocks, without relying on any semantic information. This mechanism serves as the basis for the attention sink on position zero. Furthermore, by analyzing training traces from a 30B A3B MoE model trained from scratch, we find that this mechanism emerges early in training and becomes increasingly concentrated in the first two layers, suggesting a possible signal for tracking pre training convergence states.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了大型语言模型中“注意力汇聚”现象的形成机制，提出了“P0汇聚电路”概念，该机制使模型能在前两个Transformer块内识别位置0的token并诱导注意力汇聚，且不依赖语义信息。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型常对特定token（尤其是输入序列的第一个token）产生不成比例的注意力，这种现象被称为注意力汇聚。虽然这种结构性偏差影响广泛，但其底层机制尚未被充分理解，研究旨在揭示该现象的形成原因。
AI.method: 通过追踪注意力汇聚的形成过程，识别出一个简单机制——P0汇聚电路，该机制使模型能在两个Transformer块内识别位置0的token并诱导注意力汇聚。研究还分析了从头训练的30B A3B MoE模型的训练轨迹，验证该机制的早期出现和演变。
AI.result: 发现P0汇聚电路机制无需依赖语义信息即可工作；该机制在训练早期就已出现，并逐渐集中到前两个层中，这可能是追踪预训练收敛状态的一个信号。
AI.conclusion: 注意力汇聚现象的形成由P0汇聚电路驱动，该机制在训练早期建立并逐渐固化，为理解LLM的结构性偏差提供了新视角，并为监控预训练过程提供了潜在指标。

title: Scaling Strategy, Not Compute: A Stand-Alone, Open-Source StarCraft II Benchmark for Accessible Reinforcement Learning Research
summary: The research community lacks a middle ground between StarCraft IIs full game and its mini-games. The full-games sprawling state-action space renders reward signals sparse and noisy, but in mini-games simple agents saturate performance. This complexity gap hinders steady curriculum design and prevents researchers from experimenting with modern Reinforcement Learning algorithms in RTS environments under realistic compute budgets. To fill this gap, we present the Two-Bridge Map Suite, the first entry in an open-source benchmark series we purposely engineered as an intermediate benchmark to sit between these extremes. By disabling economy mechanics such as resource collection, base building, and fog-of-war, the environment isolates two core tactical skills: long-range navigation and micro-combat. Preliminary experiments show that agents learn coherent maneuvering and engagement behaviors without imposing full-game computational costs. Two-Bridge is released as a lightweight, Gym-compatible wrapper on top of PySC2, with maps, wrappers, and reference scripts fully open-sourced to encourage broad adoption as a standard benchmark.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Two-Bridge Map Suite，一个介于StarCraft II完整游戏与迷你游戏之间的开源基准测试环境。通过禁用经济机制（资源采集、基地建设、战争迷雾），该环境专注于长期导航和微操作战两大核心战术技能，填补了现有基准测试的空白，为研究者提供了在合理计算预算下测试强化学习算法的中等复杂度平台。
AI.motivation: 现有的StarCraft II研究环境存在两极分化问题：完整游戏的状态-动作空间庞大，导致奖励信号稀疏且噪声大；而迷你游戏过于简单，简单智能体就能达到性能饱和。这种复杂性差距阻碍了课程设计的稳步推进，也使研究者难以在现实计算预算下在现代强化学习算法与RTS环境中进行实验。
AI.method: 研究团队设计了Two-Bridge Map Suite作为中间基准测试，通过禁用经济机制（资源采集、基地建设和战争迷雾）来简化环境，使其隔离并专注于两个核心战术技能：长期导航和微操作战。该环境基于PySC2构建，作为轻量级、Gym兼容的封装器发布，包含地图、封装器和参考脚本，完全开源。
AI.result: 初步实验表明，智能体能够学习到连贯的机动和交战行为，同时避免了完整游戏的计算成本。Two-Bridge成功地在简化环境和完整游戏之间建立了平衡，验证了作为中间基准测试的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Two-Bridge Map Suite成功填补了StarCraft II研究环境中的复杂性空白，为强化学习社区提供了一个标准化的中等复杂度基准测试平台。其开源、轻量级且易于集成的特性有望促进广泛采用，推动RTS环境下强化学习算法的研究进展。

title: Space-Control: Process-Level Isolation for Sharing CXL-based Disaggregated Memory
summary:
Memory disaggregation via Compute Express Link (CXL) enables multiple hosts to share remote memory, improving utilization for data-intensive workloads. Today, virtual memory enables process-level isolation on a host and CXL enables host-level isolation. This creates a critical security gap: the absence of process-level memory isolation in shared disaggregated memory.
  We present Space-Control, a hardware-software co-design that provides fine-grained, process-level isolation for shared disaggregated memory. Space-Control authenticates execution context in the hardware and enforces access control on every memory access and amortizes lookup times with a small cache. Our design allows up to 127 processes Simulation Toolkit (SST) based CXL model, Space-Control incurs minimal performance overhead of 3.3%, making shared disaggregated memory isolation practical.

AI.tldr: Space-Control提出了一种硬件-软件协同设计方案，通过在硬件中验证执行上下文并对每次内存访问实施访问控制，为共享 disaggregated memory 提供细粒度的进程级隔离，性能开销仅3.3%。
AI.motivation: CXL实现的内存分解（memory disaggregation）允许多主机共享远程内存，但存在关键安全缺口：虚拟内存仅提供主机内的进程级隔离，CXL仅提供主机级隔离，共享分解内存中缺乏进程级内存隔离机制。
AI.method: 提出Space-Control硬件-软件协同设计：在硬件中认证执行上下文（execution context），对每次内存访问实施访问控制，通过小型缓存分摊查找时间开销，支持最多127个进程。
AI.result: 基于SST（Simulation Toolkit）的CXL模型评估表明，Space-Control仅产生3.3%的最小性能开销，使共享分解内存隔离变得实用可行。
AI.conclusion: Space-Control成功填补了CXL共享分解内存中的进程级隔离安全缺口，以极低性能开销实现了实用的细粒度内存隔离方案。

title: Learning When to Cooperate Under Heterogeneous Goals
summary: A significant element of human cooperative intelligence lies in our ability to identify opportunities for fruitful collaboration; and conversely to recognise when the task at hand is better pursued alone. Research on flexible cooperation in machines has left this meta-level problem largely unexplored, despite its importance for successful collaboration in heterogeneous open-ended environments. Here, we extend the typical Ad Hoc Teamwork (AHT) setting to incorporate the idea of agents having heterogeneous goals that in any given scenario may or may not overlap. We introduce a novel approach to learning policies in this setting, based on a hierarchical combination of imitation and reinforcement learning, and show that it outperforms baseline methods across extended versions of two cooperative environments. We also investigate the contribution of an auxiliary component that learns to model teammates by predicting their actions, finding that its effect on performance is inversely related to the amount of observable information about teammate goals.

AI.tldr: 本文扩展了Ad Hoc Teamwork设置，引入异构目标场景，提出了一种结合模仿学习和强化学习的分层方法，使智能体能够学习何时合作、何时独立行动，并在实验中超越基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有灵活协作研究忽略了元层面问题：智能体需要识别何时适合合作、何时应该独立完成任务。这对于异构开放环境中的成功协作至关重要，但尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 1) 扩展AHT设置，引入异构目标（目标可能重叠也可能不重叠）；2) 提出分层方法，结合模仿学习和强化学习来学习策略；3) 引入辅助组件，通过预测队友行动来学习队友建模。
AI.result: 所提方法在两个协作环境的扩展版本上均超越基线方法；辅助组件（队友建模）对性能的贡献与可观察的队友目标信息量呈反比关系。
AI.conclusion: 该工作成功解决了异构目标场景下的协作决策问题，证明了分层模仿-强化学习方法的有效性，并揭示了队友建模组件在不同信息可得性条件下的作用机制。

title: Uber's Failover Architecture: Reconciling Reliability and Efficiency in Hyperscale Microservice Infrastructure
summary: Operating a global, real-time platform at Uber's scale requires infrastructure that is both resilient and cost-efficient. Historically, reliability was ensured through a costly 2x capacity model--each service provisioned to handle global traffic independently across two regions--leaving half the fleet idle. We present Uber's Failover Architecture (UFA), which replaces the uniform 2x model with a differentiated architecture aligned to business criticality. Critical services retain failover guarantees, while non-critical services opportunistically use failover buffer capacity reserved for critical services during steady state. During rare "full-peak" failovers, non-critical services are selectively preempted and rapidly restored, with differentiated Service-Level Agreements (SLAs) using on-demand capacity. Automated safeguards, including dependency analysis and regression gates, ensure critical services continue to function even while non-critical services are unavailable. The quantitative impact is significant: UFA reduces steady-state provisioning from 2x to 1.3x, raising utilization from ~20% to ~30% while sustaining 99.97% availability. To date, UFA has hardened over 4,000 unsafe dependencies, eliminated over one million CPU cores from a baseline of about four million cores.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Uber故障转移架构（UFA），通过差异化服务策略替代传统的2x冗余模型，将稳态资源配置从2x降至1.3x，利用率从约20%提升至约30%，同时保持99.97%的可用性，累计节省超过100万个CPU核心。
AI.motivation: Uber传统采用2x容量模型确保可靠性，即每个服务在两个区域独立配置以处理全球流量，导致一半资源闲置，成本高昂且资源利用率低下（约20%）。
AI.method: 提出Uber故障转移架构（UFA），采用差异化架构：关键服务保留故障转移保障，非关键服务在稳态时机会性使用为关键服务预留的缓冲容量；在罕见的"全峰值"故障转移期间，选择性抢占非关键服务并使用按需容量快速恢复；引入差异化SLA、依赖分析、回归门控等自动化保障机制确保关键服务持续运行。
AI.result: UFA将稳态资源配置从2x降至1.3x，利用率从约20%提升至约30%，保持99.97%可用性；已加固超过4,000个不安全依赖，在约400万核心基线上消除超过100万个CPU核心。
AI.conclusion: UFA通过业务关键性对齐的差异化架构，在保证关键服务可靠性的前提下显著提升了资源利用效率并降低了成本，证明了差异化故障转移策略在大规模全球实时平台中的有效性。

title: How the Graph Construction Technique Shapes Performance in IoT Botnet Detection
summary: The increasing incidence of IoT-based botnet attacks has driven interest in advanced learning models for detection. Recent efforts have focused on leveraging attention mechanisms to model long-range feature dependencies and Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) to capture relationships between data instances. Since GNNs require graph-structured input, tabular NetFlow data must be transformed accordingly. This study evaluates how the choice of the method for constructing the graph-structured dataset impacts the classification performance of a GNN model. Five methods--k-Nearest Neighbors, Mutual Nearest Neighbors, Shared Nearest Neighbor, Gabriel Graph, and epsilon-radius Graph--were evaluated in this research. To reduce the computational burden associated with high-dimensional data, a Variational Autoencoder (VAE) is employed to project the original features into a lower-dimensional latent space prior to graph generation. Subsequently, a Graph Attention Network (GAT) is trained on each graph to classify traffic in the N-BaIoT dataset into three categories: Normal, Mirai, and Gafgyt. The results indicate that using Gabriel graph achieves the highest detection performance with an accuracy of 97.56% while SNN recorded the lowest performance with an accuracy as low as 78.56%.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了图构建方法对GNN模型检测IoT僵尸网络攻击性能的影响，发现Gabriel图方法在N-BaIoT数据集上取得了97.56%的最高准确率，显著优于其他方法。
AI.motivation: 基于IoT的僵尸网络攻击日益增多，推动了先进学习模型在检测领域的应用。现有研究利用注意力机制建模长程特征依赖关系，使用图神经网络(GNN)捕获数据实例之间的关系。然而，GNN需要图结构输入，表格型NetFlow数据必须进行转换，而图构建方法的选择对分类性能的影响尚不明确。
AI.method: 1. 使用变分自编码器(VAE)将高维原始特征投影到低维潜在空间，降低计算负担；2. 评估五种图构建方法将表格数据转换为图结构：k近邻(KNN)、互近邻(MNN)、共享近邻(SNN)、Gabriel图和epsilon半径图；3. 在每个图上训练图注意力网络(GAT)对N-BaIoT数据集流量进行分类，分为正常、Mirai和Gafgyt三类。
AI.result: 不同图构建方法对GNN检测性能影响显著。Gabriel图方法表现最佳，准确率达97.56%；共享近邻(SNN)方法表现最差，准确率仅为78.56%。各方法之间存在约19个百分点的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: 图构建方法的选择对基于GNN的IoT僵尸网络检测性能具有重大影响。Gabriel图方法最适合此类任务，能够有效捕获数据实例间的关系，实现高精度分类。研究为实际部署中选择合适的图构建方法提供了实证依据。

title: Robotic Foundation Models for Industrial Control: A Comprehensive Survey and Readiness Assessment Framework
summary: Robotic foundation models (RFMs) are emerging as a promising route towards flexible, instruction- and demonstration-driven robot control, however, a critical investigation of their industrial applicability is still lacking. This survey gives an extensive overview over the RFM-landscape and analyses, driven by concrete implications, how industrial domains and use cases shape the requirements of RFMs, with particular focus on collaborative robot platforms, heterogeneous sensing and actuation, edge-computing constraints, and safety-critical operation. We synthesise industrial deployment perspectives into eleven interdependent implications and operationalise them into an assessment framework comprising a catalogue of 149 concrete criteria, spanning both model capabilities and ecosystem requirements. Using this framework, we evaluate 324 manipulation-capable RFMs via 48,276 criterion-level decisions obtained via a conservative LLM-assisted evaluation pipeline, validated against expert judgements. The results indicate that industrial maturity is limited and uneven: even the highest-rated models satisfy only a fraction of criteria and typically exhibit narrow implication-specific peaks rather than integrated coverage. We conclude that progress towards industry-grade RFMs depends less on isolated benchmark successes than on systematic incorporation of safety, real-time feasibility, robust perception, interaction, and cost-effective system integration into auditable deployment stacks.

AI.tldr: 本综述系统评估了机器人基础模型（RFMs）的工业应用前景，建立了包含149项评估标准的框架，对324个操控类RFM进行了分析，发现当前模型工业成熟度有限且不均衡，需在安全性、实时性、鲁棒感知等方面进行系统性改进。
AI.motivation: 机器人基础模型（RFMs）被视为实现灵活、指令和演示驱动机器人控制的有前景路径，但缺乏对其工业适用性的关键研究。工业领域和用例对RFMs提出了特定要求，包括协作机器人平台、异构感知与执行、边缘计算约束和安全关键操作，亟需系统评估当前RFMs是否满足这些工业需求。
AI.method: 提出了一套综合评估框架：1）将工业部署视角综合为11个相互依赖的影响因素；2）将这些因素操作化为包含149项具体标准的评估目录，涵盖模型能力和生态系统要求；3）使用保守的LLM辅助评估流程，通过48,276个标准级别决策对324个具备操控能力的RFMs进行评估；4）通过专家判断验证评估结果的有效性。
AI.result: 评估结果显示工业成熟度有限且不均衡：即使评分最高的模型也仅满足一小部分标准，且通常表现出狭窄的特定影响峰值，而非集成覆盖。模型在工业应用中存在明显的能力缺口，缺乏对工业环境中关键需求的全面支持。
AI.conclusion: 工业级RFMs的进步较少依赖于孤立的基准测试成功，而更多取决于将安全性、实时可行性、鲁棒感知、交互和成本效益系统集成系统地纳入可审计的部署堆栈中。需要从单一性能优化转向系统性的工业需求整合。

title: FuzzingRL: Reinforcement Fuzz-Testing for Revealing VLM Failures
comment: 18 pages, 4 figures. † These authors jointly supervised this work: Jiageng Mao and Yue Wang
summary: Vision Language Models (VLMs) are prone to errors, and identifying where these errors occur is critical for ensuring the reliability and safety of AI systems. In this paper, we propose an approach that automatically generates questions designed to deliberately induce incorrect responses from VLMs, thereby revealing their vulnerabilities. The core of this approach lies in fuzz testing and reinforcement finetuning: we transform a single input query into a large set of diverse variants through vision and language fuzzing. Based on the fuzzing outcomes, the question generator is further instructed by adversarial reinforcement fine-tuning to produce increasingly challenging queries that trigger model failures. With this approach, we can consistently drive down a target VLM's answer accuracy -- for example, the accuracy of Qwen2.5-VL-32B on our generated questions drops from 86.58\% to 65.53\% in four RL iterations. Moreover, a fuzzing policy trained against a single target VLM transfers to multiple other VLMs, producing challenging queries that degrade their performance as well.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合模糊测试和对抗强化微调的方法，自动生成旨在诱导视觉语言模型（VLM）出错的问题，从而揭示模型漏洞。实验表明该方法能显著降低目标模型准确率（如Qwen2.5-VL-32B从86.58%降至65.53%），且针对单一模型训练的策略具有良好的跨模型迁移性。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型容易产生错误，而识别这些错误发生的位置对于确保AI系统的可靠性和安全性至关重要。现有方法缺乏系统性地发现VLM脆弱性和失败模式的有效手段，因此需要一种能够主动揭示模型漏洞的自动化测试方法。
AI.method: 该方法核心包含两个部分：（1）视觉和语言模糊测试：将单个输入查询转化为大量多样化的变体；（2）对抗强化微调：基于模糊测试的结果，通过强化学习训练问题生成器，使其生成越来越具有挑战性的查询来触发模型失败。通过迭代优化，生成器能够持续产生更难的问题。
AI.result: 在四个强化学习迭代中，成功将Qwen2.5-VL-32B模型的准确率从86.58%降低至65.53%。更重要的是，针对单一目标VLM训练的模糊测试策略可以迁移到多个其他VLM上，生成的挑战性查询同样能够降低这些模型的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的模糊测试结合对抗强化微调的方法能够有效发现VLM的脆弱性，通过自动生成具有挑战性的问题显著降低模型准确率，且具有良好的跨模型泛化能力，为VLM的可靠性测试和安全评估提供了有效工具。

title: MultiGen: Level-Design for Editable Multiplayer Worlds in Diffusion Game Engines
summary: Video world models have shown immense promise for interactive simulation and entertainment, but current systems still struggle with two important aspects of interactivity: user control over the environment for reproducible, editable experiences, and shared inference where players hold influence over a common world. To address these limitations, we introduce an explicit external memory into the system, a persistent state operating independent of the model's context window, that is continually updated by user actions and queried throughout the generation roll-out. Unlike conventional diffusion game engines that operate as next-frame predictors, our approach decomposes generation into Memory, Observation, and Dynamics modules. This design gives users direct, editable control over environment structure via an editable memory representation, and it naturally extends to real-time multiplayer rollouts with coherent viewpoints and consistent cross-player interactions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种引入显式外部记忆的视频世界模型，通过将生成过程分解为记忆、观察和动态三个模块，实现了用户对环境的可控编辑以及多玩家共享推理。
AI.motivation: 当前视频世界模型在交互性方面存在两个主要局限：用户对环境的可控性不足，难以实现可复现和可编辑的体验；以及无法支持多玩家在共享世界中协同推理。
AI.method: 引入独立于模型上下文窗口的显式外部记忆机制，该记忆由用户动作持续更新并在生成过程中被查询。将生成过程分解为三个模块：记忆模块（Memory）负责维护持久状态，观察模块（Observation）处理感知输入，动态模块（Dynamics）负责推演环境变化。
AI.result: 该方法使用户能够通过可编辑的记忆表示直接控制环境结构，并自然扩展至实时多玩家场景，实现视角一致且跨玩家交互协调的生成效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入显式外部记忆和模块化设计，有效解决了视频世界模型中的用户可控性与多人共享推理问题，为交互式仿真和娱乐应用提供了新的技术路径。

title: Mozart: Modularized and Efficient MoE Training on 3.5D Wafer-Scale Chiplet Architectures
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture offers enhanced efficiency for Large Language Models (LLMs) with modularized computation, yet its inherent sparsity poses significant hardware deployment challenges, including memory locality issues, communication overhead, and inefficient computing resource utilization. Inspired by the modular organization of the human brain, we propose Mozart, a novel algorithm-hardware co-design framework tailored for efficient training of MoE-based LLMs on 3.5D wafer-scale chiplet architectures. On the algorithm side, Mozart exploits the inherent modularity of chiplets and introduces: (1) an expert allocation strategy that enables efficient on-package all-to-all communication, and (2) a fine-grained scheduling mechanism that improves communication-computation overlap through streaming tokens and experts. On the architecture side, Mozart adaptively co-locates heterogeneous modules on specialized chiplets with a 2.5D NoP-Tree topology and hierarchical memory structure. Evaluation across three popular MoE models demonstrates significant efficiency gains, enabling more effective parallelization and resource utilization for large-scale modularized MoE-LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Mozart框架，一种针对3.5D晶圆级芯粒架构的算法-硬件协同设计方案，旨在解决混合专家(MoE)模型在大语言模型训练中的稀疏性问题，通过专家分配策略和细粒度调度机制优化通信与计算，显著提升了资源利用率和并行效率。
AI.motivation: 混合专家(MoE)架构虽然为大型语言模型提供了模块化计算的高效性，但其固有的稀疏性在硬件部署中带来了严重的挑战，包括内存局部性问题、通信开销高以及计算资源利用效率低下。受人类大脑模块化组织的启发，作者希望解决这些硬件部署瓶颈。
AI.method: Mozart采用算法-硬件协同设计方法。在算法层面，利用芯粒的固有模块化特性，引入：(1)专家分配策略，实现高效的封装内全对全通信；(2)细粒度调度机制，通过流式令牌和专家改善通信-计算重叠。在架构层面，采用2.5D NoP-Tree拓扑和层次化内存结构，将异构模块自适应地协同定位在专用芯粒上。
AI.result: 在三种流行的MoE模型上的评估表明，Mozart实现了显著的效率提升，能够更有效地实现大规模模块化MoE-LLMs的并行化和资源利用。
AI.conclusion: Mozart框架成功解决了MoE架构在硬件部署中的稀疏性挑战，通过算法与架构的协同优化，为大规模MoE-LLMs的训练提供了一种高效的解决方案，显著提升了并行化能力和资源利用率。

title: Modeling the Senegalese artisanal fisheries migrations
summary: The North-West African coast is enriched by the Canary current, which sustain a very produc- tive marine ecosystem. The Senegalese artisanal fishing fleet, the largest in West Africa, ben- efit from this particularly productive ecosystem. It has survived the ages with remarkable adaptability, and has great flexibility allowing it to react quickly to changes, in particular by changing fishing gear and performing migrations. However, since the 1980s, the increasing fishing effort led to a progressive fish depletion, increasing fisher's migration distances to access new fishing grounds. Since 2007 many fishers even started to navigate to Canary archi- pelago in order to find a more lucrative job in Europe, carrying candidate to emigration in their canoes. This phenomenon further increased since 2022 due to a new drop in fishery yields, consecutive to the development of fishmeal factories along the coast that amplified overfishing. Climate change may also impact fish habitat, and by consequence the distribution of fishing grounds. The question addressed in this research was how climate change, fishing effort and socio-economic parameters interact and determine the artisanal fishery dynamics. An interdisciplinary approach allowed us to collect data and qualitative information on cli- mate, fishing effort and socio-economic parameters. This served as a basis to build a multi- agent model of the mobility of Senegalese artisanal fishing. We implemented a first version of the model and presented some preliminary simulations with contrasted fishing effort and climate scenario. The results suggested that first, climate change should have only a slight impact on artisanal fishing, even in the most extreme climate scenario considered. Second, if fishing effort was maintained at current levels, we found a collapse of the fishery with massive fishers migrations whatever the climate scenario. Third, with reduced fishing effort, a sustain- able fishery equilibrium emerges in which Senegal's artisanal fishery catches ~250,000 tons of fish a year mostly in Senegal, approaching the 2000s catches records. This sustainable equi- librium maintained with the two-climate change scenario tested. Fishers migrations provide clues of the fish populations state and have implications for the sustainable exploitation of fishing resources. Senegalese artisanal fishers' migrations impact the regional distribution of the fishing effort, therefore must be taken into account in regional development and planning policies for this sector, particularly in a context of increasing infrastructure and spatial man- agement measures (e.g. marine protected areas). This work lays the foundations of a computer simulation tool for decision support.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过多智能体模型模拟塞内加尔手工渔业动态，发现过度捕捞是渔业崩溃的主因，气候变化影响较小；降低捕捞强度可实现可持续渔业平衡，年捕捞量约25万吨，为区域渔业管理提供决策支持工具。
AI.motivation: 塞内加尔手工渔业是西非最大的船队，依赖加那利洋流支撑的高生产力海洋生态系统。但自1980年代以来，捕捞强度增加导致鱼类资源逐步枯竭，渔民不得不迁移更远寻找新渔场。自2007年起，许多渔民甚至开始前往加那利群岛寻求更有利可图的工作。2022年鱼粉工厂的发展进一步加剧了过度捕捞，同时气候变化可能影响鱼类栖息地和渔场分布。研究旨在探究气候变化、捕捞努力量和社会经济参数如何相互作用并决定手工渔业动态。
AI.method: 采用跨学科方法收集气候、捕捞努力量和社会经济参数的数据及定性信息，以此为基础构建塞内加尔手工渔业流动性的多智能体模型（multi-agent model）。实施了模型的初版，并在不同的捕捞努力量和气候情景下进行了初步模拟。
AI.result: 模拟结果表明：（1）即使在极端气候情景下，气候变化对手工渔业的影响也很轻微；（2）若维持当前捕捞努力量，无论气候情景如何，渔业都会崩溃并导致大规模渔民迁移；（3）若降低捕捞努力量，可出现可持续的渔业平衡，年捕捞量约25万吨，主要在塞内加尔境内，接近2000年代的捕捞记录，且该平衡在测试的两种气候变化情景下都能维持。渔民迁移反映了鱼类种群状态，对渔业资源的可持续开发具有重要影响。
AI.conclusion: 塞内加尔手工渔民的迁移影响区域捕捞努力量的分布，因此必须在区域发展规划和政策中加以考虑，特别是在基础设施和空间管理措施（如海洋保护区）日益增加的背景下。本研究为决策支持奠定了计算机模拟工具的基础。

title: Link Wars: The Semantic Crisis. Is the debate over or is it just beginning?
summary: For fifty years, networking has fragmented whenever new workloads exposed hidden assumptions about time, ordering, failure, and trust. This paper argues that the current interconnect landscape -- NVLink, UALink, Ultra Ethernet, AELink/Aethernet, TTPoE, and classical RDMA -- suffers from a semantic crisis: vendor-specific divergence disguised as optimization. We trace this crisis to the Forward-In-Time-Only (FITO) category mistake embedded in every major fabric stack, and show how each pathology -- aspirational RDMA completion, fire-and-forget GPU semantics, opaque proprietary stacks, incompatible multi-cloud ordering, universal fencing -- arises from the same failure to define explicit, testable link semantics from APIs to bits on the wire. We conjecture that RDMA achieves reliability through universal fencing that collapses concurrency into serialized checkpoints, and that precise minimal semantics can maintain correctness without global barriers, as superscalar architectures separated execution from retirement. We describe how Open Atomic Ethernet (OAE) under the Open Compute Project addresses the crisis through bilateral transaction primitives with explicit ordering, completion, and failure visibility. Drawing on Helland's analysis of scalable OLTP isolation (the "BIG DEAL"), we show the crisis pervades the entire stack. We assess whether convergence on a single open standard is still possible or whether fragmentation is now structural.

AI.tldr: 本文指出网络互连技术（如NVLink、RDMA等）因缺乏显式、可测试的链路语义而陷入语义危机，根源在于"仅前向时间"（FITO）分类错误；提出开放原子以太网（OAE）通过双边事务原语解决该问题，并探讨统一标准是否仍可行。
AI.motivation: 过去五十年中，每当新工作负载暴露出关于时间、顺序、故障和信任的隐含假设时，网络就会出现分裂。当前互连技术领域（NVLink、UALink、Ultra Ethernet等）存在语义危机：厂商特定的分歧被伪装成优化，导致碎片化。作者旨在揭示这一危机的根源，并探索统一开放标准的可能性。
AI.method: 1) 追溯危机根源到所有主要结构栈中嵌入的FITO（Forward-In-Time-Only）分类错误；2) 分析五种典型病理：期望式RDMA完成、即发即弃GPU语义、不透明的专有栈、不兼容的多云顺序、通用栅栏；3) 借鉴Helland的可扩展OLTP隔离分析（"BIG DEAL"），验证危机贯穿整个协议栈；4) 介绍开放原子以太网（OAE）如何通过双边事务原语提供显式的顺序、完成和故障可见性。
AI.result: 1) 揭示当前互连技术的各种病理均源于同一根本问题：未能定义从API到线路比特的显式、可测试链路语义；2) 推测RDMA通过通用栅栏机制实现可靠性，但代价是将并发退化为串行化检查点；3) 类比超标量架构将执行与退休分离，证明精确的最小语义可在无全局屏障下保持正确性；4) OAE通过显式语义提供了系统性解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 互连技术的语义危机已渗透至整个协议栈，源于FITO分类错误导致的隐含假设。OAE通过双边事务原语提供了正确方向，但能否收敛至单一开放标准仍不确定，碎片化可能已结构性固化。

title: Demonstration of a 1.2 Gbps Always-on Fully-Connected Mesh Network with RFSoC SDRs
summary: We design and implement on Radio Frequency System-on-Chip (RFSoC) software-defined radios (SDRs) a complete-graph network of four unmanned aerial vehicles and demonstrate real-time 4K video streaming over twelve always-on 2x2 multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) links. The testbed operates at an aggregate network throughput of approximately 1.2 Gbps (i.e., 12 links of 99.84 Mbps) across a shared bandwidth of 200 MHz. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first demonstration of low-latency digitally controlled frequency-division duplex (FDD) RFSoC-based MIMO wireless links capable of simultaneously supporting multiple real-time, uncompressed 4K video streams. The testbed consists of four AMD/Xilinx Zynq UltraScale+ RFSoC ZCU111 evaluation kits configured as a fully-connected mesh network with custom-built physical and medium-access-control layers, adaptive equalization, and adjacent-band filtering implemented entirely in RFSoC's programmable logic. A host-side graphical user interface (GUI) provides real-time visualization of each link's performance including error vector magnitude (EVM), pre-detection signal-to-interference-plus-noise ratio (SINR), and bit error rate (BER), and enables dynamic reconfiguration of link parameters during operation.

AI.tldr: 本文在RFSoC软件定义无线电平台上实现了四无人机全连接mesh网络，首次展示了基于FDD的MIMO无线链路同时支持多路实时无压缩4K视频流，在200MHz带宽下实现约1.2Gbps吞吐量。
AI.motivation: 旨在演示低延迟数字控制FDD RFSoC MIMO无线链路能够同时支持多路实时无压缩4K视频流的能力，填补该领域的技术空白。
AI.method: 使用四块AMD/Xilinx Zynq UltraScale+ RFSoC ZCU111评估板构建全连接mesh网络，在RFSoC可编程逻辑中实现自定义物理层和MAC层、自适应均衡及邻带滤波，并开发主机端GUI实现链路性能实时可视化和参数动态重配置。
AI.result: 成功建立12条始终在线的2x2 MIMO链路，在200MHz共享带宽下实现约1.2Gbps总网络吞吐量（每链路99.84Mbps），实时传输多路无压缩4K视频流，GUI实时显示EVM、SINR和BER等性能指标。
AI.conclusion: 首次验证了基于RFSoC的FDD MIMO系统可同时支持多路实时无压缩4K视频流，展示了SDR在高速无人机网络通信中的应用潜力。

title: Gradient-based Nested Co-Design of Aerodynamic Shape and Control for Winged Robots
summary: Designing aerial robots for specialized tasks, from perching to payload delivery, requires tailoring their aerodynamic shape to specific mission requirements. For tasks involving wide flight envelopes, the usual sequential process of first determining the shape and then the motion planner is likely to be suboptimal due to the inherent nonlinear interactions between them. This limitation has been motivating co-design research, which involves jointly optimizing the aerodynamic shape and the motion planner. In this paper, we present a general-purpose, gradient-based, nested co-design framework where the motion planner solves an optimal control problem and the aerodynamic forces used in the dynamics model are determined by a neural surrogate model. This enables us to model complex subsonic flow conditions encountered in aerial robotics and to overcome the limited applicability of existing co-design methods. These limitations stem from the simplifying assumptions they require for computational tractability to either the planner or the aerodynamics. We validate our method on two complex dynamic tasks for fixed-wing gliders: perching and a short landing. Our optimized designs improve task performance compared to an evolutionary baseline in a fraction of the computation time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于梯度的嵌套协同设计框架，通过联合优化气动外形和运动规划器，解决了传统顺序设计方法在宽飞行包络任务中的次优问题，并在固定翼滑翔机的栖息和短距着陆任务中验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统的空中机器人设计采用顺序流程，即先确定气动外形再设计运动规划器。然而，对于涉及宽飞行包络的任务，这种顺序方法往往导致次优解，因为气动外形与运动规划之间存在固有的非线性相互作用。这一局限性推动了协同设计研究的发展，即同时优化气动外形和运动规划器。现有协同设计方法受限于计算可行性，通常需要对规划器或空气动力学模型进行简化假设，限制了其适用范围。
AI.method: 提出了一种通用的、基于梯度的嵌套协同设计框架。该框架包含两层优化：外层优化气动外形，内层运动规划器求解最优控制问题。关键创新在于使用神经网络代理模型来计算动力学模型中的气动力，能够建模空中机器人遇到的复杂亚音速流动条件，克服了现有方法需要简化假设的限制。这种基于梯度的方法允许高效地同时优化外形参数和运动轨迹。
AI.result: 在两个复杂的固定翼滑翔机动态任务上验证了该方法：栖息任务和短距着陆任务。优化后的设计在任务性能上优于进化算法基线方法，同时计算时间仅为后者的一小部分。这证明了该框架能够有效处理复杂的空气动力学条件，并在合理计算成本下获得高质量的设计方案。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功开发了一个通用的协同设计框架，能够处理空中机器人设计中的复杂空气动力学问题。通过神经网络代理模型和基于梯度的优化方法，克服了现有方法的局限性，实现了气动外形与运动规划的联合优化。该方法在计算效率和设计质量方面均表现出显著优势，为宽飞行包络任务中的空中机器人设计提供了有效工具。

title: Switchable Activation Networks
summary: Deep neural networks, and more recently large-scale generative models such as large language models (LLMs) and large vision-action models (LVAs), achieve remarkable performance across diverse domains, yet their prohibitive computational cost hinders deployment in resource-constrained environments. Existing efficiency techniques offer only partial remedies: dropout improves regularization during training but leaves inference unchanged, while pruning and low-rank factorization compress models post hoc into static forms with limited adaptability. Here we introduce SWAN (Switchable Activation Networks), a framework that equips each neural unit with a deterministic, input-dependent binary gate, enabling the network to learn when a unit should be active or inactive. This dynamic control mechanism allocates computation adaptively, reducing redundancy while preserving accuracy. Unlike traditional pruning, SWAN does not simply shrink networks after training; instead, it learns structured, context-dependent activation patterns that support both efficient dynamic inference and conversion into compact dense models for deployment. By reframing efficiency as a problem of learned activation control, SWAN unifies the strengths of sparsity, pruning, and adaptive inference within a single paradigm. Beyond computational gains, this perspective suggests a more general principle of neural computation, where activation is not fixed but context-dependent, pointing toward sustainable AI, edge intelligence, and future architectures inspired by the adaptability of biological brains.

AI.tldr: 提出SWAN框架，通过为每个神经单元配备可学习的输入依赖二元门控，实现动态自适应的计算分配，统一了稀疏化、剪枝和自适应推理的优势，在保持精度的同时降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络和大模型计算成本高昂，难以部署在资源受限环境中；现有效率技术如dropout、剪枝和低秩分解存在局限性——或仅改善训练不改变推理，或产生静态形式缺乏适应性。
AI.method: 引入SWAN（Switchable Activation Networks）框架，为每个神经单元配备确定性、输入依赖的二元门控，使网络学习单元在特定上下文中应激活或休眠，从而实现动态计算分配。该方法不依赖后处理剪枝，而是学习结构化、上下文依赖的激活模式。
AI.result: SWAN成功学习到结构化的激活控制机制，能够减少冗余计算同时保持模型精度，支持高效动态推理并可转换为紧凑的密集模型用于部署。
AI.conclusion: SWAN将效率问题重新定义为学习的激活控制问题，统一了稀疏化、剪枝和自适应推理范式；该视角揭示了神经计算的一般原则——激活应具上下文依赖性，为可持续AI、边缘智能及受生物大脑启发的架构设计指明方向。

title: Best-of-Tails: Bridging Optimism and Pessimism in Inference-Time Alignment
summary: Inference-time alignment effectively steers large language models (LLMs) by generating multiple candidates from a reference model and selecting among them with an imperfect reward model. However, current strategies face a fundamental dilemma: ``optimistic'' approaches like Best-of-$N$ suffer from reward hacking, while ``pessimistic'' regularized methods often stifle the exploration needed to discover high-quality responses. In this work, we formalize this trade-off through the lens of regret minimization, demonstrating that the optimal strategy depends critically on the tail behavior of the reward distribution. We show theoretically that light-tailed regimes favor optimism to unearth high-quality outliers, whereas heavy-tailed regimes require pessimism to guard against reward mis-calibration in the extremes. Guided by this insight, we introduce Best-of-Tails (BoT), an adaptive inference-time alignment framework that uses Tsallis divergence as a tunable regularizer to provide a finer granularity of interpolation between these extremes. BoT uses the Hill estimator to characterize reward-tail heaviness on a per-prompt basis and dynamically adjusts its selection rule to balance exploration gains against alignment error. Across math, multiple-choice reasoning, and human-preference evaluations, BoT improves alignment performance across a range of reference and reward model configurations relative to fixed-strategy baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Best-of-Tails (BoT)框架，通过分析奖励分布的尾部特性来自适应调整推理时对齐策略，解决了现有方法中乐观策略的奖励黑客问题与悲观策略的探索不足问题之间的权衡困境。
AI.motivation: 当前的推理时对齐方法面临一个基本困境：乐观方法（如Best-of-N）容易遭受奖励黑客攻击，而悲观正则化方法则会抑制探索高回复所需的探索能力。需要一种能够根据具体情况自适应平衡这两种极端的方法。
AI.method: 通过遗憾最小化视角形式化这一权衡，证明最优策略取决于奖励分布的尾部行为：轻尾分布适合乐观策略以发现高质量异常值，重尾分布需要悲观策略以防止极端情况下的奖励误校准。提出Best-of-Tails (BoT)框架，使用Tsallis散度作为可调正则化器，利用Hill估计器逐提示表征奖励尾部重度，动态调整选择规则以平衡探索收益与对齐误差。
AI.result: 在数学、多选题推理和人类偏好评估任务上，BoT在各种参考模型和奖励模型配置下相比固定策略基线均提升了性能表现，证明了自适应策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 奖励分布的尾部行为是决定推理时对齐策略选择的关键因素，基于此洞察提出的自适应框架BoT能够有效平衡探索与对齐误差，为LLM的推理时对齐提供了新的理论指导和实践方案。

title: Accelerating Diffusion Models for Generative AI Applications with Silicon Photonics
summary: Diffusion models have revolutionized generative AI, with their inherent capacity to generate highly realistic state-of-the-art synthetic data. However, these models employ an iterative denoising process over computationally intensive layers such as UNets and attention mechanisms. This results in high inference energy on conventional electronic platforms, and thus, there is an emerging need to accelerate these models in a sustainable manner. To address this challenge, we present a novel silicon photonics-based accelerator for diffusion models. Experimental evaluations demonstrate that our photonic accelerator achieves at least 3x better energy efficiency and 5.5x throughput improvement compared to state-of-the-art diffusion model accelerators.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于硅光子学的扩散模型加速器，相比现有最优方案，实现了至少3倍的能效提升和5.5倍的吞吐量提升。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在生成式AI领域表现卓越，但其迭代去噪过程涉及计算密集型架构（如UNet和注意力机制），在传统电子平台上导致高推理能耗，亟需可持续的加速方案。
AI.method: 设计并实现了一种新型的基于硅光子学的硬件加速器，专门针对扩散模型的计算特点进行优化。
AI.result: 实验评估表明，该光子加速器相比现有最先进的扩散模型加速器，实现了至少3倍的能效提升和5.5倍的吞吐量提升。
AI.conclusion: 硅光子学技术为加速扩散模型提供了一种高效、可持续的解决方案，显著提升了能效和吞吐量，具有广阔的应用前景。

title: Less is More: Robust Zero-Communication 3D Pursuit-Evasion via Representational Parsimony
comment: 7 pages, 10 figures. This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Asymmetric 3D pursuit-evasion in cluttered voxel environments is difficult under communication latency, partial observability, and nonholonomic maneuver limits. While many MARL methods rely on richer inter-agent coupling or centralized signals, these dependencies can become fragility sources when communication is delayed or noisy. Building on an inherited path-guided decentralized pursuit scaffold, we study a robustness-oriented question: can representational parsimony improve communication-free coordination? We instantiate this principle with (i) a parsimonious actor observation interface that removes team-coupled channels (83-D to 50-D), and (ii) Contribution-Gated Credit Assignment (CGCA), a locality-aware credit structure for communication-denied cooperation. In Stage-5 evaluation (4 pursuers vs. 1 evader), our configuration reaches 0.753 +/- 0.091 success and 0.223 +/- 0.066 collision, outperforming the 83-D FULL OBS counterpart (0.721 +/- 0.071, 0.253 +/- 0.089). It further shows graceful degradation under speed/yaw/noise/delay stress tests and resilient zero-shot transfer on urban-canyon maps (about 61% success at density 0.24). These results support a practical paradigm shift: explicitly severing redundant cross-agent channels can suppress compounding error cascades and improve robustness in latency-prone deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于表示简约性的去中心化追逃方法，通过移除冗余的智能体间耦合通道并引入贡献门控信用分配机制，在通信受限的3D复杂环境中实现了更鲁棒的多智能体协作。
AI.motivation: 现有多智能体强化学习方法通常依赖丰富的智能体间耦合或中心化信号，但在通信延迟、噪声或拒绝的情况下，这些依赖会成为系统脆弱性来源。研究旨在探索：表示简约性能否在无通信条件下改善多智能体协调的鲁棒性。
AI.method: （1）设计简约型智能体观测接口，将观测空间从83维缩减至50维，移除团队耦合通道；（2）提出贡献门控信用分配（CGCA）机制，这是一种局部感知的信用结构，专为通信拒绝环境下的协作设计。方法基于继承的路径引导去中心化追逃框架。
AI.result: 在第5阶段评估（4追捕者vs1逃避者）中，该方法达到0.753±0.091成功率和0.223±0.066碰撞率，优于83维全观测基线（0.721±0.071，0.253±0.089）。在速度/偏航/噪声/延迟压力测试下表现出优雅的性能退化，并在城市峡谷地图上展现了弹性的零样本迁移能力（密度0.24时约61%成功率）。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果支持一个实用范式转变：显式切断冗余的跨智能体通道可以抑制复合错误级联，提高延迟易发部署场景下的鲁棒性，为通信受限环境下的多智能体协作提供了新思路。

title: Agentic AI-Driven UAV Network Deployment: A LLM-Enhanced Exact Potential Game Approach
summary: Unmanned Aerial Vehicular Networks (UAVNs) are envisioned to provide flexible connectivity, wide-area coverage, and low-latency services in dynamic environments. From an agentic artificial intelligence (Agentic AI) perspective, UAVNs naturally operate as multi-agent systems, where autonomous UAVs act as intelligent agents that coordinate deployment and networking decisions to achieve global performance objectives. However, the strong coupling between discrete link decisions and continuous deployment parameters makes UAVN topology optimization a mixed-integer nonconvex problem, resulting in challenges in scalability, efficiency, and solution consistency under dynamic network conditions. This paper proposes a dual spatial-scale UAVN topology optimization framework based on exact potential games (EPGs), enhanced by Agentic AI. At the large spatial scale, a log-linear learning based EPG (L3-EPG) algorithm is developed to optimize inter-UAV link configurations, enabling sparse yet connected network topologies while reducing redundant links and interference. At the small spatial scale, an approximate gradient based EPG (AG-EPG) algorithm jointly optimizes UAV deployment, transmission power allocation, and ground user (GU) association to improve network throughput and latency. To further enhance adaptability across heterogeneous scenarios, a large language model (LLM) is incorporated as a knowledge-driven decision enhancer to automatically generate utility weights according to network characteristics, alleviating reliance on manual parameter tuning. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed framework consistently outperforms baseline methods in terms of energy consumption, end-to-end latency, and system throughput.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于精确势博弈和智能体AI的双空间尺度无人机网络拓扑优化框架，在大空间尺度优化链路配置，在小空间尺度联合优化部署、功率和用户关联，并引入大语言模型自动生成效用权重，实现了能耗、时延和吞吐量的全面提升。
AI.motivation: 无人机网络(UAVNs)作为多智能体系统具有灵活连接和广覆盖优势，但其拓扑优化面临离散链路决策与连续部署参数强耦合导致的混合整数非凸问题，在动态环境下存在可扩展性差、效率低和解一致性不足等挑战。
AI.method: 提出双空间尺度优化框架：大空间尺度采用基于对数线性学习的精确势博弈(L3-EPG)算法优化链路配置以实现稀疏连通拓扑；小空间尺度采用基于近似梯度的精确势博弈(AG-EPG)算法联合优化UAV部署、功率分配和地面用户关联；引入大语言模型作为知识驱动决策增强器，根据网络特征自动生成效用权重。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，所提框架在能耗、端到端时延和系统吞吐量方面均持续优于基准方法，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功解决了UAVN拓扑优化中的混合整数非凸问题，通过精确势博弈理论结合智能体AI实现高效可扩展的优化，LLM的引入增强了异构场景下的自适应能力并减少了人工参数调节依赖。

title: SDN-SYN PoW: Intent-Aware Adaptive SDN Defense with PoW Against multi-domain SYN Floods
summary: The stability of Internet services is persistently challenged by the escalating scale of volumetric TCP SYN floods, as conventional defenses like SYN Cookies fail by exacerbating bandwidth depletion under modern attacks. This paper introduces SDN-SYN PoW, a novel defense architecture that synergizes non-interactive Proof-of-Work with a Software-Defined Networking (SDN) control plane, an approach particularly effective for securing the network edge in modern SD-WAN deployments. The core innovation is its ability to perform global network sensing; the SDN controller monitors real-time traffic to dynamically adjust PoW difficulty, transforming the defense from a static mechanism into an intelligent, adaptive system that surgically applies computational costs only to anomalous sources. Through rigorous experiments on a custom-built testbed, we demonstrate that SDN-SYN PoW provides substantially superior protection and, critically, that the PoW overhead remains negligible for legitimate clients, ensuring compatibility even with low-power devices.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SDN-SYN PoW，一种结合非交互式工作量证明与SDN控制平面的TCP SYN洪泛防御架构，通过全局网络感知动态调整PoW难度，实现了对现代大规模攻击的有效防御且对合法客户端开销极低。
AI.motivation: 随着大规模TCP SYN洪泛攻击的不断升级，传统防御机制（如SYN Cookies）在现代攻击场景下失效，甚至会加剧带宽耗尽问题，亟需一种能够适应现代SD-WAN部署环境、在网络边缘有效防御的新型解决方案。
AI.method: 提出SDN-SYN PoW架构，将非交互式工作量证明与SDN控制平面相结合。核心创新在于全局网络感知能力：SDN控制器实时监控流量，动态调整PoW难度，将防御从静态机制转变为智能自适应系统，仅对异常来源精准施加计算成本。
AI.result: 在自定义测试床上进行的严格实验表明，SDN-SYN PoW提供了显著优于传统方法的保护能力；关键在于，PoW开销对合法客户端而言可忽略不计，确保了与低功耗设备的兼容性。
AI.conclusion: SDN-SYN PoW通过SDN的全局感知能力与非交互式PoW的协同作用，成功解决了传统防御机制在面对现代大规模TCP SYN洪泛攻击时的局限性，实现了高效、自适应且对合法用户友好的网络边缘防护方案。

title: Stability-Guided Exploration for Diverse Motion Generation
summary: Scaling up datasets is highly effective in improving the performance of deep learning models, including in the field of robot learning. However, data collection still proves to be a bottleneck. Approaches relying on collecting human demonstrations are labor-intensive and inherently limited: they tend to be narrow, task-specific, and fail to adequately explore the full space of feasible states. Synthetic data generation could remedy this, but current techniques mostly rely on local trajectory optimization and fail to find diverse solutions. In this work, we propose a novel method capable of finding diverse long-horizon manipulations through black-box simulation. We achieve this by combining an RRT-style search with sampling-based MPC, together with a novel sampling scheme that guides the exploration toward stable configurations. Specifically, we sample from a manifold of stable states while growing a search tree directly through simulation, without restricting the planner to purely stable motions. We demonstrate the method's ability to discover diverse manipulation strategies, including pushing, grasping, pivoting, throwing, and tool use, across different robot morphologies, without task-specific guidance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合RRT搜索和采样MPC的新方法，通过黑盒仿真发现多样化的长时域机器人操作策略，无需特定任务指导。
AI.motivation: 扩大数据集规模对提升深度学习模型性能非常有效，但数据收集仍是瓶颈。依赖人类演示的方法劳动强度大且受限，往往狭窄、任务特定，无法充分探索可行状态空间。现有合成数据生成技术主要依赖局部轨迹优化，难以找到多样化的解决方案。
AI.method: 将RRT式搜索与基于采样的模型预测控制（MPC）相结合，引入新颖的采样方案引导探索走向稳定配置。具体做法是：从稳定状态流形中采样，同时直接通过仿真生长搜索树，而不将规划器限制在纯稳定运动中。
AI.result: 该方法能够在不同机器人形态上发现多样化的操作策略，包括推、抓取、旋转、抛掷和工具使用，且无需任务特定指导。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法成功实现了多样化长时域操作的发现，为解决机器人学习中的数据收集瓶颈提供了一种有效的合成数据生成方案。

title: Khatri-Rao Clustering for Data Summarization
summary:
As datasets continue to grow in size and complexity, finding succinct yet accurate data summaries poses a key challenge. Centroid-based clustering, a widely adopted approach to address this challenge, finds informative summaries of datasets in terms of few prototypes, each representing a cluster in the data. Despite their wide adoption, the resulting data summaries often contain redundancies, limiting their effectiveness particularly in datasets characterized by a large number of underlying clusters. To overcome this limitation, we introduce the Khatri-Rao clustering paradigm that extends traditional centroid-based clustering to produce more succinct but equally accurate data summaries by postulating that centroids arise from the interaction of two or more succinct sets of protocentroids.
  We study two central approaches to centroid-based clustering, namely the well-established k-Means algorithm and the increasingly popular topic of deep clustering, under the lens of the Khatri-Rao paradigm. To this end, we introduce the Khatri-Rao k-Means algorithm and the Khatri-Rao deep clustering framework. Extensive experiments show that Khatri-Rao k-Means can strike a more favorable trade-off between succinctness and accuracy in data summarization than standard k-Means. Leveraging representation learning, the Khatri-Rao deep clustering framework offers even greater benefits, reducing even more the size of data summaries given by deep clustering while preserving their accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出Khatri-Rao聚类范式，通过质心分解为原型质心的交互，在保持精度的同时生成更简洁的数据摘要。
AI.motivation: 传统基于质心的聚类方法在处理具有大量底层聚类的数据集时，生成的数据摘要存在冗余，限制了其有效性。随着数据集规模和复杂性的增长，如何获得简洁而准确的数据摘要成为关键挑战。
AI.method: 引入Khatri-Rao聚类范式，假设质心由两个或多个简洁的原型质心（protocentroids）交互产生，将传统基于质心的聚类扩展为产生更简洁的摘要。具体提出两种方法：1）Khatri-Rao k-Means算法；2）Khatri-Rao深度聚类框架，后者利用表示学习进一步优化。
AI.result: 实验表明：Khatri-Rao k-Means在数据摘要的简洁性和准确性之间取得比标准k-Means更优的平衡；Khatri-Rao深度聚类框架利用表示学习带来更大收益，在保持准确性的同时进一步减小了深度聚类数据摘要的规模。
AI.conclusion: Khatri-Rao聚类范式成功扩展了传统基于质心的聚类方法，能够生成更简洁但同样准确的数据摘要，为大规模复杂数据集的摘要问题提供了有效解决方案。

title: Breaking the Martingale Curse: Multi-Agent Debate via Asymmetric Cognitive Potential Energy
summary: Multi-Agent Debate (MAD) has emerged as a promising paradigm for enhancing large language model reasoning. However, recent work reveals a limitation:standard MAD cannot improve belief correctness beyond majority voting; we refer to this as the Martingale Curse. This curse arises because correlated errors cause agents to converge toward erroneous consensus, where debate merely reinforces collective mistakes rather than filtering noise. We propose AceMAD, a framework that breaks the Martingale Curse by harnessing asymmetric cognitive potential energy to transform MAD from a random walk into a directed convergence process with positive drift. Through a peer-prediction mechanism, agents predict their peers' belief distributions, revealing asymmetric cognitive potential: truth-holders not only know the correct answer but also anticipate the crowd's misconceptions, while the hallucinating majority remains blind to their collective error. This asymmetry creates a potential energy gap that we quantify via strictly proper scoring rules. We prove this cognitive potential manifests as information-theoretic superiority and, under nonlinear aggregation, converts into submartingale drift toward truth, directly breaking the Martingale Curse. Experiments on challenging subsets across six benchmarks show AceMAD recovers sparse truth signals even when initial majorities are incorrect, substantially outperforming baseline methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AceMAD框架，通过利用不对称认知势能打破多智能体辩论中的"鞅诅咒"问题，使辩论从随机游走转变为具有正向漂移的定向收敛过程，从而在初始多数错误的场景下有效恢复真实信号。
AI.motivation: 标准多智能体辩论（MAD）受限于"鞅诅咒"：由于错误相关性，智能体趋向于收敛至错误共识，辩论仅强化集体错误而无法过滤噪声，无法超越多数投票的信念正确性。
AI.method: 提出AceMAD框架，引入同伴预测机制让智能体预测同伴的信念分布，揭示不对称认知势能——真理持有者不仅知道正确答案，还能预见群体的误解，而幻觉多数派对其集体错误视而不见。通过严格适当的评分规则量化这一势能差，并证明其表现为信息论优势，在非线性聚合下转化为趋向真理的亚鞅漂移。
AI.result: 在六个基准数据集的挑战性子集上的实验表明，AceMAD能够在初始多数错误的情况下恢复稀疏真实信号，显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: AceMAD成功打破鞅诅咒，将MAD从随机游走转化为定向收敛过程，为提升大语言模型推理能力提供了新的理论框架和实践方法。

title: IronEngine: Towards General AI Assistant
summary: This paper presents IronEngine, a general AI assistant platform organized around a unified orchestration core that connects a desktop user interface, REST and WebSocket APIs, Python clients, local and cloud model backends, persistent memory, task scheduling, reusable skills, 24-category tool execution, MCP-compatible extensibility, and hardware-facing integration. IronEngine introduces a three-phase pipeline -- Discussion (Planner--Reviewer collaboration), Model Switch (VRAM-aware transition), and Execution (tool-augmented action loop) -- that separates planning quality from execution capability. The system features a hierarchical memory architecture with multi-level consolidation, a vectorized skill repository backed by ChromaDB, an adaptive model management layer supporting 92 model profiles with VRAM-aware context budgeting, and an intelligent tool routing system with 130+ alias normalization and automatic error correction. We present experimental results on file operation benchmarks achieving 100\% task completion with a mean total time of 1541 seconds across four heterogeneous tasks, and provide detailed comparisons with representative AI assistant systems including ChatGPT, Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, and open-source agent frameworks. Without disclosing proprietary prompts or core algorithms, this paper analyzes the platform's architectural decomposition, subsystem design, experimental performance, safety boundaries, and comparative engineering advantages. The resulting study positions IronEngine as a system-oriented foundation for general-purpose personal assistants, automation frameworks, and future human-centered agent platforms.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了IronEngine，一个通用的AI助手平台。它通过统一的编排核心连接多种接口和组件，采用三阶段流水线（讨论、模型切换、执行）分离规划与执行，并配备分层内存、向量化技能库、VRAM感知的模型管理和智能工具路由系统。实验表明其在文件操作基准上实现100%任务完成率，并与主流AI助手进行了详细对比。
AI.motivation: 当前AI助手系统缺乏统一的架构来整合多种交互方式、模型后端、工具执行和硬件资源管理。现有系统往往无法很好地平衡规划质量与执行能力，且在内存管理、模型切换和工具路由方面存在效率瓶颈。因此，需要一个系统级平台来为通用个人助手、自动化框架和未来以人为中心的智能体平台提供基础设施支持。
AI.method: IronEngine采用统一编排核心架构，整合桌面UI、REST/WebSocket API、Python客户端、本地/云模型后端、持久化内存、任务调度、可复用技能库、24类工具执行、MCP兼容扩展和硬件集成。核心技术包括：1）三阶段流水线（讨论阶段采用规划-评审协作、模型切换阶段实现VRAM感知过渡、执行阶段进行工具增强的行动循环）；2）分层内存架构与多级整合机制；3）基于ChromaDB的向量化技能库；4）支持92个模型配置文件的自适应模型管理层，具备VRAM感知的上下文预算；5）包含130+别名规范化和自动错误纠正的智能工具路由系统。
AI.result: 在文件操作基准测试中，IronEngine实现了100%的任务完成率，在四个异构任务中的平均总时间为1541秒。论文提供了与代表性AI助手系统的详细对比，包括ChatGPT、Claude Desktop、Cursor、Windsurf以及开源智能体框架。这些结果展示了平台在架构解耦、子系统设计、性能表现和工程优势方面的能力。
AI.conclusion: IronEngine作为一个系统导向的平台，为通用个人助手、自动化框架和未来以人为中心的智能体平台奠定了基础。该平台通过其统一架构、三阶段流水线、分层内存和智能工具路由等特性，在规划质量与执行能力之间实现了有效分离，为构建更强大的AI助手系统提供了可扩展的基础设施。

title: MAS-H2: A Hierarchical Multi-Agent System for Holistic Cloud-Native Autoscaling
summary: Autoscaling in cloud-native platforms like Kubernetes is reactive and metric-driven, leading to a strategic void problem. This comes from the decoupling of higher-level business policies from lower-level resource provisioning. The strategic void, coupled with a fragmented coordination of pod and node scaling, can lead to significant resource waste and performance degradation under dynamic workloads. In this paper, we present MAS-H2, a new hierarchical multi-agent system that addresses the challenges of autonomic cloud resource management with a complete end-to-end solution. MAS-H2 systematically decomposes the control problem into three layers: a Strategic Agent that formalises business policies (e.g., cost vs. performance) into a global utility function; Planning Agents that produce a joint, proactive scaling plan for pods and nodes with time-series forecasting; and Execution Agents that execute the scaling plan. We built and tested a MAS-H2 prototype as a Kubernetes Operator on Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) to benchmark it against the native Horizontal Pod Autoscaler (HPA) and Cluster Autoscaler (CA) baselines under two realistic, spiky, and stress-inducing workload scenarios. The results show that the MAS-H2 system maintained application CPU usage under 40% for predictable Heartbeat workloads. This resulted in over 50% less sustained CPU stress than the native HPA baseline, which typically operated above 80%. The MAS-H2 system demonstrated proactive planning in a volatile Chaotic Flash Sale scenario by filtering transient noise and deploying more replicas compared to HPA. It reduced peak CPU load by 55% without under-provisioning.
