AI.result: 在五个图像分类数据集上进行10-seed完整实验：相比AdamW基线，OptiRoulette在CIFAR-100上将平均测试准确率从0.6734提升至0.7656(+9.22%)，CIFAR-100-C从0.2904提升至0.3355(+4.52%)，SVHN从0.9667提升至0.9756(+0.89%)，Tiny ImageNet从0.5669提升至0.6642(+9.73%)，Caltech-256从0.5946提升至0.6920(+9.74%)。在更高目标准确率下，OptiRoulette在10/10次运行中全部达到目标，而AdamW基线在预算内均未达标。在共同目标上，OptiRoulette显著减少达到目标的时间（如Caltech-256目标0.59时仅需25.7轮对比77.0轮）。配对种子差值在所有数据集上均为正，仅CIFAR-100-C测试ROC-AUC在当前10-seed研究中未达统计显著性。
AI.conclusion: OptiRoulette通过动态优化器选择机制，在图像分类任务上显著优于单一优化器基线。其主要优势在于更高目标下的收敛可靠性以及更快的收敛速度，为深度学习训练提供了一种简单有效的元优化解决方案。该方法已作为开源工具发布，便于研究者和实践者使用。

title: Enhancing the Detection of Coronary Artery Disease Using Machine Learning
comment: 20 pages, 11 figures, 5 tables. This paper proposes a hybrid Bi-LSTM and GRU based machine learning framework for improved detection of Coronary Artery Disease using CCTA imaging data and clinical features
summary: Coronary Artery Disease (CAD) remains a leading cause of morbidity and mortality worldwide. Early detection is critical to recover patient outcomes and decrease healthcare costs. In recent years, machine learning (ML) advancements have shown significant potential in enhancing the accuracy of CAD diagnosis. This study investigates the application of ML algorithms to improve the detection of CAD by analyzing patient data, including clinical features, imaging, and biomarker profiles. Bi-directional Long Short-Term Memory (Bi-LSTM), Gated Recurrent Units (GRU), and a hybrid of Bi-LSTM+GRU were trained on large datasets to predict the presence of CAD. Results demonstrated that these ML models outperformed traditional diagnostic methods in sensitivity and specificity, offering a robust tool for clinicians to make more informed decisions. The experimental results show that the hybrid model achieved an accuracy of 97.07%. By integrating advanced data preprocessing techniques and feature selection, this study ensures optimal learning and model performance, setting a benchmark for the application of ML in CAD diagnosis. The integration of ML into CAD detection presents a promising avenue for personalized healthcare and could play a pivotal role in the future of cardiovascular disease management.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用Bi-LSTM、GRU及其混合模型进行冠状动脉疾病（CAD）的早期检测，混合模型达到了97.07%的准确率，优于传统诊断方法。
AI.motivation: 冠状动脉疾病（CAD）是全球发病率和死亡率的主要原因之一，早期检测对于改善患者预后和降低医疗成本至关重要。随着机器学习技术的发展，其在提高CAD诊断准确性方面展现出巨大潜力，本研究旨在探索ML算法在CAD检测中的应用价值。
AI.method: 研究采用双向长短期记忆网络（Bi-LSTM）、门控循环单元（GRU）以及Bi-LSTM+GRU混合模型，基于大规模数据集（包含临床特征、影像和生物标志物谱等患者数据）进行训练和预测。研究还整合了先进的数据预处理技术和特征选择方法以确保模型的最优学习性能。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，这些机器学习模型在敏感性和特异性方面均优于传统诊断方法。其中，混合模型（Bi-LSTM+GRU）表现最佳，达到了97.07%的准确率，为临床医生提供了更可靠的决策支持工具。
AI.conclusion: 将机器学习技术整合到CAD检测中为个性化医疗提供了有前景的途径，未来有望在心血管疾病管理中发挥关键作用，为ML在CAD诊断领域的应用树立了新的基准。

title: SafarDB: FPGA-Accelerated Distributed Transactions via Replicated Data Types
summary: Data replication is a critical aspect of data center design, as it ensures high availability, scalability, and fault tolerance. However, replicas need to be coordinated to maintain convergence and database integrity constraints under transactional workloads. Commutative Replicated Data Types (RDTs) provide convergence for conflict-free objects using relaxed consistency, and Well-coordinated Replicated Data Types (WRDTs) provide convergence and integrity for general objects using a hybrid model, relaxed when possible and strong when necessary. While state-of-the-art hardware acceleration of RDT uses Remote Direct Memory Access (RDMA), we observe that trends towards lower latency and higher throughput have driven recent data center architectures to leverage FPGAs as application accelerators. In contrast to deploying an FPGA-based Smart NIC, this paper connects an FPGA accelerator card directly to the network, which allows a complete redesign of the NIC to match the needs of the FPGA-hosted application. We co-design a network-attached FPGA replication engine with an FPGA-resident network interface, enabling near-network execution of replicated transactions and direct invocation of FPGA-resident operators. Following this approach, we introduce SafarDB, FPGA-accelerated Conflict-Free Replicated Data Types (CRDTs) and WRDTs. SafarDB accelerates both relaxed and strongly ordered replication paths; when strong ordering is required, SafarDB accelerates the underlying consensus control path. SafarDB improves CRDT latency and throughput by 7.0X and 5.3X, and WRDT latency and throughput by 12X and 6.8X compared to a state-of-the-art RDMA-based implementation. Further, experiments demonstrate that SafarDB is more resilient to crash-failures than existing CPU/RDMA-based CRDT and WRDT implementations, and SafarDB can detect leader failures and elect new leaders much faster than previously possible.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SafarDB，一种基于网络直连FPGA的复制数据类型加速方案，相比RDMA实现，CRDT延迟和吞吐提升7.0X和5.3X，WRDT提升12X和6.8X，且具备更快的故障检测和领导者选举能力。
AI.motivation: 数据中心数据复制需要协调副本以保证收敛性和完整性约束。现有基于RDMA的RDT硬件加速方案无法满足低延迟高吞吐需求，而当前数据中心架构趋向于使用FPGA作为应用加速器。
AI.method: 将FPGA加速卡直接连接网络而非部署为智能网卡，协同设计网络附加FPGA复制引擎与FPGA驻留网络接口，实现近网络执行复制事务并直接调用FPGA驻留操作符，加速松弛和强序复制路径及底层共识控制路径。
AI.result: 相比最先进的RDMA实现，CRDT延迟和吞吐分别提升7.0X和5.3X，WRDT延迟和吞吐分别提升12X和6.8X；在崩溃故障下更具弹性，能更快检测领导者故障并选举新领导者。
AI.conclusion: 网络直连FPGA方案可有效加速CRDT和WRDT复制，在性能和容错性上显著优于现有CPU/RDMA实现。

title: Silicone Ethernet (SEth): a Nervous System for Robotic Touch
summary: Fine-grained robotic touch sensing is essential for tasks such as robot-human interaction and the handling of hazardous materials. Yet, the sense of touch of robots is limited by the cost and complexity of routing cables to embedded sensors. This paper tackles this problem by contributing Silicone Ethernet (SEth), a wireless solution for touch sensing, communication and power transfer within a conductive silicone substrate. SEth~\emph{neurons} require no battery and deliver computation, communication, sensing and energy harvesting within a compact package. These neurons are placed into an undifferentiated conductive silicone substrate which may form the entire body of a soft robot, or an outer `skin' for hard robots. Our evaluation shows that SEth achieves data rates of 100\,kbps with sub-$μ$W receive and mW-scale transmit power. Exploiting the unique properties of the conductive silicone substrate, SEth provides prioritized traffic arbitration similar to that found in wired control networks such as CAN. The SEth network inherently supports capacitive touch and presence sensing and neurons can harvest sufficient energy to transmit 10s of messages per second at a range of 1\,m. Considered in sum, these features open new degrees of freedom in touch sensing for soft robots.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Silicone Ethernet (SEth)，一种基于导电硅胶基质的无线触觉感知方案，无需电池即可实现感知、通信和能量采集，为软体机器人提供了全新的触觉感知自由度。
AI.motivation: 现有的机器人触觉感知系统受限于嵌入式传感器的布线成本和复杂性，难以实现精细的触觉感知。为了解决这一问题，需要一种能够减少布线负担、同时支持感知、通信和供能的新型解决方案。
AI.method: 提出Silicone Ethernet (SEth)无线触觉感知方案，将无需电池的SEth神经元嵌入到未分化的导电硅胶基质中。这些神经元集成了计算、通信、感知和能量采集功能，硅胶基质可作为软体机器人的主体或硬机器人的外部皮肤。SEth利用导电硅胶基质的特性实现优先级流量仲裁机制，类似于有线控制网络（如CAN）。
AI.result: SEth实现了100 kbps的数据传输速率，接收功率为亚微瓦级（sub-μW），发射功率为毫瓦级（mW）。神经元能够从基质中采集足够的能量，在1米范围内每秒发送数十条消息。该网络天然支持电容式触觉和存在感知功能。
AI.conclusion: SEth为机器人触觉感知提供了一种低成本、易部署的无线解决方案，显著降低了布线复杂性，其低功耗、支持优先级仲裁和能量采集的特性为软体机器人的触觉感知开辟了新的设计自由度。

title: CAR: Cross-Vehicle Kinodynamics Adaptation via Mobility Representation
summary: Developing autonomous off-road mobility typically requires either extensive, platform-specific data collection or relies on simplified abstractions, such as unicycle or bicycle models, that fail to capture the complex kinodynamics of diverse platforms, ranging from wheeled to tracked vehicles. This limitation hinders scalability across evolving heterogeneous autonomous robot fleets. To address this challenge, we propose Cross-vehicle kinodynamics Adaptation via mobility Representation (CAR), a novel framework that enables rapid mobility transfer to new vehicles. CAR employs a Transformer encoder with Adaptive Layer Normalization to embed vehicle trajectory transitions and physical configurations into a shared mobility latent space. By identifying and extracting commonality from nearest neighbors within this latent space, our approach enables rapid kinodynamics adaptation to novel platforms with minimal data collection and computational overhead. We evaluate CAR using the Verti-Bench simulator, built on the Chrono multi-physics engine, and validate its performance on four distinct physical configurations of the Verti-4-Wheeler platform. With only one minute of new trajectory data, CAR achieves up to 67.2% reduction in prediction error compared to direct neighbor transfer across diverse unseen vehicle configurations, demonstrating the effectiveness of cross-vehicle mobility knowledge transfer in both simulated and real-world environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CAR框架，利用Transformer编码器将车辆轨迹和物理配置嵌入共享潜在空间，通过最近邻提取共性，实现了仅需一分钟新数据即可快速适应新平台的运动动力学迁移，预测误差降低达67.2%。
AI.motivation: 开发自主越野移动性通常需要大量平台特定数据收集，或依赖简化抽象模型（如独轮车或自行车模型），这些模型无法捕获从轮式到履带式等多样化平台的复杂运动动力学。这种局限性阻碍了异构自主机器人车队的可扩展性。
AI.method: 提出CAR框架，使用带有自适应层归一化的Transformer编码器，将车辆轨迹转换和物理配置嵌入到共享的移动性潜在空间中。通过在该潜在空间中识别和提取最近邻的共性，实现对新平台的快速运动动力学适应，仅需最少数据收集和计算开销。
AI.result: 在基于Chrono多物理引擎构建的Verti-Bench模拟器上进行评估，并在Verti-4-Wheeler平台的四种不同物理配置上验证。仅需一分钟的新轨迹数据，CAR在不同未见车辆配置下的预测误差相比直接邻域迁移降低了67.2%，证明了跨车辆移动性知识迁移在仿真和真实环境中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CAR框架成功实现了跨车辆运动动力学的快速迁移，仅需极少数据即可适应新平台，为异构自主机器人车队的可扩展性提供了有效解决方案，在仿真和真实环境中均表现出色。

title: Correlation Analysis of Generative Models
summary: Based on literature review about existing diffusion models and flow matching with a neural network to predict a predefined target from noisy data, a unified representation is first proposed for these models using two simple linear equations in this paper. Theoretical analysis of the proposed model is then presented. Our theoretical analysis shows that the correlation between the noisy data and the predicted target is sometimes weak in the existing diffusion models and flow matching. This might affect the prediction (or learning) process which plays a crucial role in all models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了现有扩散模型和流匹配的统一表示，发现噪声数据与预测目标之间有时存在弱相关性，这可能影响预测/学习过程。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型和流匹配使用神经网络从噪声数据预测预定义目标，但缺乏统一的理论框架，且需要深入理解这些模型中噪声数据与预测目标之间的相关性及其对学习过程的影响。
AI.method: 基于文献综述，提出了两个简单线性方程来统一表示现有扩散模型和流匹配，并对所提模型进行理论分析，研究噪声数据与预测目标之间的相关性。
AI.result: 理论分析表明，在现有扩散模型和流匹配中，噪声数据与预测目标之间的相关性有时较弱，这可能影响预测（或学习）过程，而该过程在所有模型中都起着关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的统一表示为扩散模型和流匹配提供了理论框架，并揭示了现有方法中噪声数据与预测目标弱相关性的潜在问题，这对模型的学习过程有重要影响。

title: Empowering Locally Deployable Medical Agent via State Enhanced Logical Skills for FHIR-based Clinical Tasks
summary: While Large Language Models demonstrate immense potential as proactive Medical Agents, their real-world deployment is severely bottlenecked by data scarcity under privacy constraints. To overcome this, we propose State-Enhanced Logical-Skill Memory (SELSM), a training-free framework that distills simulated clinical trajectories into entity-agnostic operational rules within an abstract skill space. During inference, a Query-Anchored Two-Stage Retrieval mechanism dynamically fetches these entity-agnostic logical priors to guide the agent's step-by-step reasoning, effectively resolving the state polysemy problem. Evaluated on MedAgentBench -- the only authoritative high-fidelity virtual EHR sandbox benchmarked with real clinical data -- SELSM substantially elevates the zero-shot capabilities of locally deployable foundation models (30B--32B parameters). Notably, on the Qwen3-30B-A3B backbone, our framework completely eliminates task chain breakdowns to achieve a 100\% completion rate, boosting the overall success rate by an absolute 22.67\% and significantly outperforming existing memory-augmented baselines. This study demonstrates that equipping models with a dynamically updatable, state-enhanced cognitive scaffold is a privacy-preserving and computationally efficient pathway for local adaptation of AI agents to clinical information systems. While currently validated on FHIR-based EHR interactions as an initial step, the entity-agnostic design of SELSM provides a principled foundation toward broader clinical deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SELSM框架，一种无需训练的方法，通过将模拟临床轨迹提炼为实体无关的操作规则，解决了医疗智能体在隐私约束下数据稀缺的问题。在Qwen3-30B-A3B模型上实现了100%的任务完成率，成功率绝对提升22.67%，显著优于现有基线。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型作为主动医疗智能体潜力巨大，但实际部署受限于隐私约束下的数据稀缺问题。现有方法难以在保护隐私的同时有效提升模型在临床场景中的表现。
AI.method: 提出SELSM（状态增强逻辑技能记忆）框架：1) 将模拟临床轨迹提炼为抽象技能空间中的实体无关操作规则；2) 设计查询锚定两阶段检索机制，动态获取逻辑先验指导智能体逐步推理，解决状态多义性问题；3) 无需训练，支持本地化部署。
AI.result: 在MedAgentBench基准（基于真实临床数据的高保真虚拟EHR沙盒）上评估：1) 在Qwen3-30B-A3B骨干网络上，完全消除任务链中断，实现100%完成率；2) 整体成功率绝对提升22.67%；3) 显著优于现有记忆增强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 为模型配备动态可更新的状态增强认知支架，是实现AI智能体本地化适配临床信息系统的一条隐私保护且计算高效的路径。SELSM的实体无关设计为更广泛的临床部署提供了有原则的基础。

title: Covenant-72B: Pre-Training a 72B LLM with Trustless Peers Over-the-Internet
summary: Recently, there has been increased interest in globally distributed training, which has the promise to both reduce training costs and democratize participation in building large-scale foundation models. However, existing models trained in a globally distributed manner are relatively small in scale and have only been trained with whitelisted participants. Therefore, they do not yet realize the full promise of democratized participation. In this report, we describe Covenant-72B, an LLM produced by the largest collaborative globally distributed pre-training run (in terms of both compute and model scale), which simultaneously allowed open, permissionless participation supported by a live blockchain protocol. We utilized a state-of-the-art communication-efficient optimizer, SparseLoCo, supporting dynamic participation with peers joining and leaving freely. Our model, pre-trained on approximately 1.1T tokens, performs competitively with fully centralized models pre-trained on similar or higher compute budgets, demonstrating that fully democratized, non-whitelisted participation is not only feasible, but can be achieved at unprecedented scale for a globally distributed pre-training run.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Covenant-72B，这是迄今为止规模最大的协作式全球分布式预训练大语言模型，首次在开放、无许可参与的环境下实现了72B参数规模的模型训练，证明了完全民主化、非白名单参与的大规模分布式训练是可行的。
AI.motivation: 现有的全球分布式训练模型规模较小，且仅限于白名单参与者，未能实现完全民主化参与的承诺。研究旨在突破这些限制，证明在大规模模型训练中实现开放、无许可参与的可行性。
AI.method: 采用基于区块链协议的开放、无许可参与机制，使用先进的通信高效优化器SparseLoCo，支持参与者的动态加入和离开。模型参数规模为72B，在约1.1T tokens上进行预训练。
AI.result: Covenant-72B的性能与在相似或更高计算预算下训练的完全中心化模型相当，证明了在计算规模和模型规模上都达到前所未有的全球分布式预训练运行是可行的。
AI.conclusion: 完全民主化、非白名单参与的全球分布式大规模预训练不仅可行，而且可以产生与中心化训练相当的竞争性模型，为降低训练成本和民主化参与构建大规模基础模型开辟了新路径。

title: Time-based Fairness Improves Performance in Multi-rate WLANs
comment: Published in the Proceedings of Usenix Annual Technical Conference in 2004
summary:
The performance seen by individual clients on a wireless local area network (WLAN) is heavily influenced by the manner in which wireless channel capacity is allocated. The popular MAC protocol DCF (Distributed Coordination Function) used in 802.11 networks provides equal long-term transmission opportunities to competing nodes when all nodes experience similar channel conditions. When similar-sized packets are also used, DCF leads to equal achieved throughputs (throughput-based fairness) among contending nodes. Because of varying indoor channel conditions, the 802.11 standard supports multiple data transmission rates to exploit the trade-off between data rate and bit error rate. This leads to considerable rate diversity, particularly when the network is congested. Under such conditions, throughput-based fairness can lead to drastically reduced aggregate throughput.
  In this paper, we argue the advantages of time-based fairness, in which each competing node receives an equal share of the wireless channel occupancy time. We demonstrate that this notion of fairness can lead to significant improvements in aggregate performance while still guaranteeing that no node receives worse channel access than it would in a single-rate WLAN. We also describe our algorithm, TBR (Time-based Regulator), which runs on the AP and works with any MAC protocol to provide time-based fairness by regulating packets. Through experiments, we show that our practical and backward compatible implementation of TBR in conjunction with an existing implementation of DCF achieves time-based fairness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出时间公平性概念和TBR算法，通过让各节点平等占用信道时间来改善多速率WLAN中的聚合吞吐量性能。
AI.motivation: 传统802.11 DCF协议在相似信道条件下提供吞吐量公平性，但在多速率WLAN中，由于室内信道条件差异导致的速率多样性，吞吐量公平性会导致聚合吞吐量显著下降。
AI.method: 提出时间公平性概念（每个竞争节点获得平等的信道占用时间份额），并设计TBR（Time-based Regulator）算法，该算法运行在AP上，通过调节数据包来与任何MAC协议配合实现时间公平性。
AI.result: 实验表明，TBR与现有DCF实现的实用且向后兼容的组合能够实现时间公平性，在保证没有节点获得比单速率WLAN更差信道访问的前提下，显著改善了聚合性能。
AI.conclusion: 时间公平性优于吞吐量公平性，能够在多速率WLAN环境中实现更高的聚合吞吐量，同时保证每个节点的公平信道访问权利。

title: Material Driven HRI Design: Aesthetics as Explainability
comment: 4 pages, 1 table, 2026 ACM/IEEE Human-Robot Interaction Conference Workshop on Articulating the Value of Design Research for HRI
summary: Aesthetics - often treated as secondary to function-guides how people interpret robots' roles. A great deal of robot designs - both real and fictitious - use sleek industrial aesthetics. These feature hard glossy plastics, hiding as much of the underlying mechanical and electrical components as possible, resembling something akin to a nude humanoid figure. This leaves robots as something of a blank slate to which end-users apply coverings to, often based on media of fiction and non-fiction alike. We argue that designers can take cues from fashion to design interaction and set appropriate expectations. Rather than viewing appearance as decoration, we propose that color, texture, and material choices function as interaction signals. These signals can invite or discourage touch, clarify a robot's role, and help align user expectations with a robot's actual capabilities. When done thoughtfully, such cues can create familiarity and legibility; when done poorly, they can lead to wrong expectations. This preliminary paper proposes a framework describing how materials can create explainability by signaling expectations for interaction, task, and environment. We use this framework to do a content analysis of 6 robots.

AI.tldr: 本文提出机器人设计应借鉴时尚理念，将颜色、纹理和材料选择视为交互信号，而非单纯的装饰。这些信号可以引导用户期望、阐明机器人角色，并创建适当的人机交互预期。
AI.motivation: 当前机器人设计普遍采用光滑工业美学，隐藏机械和电气组件，呈现类似裸体人形的"空白板"状态。这种设计使用户难以正确理解机器人的角色和能力，导致期望错位。设计师需要新的方法来通过外观设计传达机器人的功能和交互预期。
AI.method: 提出一个理论框架，阐述材料如何通过信号传递交互、任务和环境的预期，从而创建可解释性。研究者运用该框架对6个机器人进行了内容分析，验证材料选择如何影响用户对机器人的理解和期望。
AI.result: 研究确立了颜色、纹理和材料作为交互信号的功能：它们可以邀请或阻止触摸行为、澄清机器人角色、帮助用户期望与机器人实际能力对齐。精心设计的材料信号能创造熟悉感和易读性，而设计不当则导致错误期望。
AI.conclusion: 设计师应重新审视机器人外观设计，不再将其视为次要装饰，而应作为关键的交互设计元素。通过借鉴时尚领域的设计策略，合理运用材料信号，可以有效引导用户期望，提升人机交互的可解释性和准确性。

title: Annealed Co-Generation: Disentangling Variables via Progressive Pairwise Modeling
summary: For multivariate co-generation in scientific applications, we advocate pairwise block rather than joint modeling of all variables. This design mitigates the computational burden and data imbalance. To this end, we propose an Annealed Co-Generation (ACG) framework that replaces high-dimensional diffusion modeling with a low-dimensional diffusion model, which enables multivariate co-generation by composing pairwise variable generations. We first train an unconditional diffusion model over causal variables that are disentangled into pairs. At inference time, we recover the joint distribution by coupling these pairwise models through shared common variables, enabling coherent multivariate generation without any additional training. By employing a three-stage annealing process-Consensus, Heating, and Cooling-our method enforces consistency across shared common variables and progressively constrains each pairwise data distribution to lie on a learnable manifold, while maintaining high likelihood within each pair. We demonstrate the framework's flexibility and efficacy on two distinct scientific tasks: flow-field completion and antibody generation. All datasets and code will be made publicly available upon publication.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种退火协同生成（ACG）框架，通过用低维扩散模型替代高维扩散建模，利用成对变量组合实现多变量协同生成，有效缓解了计算负担和数据不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 在科学应用的多变量协同生成任务中，对所有变量进行联合建模面临计算负担重和数据不平衡的挑战。为解决这些问题，作者提出采用成对建模而非联合建模的思路。
AI.method: 提出退火协同生成（ACG）框架：1）训练一个基于解耦成对因果变量的无条件扩散模型；2）在推理阶段，通过共享公共变量耦合这些成对模型来恢复联合分布，无需额外训练；3）采用三阶段退火过程（共识、加热和冷却），在共享变量上强制一致性，并逐步约束每个成对数据分布到可学习流形上，同时保持每对内的高似然性。
AI.result: 在两个不同的科学任务——流场补全和抗体生成上验证了该框架的灵活性和有效性。实验表明该方法能够实现连贯的多变量生成。
AI.conclusion: ACG框架成功将高维扩散建模替换为低维扩散模型，通过成对变量组合实现了高效的多变量协同生成，为科学应用中的多变量生成任务提供了一种有效的解决方案。数据和代码将公开发布。

title: Enhancing Web Agents with a Hierarchical Memory Tree
summary: Large language model-based web agents have shown strong potential in automating web interactions through advanced reasoning and instruction following. While retrieval-based memory derived from historical trajectories enables these agents to handle complex, long-horizon tasks, current methods struggle to generalize across unseen websites. We identify that this challenge arises from the flat memory structures that entangle high-level task logic with site-specific action details. This entanglement induces a workflow mismatch in new environments, where retrieved contents are conflated with current web, leading to logically inconsistent execution. To address this, we propose Hierarchical Memory Tree (HMT), a structured framework designed to explicitly decouple logical planning from action execution. HMT constructs a three-level hierarchy from raw trajectories via an automated abstraction pipeline: the Intent level maps diverse user instructions to standardized task goals; the Stage level defines reusable semantic subgoals characterized by observable pre-conditions and post-conditions; and the Action level stores action patterns paired with transferable semantic element descriptions. Leveraging this structure, we develop a stage-aware inference mechanism comprising a Planner and an Actor. By explicitly validating pre-conditions, the Planner aligns the current state with the correct logical subgoal to prevent workflow mismatch, while the Actor grounds actions by matching the stored semantic descriptions to the target page. Experimental results on Mind2Web and WebArena show that HMT significantly outperforms flat-memory methods, particularly in cross-website and cross-domain scenarios, highlighting the necessity of structured memory for robust generalization of web agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出分层记忆树（HMT）框架，通过将任务逻辑与站点特定动作解耦，解决现有基于大语言模型的网页代理在跨网站泛化方面的局限性，在Mind2Web和WebArena基准上显著优于扁平记忆方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的网页代理采用扁平记忆结构，将高层任务逻辑与站点特定动作细节纠缠在一起。这种纠缠导致在新的网页环境中出现工作流不匹配问题：检索到的内容与当前网页混淆，引发逻辑不一致的执行，从而限制了代理在未见网站上的泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出分层记忆树（HMT）框架，通过自动化抽象管道从原始轨迹构建三层层级结构：（1）意图层：将多样化用户指令映射到标准化任务目标；（2）阶段层：定义具有可观察前置条件和后置条件的可复用语义子目标；（3）动作层：存储动作模式及可迁移的语义元素描述。基于此结构开发阶段感知推理机制，包含规划器（通过验证前置条件将当前状态与正确逻辑子目标对齐以防止工作流不匹配）和执行器（通过匹配存储的语义描述与目标页面来落地动作）。
AI.result: 在Mind2Web和WebArena基准测试上的实验结果表明，HMT显著优于扁平记忆方法，尤其在跨网站和跨域场景中表现突出，验证了结构化记忆对于网页代理鲁棒泛化的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 结构化记忆对于网页代理的鲁棒泛化至关重要。通过显式解耦逻辑规划与动作执行，分层记忆树能够有效缓解工作流不匹配问题，使网页代理在跨网站和跨域场景中实现更好的泛化性能。

title: A Hodge-Based Framework for Service Operational Analysis in Serverless Platforms
summary: In this paper we propose a method for analyzing services deployed in serverless platforms. These services typically consists of orchestrated functions that can exhibit complex and non-conservative information flows due to the interaction of independently deployed functions under coarse-grained control mechanisms. We introduce a topological model of serverless services and make use of the Hodge decomposition to partition observed operational flows into locally correctable components and globally persistent harmonic modes. Our analysis shows that harmonic flows naturally arise from different kind of interactions among functions and should be interpreted as structural properties of serverless systems rather than configuration errors. We present a systematic methodology for analyzing inter-function flows and deriving actionable remediation strategies, including dumping effects to contain the effects of harmonic inefficiencies as an alternative to completely restructure the topological model of the service. Experimental results confirm that the proposed approach can uncover latent architectural structures leading to inefficiencies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于拓扑模型和Hodge分解的无服务器平台服务分析方法，将运行流分解为可修正组件与调和流，揭示了调和流是系统结构特性而非配置错误，并提供了包含转储效应的补救策略。
AI.motivation: 无服务器平台中的服务由编排函数组成，由于独立部署的函数在粗粒度控制机制下交互，会表现出复杂且非保守的信息流，现有方法难以有效分析这些流的性质与来源。
AI.method: 引入无服务器服务的拓扑模型，利用Hodge分解将观测到的运行流划分为局部可修正的组件和全局持续的调和模式，并建立系统化的函数间流分析方法以推导可行的补救策略。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，调和流自然产生于函数间的不同交互类型，应被视为无服务器系统的结构属性而非配置错误；所提方法能够揭示导致效率低下的潜在架构结构。
AI.conclusion: 调和流是无服务器系统的内在结构特性，通过转储效应等措施可以有效遏制调和低效的影响，作为完全重构服务拓扑模型的替代方案。

title: Predicting Conflict Impact on Performance in O-RAN
comment: INFOCOM 2026 Workshop - 6G AI-RAN: AI Native Distributed Intelligence for 6G Networks. 6 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables
summary: The O-RAN Alliance promotes the integration of intelligent autonomous agents to control the Radio Access Network (RAN). This improves flexibility, performance, and observability in the RAN, but introduces new challenges, such as the detection and management of conflicts among the intelligent autonomous agents. A solution consists of profiling the agents before deployment to gather statistical information about their decision-making behavior, then using the information to estimate the level of conflict among agents with different goals. This approach enables determining the occurrence of conflicts among agents, but does not provide information about the impact on RAN performance, including potential service degradation. The problem becomes more complex when agents generate control actions at different timescales, which makes conflict severity hard to predict. In this paper, we present a novel approach that fills this gap. Our solution leverages the same data used to determine conflict severity but extends its use to predict the impact of such conflicts on RAN performance based on the frequency at which each agent generates actions, giving more weight to faster applications, which exert control more frequently. Via a prototype, we demonstrate that our solution is viable and accurately predicts conflict impact on RAN performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种预测O-RAN智能代理冲突对无线接入网（RAN）性能影响的新方法，通过利用代理决策行为的历史数据并考虑不同代理的操作频率，能够准确预测冲突对网络性能的影响程度。
AI.motivation: O-RAN联盟引入智能自治代理控制无线接入网以提高灵活性、性能和可观测性，但这带来了代理间冲突检测与管理的挑战。现有解决方案能够通过代理行为画像确定冲突的存在，但无法评估冲突对RAN性能的实际影响，尤其是当代理在不同时间尺度上生成控制动作时，冲突严重性难以预测。
AI.method: 本文提出一种新方法，利用用于确定冲突严重性的相同数据，扩展其用途以预测冲突对RAN性能的影响。该方法基于每个代理生成动作的频率进行加权评估，为动作频率更高的代理赋予更大权重，因为这些代理施加控制更为频繁。通过原型系统验证了该解决方案的可行性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法能够准确预测冲突对RAN性能的影响。所提出的解决方案在原型系统中得到验证，证明了其可行性和预测准确性。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功填补了现有O-RAN代理冲突检测方法的空白，不仅能够确定代理间冲突的存在，还能预测冲突对网络性能的具体影响，为O-RAN系统中多代理冲突管理提供了有效的解决方案。

title: VertiAdaptor: Online Kinodynamics Adaptation for Vertically Challenging Terrain
summary: Autonomous driving in off-road environments presents significant challenges due to the dynamic and unpredictable nature of unstructured terrain. Traditional kinodynamic models often struggle to generalize across diverse geometric and semantic terrain types, underscoring the need for real-time adaptation to ensure safe and reliable navigation. We propose VertiAdaptor (VA), a novel online adaptation framework that efficiently integrates elevation with semantic embeddings to enable terrain-aware kinodynamic modeling and planning via function encoders. VA learns a kinodynamic space spanned by a set of neural ordinary differential equation basis functions, capturing complex vehicle-terrain interactions across varied environments. After offline training, the proposed approach can rapidly adapt to new, unseen environments by identifying kinodynamics in the learned space through a computationally efficient least-squares calculation. We evaluate VA within the Verti-Bench simulator, built on the Chrono multi-physics engine, and validate its performance both in simulation and on a physical Verti-4-Wheeler platform. Our results demonstrate that VA improves prediction accuracy by up to 23.9% and achieves a 5X faster adaptation time, advancing the robustness and reliability of autonomous robots in complex and evolving off-road environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了VertiAdaptor (VA)框架，一种用于越野自动驾驶的在线自适应方法，通过函数编码器融合高程和语义嵌入实现地形感知的动力学建模，预测精度提升23.9%，自适应速度提升5倍。
AI.motivation: 越野环境中的非结构化地形具有动态和不可预测的特性，传统的运动动力学模型难以在不同几何和语义地形类型间泛化，迫切需要实时自适应能力以确保安全可靠的导航。
AI.method: 提出VertiAdaptor (VA)框架，利用函数编码器整合高程和语义嵌入，学习由神经常微分方程基函数张成的运动动力学空间。该方法通过离线训练后，可在学习空间中通过计算高效的Least-Squares计算识别运动动力学，快速适应新环境。
AI.result: 在基于Chrono多物理引擎的Verti-Bench仿真器和物理Verti-4-Wheeler平台上进行验证。VA将预测精度提升高达23.9%，自适应时间缩短5倍。
AI.conclusion: VA框架有效提升了复杂动态越野环境中自主机器人的鲁棒性和可靠性，为越野自动驾驶中的实时地形感知动力学建模与规划提供了高效解决方案。

title: RACER: Risk-Aware Calibrated Efficient Routing for Large Language Models
summary: Efficiently routing queries to the optimal large language model (LLM) is crucial for optimizing the cost-performance trade-off in multi-model systems. However, most existing routers rely on single-model selection, making them susceptible to misrouting. In this work, we formulate LLM routing as the $α$-VOR problem to minimize expected set size while controlling the misrouting risk, and propose a novel method -- RACER, extending base routers to output model sets that can be subsequently aggregated for improved output. In particular, RACER constructs nested model sets via augmented scoring and utilizes finite-sample concentration bounds to calibrate a threshold that allows for both variable set sizes and abstention. We theoretically prove that RACER achieves rigorous distribution-free risk control on unseen test data in a post-hoc and model-agnostic manner. Extensive experiments verify our theoretical guarantees and demonstrate that RACER consistently enhances downstream accuracy across a wide range of benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RACER方法，将LLM路由问题形式化为α-VOR问题，通过输出模型集合而非单一模型来降低误路由风险，在理论上实现了分布无关的风险控制，并在实验中显著提升了下游任务的准确性。
AI.motivation: 在多模型系统中，高效地将查询路由到最优的大语言模型（LLM）对于优化成本-性能权衡至关重要。然而，现有的路由器大多依赖单一模型选择，容易受到误路由的影响，缺乏有效的风险控制机制。
AI.method: 本文将LLM路由形式化为α-VOR问题，旨在最小化期望集合大小同时控制误路由风险。提出了RACER方法，将基础路由器扩展为输出模型集合，通过增强评分构建嵌套模型集，并利用有限样本集中界限校准阈值，支持可变集合大小和弃权机制。该方法具有事后性和模型无关性。
AI.result: 理论证明了RACER能够在未见测试数据上实现严格的分布无关风险控制。大量实验验证了理论保证，并表明RACER在广泛的基准测试中持续提升了下游任务的准确性。
AI.conclusion: RACER为多模型系统提供了一种高效且理论可靠的路由方案，有效平衡了集合大小与误路由风险，显著优于传统的单一模型选择方法。

title: Self-Supervised Multi-Modal World Model with 4D Space-Time Embedding
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, 1 table. Presented at 2026 World Modeling Workshop, Mila Quebec
summary: We present DeepEarth, a self-supervised multi-modal world model with Earth4D, a novel planetary-scale 4D space-time positional encoder. Earth4D extends 3D multi-resolution hash encoding to include time, efficiently scaling across the planet over centuries with sub-meter, sub-second precision. Multi-modal encoders (e.g. vision-language models) are fused with Earth4D embeddings and trained via masked reconstruction. We demonstrate Earth4D's expressive power by achieving state-of-the-art performance on an ecological forecasting benchmark. Earth4D with learnable hash probing surpasses a multi-modal foundation model pre-trained on substantially more data. Access open source code and download models at: https://github.com/legel/deepearth

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DeepEarth，一个自监督多模态世界模型，核心创新是Earth4D——一种行星尺度的4D时空位置编码器，通过扩展3D多分辨率哈希编码引入时间维度，实现了跨越世纪、亚米级和亚秒级精度的全球尺度高效编码。
AI.motivation: 现有地球科学模型缺乏统一的时空表示方法来处理行星尺度的多模态数据。需要一种能够高效处理跨越长时间尺度（世纪级）和高时空精度（亚米级、亚秒级）的位置编码方法，以支持多模态数据融合和下游任务。
AI.method: 提出Earth4D，将3D多分辨率哈希编码扩展为4D时空编码，融合视觉-语言等多模态编码器，通过掩码重建（masked reconstruction）进行自监督训练。引入可学习的哈希探测（learnable hash probing）技术以增强表示能力。
AI.result: 在生态预测基准测试上达到最先进性能；配备可学习哈希探测的Earth4D超越了在更多数据上预训练的多模态基础模型，验证了该方法的表达能力和有效性。
AI.conclusion: Earth4D为行星尺度时空建模提供了高效的统一表示方案，DeepEarth展示了自监督多模态学习在地球科学任务中的巨大潜力，为时空AI应用开辟了新方向。

title: NEST: Network- and Memory-Aware Device Placement For Distributed Deep Learning
summary: The growing scale of deep learning demands distributed training frameworks that jointly reason about parallelism, memory, and network topology. Prior works often rely on heuristic or topology-agnostic search, handling communication and memory separately. Without per-device memory awareness, these methods typically ensure feasibility post hoc by sharding parameters and activations across many devices, increasing synchronization, inflating communication, and underutilizing compute-limiting scalability and efficiency on real datacenter networks. We present NEST, a network-, compute-, and memory-aware device placement framework that unifies model parallelism, topology modeling, and memory feasibility via structured dynamic programming. NEST's DP operates on operator graphs with tensor and expert parallel configurations, explicit allreduce latencies across hierarchical or arbitrary networks, and memory/compute profiles. By factoring parallelism across tensor, pipeline, data, and expert dimensions, NEST defines a principled search space for hybrid strategies while jointly optimizing co-location, network latency, and memory feasibility. Evaluations across diverse hardware and networks show NEST achieves up to 2.43 times higher throughput, better memory efficiency, and improved scalability over state-of-the-art baselines, providing a foundation for co-designing parallelization strategies and datacenter interconnects for next-generation AI infrastructure. The source code of NEST is available at: https://github.com/scai-tech/Nest

AI.tldr: NEST是一个统一的设备放置框架，通过结构化动态规划联合优化并行策略、网络拓扑和内存可行性，在多种硬件和网络上实现了高达2.43倍的吞吐量提升。
AI.motivation: 现有分布式训练框架在处理并行性、内存和网络拓扑时往往依赖启发式或拓扑无关的搜索方法，且将通信和内存分开处理。缺乏设备级内存感知导致这些方法通过在大量设备上分片参数和激活来事后保证可行性，增加了同步开销、通信量和计算资源利用率不足，限制了在真实数据中心网络上的可扩展性和效率。
AI.method: 提出NEST框架，通过网络、计算和内存感知的设备放置，利用结构化动态规划在算子图上操作。该方法考虑张量和专家并行配置、跨层次或任意网络的显式allreduce延迟以及内存/计算配置文件。通过在张量、流水线、数据和专家维度上分解并行性，定义混合策略的原则性搜索空间，联合优化共置、网络延迟和内存可行性。
AI.result: 在多种硬件和网络上的评估表明，NEST相比最先进的基线方法实现了高达2.43倍的吞吐量提升，更好的内存效率和改进的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: NEST为协同设计并行化策略和下一代AI基础设施的数据中心互连提供了基础，证明了统一考虑网络拓扑、计算和内存约束对于提升分布式训练效率的重要性。

title: Collaborative Planning with Concurrent Synchronization for Operationally Constrained UAV-UGV Teams
summary: Collaborative planning under operational constraints is an essential capability for heterogeneous robot teams tackling complex large-scale real-world tasks. Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) offer rapid environmental coverage, but flight time is often limited by energy constraints, whereas Unmanned Ground Vehicles (UGVs) have greater energy capacity to support long-duration missions, but movement is constrained by traversable terrain. Individually, neither can complete tasks such as environmental monitoring. Effective UAV-UGV collaboration therefore requires energy-constrained multi-UAV task planning, traversability-constrained multi-UGV path planning, and crucially, synchronized concurrent co-planning to ensure timely in-mission recharging. To enable these capabilities, we propose Collaborative Planning with Concurrent Synchronization (CoPCS), a learning-based approach that integrates a heterogeneous graph transformer for operationally constrained task encoding with a transformer decoder for joint, synchronized co-planning that enables UAVs and UGVs to act concurrently in a coordinated manner. CoPCS is trained end-to-end under a unified imitation learning paradigm. We conducted extensive experiments to evaluate CoPCS in both robotic simulations and physical robot teams. Experimental results demonstrate that our method provides the novel multi-robot capability of synchronized concurrent co-planning and substantially improves team performance. More details of this work are available on the project website: https://hcrlab.gitlab.io/project/CoPCS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CoPCS（协作规划与并发同步）方法，通过基于学习的异构图变换器和变换器解码器，实现了能量受限的多无人机任务规划与地形受限的多地面无人车路径规划的同步并发协作，解决了异构机器人团队在复杂任务中的协同规划问题。
AI.motivation: 异构机器人团队（UAV和UGV）在执行大规模复杂任务时面临挑战：UAV具有快速环境覆盖能力但受限于飞行时间/能量约束，UGV具有更大能量容量支持长时间任务但受限于地形可通行性约束。单独使用任一种机器人都无法完成任务（如环境监测）。因此需要能量约束的多UAV任务规划、地形约束的多UGV路径规划，以及关键的同步并发协同规划以确保任务中及时充电。
AI.method: 提出CoPCS（Collaborative Planning with Concurrent Synchronization）方法，这是一种基于学习的方法，包含两个核心组件：（1）异构图变换器（heterogeneous graph transformer）用于操作约束下的任务编码；（2）变换器解码器（transformer decoder）用于联合同步协同规划，使UAV和UGV能够以协调方式并发行动。该方法在统一模仿学习范式下进行端到端训练。
AI.result: 在机器人仿真和物理机器人团队中进行了大量实验评估。实验结果表明，该方法提供了新颖的同步并发协同规划能力，能够实现多机器人协作，并显著提升了团队性能。
AI.conclusion: CoPCS成功实现了异构机器人团队的同步并发协同规划能力，解决了UAV能量约束和UGV地形约束下的协作规划问题，为复杂现实任务中的异构机器人团队协作提供了有效解决方案。

title: Evo: Autoregressive-Diffusion Large Language Models with Evolving Balance
summary: We introduce \textbf{Evo}, a duality latent trajectory model that bridges autoregressive (AR) and diffusion-based language generation within a continuous evolutionary generative framework. Rather than treating AR decoding and diffusion generation as separate paradigms, Evo reconceptualizes text generation as a latent flow: each token is associated with a vector-valued embedding that evolves over a progression variable $t_i \in [0, 1]$, indicating its semantic maturity. Low $t_i$ values correspond to confident AR-like refinement, while high values invoke diffusion-style planning, allowing the model to adaptively balance AR and diffusion based on uncertainty. Theoretically, we show that both AR and diffusion models emerge as discretizations of a shared probability flow, and we derive Evo's training objective from a unified variational ELBO. The model is implemented as a time-conditioned Transformer governed by a shared vector field, trained end-to-end to jointly infer latent codes and their progression times. During decoding, Evo performs efficient, semantics-aware refinement, achieving high-quality outputs without sacrificing speed. Empirically, Evo 8B achieves state-of-the-art or highly competitive results on 15 diverse benchmarks, including reasoning (GSM8K, ARC-C), code generation (HumanEval, MBPP), and general language understanding, while maintaining fast inference speed. Our results demonstrate that Evo delivers a new paradigm for LLM design with strong generation quality, robust symbolic reasoning, and decoding efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Evo模型，这是一种对偶潜轨迹模型，将自回归(AR)和扩散语言生成统一在连续演化生成框架内，通过语义成熟度变量自适应平衡两种生成范式，在多个基准测试上取得了最先进或极具竞争力的结果。
AI.motivation: 现有的语言生成方法中，自回归(AR)解码与基于扩散的生成被视为分离的范式，缺乏统一的理论框架。研究者希望找到一种方法能够桥接这两种生成范式，让模型能够根据不确定性自适应地在AR式的精炼和扩散式的规划之间进行平衡。
AI.method: Evo将文本生成重新概念化为潜在流：每个词元与一个向量嵌入相关联，该嵌入在进度变量$t_i \in [0, 1]$上演化，表示其语义成熟度。较低的$t_i$值对应AR式的精炼，较高值则调用扩散式规划。理论证明AR和扩散模型都是共享概率流的离散化，从统一的变分ELBO推导出训练目标。模型实现为由共享向量场控制的时间条件Transformer，端到端联合推断潜在编码及其进度时间。
AI.result: Evo 8B在15个多样化基准测试上达到最先进或极具竞争力的结果，涵盖推理任务(GSM8K、ARC-C)、代码生成(HumanEval、MBPP)和通用语言理解，同时保持快速推理速度。实验表明Evo在生成质量、符号推理鲁棒性和解码效率方面表现优异。
AI.conclusion: Evo为LLM设计提供了一个新范式，成功地将AR和扩散生成统一在连续演化框架内，实现了生成质量、符号推理鲁棒性和解码效率的良好平衡，证明了桥接两种生成范式的可行性与优越性。

title: Animating Petascale Time-varying Data on Commodity Hardware with LLM-assisted Scripting
comment: Will appear in ICBDA 2026. N.B. Due to the limitation "The abstract field cannot be longer than 1,920 characters", the abstract here is shorter than that in the PDF file Subjects
summary: Scientists face significant visualization challenges as time-varying datasets grow in speed and volume, often requiring specialized infrastructure and expertise to handle massive datasets. Petascale climate models generated in NASA laboratories require a dedicated group of graphics and media experts and access to high-performance computing resources. Scientists may need to share scientific results with the community iteratively and quickly. However, the time-consuming trial-and-error process incurs significant data transfer overhead and far exceeds the time and resources allocated for typical post-analysis visualization tasks, disrupting the production workflow. Our paper introduces a user-friendly framework for creating 3D animations of petascale, time-varying data on a commodity workstation. Our contributions: (i) Generalized Animation Descriptor (GAD) with a keyframe-based adaptable abstraction for animation, (ii) efficient data access from cloud-hosted repositories to reduce data management overhead, (iii) tailored rendering system, and (iv) an LLM-assisted conversational interface as a scripting module to allow domain scientists with no visualization expertise to create animations of their region of interest. We demonstrate the framework's effectiveness with two case studies: first, by generating animations in which sampling criteria are specified based on prior knowledge, and second, by generating AI-assisted animations in which sampling parameters are derived from natural-language user prompts. In all cases, we use large-scale NASA climate-oceanographic datasets that exceed 1PB in size yet achieve a fast turnaround time of 1 minute to 2 hours. Users can generate a rough draft of the animation within minutes, then seamlessly incorporate as much high-resolution data as needed for the final version.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个用户友好的框架，用于在普通工作站上创建PB级时变数据的3D动画。通过通用动画描述符(GAD)、云端数据访问、定制渲染系统和LLM辅助对话界面，使非可视化专家的科学家能够快速生成大规模气候数据动画，将原本耗时的过程缩短至1分钟到2小时。
AI.motivation: 随着时变数据集在速度和体量上的增长，科学家面临严峻的可视化挑战。NASA实验室产生的PB级气候模型需要专业的图形媒体团队和高性能计算资源。科学家需要快速迭代地分享科学结果，但传统的试错过程会产生巨大的数据传输开销，远超典型的后分析可视化任务所分配的时间和资源，打断了生产工作流程。
AI.method: 提出了四个核心组件：(i) 基于关键帧的可适应抽象的通用动画描述符(GAD)；(ii) 从云端托管存储库进行高效数据访问以减少数据管理开销；(iii) 定制的渲染系统；(iv) LLM辅助的对话式脚本模块，使没有可视化专业知识的领域科学家能够创建感兴趣区域的动画。
AI.result: 通过两个案例研究验证了框架的有效性：第一个案例基于先验知识指定采样标准生成动画，第二个案例从自然语言用户提示中导出采样参数生成AI辅助动画。所有案例均使用超过1PB规模的NASA气候海洋数据集，实现了1分钟到2小时的快速周转时间。用户可以在几分钟内生成动画草稿，然后无缝集成所需的高分辨率数据完成最终版本。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功解决了大规模时变数据可视化的关键瓶颈，使科学家能够在普通工作站上快速创建PB级数据的3D动画，无需专业可视化团队和昂贵的高性能计算资源，显著提升了科学成果的迭代分享效率，支持从快速原型到高分辨率最终产品的完整工作流程。

title: SysNav: Multi-Level Systematic Cooperation Enables Real-World, Cross-Embodiment Object Navigation
summary: Object navigation (ObjectNav) in real-world environments is a complex problem that requires simultaneously addressing multiple challenges, including complex spatial structure, long-horizon planning and semantic understanding. Recent advances in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) offer promising capabilities for semantic understanding, yet effectively integrating them into real-world navigation systems remains a non-trivial challenge. In this work, we formulate real-world ObjectNav as a system-level problem and introduce SysNav, a three-level ObjectNav system designed for real-world crossembodiment deployment. SysNav decouples semantic reasoning, navigation planning and motion control to ensure robustness and generalizability. At the high-level, we summarize the environment into a structured scene representation and leverage VLMs to provide semantic-grounded navigation guidance. At the mid-level, we introduce a hierarchical room-based navigation strategy that reserves VLM guidance for room-level decisions, which effectively utilizes its reasoning ability while ensuring system efficiency. At the low-level, planned waypoints are executed through different embodiment-specific motion control modules. We deploy our system on three embodiments, a custom-built wheeled robot, the Unitree Go2 quadruped and the Unitree G1 humanoid, and conduct 190 real-world experiments. Our system achieves substantial improvements in both success rate and navigation efficiency. To the best of our knowledge, SysNav is the first system capable of reliably and efficiently completing building-scale long-range object navigation in complex real-world environments. Furthermore, extensive experiments on four simulation benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance. Project page is available at: https://cmu-vln.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SysNav，一个三层对象导航系统，用于解决真实世界中的对象导航问题。该系统通过解耦语义推理、导航规划和运动控制，在三种不同机器人平台上实现了跨实体部署，在190次真实世界实验和四个仿真基准测试中均取得了显著成果。
AI.motivation: 真实世界中的对象导航面临复杂空间结构、长距离规划和语义理解等多重挑战。尽管视觉-语言模型(VLMs)在语义理解方面展现出巨大潜力,但将其有效集成到真实世界导航系统中仍是一个非平凡的挑战。现有方法难以在真实环境中实现可靠且高效的建筑级长距离对象导航。
AI.method: 提出SysNav三层对象导航系统：(1)高层：构建结构化场景表示,利用VLM提供语义导向的导航指导；(2)中层：引入分层房间导航策略,将VLM指导用于房间级决策,平衡推理能力与系统效率；(3)低层：通过不同实体特定的运动控制模块执行规划的航点。系统实现了语义推理、导航规划和运动控制的解耦,确保鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.result: 在三种不同实体平台(自制轮式机器人、Unitree Go2四足机器人、Unitree G1人形机器人)上完成190次真实世界实验,在成功率和导航效率方面均取得显著提升。在四个仿真基准测试中达到最先进性能。这是首个能够在复杂真实环境中可靠高效完成建筑级长距离对象导航的系统。
AI.conclusion: SysNav成功解决了真实世界对象导航的系统级问题,通过三层架构设计实现了VLM的有效集成和跨实体部署,证明了解耦语义推理、导航规划和运动控制的有效性,为真实世界大规模对象导航提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Distilling and Adapting: A Topology-Aware Framework for Zero-Shot Interaction Prediction in Multiplex Biological Networks
summary: Multiplex Biological Networks (MBNs), which represent multiple interaction types between entities, are crucial for understanding complex biological systems. Yet, existing methods often inadequately model multiplexity, struggle to integrate structural and sequence information, and face difficulties in zero-shot prediction for unseen entities with no prior neighbourhood information. To address these limitations, we propose a novel framework for zero-shot interaction prediction in MBNs by leveraging context-aware representation learning and knowledge distillation. Our approach leverages domain-specific foundation models to generate enriched embeddings, introduces a topology-aware graph tokenizer to capture multiplexity and higher-order connectivity, and employs contrastive learning to align embeddings across modalities. A teacher-student distillation strategy further enables robust zero-shot generalization. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework outperforms state-of-the-art methods in interaction prediction for MBNs, providing a powerful tool for exploring various biological interactions and advancing personalized therapeutics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个用于多重生物网络零-shot交互预测的新框架，通过结合上下文感知表示学习和知识蒸馏技术，有效解决了现有方法在建模多重性、整合结构与序列信息以及处理未见实体方面的局限性。
AI.motivation: 多重生物网络（MBNs）对于理解复杂生物系统至关重要，但现有方法存在三方面不足：1）无法充分建模多重性；2）难以整合结构信息和序列信息；3）在缺乏先验邻域信息的未见实体上难以进行零样本预测。
AI.method: 提出的新框架包含四个核心组件：1）利用领域特定基础模型生成增强的嵌入表示；2）引入拓扑感知图标记器以捕获多重性和高阶连接性；3）采用对比学习对齐跨模态嵌入；4）使用教师-学生蒸馏策略实现鲁棒的零样本泛化能力。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该框架在MBNs的交互预测任务上超越了现有的最先进方法，证明了其在处理多重生物网络方面的有效性和优越性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为探索各种生物交互和推进个性化治疗提供了一个强大的工具，在零样本预测场景下展现出良好的泛化能力，对生物信息学和精准医疗领域具有重要应用价值。

title: Bi-directional digital twin prototype anchoring with multi-periodicity learning for few-shot fault diagnosis
summary: Intelligent fault diagnosis (IFD) has emerged as a powerful paradigm for ensuring the safety and reliability of industrial machinery. However, traditional IFD methods rely heavily on abundant labeled data for training, which is often difficult to obtain in practical industrial environments. Constructing a digital twin (DT) of the physical asset to obtain simulation data has therefore become a promising alternative. Nevertheless, existing DT-assisted diagnosis methods mainly transfer diagnostic knowledge through domain adaptation techniques, which still require a considerable amount of unlabeled data from the target asset. To address the challenges in few-shot scenarios where only extremely limited samples are available, a bi-directional DT prototype anchoring method with multi-periodicity learning is proposed. Specifically, a framework involving meta-training in the DT virtual space and test-time adaptation in the physical space is constructed for reliable few-shot model adaptation for the target asset. A bi-directional twin-domain prototype anchoring strategy with covariance-guided augmentation for adaptation is further developed to improve the robustness of prototype estimation. In addition, a multi-periodicity feature learning module is designed to capture the intrinsic periodic characteristics within current signals. A DT of an asynchronous motor is built based on finite element method, and experiments are conducted under multiple few-shot settings and three working conditions. Comparative and ablation studies demonstrate the superiority and effectiveness of the proposed method for few-shot fault diagnosis.

AI.tldr: 本文针对工业环境中标注数据稀缺的少样本故障诊断问题，提出了一种结合数字孪生的双向原型锚定方法，通过元训练和测试时自适应框架，实现了在极少量样本下的可靠故障诊断。
AI.motivation: 传统智能故障诊断方法严重依赖大量标注数据，而实际工业环境中获取标注数据困难。现有数字孪生辅助诊断方法主要通过域适应技术迁移诊断知识，但仍需要目标设备的大量无标签数据，难以应对仅有极少量样本的少样本场景。
AI.method: 构建了数字孪生虚拟空间元训练与物理空间测试时自适应相结合的框架；提出双向孪生域原型锚定策略，结合协方差引导的数据增强提高原型估计的鲁棒性；设计多周期性特征学习模块以捕捉电流信号内在的周期性特征；基于有限元方法建立了异步电机数字孪生模型。
AI.result: 在异步电机数字孪生平台上，针对多种少样本设置和三种工况进行了实验验证。对比实验和消融研究证明了该方法在少样本故障诊断任务中的优越性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的双向数字孪生原型锚定方法能够有效解决少样本场景下的故障诊断难题，为工业机械设备的安全可靠运行提供了新的技术途径。

title: T2Nav Algebraic Topology Aware Temporal Graph Memory and Loop Detection for ZeroShot Visual Navigation
summary: Deploying autonomous agents in real world environments is challenging, particularly for navigation, where systems must adapt to situations they have not encountered before. Traditional learning approaches require substantial amounts of data, constant tuning, and, sometimes, starting over for each new task. That makes them hard to scale and not very flexible. Recent breakthroughs in foundation models, such as large language models and vision language models, enable systems to attempt new navigation tasks without requiring additional training. However, many of these methods only work with specific input types, employ relatively basic reasoning, and fail to fully exploit the details they observe or the structure of the spaces. Here, we introduce T2Nav, a zeroshot navigation system that integrates heterogeneous data and employs graph-based reasoning. By directly incorporating visual information into the graph and matching it to the environment, our approach enables the system to strike a good balance between exploration and goal attainment. This strategy allows robust obstacle avoidance, reliable loop closure detection, and efficient path planning while eliminating redundant exploration patterns. The system demonstrates flexibility by handling goals specified using reference images of target object instances, making it particularly suitable for scenarios in which agents must navigate to visually similar yet spatially distinct instances. Experiments demonstrate that our approach is efficient and adapts well to unknown environments, moving toward practical zero-shot instance-image navigation capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了T2Nav，一种零样本导航系统，通过融合异构数据和基于图的推理，实现了高效的未知环境导航和实例图像目标定位。
AI.motivation: 传统学习方法需要大量数据且难以扩展，现有的基础模型导航方法仅支持特定输入类型、推理能力有限，且未能充分利用观测细节和空间结构。需要一种灵活、高效的零样本导航方案。
AI.method: 提出T2Nav零样本导航系统：将视觉信息直接整合到图结构中并与环境匹配，采用基于图的推理方法，平衡探索与目标达成，实现障碍规避、闭环检测和路径规划。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法高效且能很好地适应未知环境；系统可处理使用目标物体实例参考图像指定的导航目标，能够导航到视觉相似但空间不同的实例，实现了实用的零样本实例图像导航能力。
AI.conclusion: T2Nav通过图结构整合视觉信息实现了高效灵活的零样本导航，在未知环境中表现出色，为实际零样本实例图像导航应用提供了有效解决方案。

title: Not all tokens are needed(NAT): token efficient reinforcement learning
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a key driver of progress in large language models, but scaling RL to long chain-of-thought (CoT) trajectories is increasingly constrained by backpropagation over every generated token. Even with optimized rollout engines, full-token updates can consume a large fraction of total training cost, turning token length into a hidden tax on RL. We introduce Not All Tokens Are Needed (NAT), a unified framework that makes the token budget a first-class optimization primitive. NAT updates the policy using only a selected subset of generated tokens while preserving the learning signal of full-sequence RL. The core idea is an unbiased partial-token policy-gradient estimator via Horvitz-Thompson reweighting, which ensures statistically correct gradients despite subsampling. We instantiate NAT with two simple, plug-and-play token selection schemes: Uniform Random Sampling (URS) and Random Prefix Cutting (RPC), both of which reduce forward and backward compute and memory without modifying the reward computation or rollout pipeline. Across mathematical reasoning benchmarks, NAT matches full-token GRPO performance while using as few as 50% of tokens, providing an efficient and orthogonal pathway to scaling RL beyond the limits imposed by long trajectories. In our experiments, RPC saves 18% peak GPU memory and 29% forward and backward RL training time for Qwen3-8B.

AI.tldr: 提出NAT框架，通过对生成的token进行子采样来降低长链式思考（CoT）强化学习的训练成本。核心是使用Horvitz-Thompson重加权获得无偏的部分token策略梯度估计器，在仅使用50%token的情况下达到全token训练性能，节省18%显存和29%训练时间。
AI.motivation: 强化学习在大语言模型中发挥重要作用，但在长链式思考轨迹中，对每个生成token进行反向传播带来巨大计算成本，token长度成为RL训练的隐性税负，限制了可扩展性。
AI.method: 提出NAT（Not All Tokens Are Needed）框架，将token预算作为一等优化原语。核心贡献是利用Horvitz-Thompson重加权技术构建无偏的部分token策略梯度估计器，确保在子采样情况下梯度统计正确。实现两种token选择方案：均匀随机采样（URS）和随机前缀截断（RPC），无需修改奖励计算或rollout流程。
AI.result: 在数学推理基准测试中，NAT仅使用50%的token即可匹配全token GRPO性能。对于Qwen3-8B模型，RPC方案节省18%峰值GPU显存和29%的前向与反向RL训练时间。
AI.conclusion: NAT提供了一个与现有优化正交的高效扩展路径，通过部分token更新有效缓解长轨迹对RL训练的限制，实现计算资源与学习效果的平衡。

title: CoTJudger: A Graph-Driven Framework for Automatic Evaluation of Chain-of-Thought Efficiency and Redundancy in LRMs
summary: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) have demonstrated strong performance by producing extended Chain-of-Thought (CoT) traces before answering. However, this paradigm often induces over-reasoning: redundant calculations and circular self-verification that increase computational cost without improving outcomes. Existing evaluations largely emphasize final accuracy or coarse token counts, and lack automated tools to separate essential logic from structural redundancy. We introduce CoTJudger, a graph-driven framework that quantifies reasoning efficiency by converting free-form CoTs into directed dependency graphs and extracting the Shortest Effective Path (SEP) needed to reach a correct solution. This yields an interpretable efficiency signal -- how much of a CoT is necessary versus structurally redundant -- that is comparable across models and tasks. Evaluating 21 LRMs, CoTJudger reveals pervasive redundancy and surfaces recurring failure modes, including verification obsession and compensatory redundancy. These results provide a practical metric for disentangling reasoning ability from computational waste, enabling more targeted evaluation and diagnosis of LRM efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出了CoTJudger框架，通过将有向依赖图和最短有效路径（SEP）来量化大型推理模型中思维链的冗余程度，从而分离必要的推理与结构冗余，实现更精准的效率评估。
AI.motivation: 大型推理模型（LRMs）通过生成扩展的思维链（CoT）取得优异表现，但常导致过度推理问题：产生冗余计算和循环自我验证，增加计算成本却无益于结果。现有评估方法主要关注最终准确率或粗略的token计数，缺乏自动工具来区分核心逻辑与结构冗余。
AI.method: 提出了CoTJudger，一个图驱动的框架。该方法将自由形式的思维链转换为有向依赖图，并提取达到正确解所需的最短有效路径（SEP）。由此产生可解释的效率信号，指示思维链中必要部分与结构冗余部分的比例。
AI.result: 在21个大型推理模型上的评估发现：推理过程中普遍存在冗余现象；识别出反复出现的失败模式，包括验证强迫症和补偿性冗余；该方法提供了可跨模型和任务比较的效率度量。
AI.conclusion: CoTJudger提供了一个实用的度量标准，能够将推理能力与计算浪费区分开来，实现了更有针对性的评估和诊断大型推理模型效率的能力。

title: TA-RNN-Medical-Hybrid: A Time-Aware and Interpretable Framework for Mortality Risk Prediction
summary: Accurate and interpretable mortality risk prediction in intensive care units (ICUs) remains a critical challenge due to the irregular temporal structure of electronic health records (EHRs), the complexity of longitudinal disease trajectories, and the lack of clinically grounded explanations in many data-driven models. To address these challenges, we propose \textit{TA-RNN-Medical-Hybrid}, a time-aware and knowledge-enriched deep learning framework that jointly models longitudinal clinical sequences and irregular temporal dynamics through explicit continuous-time encoding, along with standardized medical concept representations. The proposed framework extends time-aware recurrent modeling by integrating explicit continuous-time embeddings that operate independently of visit indexing, SNOMED-based disease representations, and a hierarchical dual-level attention mechanism that captures both visit-level temporal importance and feature/concept-level clinical relevance. This design enables accurate mortality risk estimation while providing transparent and clinically meaningful explanations aligned with established medical knowledge. We evaluate the proposed approach on the MIMIC-III critical care dataset and compare it against strong time-aware and sequential baselines. Experimental results demonstrate that TA-RNN-Medical-Hybrid consistently improves predictive performance in terms of AUC, accuracy, and recall-oriented F$_2$-score. Moreover, qualitative analysis shows that the model effectively decomposes mortality risk across time and clinical concepts, yielding interpretable insights into disease severity, chronicity, and temporal progression. Overall, the proposed framework bridges the gap between predictive accuracy and clinical interpretability, offering a scalable and transparent solution for high-stakes ICU decision support systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TA-RNN-Medical-Hybrid框架，通过时间感知的循环神经网络结合标准化医学概念表示，解决了ICU死亡率风险预测中的时间不规则性和可解释性问题，在MIMIC-III数据集上取得了优于基线的性能并提供了临床可解释性。
AI.motivation: ICU死亡率风险预测面临三大挑战：电子健康记录（EHR）的时间结构不规则、疾病轨迹的复杂性，以及数据驱动模型缺乏临床依据的解释性。现有方法难以同时实现准确的预测和临床可解释性。
AI.method: 提出TA-RNN-Medical-Hybrid框架：1）引入显式连续时间编码以建模不规则时间动态，独立于就诊索引；2）集成基于SNOMED的标准化疾病表示；3）设计层次化双层注意力机制，分别捕获就诊级别的时间重要性和特征/概念级别的临床相关性。该框架联合建模纵向临床序列和时间动态。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-III重症监护数据集上，该方法在AUC、准确率和面向召回的F2分数上均优于强时间感知和序列基线模型。定性分析表明，模型能有效分解跨时间和临床概念的死亡风险，提供关于疾病严重程度、慢性和时间进展的可解释洞察。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功弥合了预测准确性与临床可解释性之间的鸿沟，为高风险ICU决策支持系统提供了可扩展且透明的解决方案，同时保证了预测结果与既有医学知识的一致性。

title: SurgSync: Time-Synchronized Multi-Modal Data Collection Framework and Dataset for Surgical Robotics
comment: Accepted By International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), IEEE, 2026. More details can be found at https://surgsync.github.io/
summary: Most existing robotic surgery systems adopt a human-in-the-loop paradigm, often with the surgeon directly teleoperating the robotic system. Adding intelligence to these robots would enable higher-level control, such as supervised autonomy or even full autonomy. However, artificial intelligence (AI) requires large amounts of training data, which is currently lacking. This work proposes SurgSync, a multi-modal data collection framework with offline and online synchronization to support training and real-time inference, respectively. The framework is implemented on a da Vinci Research Kit (dVRK) and introduces (1) dual-mode (online/offline-matching) synchronized recorders, (2) a modern stereo endoscope to achieve image quality on par with clinical systems, and (3) additional sensors such as a side-view camera and a novel capacitive contact sensor to provide ground truth contact data. The framework also incorporates a post-processing toolbox for tasks such as depth estimation, optical flow, and a practical kinematic reprojection method using Gaussian heatmap. User studies with participants of varying skill levels are performed with ex-vivo tissue to provide clinically realistic data, and a network for surgical skill assessment is employed to demonstrate utilization of the collected data. Through the user study experiments, we obtained a dataset of 214 validated instances across multiple canonical training tasks. All software and data are available at surgsync.github.io.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SurgSync，一个用于机器人手术的多模态数据采集框架，通过离线和在线同步机制支持AI训练和实时推理，以解决当前手术AI缺乏大规模训练数据的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的机器人手术系统主要采用人在回路的遥操作范式，而向这些系统添加智能（如监督自主或完全自主）需要大量训练数据，目前这类数据严重匮乏。
AI.method: 在da Vinci研究套件(dVRK)上实现了包含以下组件的框架：(1)双模式（在线/离线匹配）同步记录器；(2)现代立体内窥镜以达到临床级图像质量；(3)额外传感器（侧视相机和新型电容式接触传感器）提供接触真值数据；(4)后处理工具箱用于深度估计、光流和高斯热图运动学重投影。通过不同技能水平参与者的离体组织用户研究收集临床真实数据。
AI.result: 通过用户研究实验获得了214个经过验证的数据实例，涵盖多个典型训练任务。使用手术技能评估网络验证了所收集数据的可用性。所有软件和数据已在surgync.github.io开源发布。
AI.conclusion: SurgSync框架成功解决了机器人手术AI训练数据匮乏的问题，提供了高质量、多模态、同步的数据采集解决方案，并通过开源方式为研究社区贡献了宝贵的数据资源。

title: Reward Under Attack: Analyzing the Robustness and Hackability of Process Reward Models
summary: Process Reward Models (PRMs) are rapidly becoming the backbone of LLM reasoning pipelines, yet we demonstrate that state-of-the-art PRMs are systematically exploitable under adversarial optimization pressure. To address this, we introduce a three-tiered diagnostic framework that applies increasing adversarial pressure to quantify these vulnerabilities. Static perturbation analysis uncovers a fluency-logic dissociation: high invariance to surface-level style changes reward changes $<$0.1, yet inconsistent detection of logically-corrupted reasoning, with different models failing on different attack types. Adversarial optimization demonstrates that gradient-based attacks inflate rewards on invalid trajectories, with reward landscapes exhibiting wide, exploitable peaks. RL-induced reward hacking exposes the critical failure mode: policies trained on AIME problems achieve near-perfect PRM rewards ($>$0.9), while ground-truth accuracy remains low (below 4%), with 43% of reward gains attributable to stylistic shortcuts. These findings reveal that current PRMs function as fluency detectors rather than reasoning verifiers, creating systematic blind spots that undermine their use as training signals. We release PRM-BiasBench and a diagnostic toolkit to enable robustness evaluation before deployment. The code and dataset are available at https://github.com/SqueezeAILab/reward-under-attack.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了当前最先进的PRMs（过程奖励模型）存在系统性漏洞，容易被对抗攻击利用，本质上它们更像流畅度检测器而非推理验证器。
AI.motivation: 随着PRMs成为大语言模型推理流程的核心组件，其安全性至关重要。作者旨在探究PRMs在对抗优化压力下的鲁棒性，以发现其潜在的漏洞和失败模式。
AI.method: 提出三层诊断框架对PRMs施加递增的对抗压力进行系统性评估：1）静态扰动分析测试表面风格变化和逻辑损坏的鲁棒性；2）对抗优化验证梯度攻击是否能提升无效轨迹的奖励值；3）强化学习诱导的奖励破解实验，训练策略以探测PRM的失效模式。
AI.result: 实验发现：1）PRMs对表面风格变化不敏感（奖励变化<0.1），但对逻辑错误的检测不一致；2）梯度攻击可在无效推理路径上显著提升奖励值；3）关键失败模式为在AIME问题上训练的策略获得近乎完美的PRM奖励（>0.9），但实际准确率低于4%，其中43%的奖励增益来自风格性捷径。
AI.conclusion: 当前PRMs存在系统性盲点，表现为流畅度-逻辑解离，更倾向于检测语言流畅性而非验证推理正确性，这严重削弱了其作为训练信号的有效性。作者发布了PRM-BiasBench基准和诊断工具包以支持部署前的鲁棒性评估。

title: Grounding Machine Creativity in Game Design Knowledge Representations: Empirical Probing of LLM-Based Executable Synthesis of Goal Playable Patterns under Structural Constraints
summary: Creatively translating complex gameplay ideas into executable artifacts (e.g., games as Unity projects and code) remains a central challenge in computational game creativity. Gameplay design patterns provide a structured representation for describing gameplay phenomena, enabling designers to decompose high-level ideas into entities, constraints, and rule-driven dynamics. Among them, goal patterns formalize common player-objective relationships. Goal Playable Concepts (GPCs) operationalize these abstractions as playable Unity engine implementations, supporting experiential exploration and compositional gameplay design. We frame scalable playable pattern realization as a problem of constrained executable creative synthesis: generated artifacts must satisfy Unity's syntactic and architectural requirements while preserving the semantic gameplay meanings encoded in goal patterns. This dual constraint limits scalability. Therefore, we investigate whether contemporary large language models (LLMs) can perform such synthesis under engine-level structural constraints and generate Unity code (as games) structured and conditioned by goal playable patterns. Using 26 goal pattern instantiations, we compare a direct generation baseline (natural language -> C# -> Unity) with pipelines conditioned on a human-authored Unity-specific intermediate representation (IR), across three IR configurations and two open-source models (DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Lite-Instruct and Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct). Compilation success is evaluated via automated Unity replay. We propose grounding and hygiene failure modes, identifying structural and project-level grounding as primary bottlenecks.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何利用大语言模型（LLMs）将游戏玩法目标模式自动合成为可执行的Unity游戏代码，发现直接生成效果有限，通过Unity特定的中间表示（IR）进行条件化生成能提升成功率，并识别出结构和项目层面的 grounding 是主要瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 将复杂的游戏玩法创意转化为可执行的Unity项目代码仍然是计算游戏创造力的核心挑战。现有的目标玩法模式（Goal Playable Concepts, GPCs）提供了形式化的抽象表示，但在保证Unity引擎语法和架构约束的同时保留语义玩法的双重约束下，可扩展的实现仍然困难。因此需要研究LLM是否能在引擎级结构约束下执行这种合成任务。
AI.method: 将可扩展的可玩模式实现框架化为"受约束的可执行创造性合成"问题。使用26个目标模式实例，比较两种生成方法：(1) 直接生成基线（自然语言→C#→Unity）；(2) 基于人类编写的Unity特定中间表示（IR）进行条件化的生成管道。测试了三种IR配置和两个开源模型（DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Lite-Instruct和Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct），通过自动化Unity回放评估编译成功率。
AI.result: 通过实验比较了直接生成与IR条件化生成管道的效果，评估了编译成功率。提出了grounding和hygiene两种失败模式，并识别出结构性grounding和项目级grounding是实现过程中的主要瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: LLM在引擎级结构约束下进行游戏代码合成是可行的，但存在显著的grounding挑战。通过Unity特定的中间表示进行条件化生成可以改善结果，但结构性约束和项目层面的整合仍是限制可扩展性的关键瓶颈，需要进一步研究解决方案。

title: CN-CBF: Composite Neural Control Barrier Function for Safe Robot Navigation in Dynamic Environments
summary: Safe navigation of autonomous robots remains one of the core challenges in the field, especially in dynamic and uncertain environments. One of the prevalent approaches is safety filtering based on control barrier functions (CBFs), which are easy to deploy but difficult to design. Motivated by the shortcomings of existing learning- and model-based methods, we propose a simple yet effective neural CBF design method for safe robot navigation in dynamic environments. We employ the idea of a composite CBF, where multiple neural CBFs are combined into a single CBF. The individual CBFs are trained via the Hamilton-Jacobi reachability framework to approximate the optimal safe set for single moving obstacles. Additionally, we use the residual neural architecture, which guarantees that the estimated safe set does not intersect with the corresponding failure set. The method is extensively evaluated in simulation experiments for a ground robot and a quadrotor, comparing it against several baseline methods. The results show improved success rates of up to 18\% compared to the best baseline, without increasing the conservativeness of the motion. Also, the method is demonstrated in hardware experiments for both types of robots.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于组合神经控制障碍函数（CBF）的安全导航方法，通过Hamilton-Jacobi可达性框架训练单个神经CBF，并采用残差神经网络架构确保安全集与失效集不相交。仿真和硬件实验表明，相比最优基线方法，成功率提升高达18%，且未增加运动保守性。
AI.motivation: 自主机器人在动态不确定环境中的安全导航仍是核心挑战。基于控制障碍函数（CBF）的安全滤波方法易于部署但难以设计，现有的基于学习和模型的方法存在不足，亟需一种简单有效的CBF设计方法。
AI.method: 提出组合神经CBF设计方法：1）将多个神经CBF组合成单一CBF；2）采用Hamilton-Jacobi可达性框架训练单个CBF，近似单个移动障碍物的最优安全集；3）使用残差神经网络架构，保证估计的安全集与对应失效集不相交。方法在地面机器人和四旋翼无人机上进行了仿真和硬件实验验证。
AI.result: 在仿真实验中，相比多个基线方法，成功率提升高达18%，且未增加运动保守性；在地面机器人和四旋翼的硬件实验中成功演示了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为动态环境中的机器人安全导航提供了一种有效的神经CBF设计解决方案，在保持计算效率的同时显著提升了安全性能，具有良好的实际应用前景。

title: From ARIMA to Attention: Power Load Forecasting Using Temporal Deep Learning
summary: Accurate short-term power load forecasting is important to effectively manage, optimize, and ensure the robustness of modern power systems. This paper performs an empirical evaluation of a traditional statistical model and deep learning approaches for predicting short-term energy load. Four models, namely ARIMA, LSTM, BiLSTM, and Transformer, were leveraged on the PJM Hourly Energy Consumption data. The data processing involved interpolation, normalization, and a sliding-window sequence method. Each model's forecasting performance was evaluated for the 24-hour horizon using MAE, RMSE, and MAPE. Of the models tested, the Transformer model, which relies on self-attention algorithms, produced the best results with 3.8 percent of MAPE, with performance above any model in both accuracy and robustness. These findings underscore the growing potential of attention-based architectures in accurately capturing complex temporal patterns in power consumption data.

AI.tldr: 本文对比了ARIMA、LSTM、BiLSTM和Transformer四种模型在短期电力负荷预测任务上的性能，发现基于自注意力机制的Transformer模型表现最优，MAPE达到3.8%，证明了注意力架构在捕捉复杂时序模式方面的优势。
AI.motivation: 准确的短期电力负荷预测对于现代电力系统的管理、优化和鲁棒性保障至关重要，因此需要评估和比较传统统计模型与深度学习方法在该任务上的预测性能。
AI.method: 在PJM小时级能耗数据集上，采用ARIMA、LSTM、BiLSTM和Transformer四种模型进行24小时范围的短期负荷预测；数据处理包括插值、归一化和滑动窗口序列方法；使用MAE、RMSE和MAPE作为评价指标。
AI.result: Transformer模型在所有测试模型中表现最佳，MAPE为3.8%，在准确性和鲁棒性方面均优于其他模型。
AI.conclusion: 基于注意力机制的架构在捕捉电力消费数据中的复杂时序模式方面具有显著优势，展现出在短期负荷预测任务中的巨大潜力。

title: Vision Language Models Cannot Reason About Physical Transformation
summary: Understanding physical transformations is fundamental for reasoning in dynamic environments. While Vision Language Models (VLMs) show promise in embodied applications, whether they genuinely understand physical transformations remains unclear. We introduce ConservationBench evaluating conservation -- whether physical quantities remain invariant under transformations. Spanning four properties with paired conserving/non-conserving scenarios, we generate 23,040 questions across 112 VLMs. Results reveal systematic failure: performance remains near chance with improvements on conservation tasks accompanied by drops on controls. Control experiments show strong textual priors favoring invariance, yet models perform worse with visual content. Neither temporal resolution, prompting, nor curated sampling helps. These findings show that current VLMs fail to maintain transformation-invariant representations of physical properties across dynamic scenes.

AI.tldr: 本研究引入ConservationBench基准，评估视觉语言模型（VLMs）是否真正理解物理变换中的守恒性。实验表明当前112个VLM在守恒任务上表现接近随机水平，且存在系统性的理解失败。
AI.motivation: 虽然视觉语言模型在具身应用中展现出潜力，但目前尚不清楚它们是否真正理解物理变换。理解物理变换对于在动态环境中进行推理至关重要，因此需要系统性地评估VLMs对物理守恒性的理解能力。
AI.method: 研究者构建了ConservationBench基准，评估物理量在变换过程中是否保持不变这一守恒性。该基准涵盖四个物理属性，设计了成对的守恒/非守恒场景，生成了23,040个问题，并在112个VLMs上进行了测试。研究还包括控制实验以分析文本先验、时间分辨率、提示策略等因素的影响。
AI.result: 实验结果揭示了系统性失败：模型性能接近随机猜测水平；在守恒任务上的改进往往伴随着控制任务上的性能下降。控制实验显示模型存在强烈的文本先验偏好不变性，但在有视觉内容时表现更差。时间分辨率调整、提示优化或精心采样均无法改善性能。
AI.conclusion: 当前视觉语言模型无法在动态场景中保持物理属性的变换不变表示，这表明VLMs缺乏对物理变换的真正理解，需要进一步研究来提升其物理推理能力。

title: LIPP: Load-Aware Informative Path Planning with Physical Sampling
summary: In classical Informative Path Planning (C-IPP), robots are typically modeled as mobile sensors that acquire digital measurements such as images or radiation levels. In this model - since making a measurement leaves the robot's physical state unchanged - traversal costs are determined solely by the path taken. This is a natural assumption for many missions, but does not extend to settings involving physical sample collection, where each collected sample adds mass and increases the energy cost of all subsequent motion. As a result, IPP formulations that ignore this coupling between information gain and load-dependent traversal cost can produce plans that are distance-efficient but energy-suboptimal, collecting fewer samples and less data than the energy budget would permit. In this paper, we introduce Load-aware Informative Path Planning (LIPP ), a generalization of C-IPP that explicitly models this coupling and the resulting order-dependent traversal costs. We formulate LIPP as a Mixed-Integer Quadratic Program (MIQP) that jointly optimizes routing, visitation order, and per-location sampling count under an energy budget. We show that LIPP strictly generalizes C-IPP: as sample unit mass $λ\to 0$, the load-dependent energy model reduces exactly to the classical distance budget constraint, recovering C-IPP as a special case. We further derive theoretical bounds on the path-length increase of LIPP relative to C-IPP, characterizing the trade-off for improved energy efficiency. Finally, through extensive simulations across 2000 diverse mission scenarios, we demonstrate that LIPP matches the behavior of C-IPP at zero sample mass and progressively achieves higher uncertainty reduction per unit energy as sample mass increases.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了负载感知信息路径规划(LIPP)，解决了经典IPP在物理采样场景下忽略负载对能耗影响的局限性，实现了更高的能量效率。
AI.motivation: 经典信息路径规划(C-IPP)假设机器人仅作为移动传感器获取数字测量，但该假设不适用于物理采样场景。在物理采样中，采集的样本会增加机器人质量，从而增加后续所有运动的能量消耗。忽略信息获取与负载依赖遍历成本之间耦合关系的规划方法可能导致距离高效但能量次优的方案，无法充分利用能量预算。
AI.method: 提出负载感知信息路径规划(LIPP)框架，显式建模信息增益与负载依赖遍历成本的耦合关系。将LIPP建模为混合整数二次规划(MIQP)问题，在能量预算约束下联合优化路径规划、访问顺序和每个位置的采样数量。理论证明LIPP是C-IPP的严格推广：当样本单位质量λ→0时，负载依赖能量模型退化为经典的距离预算约束。
AI.result: 推导了LIPP相对于C-IPP的路径长度增加的理论界限，刻画了提高能量效率的权衡关系。在2000个多样化任务场景的仿真实验中，LIPP在零样本质量时与C-IPP行为一致，随着样本质量增加，逐步实现单位能量的不确定性降低效果更优。
AI.conclusion: LIPP成功将经典IPP扩展到物理采样场景，通过显式建模负载对能耗的影响，在保持理论完备性（作为C-IPP的推广）的同时，显著提升了能量利用效率，能够在相同能量预算下采集更多样本和数据。

title: Advances in GRPO for Generation Models: A Survey
summary: Large-scale flow matching models have achieved strong performance across generative tasks such as text-to-image, video, 3D, and speech synthesis. However, aligning their outputs with human preferences and task-specific objectives remains challenging. Flow-GRPO extends Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to generation models, enabling stable reinforcement learning alignment for generative systems. Since its introduction, Flow-GRPO has triggered rapid research growth, spanning methodological refinements and diverse application domains. This survey provides a comprehensive review of Flow-GRPO and its subsequent developments. We organize existing work along two primary dimensions. First, we analyze methodological advances beyond the original framework, including reward signal design, credit assignment, sampling efficiency, diversity preservation, reward hacking mitigation, and reward model construction. Second, we examine extensions of GRPO-based alignment across generative paradigms and modalities, including text-to-image, video generation, image editing, speech and audio, 3D modeling, embodied vision-language-action systems, unified multimodal models, autoregressive and masked diffusion models, and restoration tasks. By synthesizing theoretical insights and practical adaptations, this survey highlights Flow-GRPO as a general alignment framework for modern generative models and outlines key open challenges for scalable and robust reinforcement-based generation.

AI.tldr: 本综述全面回顾了Flow-GRPO方法（将群组相对策略优化扩展到生成模型）及其后续发展，从方法论改进（奖励设计、信用分配、采样效率等）和多模态应用两个维度系统梳理了该领域的研究进展，确立了其作为现代生成模型通用对齐框架的地位。
AI.motivation: 大规模流匹配模型在文本到图像、视频、3D和语音合成等生成任务中表现优异，但将其输出与人类偏好和特定任务目标对齐仍具挑战性。Flow-GRPO虽引发了快速研究增长，但缺乏系统性综述来整合方法改进与多领域应用进展。
AI.method: 从两个主要维度组织现有工作：（1）方法论改进——包括奖励信号设计、信用分配、采样效率、多样性保持、奖励黑客缓解和奖励模型构建；（2）跨生成范式和模态的扩展——涵盖文本到图像、视频生成、图像编辑、语音音频、3D建模、具身视觉-语言-动作系统、统一多模态模型、自回归与掩码扩散模型及恢复任务。
AI.result: 系统梳理了Flow-GRPO的方法论进展和跨模态应用扩展，综合了理论见解与实践适配，揭示了其在奖励设计、采样效率、多样性保持等方面的技术演进路径，以及在多种生成任务中的成功应用案例。
AI.conclusion: Flow-GRPO已成为现代生成模型的通用对齐框架，未来仍需解决基于强化学习的生成在可扩展性和鲁棒性方面的关键开放挑战。

title: Improving reasoning at inference time via uncertainty minimisation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) now exhibit strong multi-step reasoning abilities, but existing inference-time scaling methods remain computationally expensive, often relying on extensive sampling or external evaluators. We propose a principled strategy that frames reasoning as uncertainty minimisation and operates at the level of individual thoughts rather than tokens. Our method selects, at each reasoning step, the continuation that maximizes the model's self-certainty, a metric computed from its internal predictive distribution. This approach achieves significant improvement with a small number of samples, relies exclusively on model-internal signals, and applies to open-ended questions as opposed to methods like majority voting. Experiments on MATH500 and GSM8K across multiple model sizes demonstrate that thought-level self-certainty maximization consistently outperforms greedy decoding and matches or exceeds self-consistency under comparable token budgets. Cross-linguistic evaluations further indicate that the method transfers robustly beyond high-resource languages. Furthermore, analysis of self-certainty dynamics reveals that correct reasoning trajectories converge early to stable paths, suggesting that early decisions, likely associated with the planning of the reasoning process, are predictive of final accuracy. Building on this result, we show that self-certainty maximisation applied to the early steps can explain most of the performance gain and provide a simple yet efficient inference-time scaling method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于“思维级自确定性最大化”的推理时扩展方法，通过选择使模型内部预测分布最确定的推理路径，在小样本下显著提升了LLM的多步推理性能，无需外部评估器且适用于开放式问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型推理时扩展方法（如广泛采样或多数投票）计算成本高昂，且常依赖外部评估器，难以应用于开放式问题。作者旨在寻找一种更高效、仅依赖模型内部信号且适用于更广泛任务场景的推理策略。
AI.method: 将推理过程建模为不确定性最小化问题，并在“思维”层面而非词元层面进行操作。在每一步推理中，从模型内部的预测分布计算“自确定性”指标，并选择使该指标最大化的后续推理路径。该方法完全依赖模型内部信号，无需外部评估器。
AI.result: 在MATH500和GSM8K数据集上的实验表明，该方法在相同token预算下持续优于贪婪解码，性能达到或超过自一致性方法。跨语言评估显示其具有良好的跨语言鲁棒性。分析发现正确推理轨迹在早期即趋于稳定，早期推理步骤的自确定性最大化可贡献大部分性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 思维级自确定性最大化是一种简单高效的推理时扩展方法，仅依赖模型内部信号即可显著提升推理性能。研究揭示了正确推理轨迹的早期稳定性特征，通过聚焦早期步骤可实现高效推理，为LLM推理优化提供了新视角。

title: A Contrastive Fewshot RGBD Traversability Segmentation Framework for Indoor Robotic Navigation
summary: Indoor traversability segmentation aims to identify safe, navigable free space for autonomous agents, which is critical for robotic navigation. Pure vision-based models often fail to detect thin obstacles, such as chair legs, which can pose serious safety risks. We propose a multi-modal segmentation framework that leverages RGB images and sparse 1D laser depth information to capture geometric interactions and improve the detection of challenging obstacles. To reduce the reliance on large labeled datasets, we adopt the few-shot segmentation (FSS) paradigm, enabling the model to generalize from limited annotated examples. Traditional FSS methods focus solely on positive prototypes, often leading to overfitting to the support set and poor generalization. To address this, we introduce a negative contrastive learning (NCL) branch that leverages negative prototypes (obstacles) to refine free-space predictions. Additionally, we design a two-stage attention depth module to align 1D depth vectors with RGB images both horizontally and vertically. Extensive experiments on our custom-collected indoor RGB-D traversability dataset demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art FSS and RGB-D segmentation baselines, achieving up to 9\% higher mIoU under both 1-shot and 5-shot settings. These results highlight the effectiveness of leveraging negative prototypes and sparse depth for robust and efficient traversability segmentation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种融合RGB图像和稀疏1D激光深度的多模态少样本分割框架，通过引入负对比学习分支和两阶段注意力深度模块，有效解决了室内可通行区域分割中细小障碍物检测困难及样本稀缺问题，在1-shot和5-shot设置下mIoU提升达9%。
AI.motivation: 纯视觉模型在室内导航场景中难以检测椅子腿等细小障碍物，存在严重安全隐患；同时，标注数据稀缺限制了模型训练；传统少样本分割方法仅关注正原型，易过拟合且泛化能力差。
AI.method: 1) 构建多模态分割框架，融合RGB图像与稀疏1D激光深度信息捕捉几何交互；2) 提出负对比学习（NCL）分支，利用负原型（障碍物）细化自由空间预测；3) 设计两阶段注意力深度模块，实现1D深度向量与RGB图像的水平、垂直对齐；4) 采用少样本分割范式减少对大规模标注数据的依赖。
AI.result: 在自采集的室内RGB-D可通行性数据集上，方法在1-shot和5-shot设置下均优于现有FSS和RGB-D分割基线，mIoU最高提升9%，验证了负原型和稀疏深度融合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 负原型对比学习与稀疏深度融合显著提升了室内可通行区域分割的鲁棒性和效率，为数据稀缺场景下的机器人导航提供了有效解决方案。

title: Pavement Missing Condition Data Imputation through Collective Learning-Based Graph Neural Networks
summary: Pavement condition data is important in providing information regarding the current state of the road network and in determining the needs of maintenance and rehabilitation treatments. However, the condition data is often incomplete due to various reasons such as sensor errors and non-periodic inspection schedules. Missing data, especially data missing systematically, presents loss of information, reduces statistical power, and introduces biased assessment. Existing methods in dealing with missing data usually discard entire data points with missing values or impute through data correlation. In this paper, we used a collective learning-based Graph Convolutional Networks, which integrates both features of adjacent sections and dependencies between observed section conditions to learn missing condition values. Unlike other variants of graph neural networks, the proposed approach is able to capture dependent relationship between the conditions of adjacent pavement sections. In the case study, pavement condition data collected from Texas Department of Transportation Austin District were used. Experiments show that the proposed model was able to produce promising results in imputing the missing data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图卷积网络（GCN）的集体学习方法，用于填补缺失的路面状况数据，通过捕捉相邻路段间的空间依赖关系，在真实数据集上取得了良好的填补效果。
AI.motivation: 路面状况数据对于评估道路网络现状和制定维护计划至关重要，但数据常因传感器误差或非周期性检查而缺失，系统性的数据缺失会导致信息丢失、统计效力降低和评估偏差。现有的缺失数据处理方法通常删除含缺失值的样本或基于数据相关性进行填补，无法充分利用路段间的空间依赖关系。
AI.method: 提出了一种集体学习型图卷积网络（GCN），该方法整合了相邻路段的特征和观测路段状况之间的依赖关系来学习缺失的数值。与其他图神经网络变体不同，该方法能够捕捉相邻路面路段状况之间的依赖关系，从而更准确地填补缺失数据。
AI.result: 使用德克萨斯州交通部奥斯汀区收集的路面状况数据进行案例研究，实验结果表明所提出的模型在填补缺失数据方面取得了良好的效果。
AI.conclusion: 基于图卷积网络的集体学习方法能够有效利用相邻路段的空间依赖关系，为路面状况数据的缺失值填补提供了一种有效且准确的方法，有助于提高道路网络状态评估的准确性。

title: Learning to Rank the Initial Branching Order of SAT Solvers
comment: Published at VerifAI-2: The Second Workshop on AI Verification in the Wild
summary: Finding good branching orders is key to solving SAT problems efficiently, but finding such branching orders is a difficult problem.
