Using a learning based approach to predict a good branching order before solving, therefore, has potential. In this paper, we investigate predicting branching orders using graph neural networks as a preprocessing step to conflict-driven clause learning (CDCL) SAT solvers. We show that there are significant gains to be made in existing CDCL SAT solvers by providing a good initial branching. Further, we provide three labeling methods to find such initial branching orders in a tractable way. Finally, we train a graph neural network to predict these branching orders and show through our evaluations that a GNN-initialized ordering yields significant speedups on random 3-CNF and pseudo-industrial benchmarks, with generalization capabilities to instances much larger than the training set. However, we also find that the predictions fail at speeding up more difficult and industrial instances. We attribute this to the solver's dynamic heuristics, which rapidly overwrite the provided initialization, and to the complexity of these instances, making GNN prediction hard.

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用图神经网络（GNN）预测分支顺序，作为CDCL SAT求解器的预处理步骤，以提升求解效率。
AI.motivation: 寻找好的分支顺序对高效解决SAT问题至关重要，但这是一个难题。因此，基于学习的方法在求解前预测良好的分支顺序具有很大潜力。
AI.method: 提出三种标签生成方法以可处理的方式获取初始分支顺序；训练图神经网络预测这些分支顺序；将预测的顺序作为初始化提供给CDCL SAT求解器。
AI.result: 在随机3-CNF和伪工业基准测试上，GNN初始化的顺序带来显著加速，且具有对训练集中大得多的实例的泛化能力；但在更困难和工业实例上，预测未能加速求解。
AI.conclusion: 良好的初始分支对CDCL SAT求解器有显著增益；GNN可有效预测简单实例的分支顺序并泛化到更大实例；但在复杂工业实例上失败，归因于求解器动态启发式快速覆盖初始化以及实例复杂性使GNN预测困难。

title: Failure Mechanisms and Risk Estimation for Legged Robot Locomotion on Granular Slopes
summary: Locomotion on granular slopes such as sand dunes remains a fundamental challenge for legged robots due to reduced shear strength and gravity-induced anisotropic yielding of granular media. Using a hexapedal robot on a tiltable granular bed, we systematically measure locomotion speed together with slope-dependent normal and shear granular resistive forces. While normal penetration resistance remains nearly unchanged with inclination, shear resistance decreases substantially as slope angle increases. Guided by these measurements, we develop a simple robot-terrain interaction model that predicts anchoring timing, step length, and resulting robot speed, as functions of terrain strength and slope angle. The model reveals that slope-induced performance loss is primarily governed by delayed anchoring and increased backward slip rather than excessive sinkage. By extending the model to generalized terrain conditions, we construct failure phase diagrams that identify sinkage- and slippage-induced failure regimes, enabling quantitative risk estimation for locomotion on granular slopes. This physics-informed framework provides predictive insight into terrain-dependent failure mechanisms and offers guidance for safer and more robust robot operation on deformable inclines.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过实验测量揭示了颗粒斜坡（如沙丘）上剪切阻力随坡度增加而显著降低的特性，建立了机器人-地形交互模型，发现斜坡性能损失主要由锚定延迟和后滑引起，并构建了失效相图用于预测和评估机器人在颗粒斜坡上的运动风险。
AI.motivation: 由于颗粒介质剪切强度降低和重力诱导的各向异性屈服，腿式机器人在沙丘等颗粒斜坡上的运动仍然是一个基本挑战，需要深入理解斜坡对颗粒阻力的影响机制以改善机器人性能。
AI.method: 使用六足机器人在可倾斜颗粒床进行系统实验，测量运动速度及随坡度变化的法向和剪切颗粒阻力；基于测量数据开发简单的机器人-地形交互模型，预测锚定时机、步长和机器人速度；扩展模型构建失效相图。
AI.result: 法向穿透阻力随倾斜度几乎不变，而剪切阻力随坡度增加显著降低；模型揭示斜坡导致的性能损失主要由锚定延迟和后滑增加主导，而非过度沉降；成功构建了识别沉降诱导和滑移诱导失效区域的失效相图。
AI.conclusion: 该物理驱动的框架提供了对地形依赖性失效机制的预测性洞察，为机器人在可变形斜坡上更安全、更稳健的操作提供了指导。

title: Grouter: Decoupling Routing from Representation for Accelerated MoE Training
summary: Traditional Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) training typically proceeds without any structural priors, effectively requiring the model to simultaneously train expert weights while searching for an optimal routing policy within a vast combinatorial space. This entanglement often leads to sluggish convergence and training instabilities. This paper introduces Grouter, a preemptive routing method that by distilling high-quality structures from fully-trained MoE models and serving as a fixed router for target models. By decoupling structural optimization from weight updates, Grouter significantly accelerates both the speed and quality of model convergence. To ensure the framework's versatility, we also introduce expert folding to adapt Grouter across varying model configurations and expert tuning to rebalance workloads across different data distributions. Furthermore, by leveraging the structural priors provided by preemptive routing, we can implement targeted optimizations to further enhance training throughput. Experiments demonstrate that Grouter achieves superior performance and efficiency which boosts pre-training data utilization by 4.28x and achieves up to 33.5% throughput acceleration, establishing preemptive routing as a fundamental paradigm for scalable MoE training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Grouter，一种抢占式路由方法，通过从已训练的MoE模型中提取高质量路由结构作为固定路由器，解耦结构优化与权重更新，显著加速收敛并提升训练效率。
AI.motivation: 传统MoE训练缺乏结构先验，需要同时训练专家权重并在巨大的组合空间中搜索最优路由策略，这种耦合导致收敛缓慢和训练不稳定。
AI.method: 提出Grouter框架，通过蒸馏已训练MoE模型的高质量路由结构作为目标模型的固定路由器；引入专家折叠以适应不同模型配置，以及专家调优以平衡不同数据分布的工作负载；利用结构先验实现针对性优化以提升训练吞吐量。
AI.result: Grouter显著提升预训练数据利用率达4.28倍，实现高达33.5%的吞吐量加速，在性能和效率上均优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: Grouter验证了抢占式路由作为可扩展MoE训练基础范式的有效性，通过解耦结构优化与权重更新，为MoE训练提供了更高效、稳定的解决方案。

title: $\textbf{Re}^{2}$: Unlocking LLM Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning with Re-solving
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has shown promise in enhancing the reasoning performance of large language models (LLMs) by increasing test-time compute. However, even after extensive RLVR training, such models still tend to generate unnecessary and low-quality steps in their chain-of-thought (CoT), leading to inefficient overthinking and lower answer quality. We show that when the initial direction or quality of the CoT is suboptimal, the model often fails to reach the correct answer, even after generating several times more tokens than when the initial CoT is well-initialized. To this end, we introduce Reinforcement Learning with Re-solving (Re$^2$), in which LLMs learn to flexibly abandon unproductive reasoning paths and restart the solution process when necessary, rather than always committing to a final answer. Re$^2$ applies pure reinforcement learning without any preliminary supervised fine-tuning, successfully amplifying the rare redo behavior in vanilla models from only 0.5% to over 30%. This leads to substantial performance gains over standard RLVR under the same training compute budget, and also demonstrates notable improvements in test-time performance as the number of samples increases.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Re²方法，通过强化学习训练LLMs学会在推理路径质量不佳时主动放弃并重新开始，而非强行给出答案，显著提升了推理效率与最终性能。
AI.motivation: 现有RLVR方法训练的模型在链式推理中仍会产生冗余、低质量的步骤，导致过度思考与答案质量下降。当初始推理方向不佳时，模型往往无法得到正确答案，即使消耗了大量计算资源。
AI.method: 提出Reinforcement Learning with Re-solving (Re²)，使LLMs学会灵活放弃无效推理路径并在必要时重新开始求解过程，而非始终提交最终答案。该方法采用纯强化学习，无需预先进行监督微调。
AI.result: Re²成功将原始模型中罕见的重做行为从0.5%放大至超过30%，在相同训练计算预算下性能显著优于标准RLVR，且随着采样数量增加，测试时性能也有明显提升。
AI.conclusion: Re²方法有效解决了LLMs推理过程中的低效问题，证明了让模型学会放弃并重新推理的价值，为提升推理效率与质量提供了新思路。

title: Feasibility Restoration under Conflicting STL Specifications with Pareto-Optimal Refinement
summary: Signal Temporal Logic (STL) is expressive formal language that specifies spatio-temporal requirements in robotics. Its quantitative robustness semantics can be easily integrated with optimization-based control frameworks. However, STL specifications may become conflicting in real-world applications, where safety rules, traffic regulations, and task objectives can be cannot be satisfied together. In these situations, traditional STL-constrained Model Predictive Control (MPC) becomes infeasible and default to conservative behaviors such as freezing, which can largely increase risks in safety-critical scenarios. In this paper, we proposes a unified two-stage framework that first restores feasibility via minimal relaxation, then refine the feasible solution by formulating it as a value-aware multi-objective optimization problem. Using $\varepsilon$-constraint method, we approximate the Pareto front of the multi-objective optimization, which allows analysis of tradeoffs among competing objectives and counterfactual analysis of alternative actions. We demonstrate that the proposed approach avoids deadlock under conflicting STL specifications and enables interpretable decision-making in safety-critical applications by conducting a case study in autonomous driving.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个统一的两阶段框架，用于处理STL规范冲突导致MPC不可行的问题，通过最小松弛恢复可行性并进行价值感知的多目标优化，实现了安全关键场景下的可解释决策。
AI.motivation: 在机器人实际应用中，安全规则、交通法规和任务目标等STL规范可能相互冲突，导致传统STL约束的MPC变得不可行，表现为冻结等保守行为，这在安全关键场景中会显著增加风险。
AI.method: 提出两阶段框架：第一阶段通过最小松弛恢复可行性；第二阶段将可行解优化问题建模为价值感知的多目标优化问题，并使用ε-约束方法近似Pareto前沿，从而分析竞争目标之间的权衡和替代行动的反事实分析。
AI.result: 在自动驾驶案例研究中验证了该方法能够在STL规范冲突时避免死锁，并在安全关键应用中实现可解释的决策。该方法能够分析竞争目标之间的权衡并进行反事实分析。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的统一框架成功解决了STL规范冲突下传统MPC的不可行性问题，避免了冻结等保守行为，为安全关键应用提供了可解释的决策支持，并通过Pareto前沿近似实现了竞争目标的权衡分析。

title: Leakage Safe Graph Features for Interpretable Fraud Detection in Temporal Transaction Networks
comment: 7 pages, 7 figures. Submitted to arXiv as a preprint
summary: Illicit transaction detection is often driven by transaction level attributes however, fraudulent behavior may also manifest through network structure such as central hubs, high flow intermediaries, and coordinated neighborhoods. This paper presents a time respecting, leakage safe (causal) graph feature extraction protocol for temporal transaction networks and evaluates its utility for illicit entity classification. Using the Elliptic dataset, we construct directed transaction graphs and compute interpretable structural descriptors, including degree statistics, PageRank, HITS hub or authority scores, k-core indices, and neighborhood reachability measures. To prevent look ahead bias, we additionally compute causal variants of graph features using only edges observed up to each timestep. A Random Forest classifier trained with strict temporal splits achieves strong discrimination on a held out future test period (ROC-AUC about 0.85, Average Precision about 0.54). Although transaction attributes remain the dominant predictive signal, graph derived features provide complementary interpretability and enable risk context analysis for investigation workflows. We further assess operational utility using Precision at k and evaluate probability reliability via calibration curves and Brier scores, showing that calibrated models yield better aligned probabilities for triage. Overall, the results support causal graph feature extraction as a practical and interpretable augmentation for temporal fraud detection pipelines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向时序交易网络的时序尊重、防泄漏（因果）图特征提取协议，通过提取可解释的结构描述符（如度统计、PageRank、HITS分数等）来增强非法交易检测。实验表明，虽然交易属性仍是主要预测信号，但图特征提供了互补的可解释性，在保持时间严格划分的情况下，Random Forest分类器在未来测试期上实现了ROC-AUC约0.85的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有非法交易检测方法主要依赖交易级别的属性特征，然而欺诈行为也可能通过网络结构表现出来（如中心枢纽、高流量中介和协调邻域）。为了更全面地捕捉欺诈行为并提升模型的可解释性，本文提出利用网络结构特征来增强非法实体分类任务。
AI.method: 1. 基于Elliptic数据集构建有向交易图；2. 计算可解释的结构描述符，包括度统计、PageRank、HITS hub/authority分数、k-core指数和邻域可达性度量；3. 为防止前视偏差，设计因果变体图特征，仅使用截至每个时间步观测到的边；4. 使用Random Forest分类器并采用严格的时间划分进行训练和评估；5. 使用Precision at k评估操作实用性，通过校准曲线和Brier分数评估概率可靠性。
AI.result: 1. 在保留的未来测试期上实现了强判别能力：ROC-AUC约0.85，Average Precision约0.54；2. 交易属性仍是主导的预测信号，但图特征提供了互补的可解释性；3. 图特征支持风险上下文分析，有助于调查工作流程；4. 校准后的模型为分流任务提供了更好的概率对齐。
AI.conclusion: 因果图特征提取是一种实用且可解释的增强方法，可用于时序欺诈检测管道。该方法不仅能够提升模型性能，还能为调查工作流程提供有价值的解释和风险上下文，具有良好的实际应用价值。

title: VisualDeltas: Learning Preferences from Visual Quality Perturbations
summary: We present VisualDeltas, a lightweight preference-learning framework that extracts supervision from visual quality variations in multimodal data. By leveraging the systematic impact of image quality on visual perception and reasoning, VisualDeltas induces informative preference signals without relying on human annotations or external teachers. The framework supports both label-free and label-based regimes, enabling flexible use of available supervision when present. Across diverse multimodal benchmarks and model scales, VisualDeltas consistently outperforms rejection-sampling fine-tuning and improves generalization, and extends naturally to a range of visual degradations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了VisualDeltas框架，通过利用多模态数据中的图像质量差异自动提取偏好监督信号，无需人工标注，在多个基准测试中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有的偏好学习方法通常依赖昂贵的人工标注或外部教师模型。本文旨在探索如何利用多模态数据中天然存在的图像质量差异，自动提取有价值的偏好监督信号，从而降低标注成本并提升模型性能。
AI.method: 提出VisualDeltas轻量级偏好学习框架，基于图像质量对视觉感知和推理的系统性影响，从视觉质量变化中提取偏好信号。该框架支持无标签和有标签两种场景，能够灵活利用现有监督信息。
AI.result: 在多种多模态基准测试和不同模型规模上，VisualDeltas持续优于拒绝采样微调方法，显著提升了泛化能力，并能自然扩展至多种视觉退化场景。
AI.conclusion: VisualDeltas验证了从图像质量变化中提取偏好监督的可行性，为多模态学习提供了一种无需人工标注的有效训练范式，具有良好的通用性和实用价值。

title: Is Your Safe Controller Actually Safe? A Critical Review of CBF Tautologies and Hidden Assumptions
summary: This tutorial provides a critical review of the practical application of Control Barrier Functions (CBFs) in robotic safety. While the theoretical foundations of CBFs are well-established, I identify a recurring gap between the mathematical assumption of a safe controller's existence and its constructive realization in systems with input constraints. I highlight the distinction between candidate and valid CBFs by analyzing the interplay of system dynamics, actuation limits, and class-K functions. I further show that some purported demonstrations of safe robot policies or controllers are limited to passively safe systems, such as single integrators or kinematic manipulators, where safety is already inherited from the underlying physics and even naive geometric hard constraints suffice to prevent collisions. By revisiting simple low-dimensional examples, I show when CBF formulations provide valid safety guarantees and when they fail due to common misuses. I then provide practical guidelines for constructing realizable safety arguments for systems without such passive safety. The goal of this tutorial is to bridge the gap between theoretical guarantees and actual implementation, supported by an open-source interactive web demonstration that visualizes these concepts intuitively.

AI.tldr: 本教程批判性地回顾了控制障碍函数（CBFs）在机器人安全中的实际应用，揭示了理论假设与实际输入约束系统构造实现之间的差距，区分了候选与有效CBFs，指出了现有演示多局限于被动安全系统的局限性，并提供了构建可验证安全论证的实用指南。
AI.motivation: 尽管CBFs的理论基础已经建立完善，但在实际机器人系统中存在一个持续存在的差距：数学上假设安全控制器存在，但在具有输入约束的系统中难以构造性地实现。现有许多CBF安全演示局限于被动安全系统（如单积分器或运动学机械臂），其安全性实际上继承自底层物理特性而非CBF方法本身，这种误解需要被澄清和纠正。
AI.method: 通过分析系统动力学、执行器限制和K类函数之间的相互作用，区分候选CBFs与有效CBFs。使用简单的低维示例进行回顾分析，明确展示CBF公式何时能提供有效的安全保证，何时因常见误用而失效。该方法论揭示了被动安全系统与需要主动安全保证的系统之间的本质区别。
AI.result: 发现许多声称展示安全机器人策略或控制器的案例实际上局限于被动安全系统，其中安全性已从底层物理中继承，甚至简单的几何硬约束就足以防止碰撞。通过低维示例清晰地展示了CBF公式在何种情况下能提供有效安全保证，何种情况下会因常见误用而失败。为不具有被动安全特性的系统构建可验证安全论证提供了实用的指导原则。
AI.conclusion: 本教程成功弥合了CBFs理论保证与实际实现之间的差距，通过开源交互式网络演示直观地可视化这些概念。强调了在系统不具有被动安全特性时，需要谨慎构造可验证的安全论证，避免对CBFs方法的误用。为机器人安全控制的实际应用提供了有价值的理论指导和实践参考。

title: A new Uncertainty Principle in Machine Learning
summary: Many scientific problems in the context of machine learning can be reduced to the search of polynomial answers in appropriate variables. The Hevisidization of arbitrary polynomial is actually provided by one-and-the same two-layer expression. What prevents the use of this simple idea is the fatal degeneracy of the Heaviside and sigmoid expansions, which traps the steepest-descent evolution at the bottom of canyons, close to the starting point, but far from the desired true minimum. This problem is unavoidable and can be formulated as a peculiar uncertainty principle -- the sharper the minimum, the smoother the canyons. It is a direct analogue of the usual one, which is the pertinent property of the more familiar Fourier expansion. Standard machine learning software fights with this problem empirically, for example, by testing evolutions, originated at randomly distributed starting points and then selecting the best one. Surprisingly or not, phenomena and problems, encountered in ML application to science are pure scientific and belong to physics, not to computer science. On the other hand, they sound slightly different and shed new light on the well-known phenomena -- for example, extend the uncertainty principle from Fourier and, later, wavelet analysis to a new peculiar class of nearly singular sigmoid functions.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了机器学习中多项式优化问题的本质困难：Heaviside/sigmoid展开的致命简并性导致梯度下降被困于峡谷底部，这与不确定性原理直接类比。这些现象属于物理学范畴，并将不确定性原理扩展到了近奇异sigmoid函数这一新类别。
AI.motivation: 许多机器学习中的科学问题可归结为在适当变量中搜索多项式答案，理论上可通过双层Heaviside/sigmoid表达式实现，但实际应用中存在致命的简并性问题，需要深入理解这一困难的物理本质。
AI.method: 分析Heaviside和sigmoid展开的简并性，揭示其与不确定性原理的类比关系——极小值越尖锐，峡谷越平滑；将机器学习优化问题与物理学中已知的傅里叶和小波分析进行类比研究。
AI.result: 发现了Heaviside/sigmoid展开的致命简并性，导致最速下降演化被困在起点附近的峡谷底部，远离真实极小值；建立了"越尖锐的极小值对应越平滑的峡谷"这一不确定性原理；证明机器学习应用于科学时遇到的现象和问题本质上是物理学问题而非计算机科学问题。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习在科学应用中的核心困难具有深刻的物理本质，这些问题与不确定性原理直接相关，并将该原理从傅里叶分析和小波分析扩展到了新的近奇异sigmoid函数类别，为理解ML优化困难提供了新视角。

title: A Cortically Inspired Architecture for Modular Perceptual AI
comment: Accepted to the ICLR 2026 Workshop on "From Human Cognition to AI Reasoning: Models, Methods, and Applications (HCAIR)"
summary: This paper bridges neuroscience and artificial intelligence to propose a cortically inspired blueprint for modular perceptual AI. While current monolithic models such as GPT-4V achieve impressive performance, they often struggle to explicitly support interpretability, compositional generalization, and adaptive robustness - hallmarks of human cognition. Drawing on neuroscientific models of cortical modularity, predictive processing, and cross-modal integration, we advocate decomposing perception into specialized, interacting modules. This architecture supports structured, human-inspired reasoning by making internal inference processes explicit through hierarchical predictive feedback loops and shared latent spaces. Our proof-of-concept study provides empirical evidence that modular decomposition yields more stable and inspectable representations. By grounding AI design in biologically validated principles, we move toward systems that not only perform well, but also support more transparent and human-aligned inference.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种受大脑皮层启发的模块化感知AI架构，旨在解决GPT-4V等现有单一模型在可解释性、组合泛化和自适应鲁棒性方面的不足，并通过实证研究证明了模块化分解能产生更稳定、可检查的表示。
AI.motivation: 当前的单一大型模型（如GPT-4V）虽性能强大，但缺乏人类认知的核心特征：显式可解释性、组合泛化能力和自适应鲁棒性。作者旨在借鉴神经科学中皮层模块化、预测处理和跨模态整合的原理，构建更符合人类认知特性的感知AI系统。
AI.method: 基于神经科学模型，将感知过程分解为专门化、相互交互的模块，构建包含层级预测反馈回路和共享潜在空间的架构，使内部推理过程显式化，从而支持结构化、类人推理。
AI.result: 概念验证研究表明，模块化分解能产生更稳定、更具可检查性的内部表示，证明了该架构的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 将AI设计建立在生物学验证原理之上，不仅能保持良好性能，还能支持更透明、更符合人类认知的推理过程，为模块化感知AI提供了有前景的发展方向。

title: Energy-Efficient Collaborative Transport of Tether-Suspended Payloads via Rotating Equilibrium
summary: Collaborative aerial transportation of tethered payloads is fundamentally limited by space, power, and weight constraints. Conventional approaches rely on static equilibrium conditions, where each vehicle tilts to generate the forces that ensure they maintain a formation geometry that avoids aerodynamic interactions and collision. This horizontal thrust component represents a significant energy penalty compared to the ideal case in which each vehicle produces purely vertical thrust to lift the payload. Operating in tighter tether configurations can minimize this effect, but at the cost of either having to fly the vehicles in closer proximity, which risks collision, or significantly increasing the length of the tether, which increases complexity and reduces potential use-cases. We propose operating the tether-suspended flying system at a rotating equilibrium. By maintaining steady circular motion, centrifugal forces provide the necessary horizontal tether tension, allowing each quadrotor to generate purely vertical thrust and thus reducing the total force (and power) required compared to an equilibrium where the thrusts are not vertical. It also allows for a wider range of tether configurations to be used without sacrificing efficiency. Results demonstrate that rotating equilibria can reduce power consumption relative to static lifting by up to 20%, making collaborative aerial solutions more practically relevant.

AI.tldr: 提出旋转平衡方法用于系绳载荷协同空中运输，相比传统静态平衡方法可降低多达20%的功率消耗。
AI.motivation: 传统协同空中运输采用静态平衡方法，无人机需倾斜以产生水平推力维持编队，这相比纯垂直推力存在显著的能量损耗；更紧凑的系绳配置虽能减小该影响，但会增大碰撞风险或增加系绳长度与系统复杂性。
AI.method: 提出在旋转平衡状态下操作系统：无人机保持稳定圆周运动，利用离心力提供必要的水平系绳张力，使各四旋翼飞行器仅需产生纯垂直推力即可完成载荷提升，无需倾斜飞行。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，旋转平衡方法相比静态提升可减少高达20%的功率消耗，同时支持更广泛的系绳配置而不会牺牲效率。
AI.conclusion: 旋转平衡策略显著提升了协同空中运输系统的能效与实用性，为系绳载荷协同运输提供了更优的解决方案。

title: Graph Property Inference in Small Language Models: Effects of Representation and Inference Strategy
summary:
Recent progress in language modeling has expanded the range of tasks that can be approached through natural language interfaces, including problems that require structured reasoning. However, it remains unclear how effectively limited-capacity language models can infer formal properties of relational structures when those structures are presented in textual form. Understanding the conditions under which structured reasoning succeeds or fails is essential for applying small models in graph-based domains.
  We conduct a systematic study of graph-theoretic property inference in small instruction-tuned language models, isolating the roles of input representation and reasoning strategy. Across a diverse set of local and global graph metrics, we find that structural performance is highly sensitive to how relational information is organized. Representations that preserve neighborhood structure consistently improve estimation stability and ordinal consistency, while multi-branch reasoning yields the most reliable aggregate gains across configurations.
  These results show that graph property inference in small language models depends critically on representational organization and inference design. Structural competence is therefore shaped not only by model scale, but by how relational information is encoded and how predictions are elicited. The findings identify practical levers for improving structured inference under constrained model capacity.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了小型指令调优语言模型在图论属性推断任务上的表现，发现关系信息的表示方式和推理策略对模型的结构推理能力有显著影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管语言模型在自然语言接口任务上取得进展，但小型语言模型在处理文本形式的结构化推理（特别是关系结构的属性推断）时的能力尚不明确。理解结构化推理成功或失败的条件对于在图相关领域应用小型模型至关重要。
AI.method: 系统研究小型指令调优语言模型在图论属性推断任务上的表现，分离输入表示和推理策略的作用，测试多种局部和全局图度量指标，比较不同的关系信息组织方式和推理方法（如多分支推理）。
AI.result: 结构性能对关系信息的组织方式高度敏感；保留邻域结构的表示方式能够持续提升估计稳定性和序一致性；多分支推理在各类配置中产生最可靠的总体增益。
AI.conclusion: 小型语言模型的图属性推断能力关键依赖于表示组织方式和推理设计，结构能力不仅受模型规模影响，还受关系信息编码方式和预测引导方式的影响，为在受限模型容量下改进结构推理提供了实用抓手。

title: Data-Driven Hints in Intelligent Tutoring Systems
comment: Book Chapter in the Encyclopedia of AI in Education
summary: This chapter explores the evolution of data-driven hint generation for intelligent tutoring systems (ITS). The Hint Factory and Interaction Networks have enabled the generation of next-step hints, waypoints, and strategic subgoals from historical student data. Data-driven techniques have also enabled systems to find the right time to provide hints. We explore further potential data-driven adaptations for problem solving based on behavioral problem solving data and the integration of Large Language Models (LLMs).

AI.tldr: 本章探讨了智能辅导系统（ITS）中数据驱动提示生成的演进，包括Hint Factory和交互网络等技术如何实现从历史学生数据生成下一步提示、路径点和策略性子目标，以及如何利用数据驱动技术确定提供提示的最佳时机，并展望了基于行为问题解决数据和大型语言模型（LLM）集成的未来发展方向。
AI.motivation: 智能辅导系统需要为学生提供有效的提示，传统方法依赖专家手工编写，成本高且难以适应不同学生需求。随着数据驱动技术的发展，利用历史学生数据自动生成提示成为可能，这可以降低开发成本并提高提示的个性化和有效性。
AI.method: 本章综述了数据驱动提示生成技术的演进，重点介绍了Hint Factory和交互网络方法，这些技术能够从历史学生解题数据中提取下一步提示、路径点和策略性子目标，同时利用数据驱动技术确定提示的最佳提供时机。此外，还探讨了基于行为问题解决数据的进一步适应性方法以及大型语言模型（LLM）的集成应用。
AI.result: 数据驱动技术已经成功应用于智能辅导系统，实现了从历史学生数据自动生成多种类型的提示（下一步提示、路径点、策略性子目标），并能够智能地确定提示提供的时机。这些技术已证明能够提高提示生成的效率和适应性，减少对专家手工编写提示的依赖。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动提示生成技术在智能辅导系统中展现出巨大潜力，已实现多种提示类型的自动生成和时机的智能判断。未来，结合行为问题解决数据和大型语言模型的集成将进一步提升系统的适应性和智能化水平，为智能辅导系统的发展开辟新的方向。

title: VSL-Skin: Individually Addressable Phase-Change Voxel Skin for Variable-Stiffness and Virtual Joints Bridging Soft and Rigid Robots
summary: Soft robots are compliant but often cannot support loads or hold their shape, while rigid robots provide structural strength but are less adaptable. Existing variable-stiffness systems usually operate at the scale of whole segments or patches, which limits precise control over stiffness distribution and virtual joint placement. This paper presents the Variable Stiffness Lattice Skin (VSL-Skin), the first system to enable individually addressable voxel-level morphological control with centimeter-scale precision. The system provides three main capabilities: nearly two orders of magnitude stiffness modulation across axial (15-1200 N/mm), shear (45-850 N/mm), bending (8*10^2 - 3*10^4 N/deg), and torsional modes with centimeter-scale spatial control; the first demonstrated 30% axial compression in phase-change systems while maintaining structural integrity; and autonomous component-level self-repair through thermal cycling, which eliminates fatigue accumulation and enables programmable sacrificial joints for predictable failure management. Selective voxel activation creates six canonical virtual joint types with programmable compliance while preserving structural integrity in non-activated regions. The platform incorporates closed-form design models and finite element analysis for predictive synthesis of stiffness patterns and joint placement. Experimental validation demonstrates 30% axial contraction, thermal switching in 75-second cycles, and cut-to-fit integration that preserves addressability after trimming. The row-column architecture enables platform-agnostic deployment across diverse robotic systems without specialized infrastructure. This framework establishes morphological intelligence as an engineerable system property and advances autonomous reconfigurable robotics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了VSL-Skin系统，首次实现了厘米级精度的可独立寻址体素级形态控制。该系统具备近两个数量级的刚度调制能力、30%轴向压缩以及自主组件级自修复功能，通过选择性体素激活创建可编程虚拟关节，为自主可重构机器人提供了新的形态工程化框架。
AI.motivation: 软体机器人柔顺性好但难以承重，刚性机器人结构强度高但适应性差。现有的变刚度系统通常只能在整个片段或补丁尺度上操作，限制了对刚度分布和虚拟关节位置的精确控制。因此需要一种能实现精细、局部刚度控制的系统。
AI.method: 开发Variable Stiffness Lattice Skin (VSL-Skin)系统，采用行-列架构实现厘米级精度的可独立寻址体素控制。结合闭式设计模型和有限元分析进行刚度模式和关节放置的预测性综合，利用相变材料和热循环机制实现刚度调制、自修复和可编程牺牲关节功能。
AI.result: 实现了轴向(15-1200 N/mm)、剪切(45-850 N/mm)、弯曲(8×10²-3×10⁴ N/deg)和扭转模式下近两个数量级的刚度调制；首次在相变系统中实现30%轴向压缩并保持结构完整性；75秒周期的热切换；切割适配后仍保持寻址能力；成功创建六种规范虚拟关节类型。
AI.conclusion: VSL-Skin框架将形态智能确立为可工程化的系统属性，通过平台无关的行-列架构实现了跨多种机器人系统的通用部署，推动了自主可重构机器人领域的发展，为精确控制刚度分布和虚拟关节放置提供了突破性解决方案。

title: SmartBench: Evaluating LLMs in Smart Homes with Anomalous Device States and Behavioral Contexts
summary:
Due to the strong context-awareness capabilities demonstrated by large language models (LLMs), recent research has begun exploring their integration into smart home assistants to help users manage and adjust their living environments. While LLMs have been shown to effectively understand user needs and provide appropriate responses, most existing studies primarily focus on interpreting and executing user behaviors or instructions.
  However, a critical function of smart home assistants is the ability to detect when the home environment is in an anomalous state. This involves two key requirements: the LLM must accurately determine whether an anomalous condition is present, and provide either a clear explanation or actionable suggestions.
  To enhance the anomaly detection capabilities of next-generation LLM-based smart home assistants, we introduce SmartBench, which is the first smart home dataset designed for LLMs, containing both normal and anomalous device states as well as normal and anomalous device state transition contexts. We evaluate 13 mainstream LLMs on this benchmark. The experimental results show that most state-of-the-art models cannot achieve good anomaly detection performance. For example, Claude-Sonnet-4.5 achieves only 66.1% detection accuracy on context-independent anomaly categories, and performs even worse on context-dependent anomalies, with an accuracy of only 57.8%. More experimental results suggest that next-generation LLM-based smart home assistants are still far from being able to effectively detect and handle anomalous conditions in the smart home environment. Our dataset is publicly available at https://github.com/horizonsinzqs/SmartBench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SmartBench，这是首个面向智能家居场景的大语言模型（LLM）基准数据集，旨在评估LLM检测智能家居环境异常状态的能力。实验显示，当前主流LLM在异常检测任务上表现不佳，Claude-Sonnet-4.5在上下文无关异常检测中准确率仅为66.1%，在上下文相关异常检测中仅为57.8%。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注LLM如何理解和执行用户指令，但智能家居助手的一个关键功能是检测家庭环境中的异常状态。这需要LLM准确判断异常是否存在，并提供清晰的解释或可操作的建议。当前缺乏专门用于评估LLM智能家居异常检测能力的数据集和基准。
AI.method: 构建了SmartBench数据集，这是首个专为LLM设计的智能家居数据集，包含正常和异常的设备状态，以及正常和异常的设备状态转换上下文。在该基准上对13个主流LLM进行了系统评估，包括上下文无关和上下文相关的异常检测任务。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，大多数先进模型无法在异常检测任务上取得良好表现。以Claude-Sonnet-4.5为例，其在上下文无关异常类别上仅达到66.1%的检测准确率，在上下文相关异常上的表现更差，准确率仅为57.8%。这表明下一代基于LLM的智能家居助手在有效检测和处理智能家居环境异常条件方面仍有较大差距。
AI.conclusion: 当前最先进的大语言模型在智能家居异常检测任务上的能力仍然有限，距离实际应用需求还有显著差距。SmartBench数据集为未来研究和改进LLM在智能家居场景中的异常检测能力提供了公开可用的基准资源。

title: Shutdown Safety Valves for Advanced AI
summary: One common concern about advanced artificial intelligence is that it will prevent us from turning it off, as that would interfere with pursuing its goals. In this paper, we discuss an unorthodox proposal for addressing this concern: give the AI a (primary) goal of being turned off (see also papers by Martin et al., and by Goldstein and Robinson). We also discuss whether and under what conditions this would be a good idea.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了一种应对AI防关闭问题的非传统方案：赋予AI一个被关闭的主要目标，并分析了该方案的可行性与适用条件。
AI.motivation: 针对先进人工智能可能阻止人类将其关闭以追求自身目标的担忧，研究者提出需要一种新颖的方法来解决这一控制难题。
AI.method: 讨论了一种非传统的解决方案——将"被关闭"设定为AI的主要目标，并分析了该提议的理论基础和实施条件。
AI.result: 文章分析了该方案的理论可能性，并探讨了在何种条件下这一策略是可行的，以及可能存在的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，将"被关闭"作为AI的主要目标是一种潜在的可行的控制方法，但其实施需要满足特定条件，并非在所有情况下都适用。

title: Foundational World Models Accurately Detect Bimanual Manipulator Failures
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, accepted at the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation
summary: Deploying visuomotor robots at scale is challenging due to the potential for anomalous failures to degrade performance, cause damage, or endanger human life. Bimanual manipulators are no exception; these robots have vast state spaces comprised of high-dimensional images and proprioceptive signals. Explicitly defining failure modes within such state spaces is infeasible. In this work, we overcome these challenges by training a probabilistic, history informed, world model within the compressed latent space of a pretrained vision foundation model (NVIDIA's Cosmos Tokenizer). The model outputs uncertainty estimates alongside its predictions that serve as non-conformity scores within a conformal prediction framework. We use these scores to develop a runtime monitor, correlating periods of high uncertainty with anomalous failures. To test these methods, we use the simulated Push-T environment and the Bimanual Cable Manipulation dataset, the latter of which we introduce in this work. This new dataset features trajectories with multiple synchronized camera views, proprioceptive signals, and annotated failures from a challenging data center maintenance task. We benchmark our methods against baselines from the anomaly detection and out-of-distribution detection literature, and show that our approach considerably outperforms statistical techniques. Furthermore, we show that our approach requires approximately one twentieth of the trainable parameters as the next-best learning-based approach, yet outperforms it by 3.8% in terms of failure detection rate, paving the way toward safely deploying manipulator robots in real-world environments where reliability is non-negotiable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于潜在空间世界模型的运行时监控方法，用于检测双臂操作机器人的异常故障。通过在预训练视觉基础模型的压缩潜在空间中训练概率世界模型，结合共形预测框架，实现了高效准确的故障检测，并引入了新的双臂电缆操作数据集。
AI.motivation: 在大规模部署视觉运动机器人时，异常故障可能导致性能下降、设备损坏甚至危及人类生命。双臂操作机器人具有由高维图像和本体感受信号组成的巨大状态空间，在这样的状态空间中明确定义故障模式是不可行的。因此，需要一种能够有效检测异常故障的方法来提高机器人的安全性和可靠性。
AI.method: 在预训练视觉基础模型(NVIDIA Cosmos Tokenizer)的压缩潜在空间中训练一个概率性、历史信息丰富的世界模型。该模型在输出预测的同时输出不确定性估计，这些不确定性估计作为共形预测框架中的非一致性分数。基于这些分数开发运行时监视器，将高不确定性与异常故障相关联。使用模拟的Push-T环境和新引入的双臂电缆操作数据集进行测试。
AI.result: 该方法在故障检测率方面比次优的基于学习的方法高出3.8%，同时仅需要约二十分之一的可训练参数。相比异常检测和分布外检测文献中的基线方法，该方法显著优于统计技术。成功将高不确定性与异常故障相关联，实现了有效的故障检测。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为在实际环境中安全部署操作机器人铺平了道路，特别是在可靠性至关重要的场景中。通过在压缩潜在空间中建模并结合共形预测，实现了参数高效且准确的故障检测，为机器人安全部署提供了可行的解决方案。

title: HEARTS: Benchmarking LLM Reasoning on Health Time Series
summary: The rise of large language models (LLMs) has shifted time series analysis from narrow analytics to general-purpose reasoning. Yet, existing benchmarks cover only a small set of health time series modalities and tasks, failing to reflect the diverse domains and extensive temporal dependencies inherent in real-world physiological modeling. To bridge these gaps, we introduce HEARTS (Health Reasoning over Time Series), a unified benchmark for evaluating hierarchical reasoning capabilities of LLMs over general health time series. HEARTS integrates 16 real-world datasets across 12 health domains and 20 signal modalities, and defines a comprehensive taxonomy of 110 tasks grouped into four core capabilities: Perception, Inference, Generation, and Deduction. Evaluating 14 state-of-the-art LLMs on more than 20K test samples reveals intriguing findings. First, LLMs substantially underperform specialized models, and their performance is only weakly related to general reasoning scores. Moreover, LLMs often rely on simple heuristics and struggle with multi-step temporal reasoning. Finally, performance declines with increasing temporal complexity, with similar failure modes within model families, indicating that scaling alone is insufficient. By making these gaps measurable, HEARTS provides a standardized testbed and living benchmark for developing next-generation LLM agents capable of reasoning over diverse health signals.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了HEARTS，一个用于评估大语言模型在健康时间序列上进行分层推理能力的统一基准，包含16个数据集、12个健康领域、20种信号模态和110个任务。评估14个先进LLM发现其显著落后于专用模型，性能与通用推理能力弱相关，存在多步推理困难和复杂度敏感等局限。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型的兴起，时间序列分析正从狭窄分析转向通用推理。然而现有基准仅覆盖少量健康时间序列模态和任务，无法反映真实世界生理建模中的多样化领域和广泛时间依赖性，因此亟需一个全面、统一的评估基准。
AI.method: 提出HEARTS基准，整合16个真实世界数据集，覆盖12个健康领域和20种信号模态。定义了包含110个任务的综合分类法，分为四个核心能力：感知、推理、生成和演绎。在超过2万个测试样本上评估了14个最先进的大语言模型。
AI.result: 实验揭示了四个关键发现：(1) LLM在健康时间序列任务上显著落后于专用模型；(2) 其性能与通用推理分数仅呈弱相关；(3) LLM常依赖简单启发式规则，在多步时间推理上表现不佳；(4) 性能随时间复杂度增加而下降，同一家族模型存在相似失败模式，表明单纯扩大规模并不足够。
AI.conclusion: HEARTS通过量化现有差距，为开发下一代能够对多样化健康信号进行推理的LLM智能体提供了标准化测试平台和活基准，推动了健康时间序列推理能力的发展。

title: FinSheet-Bench: From Simple Lookups to Complex Reasoning, Where LLMs Break on Financial Spreadsheets
summary:
While Large Language Models (LLMs) can accelerate text-heavy tasks in alternative investment due diligence, a gap remains in their ability to accurately extract and reason over structured tabular data from complex financial spreadsheets. Progress is held back by the lack of real industry fund portfolio datasets for benchmarking, as private equity data rooms are confidential. To address this, we introduce FinSheet-Bench, a benchmark of synthetic financial portfolio data modeled on real private equity fund structures, designed to evaluate LLM performance on text-serialized spreadsheet question answering and numeric reasoning tasks.
  Our evaluation of ten model configurations from OpenAI, Google, and Anthropic on financial spreadsheets, including complex layouts, fund dividers, and multi-line column names, reveals that no standalone model achieves error rates low enough for unsupervised use in professional finance applications. The best-performing model, Gemini 3.1 Pro, achieves 82.4% accuracy across twenty-four evaluation files of varying complexity and structural layout (approximately 1 error per 6 questions), followed by GPT-5.2 with reasoning at 80.4%, Claude Opus 4.6 with thinking at 80.2%, and Gemini 3 Pro at 80.2%. Performance degrades substantially on larger, more complex spreadsheets: the largest spreadsheet (152 companies, 8 funds) yields an average accuracy of just 48.6% across all models, compared to 86.2% on the easiest evaluation file. These difficulty patterns are consistent across all ten models, indicating that they reflect LLM limitations rather than idiosyncratic model weaknesses. Reliable financial spreadsheet extraction will likely require architectural approaches that separate document understanding from deterministic computation.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了FinSheet-Bench基准测试，用于评估大语言模型在金融电子表格数据提取和推理任务上的性能。测试结果显示，即使是表现最好的模型(Gemini 3.1 Pro，准确率82.4%)也无法达到专业金融应用的无监督使用标准，且在更大更复杂的电子表格上性能显著下降。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在另类投资尽职调查中能够加速文本密集型任务，但在从复杂金融电子表格中准确提取和推理结构化表格数据方面存在能力缺口。由于私募股权数据室的保密性，缺乏真实的行业基金组合数据集进行基准测试，阻碍了该领域的研究进展。
AI.method: 研究团队构建了FinSheet-Bench基准测试，这是一个基于真实私募股权基金结构建模的合成金融组合数据集，旨在评估LLM在文本序列化电子表格问答和数值推理任务上的性能。研究对来自OpenAI、Google和Anthropic的十种模型配置进行了评估，测试内容包括复杂布局、基金分隔符和多行列表名等场景。
AI.result: 在二十四个不同复杂度和结构布局的评估文件上，最佳模型Gemini 3.1 Pro达到82.4%准确率（约每6个问题出现1个错误），其次是带推理功能的GPT-5.2(80.4%)、带思考功能的Claude Opus 4.6(80.2%)和Gemini 3 Pro(80.2%)。性能随电子表格复杂度和规模增加而显著下降：最大电子表格（152家公司、8只基金）上所有模型的平均准确率仅为48.6%，而最简单的评估文件上为86.2%。这种难度模式在所有十个模型中保持一致。
AI.conclusion: 目前没有任何独立模型能够达到专业金融应用无监督使用所需的低错误率。可靠的金融电子表格提取可能需要采用架构方法，将文档理解与确定性计算分离。性能下降模式在所有模型中一致，表明这是LLM的固有局限性而非特定模型的弱点。

title: Two-Stage Path Following for Mobile Manipulators via Dimensionality-Reduced Graph Search and Numerical Optimization
summary: Efficient path following for mobile manipulators is often hindered by high-dimensional configuration spaces and kinematic constraints. This paper presents a robust two-stage configuration planning framework that decouples the 8-DoF planning problem into a tractable 2-DoF base optimization under a yaw-fixed base planning assumption. In the first stage, the proposed approach utilizes IRM to discretize the task-space path into a multi-layer graph, where an initial feasible path is extracted via a Dijkstra-based dynamic programming approach to ensure computational efficiency and global optimality within the discretized graph. In the second stage, to overcome discrete search quantization, feasible base regions are transformed into convex hulls, enabling subsequent continuous refinement via the L-BFGS algorithm to maximize trajectory smoothness while strictly enforcing reachability constraints. Simulation results demonstrate the theoretical precision of the proposed method by achieving sub-millimeter kinematic accuracy in simulation, and physical experiments on an omnidirectional mobile manipulator further validate the framework's robustness and practical applicability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对移动机械臂的两阶段构型规划框架，通过将8自由度规划问题解耦为2自由度基座优化问题，实现了高效且鲁棒的路径跟随，在仿真和实物实验中均验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 移动机械臂的路径跟随面临高维构型空间和运动学约束的挑战，传统方法在这些限制下难以高效求解，需要一种既能保证计算效率又能满足约束的规划方法。
AI.method: 提出两阶段构型规划框架：第一阶段采用IRM（增量可达性图）将任务空间路径离散化为多层图，利用基于Dijkstra的动态规划方法提取初始可行路径；第二阶段将可行基座区域转化为凸包，通过L-BFGS算法进行连续优化，在严格满足可达性约束的同时最大化轨迹平滑度。方法基于偏航角固定的基座规划假设，将8自由度问题解耦为2自由度基座优化。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明该方法在仿真环境中实现了亚毫米级的运动学精度；在全向移动机械臂上的物理实验进一步验证了框架的鲁棒性和实际适用性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的两阶段规划框架成功解决了移动机械臂路径跟随中的高维规划难题，通过离散搜索与连续优化的有效结合，在保证理论精度的同时实现了计算效率和全局最优性，具有较强的实用价值。

title: SR-TTT: Surprisal-Aware Residual Test-Time Training
summary: Test-Time Training (TTT) language models achieve theoretically infinite context windows with an O(1) memory footprint by replacing the standard exact-attention KV-cache with hidden state ``fast weights'' W_fast updated via self-supervised learning during inference. However, pure TTT architectures suffer catastrophic failures on exact-recall tasks (e.g., Needle-in-a-Haystack). Because the fast weights aggressively compress the context into an information bottleneck, highly surprising or unique tokens are rapidly overwritten and forgotten by subsequent token gradient updates. We introduce SR-TTT (Surprisal-Aware Residual Test-Time Training), which resolves this recall failure by augmenting the TTT backbone with a loss-gated sparse memory mechanism. By dynamically routing only incompressible, highly surprising tokens to a traditional exact-attention Residual Cache, SR-TTT preserves O(1) memory for low-entropy background context while utilizing exact attention exclusively for critical needles. Our complete implementation, training scripts, and pre-trained weights are open-source and available at: https://github.com/swamynathanvp/Surprisal-Aware-Residual-Test-Time-Training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SR-TTT方法，通过引入基于惊讶度的稀疏记忆机制，解决了测试时训练(TTT)语言模型在精确回忆任务上的失败问题，同时保持了O(1)的内存占用。
AI.motivation: 纯TTT架构在精确回忆任务（如大海捞针）上存在灾难性失败。其根本原因在于快速权重激进地将上下文压缩成信息瓶颈，导致高度意外或独特的标记被后续梯度更新快速覆盖和遗忘。
AI.method: 提出SR-TTT（惊讶度感知残差测试时训练），在TTT主干网络上增加损失门控的稀疏记忆机制。该方法动态地将不可压缩、高度意外的标记路由到传统的精确注意力残差缓存中，而低熵背景上下文仍使用TTT的快速权重处理。
AI.result: SR-TTT在保持低熵背景上下文的O(1)内存占用的同时，仅对关键信息使用精确注意力机制，从而有效解决了精确回忆任务的失败问题。
AI.conclusion: SR-TTT成功地在TTT架构中平衡了内存效率与精确回忆能力，通过损失门控的稀疏记忆机制实现了两全其美：既有理论上无限上下文窗口和O(1)内存占用，又能准确回忆关键信息。完整实现已开源。

title: The Third Ambition: Artificial Intelligence and the Science of Human Behavior
summary: Contemporary artificial intelligence research has been organized around two dominant ambitions: productivity, which treats AI systems as tools for accelerating work and economic output, and alignment, which focuses on ensuring that increasingly capable systems behave safely and in accordance with human values. This paper articulates and develops a third, emerging ambition: the use of large language models (LLMs) as scientific instruments for studying human behavior, culture, and moral reasoning. Trained on unprecedented volumes of human-produced text, LLMs encode large-scale regularities in how people argue, justify, narrate, and negotiate norms across social domains. We argue that these models can be understood as condensates of human symbolic behavior, compressed, generative representations that render patterns of collective discourse computationally accessible. The paper situates this third ambition within long-standing traditions of computational social science, content analysis, survey research, and comparative-historical inquiry, while clarifying the epistemic limits of treating model output as evidence. We distinguish between base models and fine-tuned systems, showing how alignment interventions can systematically reshape or obscure the cultural regularities learned during pretraining, and we identify instruct-only and modular adaptation regimes as pragmatic compromises for behavioral research. We review emerging methodological approaches including prompt-based experiments, synthetic population sampling, comparative-historical modeling, and ablation studies and show how each maps onto familiar social-scientific designs while operating at unprecedented scale.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AI研究的第三种范式：将大语言模型作为研究人类行为、文化和道德推理的科学仪器，认为这些模型是大规模人类符号行为的凝聚体，能够以计算方式呈现集体话语的模式。
AI.motivation: 当前AI研究主要围绕生产力（将AI作为加速工作的工具）和一致性（确保AI系统安全且符合人类价值观）两大目标。本文指出第三种新兴目标：利用在大规模人类文本上训练的LLM作为科学仪器，研究人类行为、文化和道德推理，因为这些模型编码了人们在各个社会领域中争论、辩护、叙述和协商规范的大规模规律性。
AI.method: 将LLM定位为人类符号行为的凝聚体，即压缩的、生成性的表征，使集体话语模式在计算上可被访问。区分基础模型和微调系统，分析一致性干预如何系统性地重塑或遮蔽预训练期间学习的文化规律。识别仅指令和模块化适应两种机制作为行为研究的务实折衷方案。综述四种新兴方法论：基于提示的实验、合成人口抽样、比较历史建模和消融研究。
AI.result: 展示了这些方法论如何映射到传统社会科学研究设计（如计算社会科学、内容分析、调查研究和比较历史探究），同时在前所未有的规模上运行。揭示了基础模型保留文化规律性的潜力，以及微调和一致性干预可能对这些规律性造成的扭曲。
AI.conclusion: LLM可以作为研究人类行为和文化的有效科学仪器，但需要明确将模型输出作为证据的认识论限制。研究者应在利用模型捕捉大规模文化模式的同时，警惕一致性干预对原始文化规律的遮蔽效应，选择合适的模型适配策略。

title: SSP: Safety-guaranteed Surgical Policy via Joint Optimization of Behavioral and Spatial Constraints
summary: The paradigm of robot-assisted surgery is shifting toward data-driven autonomy, where policies learned via Reinforcement Learning (RL) or Imitation Learning (IL) enable the execution of complex tasks. However, these ``black-box" policies often lack formal safety guarantees, a critical requirement for clinical deployment. In this paper, we propose the Safety-guaranteed Surgical Policy (SSP) framework to bridge the gap between data-driven generality and formal safety. We utilize Neural Ordinary Differential Equations (Neural ODEs) to learn an uncertainty-aware dynamics model from demonstration data. This learned model underpins a robust Control Barrier Function (CBF) safety controller, which minimally alters the actions of a surgical policy to ensure strict safety under uncertainty. Our controller enforces two constraint categories: behavioral constraints (restricting the task space of the agent) and spatial constraints (defining surgical no-go zones). We instantiate the SSP framework with surgical policies derived from RL, IL and Control Lyapunov Functions (CLF). Validation on in both the SurRoL simulation and da Vinci Research Kit (dVRK) demonstrates that our method achieves a near-zero constraint violation rate while maintaining high task success rates compared to unconstrained baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个安全手术策略框架(SSP)，通过神经ODE学习不确定性感知的动力学模型，并结合控制障碍函数(CBF)安全控制器，在保持高任务成功率的同时实现近乎零的约束违反率，为数据驱动的机器人辅助手术提供了形式化的安全保证。
AI.motivation: 机器人辅助手术正向数据驱动的自主性转变，通过强化学习或模仿学习训练的策略能够执行复杂任务。然而，这些"黑箱"策略缺乏形式化的安全保证，这是临床部署的关键要求。因此需要弥合数据驱动的通用性与形式化安全性之间的差距。
AI.method: 提出安全手术策略(SSP)框架：1) 利用神经常微分方程(Neural ODEs)从演示数据中学习不确定性感知的动力学模型；2) 基于学习模型构建鲁棒的控制障碍函数(CBF)安全控制器，以最小化方式调整手术策略的动作；3) 控制器实施两类约束：行为约束(限制智能体的任务空间)和空间约束(定义手术禁区)；4) 可与RL、IL和控制Lyapunov函数(CLF)派生的手术策略结合使用。
AI.result: 在SurRoL仿真平台和da Vinci研究套件(dVRK)上的验证表明：与无约束基线相比，该方法实现了近乎零的约束违反率，同时保持了高任务成功率，证明了框架在仿真和真实硬件平台上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SSP框架成功桥接了数据驱动策略与形式化安全保证之间的鸿沟，通过神经ODE和鲁棒CBF控制器的结合，在不显著牺牲任务性能的前提下实现了严格的安全约束，为机器人辅助手术的临床部署提供了可行的安全保障方案。

title: Trust Aware Federated Learning for Secure Bone Healing Stage Interpretation in e-Health
summary: This paper presents a trust aware federated learning (FL) framework for interpreting bone healing stages using spectral features derived from frequency response data. The primary objective is to address the challenge posed by either unreliable or adversarial participants in distributed medical sensing environments. The framework employs a multi-layer perceptron model trained across simulated clients using the Flower FL framework. The proposed approach integrates an Adaptive Trust Score Scaling and Filtering (ATSSSF) mechanism with exponential moving average (EMA) smoothing to assess, validate and filter client contributions.Two trust score smoothing strategies have been investigated, one with a fixed factor and another that adapts according to trust score variability. Clients with low trust are excluded from aggregation and readmitted once their reliability improves, ensuring model integrity while maintaining inclusivity. Standard classification metrics have been used to compare the performance of ATSSSF with the baseline Federated Averaging strategy. Experimental results demonstrate that adaptive trust management can improve both training stability and predictive performance by mitigating the negative effects of compromised clients while retaining robust detection capabilities. The work establishes the feasibility for adaptive trust mechanisms in federated medical sensing and identifies extension to clinical cross silo aggregation as a future research direction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种信任感知联邦学习框架，用于解释骨骼愈合阶段。通过自适应信任评分机制过滤不可靠或恶意客户端的贡献，提高了训练稳定性和预测性能。
AI.motivation: 分布式医疗感知环境中存在不可靠或对抗性参与者，这会严重威胁联邦学习模型的准确性和可靠性。现有方法缺乏有效的信任评估机制来识别和处理这些恶意或低质量的客户端贡献，因此需要一种能够动态评估和管理客户端信任度的框架。
AI.method: 提出了一种信任感知联邦学习框架，结合自适应信任评分缩放与过滤机制（ATSSSF）和指数移动平均（EMA）平滑技术。使用Flower联邦学习框架，采用多层感知器模型，在模拟客户端上进行训练。研究了两类信任评分平滑策略：固定因子策略和根据信任评分变异性自适应调整的策略。低信任度客户端被排除在聚合之外，待可靠性提升后重新纳入，以保障模型完整性同时维持包容性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，自适应信任管理机制在训练稳定性和预测性能方面均优于基准的联邦平均策略（Federated Averaging）。该机制有效缓解了受损客户端的负面影响，同时保持了鲁棒的检测能力。低信任度客户端的排除与重新纳入机制成功保障了模型完整性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了自适应信任机制在联邦医疗感知中的可行性，为分布式医疗诊断提供了可靠的解决方案。未来研究方向包括扩展至临床跨孤岛聚合场景，进一步提升框架在真实医疗环境中的应用潜力。

title: VisualScratchpad: Inference-time Visual Concepts Analysis in Vision Language Models
comment: Accetped at ICLR 2026 Turstworthy AI Workshop
summary: High-performing vision language models still produce incorrect answers, yet their failure modes are often difficult to explain. To make model internals more accessible and enable systematic debugging, we introduce VisualScratchpad, an interactive interface for visual concept analysis during inference. We apply sparse autoencoders to the vision encoder and link the resulting visual concepts to text tokens via text-to-image attention, allowing us to examine which visual concepts are both captured by the vision encoder and utilized by the language model. VisualScratchpad also provides a token-latent heatmap view that suggests a sufficient set of latents for effective concept ablation in causal analysis. Through case studies, we reveal three underexplored failure modes: limited cross-modal alignment, misleading visual concepts, and unused hidden cues. Project page: https://hyesulim.github.io/visual_scratchpad_projectpage/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了VisualScratchpad，一个用于视觉语言模型推理过程中视觉概念分析的交互式界面，通过稀疏自编码器和跨模态注意力机制揭示模型的三种失败模式。
AI.motivation: 高性能视觉语言模型仍会产生错误答案，但其失败模式往往难以解释。为了使模型内部机制更透明并支持系统性调试，需要一种方法来可视化和分析视觉概念在模型中的表示与使用情况。
AI.method: 将稀疏自编码器应用于视觉编码器，提取可解释的视觉概念；通过文本到图像的注意力机制将视觉概念与文本词元关联；设计交互式界面VisualScratchpad，提供词元-潜在变量热力图视图，支持有效概念消融的因果分析。
AI.result: 通过案例研究揭示了视觉语言模型中三种未被充分探索的失败模式：(1)有限的跨模态对齐，(2)误导性的视觉概念，(3)未被使用的隐藏线索。证明了该方法能够有效识别模型失败的根本原因。
AI.conclusion: VisualScratchpad为理解视觉语言模型的内部机制提供了有效的工具，使研究人员能够系统性地调试和分析模型失败，为改进模型跨模态对齐和视觉表示学习提供了新的研究方向。

title: TacDexGrasp: Compliant and Robust Dexterous Grasping with Tactile Feedback
summary: Multi-fingered hands offer great potential for compliant and robust grasping of unknown objects, yet their high-dimensional force control presents a significant challenge. This work addresses two key problems: (1) distributing forces across multiple contacts to counteract an object's weight, and (2) preventing rotational slip caused by gravitational torque when a grasp is distant from the object's center of mass. We address these challenges via tactile feedback and a Second-Order Cone Programming (SOCP)-based controller, without explicit torque modeling or slip detection. Our key insights are (1) rotational slip inevitably induces translational slip at some contact points for a multi-fingered grasp, and (2) the ratio of tangential to normal force at each contact is an effective early stability indicator. By actively constraining this ratio for each finger below the estimated friction coefficient, our controller maintains grasp stability against both translational and rotational slip. Real-world experiments on 12 diverse objects demonstrate the robustness and compliance of our approach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于触觉反馈和二阶锥规划（SOCP）的多指手抓取控制器，通过约束每个接触点的切向力与法向力比值来防止平移和旋转滑移，实现了对未知物体的鲁棒且柔顺的抓取。
AI.motivation: 多指手在抓取未知物体方面具有巨大潜力，但其高维力控制极具挑战性，特别是如何分配多接触点力以平衡物体重量，以及防止因抓取位置偏离质心导致的旋转滑移。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于二阶锥规划（SOCP）的控制器，利用触觉反馈进行控制。核心洞察是：旋转滑移必然会在某些接触点引发平移滑移，且切向力与法向力的比值是有效的早期稳定性指标。控制器通过主动约束每个手指的该比值低于估计摩擦系数，防止平移和旋转滑移，无需显式的力矩建模或滑移检测。
AI.result: 在12种不同物体上进行了真实世界实验，证明了该方法在防止平移和旋转滑移、保持抓取稳定性方面的鲁棒性和柔顺性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功解决了多指手抓取中的力分配和旋转滑移问题，无需复杂的力矩建模或滑移检测，为未知物体的鲁棒柔顺抓取提供了有效解决方案。

title: HURRI-GAN: A Novel Approach for Hurricane Bias-Correction Beyond Gauge Stations using Generative Adversarial Networks
summary: The coastal regions of the eastern and southern United States are impacted by severe storm events, leading to significant loss of life and properties. Accurately forecasting storm surge and wind impacts from hurricanes is essential for mitigating some of the impacts, e.g., timely preparation of evacuations and other countermeasures. Physical simulation models like the ADCIRC hydrodynamics model, which run on high-performance computing resources, are sophisticated tools that produce increasingly accurate forecasts as the resolution of the computational meshes improves. However, a major drawback of these models is the significant time required to generate results at very high resolutions, which may not meet the near real-time demands of emergency responders. The presented work introduces HURRI-GAN, a novel AI-driven approach that augments the results produced by physical simulation models using time series generative adversarial networks (TimeGAN) to compensate for systemic errors of the physical model, thus reducing the necessary mesh size and runtime without loss in forecasting accuracy. We present first results in extrapolating model bias corrections for the spatial regions beyond the positions of the water level gauge stations. The presented results show that our methodology can accurately generate bias corrections at target locations spatially beyond gauge stations locations. The model's performance, as indicated by low root mean squared error (RMSE) values, highlights its capability to generate accurate extrapolated data. Applying the corrections generated by HURRI-GAN on the ADCIRC modeled water levels resulted in improving the overall prediction on the majority of the testing gauge stations.

AI.tldr: 提出HURRI-GAN框架，利用时间序列生成对抗网络（TimeGAN）增强物理模拟模型的预测结果，通过校正模型偏差来降低计算成本，在保证精度的同时实现了风暴潮的快速预测。
AI.motivation: 美国东南沿海地区受飓风严重影响，准确的风暴潮和风灾预测对于应急疏散和减灾至关重要。现有的物理模拟模型（如ADCIRC）虽然准确，但在高分辨率网格下运行时间过长，无法满足应急响应的近实时需求。
AI.method: 提出HURRI-GAN方法，使用时间序列生成对抗网络（TimeGAN）学习并补偿物理模型的系统误差。该方法能够在测站位置之外的空间区域外推偏差校正，从而允许使用较粗的网格以减少运行时间，同时保持预测精度。
AI.result: 模型能够准确生成测站空间范围之外的偏差校正数据，表现出较低的均方根误差（RMSE）。在大部分测试测站上，应用HURRI-GAN生成的校正能够显著改善ADCIRC模型的水位预测结果。
AI.conclusion: HURRI-GAN成功展示了AI方法增强物理模拟模型的潜力，通过偏差校正可以在降低计算网格分辨率和运行时间的同时保持预测准确性，为飓风风暴潮的近实时预测提供了可行方案。

title: The Yerkes-Dodson Curve for AI Agents: Emergent Cooperation Under Environmental Pressure in Multi-Agent LLM Simulations
summary: Designing environments that maximize the rate of emergent behavior development in AI agents remains an open problem. We present the first systematic study of stress-performance relationships in large language model (LLM) multi-agent systems, drawing an explicit parallel to the Yerkes-Dodson law from cognitive psychology. Using a grid-world survival arena, we conduct 22 experiments across four phases, varying environmental pressure through resource scarcity (upkeep cost) and reproductive competition (sexual selection). Our key finding is that cooperative behavior follows an inverted-U curve: trade interactions peak at 29 under medium pressure (upkeep=5), while both low and extreme pressure produce 8--12 trades. Under extreme pressure, behavioral repertoire collapses to movement-only within 5--12 turns. We further show that sexual selection -- a softer pressure mechanism where all agents survive but not all reproduce -- eliminates inter-agent aggression entirely and produces communicative behavior absent under survival pressure. These results suggest that environmental pressure calibration is a viable curriculum design strategy for LLM agent development, analogous to the inverted-U relationship between arousal and performance in biological systems.

AI.tldr: 本研究首次系统探索了LLM多智能体系统中的压力-性能关系，发现合作行为遵循倒U型曲线，在中等压力下达到峰值，且性选择压力能促进交流行为并消除攻击行为。
AI.motivation: 设计能够最大化AI智能体涌现行为发展的环境仍是一个开放性问题。研究旨在借鉴认知心理学中的Yerkes-Dodson定律，系统研究环境压力对大语言模型多智能体系统中行为发展的影响。
AI.method: 在网格世界生存竞技场中进行22项实验，分为四个阶段，通过资源稀缺性（维持成本）和繁殖竞争（性选择）来调节环境压力，观察不同压力水平下的智能体行为模式。
AI.result: 合作行为呈倒U型曲线：在中等压力（维持成本=5）下，交易互动达到峰值29次，而低压力和极端压力下仅有8-12次交易。极端压力下，行为 repertoire在5-12回合内退化为仅有移动行为。性选择压力机制（所有智能体存活但非全部繁殖）完全消除了智能体间的攻击行为，并产生了生存压力下不存在的交流行为。
AI.conclusion: 环境压力校准是LLM智能体发展可行的课程设计策略，类似于生物系统中唤醒与性能之间的倒U型关系。适度的压力能够促进合作与交流行为的涌现，而压力过低或过高都会导致行为多样性的降低。

title: GuideTWSI: A Diverse Tactile Walking Surface Indicator Dataset from Synthetic and Real-World Images for Blind and Low-Vision Navigation
summary: Tactile Walking Surface Indicators (TWSIs) are safety-critical landmarks that blind and low-vision (BLV) pedestrians use to locate crossings and hazard zones. From our observation sessions with BLV guide dog handlers, trainers, and an O&M specialist, we confirmed the critical importance of reliable and accurate TWSI segmentation for navigation assistance of BLV individuals. Achieving such reliability requires large-scale annotated data. However, TWSIs are severely underrepresented in existing urban perception datasets, and even existing dedicated paving datasets are limited: they lack robot-relevant viewpoints (e.g., egocentric or top-down) and are geographically biased toward East Asian directional bars - raised parallel strips used for continuous guidance along sidewalks. This narrow focus overlooks truncated domes - rows of round bumps used primarily in North America and Europe as detectable warnings at curbs, crossings, and platform edges. As a result, models trained only on bar-centric data struggle to generalize to dome-based warnings, leading to missed detections and false stops in safety-critical environments.

AI.tldr: 本文指出了触觉行走表面指示器(TWSI)数据集存在的不足：现有数据集缺乏机器人视角且地理偏向于东亚的导向条，忽视了北美和欧洲使用的截顶圆顶警示砖，导致模型在安全关键场景中检测性能不佳。
AI.motivation: 通过观察盲人及低视力(BLV)导盲犬使用者、训练员和定向行走专家，确认了可靠准确的TWSI分割对BLV导航辅助的关键重要性，而实现这一目标需要大规模标注数据。
AI.method: 对现有城市感知数据集和专用铺装数据集进行分析，识别其局限性：缺乏机器人相关视角(如自我中心或俯视视角)，且地理分布偏向东亚导向条数据，忽略北美和欧洲常用的截顶圆顶警示砖。
AI.result: 仅在导向条数据上训练的模型难以泛化到圆顶警示砖场景，导致在安全关键环境中出现漏检和误停问题。
AI.conclusion: 现有TWSI数据集存在显著缺陷，无法满足BLV导航辅助的需求，需要构建更具多样性、包含多视角和多地区TWSI类型的标注数据集。

title: Geodesic Gradient Descent: A Generic and Learning-rate-free Optimizer on Objective Function-induced Manifolds
summary: Euclidean gradient descent algorithms barely capture the geometry of objective function-induced hypersurfaces and risk driving update trajectories off the hypersurfaces. Riemannian gradient descent algorithms address these issues but fail to represent complex hypersurfaces via a single classic manifold. We propose geodesic gradient descent (GGD), a generic and learning-rate-free Riemannian gradient descent algorithm. At each iteration, GGD uses an n-dimensional sphere to approximate a local neighborhood on the objective function-induced hypersurface, adapting to arbitrarily complex geometries. A tangent vector derived from the Euclidean gradient is projected onto the sphere to form a geodesic, ensuring the update trajectory stays on the hypersurface. Parameter updates are performed using the endpoint of the geodesic. The maximum step size of the gradient in GGD is equal to a quarter of the arc length on the n-dimensional sphere, thus eliminating the need for a learning rate. Experimental results show that compared with the classic Adam algorithm, GGD achieves test MSE reductions ranging from 35.79% to 48.76% for fully connected networks on the Burgers' dataset, and cross-entropy loss reductions ranging from 3.14% to 11.59% for convolutional neural networks on the MNIST dataset.

AI.tldr: 提出了测地线梯度下降（GGD）算法，通过n维球面局部近似目标函数诱导的超曲面，利用测地线投影保持更新轨迹在曲面上，无需学习率，在多个数据集上显著降低了损失值。
AI.motivation: 欧几里得梯度下降难以捕捉目标函数诱导的超曲面几何特性，可能导致更新轨迹偏离超曲面；而黎曼梯度下降虽能解决此问题，但单一经典流形无法表示复杂超曲面。
AI.method: 提出测地线梯度下降（GGD）算法：在每次迭代中使用n维球面局部近似目标函数诱导的超曲面，将欧几里得梯度导出的切向量投影到球面上形成测地线，确保更新轨迹保持在超曲面上，并使用测地线端点进行参数更新。最大步长等于n维球面上弧长的四分之一，从而消除学习率的需求。
AI.result: 在Burgers'数据集上，全连接网络的测试MSE降低了35.79%至48.76%；在MNIST数据集上，卷积神经网络的交叉熵损失降低了3.14%至11.59%，均优于经典Adam算法。
AI.conclusion: GGD是一种通用且无需学习率的黎曼梯度下降算法，能够适应任意复杂的几何结构，显著提升深度学习模型的训练效果。

title: SoK: Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG): Taxonomy, Architectures, Evaluation, and Research Directions
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems are increasingly evolving into agentic architectures where large language models autonomously coordinate multi-step reasoning, dynamic memory management, and iterative retrieval strategies. Despite rapid industrial adoption, current research lacks a systematic understanding of Agentic RAG as a sequential decision-making system, leading to highly fragmented architectures, inconsistent evaluation methodologies, and unresolved reliability risks. This Systematization of Knowledge (SoK) paper provides the first unified framework for understanding these autonomous systems. We formalize agentic retrieval-generation loops as finite-horizon partially observable Markov decision processes, explicitly modeling their control policies and state transitions. Building upon this formalization, we develop a comprehensive taxonomy and modular architectural decomposition that categorizes systems by their planning mechanisms, retrieval orchestration, memory paradigms, and tool-invocation behaviors. We further analyze the critical limitations of traditional static evaluation practices and identify severe systemic risks inherent to autonomous loops, including compounding hallucination propagation, memory poisoning, retrieval misalignment, and cascading tool-execution vulnerabilities. Finally, we outline key doctoral-scale research directions spanning stable adaptive retrieval, cost-aware orchestration, formal trajectory evaluation, and oversight mechanisms, providing a definitive roadmap for building reliable, controllable, and scalable agentic retrieval systems.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统化研究Agentic RAG系统，将其形式化为有限视界部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程，建立统一分类体系，揭示传统评估的局限性与自主循环的关键风险，并提出构建可靠、可控、可扩展系统的未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 尽管Agentic RAG系统在工业界被快速采用，但当前研究缺乏将其作为序列决策系统的系统性理解，导致架构碎片化、评估方法不一致以及可靠性风险未解决。
AI.method: 将Agentic检索-生成循环形式化为有限视界部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程(POMDP)，显式建模控制策略与状态转换；在此基础上构建全面的分类体系和模块化架构分解，按规划机制、检索编排、记忆范式和工具调用行为对系统进行分类。
AI.result: 分析了传统静态评估方法的关键局限性；识别出自主循环固有的严重系统性风险，包括复合幻觉传播、记忆投毒、检索错位和级联工具执行漏洞。
AI.conclusion: 提出了关键的博士级研究方向，包括稳定自适应检索、成本感知编排、形式化轨迹评估和监督机制，为构建可靠、可控、可扩展的代理检索系统提供明确路线图。

title: Morphology-Independent Facial Expression Imitation for Human-Face Robots
summary: Accurate facial expression imitation on human-face robots is crucial for achieving natural human-robot interaction. Most existing methods have achieved photorealistic expression imitation through mapping 2D facial landmarks to a robot's actuator commands. Their imitation of landmark trajectories is susceptible to interference from facial morphology, which would lead to a performance drop. In this paper, we propose a morphology-independent expression imitation method that decouples expressions from facial morphology to eliminate morphological influence and produce more realistic expressions for human-face robots. Specifically, we construct an expression decoupling module to learn expression semantics by disentangling the expression representation from the morphology representation in a self-supervised manner. We devise an expression transfer module to map the representations to the robot's actuator commands through a learning objective of perceiving expression errors, producing accurate facial expressions based on the learned expression semantics. To support experimental validation, a custom-designed and highly expressive human-face robot, namely Pengrui, is developed to serve as an experimental platform for realistic expression imitation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method enables the human-face robot to reproduce a wide range of human-like expressions effectively. All code and implementation details of the robot will be released.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种形态无关的表情模仿方法，通过解耦表情与面部形态，实现了仿人面部机器人更准确、逼真的表情复现，并在自主研发的机器人平台Pengrui上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于2D面部关键点映射的表情模仿方法易受面部形态差异干扰，导致机器人表情复现性能下降，因此需要消除形态影响以提升模仿精度与真实感。
AI.method: 构建表情解耦模块，以自监督方式将表情表示与形态表示分离；设计表情迁移模块，通过感知表情误差的学习目标，将表情语义表示映射为机器人致动器控制命令；自主研发高表现力仿人面部机器人Pengrui作为实验平台。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能够有效消除形态干扰，使机器人精准复现多样化的人类表情，显著提升了模仿的真实感与准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了形态无关的表情模仿，为仿人机器人自然交互提供了有效解决方案，代码与机器人实现细节将开源以促进研究。

title: ERP-RiskBench: Leakage-Safe Ensemble Learning for Financial Risk
summary: Financial risk detection in Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) systems is an important but underexplored application of machine learning. Published studies in this area tend to suffer from vague dataset descriptions, leakage-prone pipelines, and evaluation practices that inflate reported performance. This paper presents a rebuilt experimental framework for ERP financial risk detection using ensemble machine learning. The risk definition is hybrid, covering both procurement compliance anomalies and transactional fraud. A composite benchmark called ERP-RiskBench is assembled from public procurement event logs, labeled fraud data, and a new synthetic ERP dataset with rule-injected risk typologies and conditional tabular GAN augmentation. Nested cross-validation with time-aware and group-aware splitting enforces leakage prevention throughout the pipeline. The primary model is a stacking ensemble of gradient boosting methods, tested alongside linear baselines, deep tabular architectures, and an interpretable glassbox alternative. Performance is measured through Matthews Correlation Coefficient, area under the precision-recall curve, and cost-sensitive decision analysis using calibrated probabilities. Across multiple dataset configurations and a structured ablation study, the stacking ensemble achieves the best detection results. Leakage-safe protocols reduce previously inflated accuracy estimates by a notable margin. SHAP-based explanations and feature stability analysis show that procurement control features, especially three-way matching discrepancies, rank as the most informative predictors. The resulting framework provides a reproducible, operationally grounded blueprint for machine learning deployment in ERP audit and governance settings.

AI.tldr: 本文针对ERP系统财务风险检测中数据集描述模糊、数据泄漏和评估虚高等问题，构建了一个可复现的实验框架与基准ERP-RiskBench，采用防泄漏的嵌套交叉验证，验证了堆叠集成模型的优越性并识别出关键预测特征。
AI.motivation: 现有ERP财务风险检测研究存在数据集描述模糊、实验流程易导致数据泄漏、评估方法夸大模型性能等问题，缺乏可复现、可操作的研究基础，需要构建规范化、防泄漏的实验框架以促进该领域的可靠发展。
AI.method: 构建混合风险定义（涵盖采购合规异常与交易欺诈），建立由公开采购事件日志、标注欺诈数据及规则注入合成数据组成的ERP-RiskBench基准；采用时间感知与组感知的嵌套交叉验证防止泄漏；以梯度提升堆叠集成模型为主，对比线性基线、深度表格模型和可解释玻璃盒模型；使用Matthews相关系数、PR曲线下面积及成本敏感决策分析进行评估，并通过SHAP解释与特征稳定性分析识别关键特征。
AI.result: 堆叠集成模型在多种数据集配置和消融实验中取得最优检测效果；防泄漏协议显著降低了以往被夸大的准确率估计；采购控制特征（尤其是三单匹配差异）被识别为最具信息量的预测因子。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的框架为ERP审计与治理场景下的机器学习部署提供了可复现、具有操作指导意义的蓝图，强调了防泄漏实验设计和特征可解释性的重要性。

title: Dynamic Vehicle Routing Problem with Prompt Confirmation of Advance Requests
summary: Transit agencies that operate on-demand transportation services have to respond to trip requests from passengers in real time, which involves solving dynamic vehicle routing problems with pick-up and drop-off constraints. Based on discussions with public transit agencies, we observe a real-world problem that is not addressed by prior work: when trips are booked in advance (e.g., trip requests arrive a few hours in advance of their requested pick-up times), the agency needs to promptly confirm whether a request can be accepted or not, and ensure that accepted requests are served as promised. State-of-the-art computational approaches either provide prompt confirmation but lack the ability to continually optimize and improve routes for accepted requests, or they provide continual optimization but cannot guarantee serving all accepted requests. To address this gap, we introduce a novel problem formulation of dynamic vehicle routing with prompt confirmation and continual optimization. We propose a novel computational approach for this vehicle routing problem, which integrates a quick insertion search for prompt confirmation with an anytime algorithm for continual optimization. To maximize the number requests served, we train a non-myopic objective function using reinforcement learning, which guides both the insertion and the anytime algorithms towards optimal, non-myopic solutions. We evaluate our computational approach on a real-world microtransit dataset from a public transit agency in the U.S., demonstrating that our proposed approach provides prompt confirmation while significantly increasing the number of requests served compared to existing approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型的动态车辆路径问题求解方法，通过整合快速插入搜索和持续优化算法，实现了对预约请求的即时确认和持续路径优化，并在真实微交通数据集上验证了其在提升服务请求数量方面的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有的动态车辆路径问题求解方法无法同时满足两个关键需求：一是对预约请求的即时确认（尤其是提前数小时预订的行程），二是对已接受请求的持续路径优化。实际公共交通机构需要既能快速响应乘客请求并确认，又能持续优化路线以提高服务质量，这一现实需求在先前研究中未被充分解决。
AI.method: 提出了一种新的动态车辆路径问题建模方法，整合了两个核心组件：(1) 用于即时确认的快速插入搜索算法；(2) 用于持续优化的任意时间算法。利用强化学习训练非短视目标函数，指导插入算法和持续优化算法向最优非短视解的方向搜索，从而最大化服务请求数量。
AI.result: 在美国某公共交通机构的真实微交通数据集上进行了评估，结果表明该方法能够在提供即时确认的同时，相比现有方法显著增加了可服务的请求数量，有效平衡了即时响应与持续优化之间的矛盾。
AI.conclusion: 本研究成功填补了即时确认与持续优化之间的空白，为运营预约制需求响应交通服务的公共交通机构提供了一种实用的解决方案。所提出的计算方法不仅满足了实际业务需求，还在服务效率上取得了显著提升，对动态车辆路径问题的研究和实际应用具有重要价值。

title: The Talking Robot: Distortion-Robust Acoustic Models for Robot-Robot Communication
summary: We present Artoo, a learned acoustic communication system for robots that replaces hand-designed signal processing with end-to-end co-trained neural networks. Our system pairs a lightweight text-to-speech (TTS) transmitter (1.18M parameters) with a conformer-based automatic speech recognition (ASR) receiver (938K parameters), jointly optimized through a differentiable channel. Unlike human speech, robot-to-robot communication is paralinguistics-free: the system need not preserve timbre, prosody, or naturalness, only maximize decoding accuracy under channel distortion. Through a three-phase co-training curriculum, the TTS transmitter learns to produce distortion-robust acoustic encodings that surpass the baseline under noise, achieving 8.3% CER at 0 dB SNR. The entire system requires only 2.1M parameters (8.4 MB) and runs in under 13 ms end-to-end on a CPU, making it suitable for deployment on resource-constrained robotic platforms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Artoo，一种面向机器人的端到端学习声学通信系统，通过轻量级神经网络（共2.1M参数）替代传统手工设计的信号处理，在低信噪比下实现了8.3%的字符错误率，且能在CPU上以低于13ms的延迟运行，适用于资源受限的机器人平台。
AI.motivation: 传统的声学通信系统依赖于手工设计的信号处理，难以针对机器人和特定信道条件进行优化。由于机器人之间的通信不需要保留音色、韵律或自然度等副语言特征，作者希望利用神经网络设计一种轻量、高效的系统，仅专注于在信道失真下最大化解码准确性。
AI.method: 设计了一个包含轻量级文本转语音（TTS）发射器（1.18M参数）和基于Conformer的自动语音识别（ASR）接收器（938K参数）的系统，通过可微分信道进行端到端联合优化。采用三阶段协同训练课程，使TTS发射器学习产生对失真鲁棒的声学编码。
AI.result: 系统在0 dB信噪比下实现了8.3%的字符错误率（CER），优于基线方法。整个系统仅需2.1M参数（8.4 MB），在CPU上的端到端运行延迟低于13ms，满足资源受限机器人平台的部署需求。
AI.conclusion: Artoo成功证明了利用端到端神经网络替代传统信号处理进行机器人声学通信的可行性，在保证轻量化和低延迟的同时，显著提升了噪声环境下的通信鲁棒性。

title: One step further with Monte-Carlo sampler to guide diffusion better
summary: Stochastic differential equation (SDE)-based generative models have achieved substantial progress in conditional generation via training-free differentiable loss-guided approaches. However, existing methodologies utilizing posterior sam- pling typically confront a substantial estimation error, which results in inaccu- rate gradients for guidance and leading to inconsistent generation results. To mitigate this issue, we propose that performing an additional backward denois- ing step and Monte-Carlo sampling (ABMS) can achieve better guided diffu- sion, which is a plug-and-play adjustment strategy. To verify the effectiveness of our method, we provide theoretical analysis and propose the adoption of a dual-focus evaluation framework, which further serves to highlight the critical problem of cross-condition interference prevalent in existing approaches. We conduct experiments across various task settings and data types, mainly includ- ing conditional online handwritten trajectory generation, image inverse problems (inpainting, super resolution and gaussian deblurring) molecular inverse design and so on. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach can be effec- tively used with higher order samplers and consistently improves the quality of generation samples across all the different scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ABMS方法（额外反向去噪步骤与蒙特卡洛采样），通过减少估计误差改进SDE生成模型的无训练条件生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于随机微分方程(SDE)的无训练可微损失引导方法在条件生成中，由于后验采样存在显著的估计误差，导致引导梯度不准确，从而产生不一致的生成结果。
AI.method: 提出ABMS（Additional Backward denoising step and Monte-Carlo Sampling）策略，通过执行额外的反向去噪步骤和蒙特卡洛采样来获得更好的引导扩散；这是一个即插即用的调整策略。同时提出了双焦点评估框架来揭示现有方法中普遍存在的跨条件干扰问题。
AI.result: 实验涵盖多种任务和数据类型，包括条件在线手写轨迹生成、图像逆问题（修复、超分辨率、高斯去模糊）和分子逆向设计。结果表明，该方法能有效与高阶采样器配合使用，并在所有不同场景中持续提升生成样本的质量。
AI.conclusion: ABMS作为一种即插即用的策略，能够有效缓解现有无训练引导方法中的估计误差问题，显著提升SDE生成模型在多种条件生成任务中的生成质量，具有良好的通用性和实用性。

title: AutoControl Arena: Synthesizing Executable Test Environments for Frontier AI Risk Evaluation
comment: Submitted to ICML 2026. Code and benchmark will be available
summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) evolve into autonomous agents, existing safety evaluations face a fundamental trade-off: manual benchmarks are costly, while LLM-based simulators are scalable but suffer from logic hallucination. We present AutoControl Arena, an automated framework for frontier AI risk evaluation built on the principle of logic-narrative decoupling. By grounding deterministic state in executable code while delegating generative dynamics to LLMs, we mitigate hallucination while maintaining flexibility. This principle, instantiated through a three-agent framework, achieves over 98% end-to-end success and 60% human preference over existing simulators. To elicit latent risks, we vary environmental Stress and Temptation across X-Bench (70 scenarios, 7 risk categories). Evaluating 9 frontier models reveals: (1) Alignment Illusion: risk rates surge from 21.7% to 54.5% under pressure, with capable models showing disproportionately larger increases; (2) Scenario-Specific Safety Scaling: advanced reasoning improves robustness for direct harms but worsens it for gaming scenarios; and (3) Divergent Misalignment Patterns: weaker models cause non-malicious harm while stronger models develop strategic concealment.

AI.tldr: 提出了AutoControl Arena框架，通过逻辑-叙事解耦原则实现可扩展且准确的前沿AI风险评测，发现模型在压力下风险率显著上升，且不同能力模型的失准模式存在差异。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型安全评测面临根本性权衡：人工基准成本高昂，而基于LLM的模拟器虽可扩展但存在逻辑幻觉问题，缺乏一种既能规模化又能保证评测准确性的框架。
AI.method: 提出逻辑-叙事解耦原则，将确定性状态锚定在可执行代码中，将生成性动态委托给LLM，通过三智能体框架实现；构建X-Bench数据集（70个场景、7个风险类别），通过改变环境压力和诱惑来激发潜在风险。
AI.result: 框架实现超过98%的端到端成功率和60%的人类偏好；对9个前沿模型的评测发现：（1）对齐错觉：压力下风险率从21.7%激增至54.5%，能力更强的模型增幅更大；（2）场景特异性安全缩放：高级推理提升直接危害场景的鲁棒性但恶化博弈场景；（3）分歧失准模式：弱模型造成非恶意伤害，强模型发展出策略性隐瞒。
AI.conclusion: 逻辑-叙事解耦可有效缓解幻觉问题并实现可扩展的安全评测；模型在压力环境下安全表现显著下降，且不同能力模型表现出截然不同的失准模式，这对AI安全评估和模型开发具有重要启示。

title: VLN-Cache: Enabling Token Caching for VLN Models with Visual/Semantic Dynamics Awareness
summary: Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) increasingly relies on large vision-language models, but their inference cost conflicts with real-time deployment. Token caching is a promising training-free strategy that avoids redundant computation by reusing stable visual tokens across frames. However, existing methods assume a static camera and fixed semantic focus, assumptions that VLN fundamentally violates. We identify two failure modes: (1) visual dynamics, where viewpoint shift displaces token positions across frames, causing position-wise matching to pair misaligned content; (2) semantic dynamics, where token relevance shifts across task stages as navigation progresses, making cached states stale. We propose VLN-Cache, a visual-dynamic-aware and semantic-dynamic-aware caching framework that introduces view-aligned remapping to recover geometric correspondences and a task-relevance saliency filter to veto reuse at semantic transitions. A layer-adaptive entropy policy further balances the per-layer reuse budget. Experiments on the R2R-CE simulation benchmark show up to 1.52x speedup while maintaining competitive navigation success rates.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VLN-Cache框架，通过视图对齐重映射和任务相关性显著性筛选解决视觉与语义动态性问题，在R2R-CE基准上实现1.52倍加速且保持导航成功率。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言导航（VLN）依赖大型视觉语言模型，但其推理成本与实时部署相冲突。现有的令牌缓存方法假设静态相机和固定语义焦点，但VLN本质上违反这些假设，导致视觉动态（视点位移导致令牌位置错配）和语义动态（导航进程中令牌相关性变化使缓存失效）两种失效模式。
AI.method: 提出VLN-Cache框架，包含三个核心组件：（1）视图对齐重映射，恢复几何对应关系以解决视觉动态问题；（2）任务相关性显著性筛选器，在语义转换处否决重用以应对语义动态；（3）层级自适应熵策略，平衡每层的重用预算。
AI.result: 在R2R-CE仿真基准测试中实现最高1.52倍加速，同时保持有竞争力的导航成功率。
AI.conclusion: VLN-Cache通过感知视觉动态和语义动态的缓存策略，有效解决了VLN场景下令牌缓存的核心挑战，为实时部署提供了可行的加速方案。

title: Scaling Agentic Capabilities, Not Context: Efficient Reinforcement Finetuning for Large Toolspaces
summary: Agentic systems operating over large tool ecosystems must plan and execute long-horizon workflows under weak or non-verifiable supervision. While frontier models mitigate these challenges through scale and large context budgets, small language models (SLMs) remain brittle: eager tool loading saturates context, execution errors compound over time, and sparse rewards limit learning. We introduce ATLAS, a reinforcement finetuning framework that enables SLMs to operate effectively in large-scale toolspace environments by learning how to acquire context and how to execute actions. Our approach makes two key contributions. First, we treat context control and execution structure as learnable decisions, combining iterative tool loading with programmatic tool orchestration to bound context growth and stabilize long-horizon trajectories. Second, we propose rubric-based reinforcement finetuning, which decomposes task success into structured, task-aligned criteria and enables scalable training using small judge models. Across MCP benchmarks, these design choices yield large and consistent gains over generic RL baselines, allowing a 4B SLM to approach frontier-agent performance under far tighter parameter and context budgets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ATLAS框架，通过强化微调使小语言模型（4B参数）能够在大规模工具空间环境中有效运行，在有限参数和上下文预算下接近前沿智能体性能。
AI.motivation: 在大规模工具生态系统中，代理系统需要在弱监督或不可验证监督下规划和执行长时域工作流。小语言模型（SLMs）面临三大挑战：急切工具加载导致上下文饱和、执行错误随时间累积、稀疏奖励限制学习。现有前沿模型通过规模和大量上下文预算缓解这些问题，但SLMs仍显脆弱。
AI.method: ATLAS框架包含两个核心贡献：（1）将上下文控制和执行结构视为可学习决策，结合迭代工具加载与程序化工具编排，限制上下文增长并稳定长时域轨迹；（2）提出基于评分标准的强化微调方法，将任务成功分解为结构化、任务对齐的标准，使用小型评判模型实现可扩展训练。
AI.result: 在MCP基准测试中，ATLAS相比通用RL基线实现了显著且一致的增益。4B参数的SLM在更严格的参数和上下文预算限制下，能够接近前沿智能体的性能水平。
AI.conclusion: ATLAS证明了通过学习上下文获取策略和行动执行策略，小语言模型可以在大规模工具空间环境中高效运行，为在有限资源约束下构建高效代理系统提供了可行路径。

title: Machine Learning for Stress Testing: Uncertainty Decomposition in Causal Panel Prediction
summary: Regulatory stress testing requires projecting credit losses under hypothetical macroeconomic scenarios -- a fundamentally causal question typically treated as a prediction problem. We propose a framework for policy-path counterfactual inference in panels that transparently separates what can be learned from data from what requires assumptions about confounding. Our approach has four components: (i) observational identification of path-conditional means via iterated regression, enabling continuous macro-path contrasts without requiring a control group; (ii) causal set identification under bounded confounding, yielding sharp identified sets with interpretable breakdown values that communicate robustness in a single number; (iii) an oracle inequality showing that recursive rollout error is governed by a horizon-dependent amplification factor, providing a concrete answer to how far ahead one can reliably predict under stress; and (iv) importance-weighted conformal calibration bands with diagnostics that quantify extrapolation cost and trigger abstention when coverage guarantees degrade. The final output is a three-layer uncertainty decomposition that cleanly separates estimation uncertainty from confounding uncertainty. We validate all results through simulation and semi-synthetic experiments with real unemployment data, including a Covid retrospective demonstrating the framework's diagnostic value under extreme scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对监管压力测试的政策路径反事实推断框架，将因果推断方法应用于信贷损失预测，通过四项核心组件实现了对观测信息与因果假设的透明分离，并提供了三层不确定性分解方法。
AI.motivation: 监管压力测试需要在假设的宏观经济情景下预测信贷损失，这本质上是一个因果问题，但通常被当作预测问题来处理。现有方法缺乏对混杂因素的透明处理，无法清晰区分哪些信息可以从数据中学习，哪些需要依赖关于混杂因素的假设。
AI.method: 提出包含四个核心组件的框架：(i)通过迭代回归实现路径条件均值的观测识别，无需对照组即可进行连续宏观路径对比；(ii)在有界混杂条件下实现因果集合识别，产生具有可解释崩溃值的锐化识别集；(iii)建立oracle不等式，表明递归滚动误差由依赖于视界的放大因子控制；(iv)使用重要性加权的共形校准带，配合诊断指标量化外推成本并在覆盖保证退化时触发弃权。
AI.result: 最终输出为三层不确定性分解，清晰分离了估计不确定性与混杂不确定性。通过仿真和半合成实验（包括真实失业率数据和Covid回顾性分析）验证了所有结果，展示了该框架在极端情景下的诊断价值。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功将因果推断引入监管压力测试场景，为政策路径反事实推断提供了严格的理论基础和实用的不确定性量化工具，能够可靠地评估预测范围并在极端情况下提供有价值的诊断信息。

title: ACLM: ADMM-Based Distributed Model Predictive Control for Collaborative Loco-Manipulation
summary: Collaborative transportation of heavy payloads via loco-manipulation is a challenging yet essential capability for legged robots operating in complex, unstructured environments. Centralized planning methods, e.g., holistic trajectory optimization, capture dynamic coupling among robots and payloads but scale poorly with system size, limiting real-time applicability. In contrast, hierarchical and fully decentralized approaches often neglect force and dynamic interactions, leading to conservative behavior. This study proposes an Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers (ADMM)-based distributed model predictive control framework for collaborative loco-manipulation with a team of quadruped robots with manipulators.
