However, standard RL paradigms favor static problem-solving over continuous adaptation: agents often converge to suboptimal strategies due to insufficient exploration, while learned knowledge remains implicit within parameters rather than explicitly retrievable, limiting effective experiential learning. To address these limitations, we introduce RetroAgent, an online RL framework that empowers agents to master complex interactive environments not just by solving, but by evolving. Concretely, RetroAgent features a hindsight self-reflection mechanism that produces dual intrinsic feedback: (1) intrinsic numerical feedback that that tracks incremental subtask completion relative to prior attempts, rewarding promising explorations, and (2) intrinsic language feedback that distills reusable lessons into a memory buffer, retrieved via our proposed Similarity & Utility-Aware Upper Confidence Bound (SimUtil-UCB) strategy balancing relevance, utility, and exploration to effectively leverage past experiences. Extensive experiments on two model families across four challenging agentic tasks demonstrate that RetroAgent significantly outperforms existing methods, achieving state-of-the-art results -- e.g., surpassing Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)-trained agents by +18.3% on ALFWorld, +15.4% on WebShop, +27.1% on Sokoban, and +8.9% on MineSweeper -- while exhibiting strong test-time adaptation and generalization to out-of-distribution scenarios.

AI.tldr: RetroAgent是一个基于在线强化学习的框架，通过引入后见自省机制生成双重内在反馈（数值反馈和语言反馈），并使用SimUtil-UCB策略检索经验，显著提升了LLM智能体在复杂交互任务中的表现，在四个基准任务上超越了现有SOTA方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于强化学习的LLM智能体存在两大局限：（1）标准RL范式偏向静态问题解决而非持续适应，因探索不足导致智能体收敛到次优策略；（2）学习到的知识以隐式方式存在于模型参数中而非显式可检索，限制了有效的经验学习。
AI.method: 提出RetroAgent在线RL框架，核心包含：（1）后见自省机制，生成双重内在反馈——内在数值反馈追踪相对先前尝试的增量子任务完成度，奖励有希望的探索；内在语言反馈将可复用的经验教训提炼到记忆缓冲区；（2）提出SimUtil-UCB（相似性与效用感知上置信界）策略，平衡相关性、效用和探索，有效检索利用过往经验。
AI.result: 在两个模型家族和四个挑战性智能体任务上进行了广泛实验：在ALFWorld上超越GRPO训练的智能体+18.3%，WebShop上+15.4%，Sokoban上+27.1%，MineSweeper上+8.9%，均达到SOTA结果；同时展现出强大的测试时适应能力和对分布外场景的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: RetroAgent通过将智能体从单纯的"解决问题"提升到"持续进化"，有效克服了传统RL范式的局限性，双重内在反馈机制与SimUtil-UCB检索策略的结合使智能体能够显式积累和利用经验，为复杂交互环境中的智能体学习提供了新范式。

title: Residual Control for Fast Recovery from Dynamics Shifts
summary: Robotic systems operating in real-world environments inevitably encounter unobserved dynamics shifts during continuous execution, including changes in actuation, mass distribution, or contact conditions. When such shifts occur mid-episode, even locally stabilizing learned policies can experience substantial transient performance degradation. While input-to-state stability guarantees bounded state deviation, it does not ensure rapid restoration of task-level performance. We address inference-time recovery under frozen policy parameters by casting adaptation as constrained disturbance shaping around a nominal stabilizing controller. We propose a stability-aligned residual control architecture in which a reinforcement learning policy trained under nominal dynamics remains fixed at deployment, and adaptation occurs exclusively through a bounded additive residual channel. A Stability Alignment Gate (SAG) regulates corrective authority through magnitude constraints, directional coherence with the nominal action, performance-conditioned activation, and adaptive gain modulation. These mechanisms preserve the nominal closed-loop structure while enabling rapid compensation for unobserved dynamics shifts without retraining or privileged disturbance information. Across mid-episode perturbations including actuator degradation, mass variation, and contact changes, the proposed method consistently reduces recovery time relative to frozen and online-adaptation baselines while maintaining near-nominal steady-state performance. Recovery time is reduced by \textbf{87\%} on the Go1 quadruped, \textbf{48\%} on the Cassie biped, \textbf{30\%} on the H1 humanoid, and \textbf{20\%} on the Scout wheeled platform on average across evaluated conditions relative to a frozen SAC policy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种稳定性对齐的残差控制架构，通过稳定性对齐门（SAG）在推理时对冻结的策略进行有界残差修正，使机器人在遭遇未观测到的动力学偏移（如执行器退化、质量变化、接触条件改变）时能够快速恢复任务性能，恢复时间平均减少20%-87%。
AI.motivation: 机器人在现实环境中连续执行任务时，不可避免地会遇到未观测到的动力学偏移（如执行器性能变化、质量分布改变、接触条件变化）。当这些偏移在任务执行过程中发生时，即使是局部稳定的已学习策略也会经历显著的瞬态性能下降。虽然输入-状态稳定性可以保证状态偏差有界，但无法确保任务级性能的快速恢复。现有的在线自适应方法需要重新训练或特权扰动信息，难以在推理阶段快速应对动态变化。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种稳定性对齐的残差控制架构，核心思想是将自适应建模为围绕名义稳定控制器的有界扰动整形。该方法在部署时保持基于名义动力学训练的强化学习策略参数冻结，自适应仅通过有界的加性残差通道进行。引入了稳定性对齐门（SAG）来调节修正权限，包含四个关键机制：（1）幅值约束限制残差大小；（2）与名义动作的方向一致性；（3）基于性能条件的激活机制；（4）自适应增益调制。这些机制在保持名义闭环结构的同时，实现了对未观测动力学偏移的快速补偿。
AI.result: 在多种中途扰动场景下（执行器退化、质量变化、接触变化）进行了评估。相对于冻结的SAC策略，恢复时间显著减少：Go1四足机器人减少87%，Cassie双足机器人减少48%，H1仿人机器人减少30%，Scout轮式平台减少20%。方法在保持接近名义稳态性能的同时，持续缩短恢复时间，优于冻结策略和在线自适应基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的稳定性对齐残差控制架构成功解决了机器人在推理阶段遭遇未观测动力学偏移时的快速恢复问题。通过稳定性对齐门调节残差修正权限，该方法在不需要重新训练或特权扰动信息的情况下，实现了对动态偏移的快速补偿。实验结果证明该方法在多种机器人平台和扰动条件下均能显著减少恢复时间，同时保持稳态性能，为机器人系统在实际环境中的鲁棒部署提供了有效解决方案。

title: Joint MDPs and Reinforcement Learning in Coupled-Dynamics Environments
summary: Many distributional quantities in reinforcement learning are intrinsically joint across actions, including distributions of gaps and probabilities of superiority. However, the classical Markov decision process (MDP) formalism specifies only marginal laws and leaves the joint law of counterfactual one-step outcomes across multiple possible actions at a state unspecified. We study coupled-dynamics environments with a multi-action generative interface which can sample counterfactual one-step outcomes for multiple actions under shared exogenous randomness. We propose joint MDPs (JMDPs) as a formalism for such environments by augmenting an MDP with a multi-action sample transition model which specifies a coupling of one-step counterfactual outcomes, while preserving standard MDP interaction as marginal observations. We adopt and formalize a one-step coupling regime where dependence across actions is confined to immediate counterfactual outcomes at the queried state. In this regime, we derive Bellman operators for $n$th-order return moments, providing dynamic programming and incremental algorithms with convergence guarantees.

AI.tldr: 本文提出联合马尔可夫决策过程（JMDP）形式化方法，用于建模强化学习中多动作间的耦合关系，推导了n阶回报矩的贝尔曼算子并证明收敛性。
AI.motivation: 强化学习中的许多分布量（如间隙分布、优势概率）本质上涉及多动作的联合分布，但经典MDP形式化仅指定边际分布，未明确多动作反事实一步结果的联合法则，无法利用耦合动力学环境中的结构化信息。
AI.method: 提出联合MDP（JMDP）形式化方法，在MDP上增加多动作样本转移模型来指定一步反事实结果的耦合关系，同时保持标准MDP交互作为边际观测；采用一步耦合机制将动作间依赖限制在查询状态的即时反事实结果上；推导n阶回报矩的贝尔曼算子。
AI.result: 在一步耦合机制下，成功推导出n阶回报矩的贝尔曼算子，提供了具有收敛保证的动态规划和增量算法。
AI.conclusion: JMDP形式化有效扩展了经典MDP框架，使其能够建模和利用多动作间的联合分布信息，为强化学习中的分布量估计提供了理论基础和实用算法。

title: Trust via Reputation of Conviction
summary: The question of \emph{knowledge}, \emph{truth} and \emph{trust} is explored via a mathematical formulation of claims and sources. We define truth as the reproducibly perceived subset of knowledge, formalize sources as having both generative and discriminative roles, and develop a framework for reputation grounded in the \emph{conviction} -- the likelihood that a source's stance is vindicated by independent consensus. We argue that conviction, rather than correctness or faithfulness, is the principled basis for trust: it is regime-independent, rewards genuine contribution, and demands the transparent and self-sufficient perceptions that make external verification possible. We formalize reputation as the expected weighted signed conviction over a realm of claims, characterize its behavior across source-claim regimes, and identify continuous verification as both a theoretical necessity and a practical mechanism through which reputation accrues. The framework is applied to AI agents, which are identified as capable but error-prone sources for whom verifiable conviction and continuously accrued reputation constitute the only robust foundation for trust.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于数学形式化的信任框架，将真理定义为可重复感知的知识子集，引入"确信度"(conviction)作为信任的核心基础，论证其优于正确性或忠实性，并将该框架应用于AI智能体，提出可验证的确信度和持续积累的声誉是建立AI信任的唯一稳健基础。
AI.motivation: 在知识、真理和信任日益复杂化的背景下，尤其是面对能力强大但易出错的AI智能体，传统基于正确性或忠实性的信任评估机制存在局限性，需要一个更加稳健、机制独立且可验证的信任理论基础。
AI.method: 将声明和来源进行数学形式化，将真理定义为可重复感知的知识子集，将来源建模为具有生成性和判别性双重角色；引入"确信度"(conviction)概念——即来源立场被独立共识证实的可能性；将声誉形式化为声明领域中期望加权有符号确信度，并刻画其在来源-声明机制下的行为特征。
AI.result: 建立了以确信度为核心的声誉理论框架：确信度具有机制独立性、奖励真实贡献、要求透明且自足的感知从而实现外部验证；识别出持续验证既是理论必要性也是声誉积累的实际机制；该框架为AI智能体提供了可验证的确信度和持续积累的声誉作为信任的唯一稳健基础。
AI.conclusion: 确信度而非正确性或忠实性应作为信任的原则性基础；对于能力强大但易出错的AI智能体而言，可验证的确信度和持续积累的声誉构成了建立信任的唯一稳健基础，为AI系统的可信部署提供了理论指导。

title: A Robust Antenna Provides Tactile Feedback in a Multi-legged Robot
summary: Multi-legged elongate robots hold promise for maneuvering through complex environments. Prior work has demonstrated that reliable locomotion can be achieved using open-loop body undulation and foot placement on rugose terrain. However, robust navigation through confined spaces remains challenging when body-environment contact is extensive and terrain rheology varies rapidly. To address this challenge, we develop a pair of tactile antennae for multi-legged robots that enable real-time sensing of surrounding geometry, modeling the morphology and function of biological centipede antennae. Each antenna features gradient compliance, with a stiff base and soft tip, allowing repeated deformation and elastic recovery. Robophysical experiments reveal a relationship between continuous antenna curvature and contact force, leading to a simplified mapping from antenna deformation to inferred discrete collision states. We incorporate this mapping into a controller that selects among a set of locomotor maneuvers based on the inferred collision state. Experiments in obstacle-rich and confined environments demonstrate that tactile feedback enables reliable steering and allows the robot to recover from near-stuck conditions without requiring global environmental information or real-time vision. These results highlight how mechanically tuned tactile appendages can simplify sensing and enhance autonomy in elongate multi-legged robots operating in constrained spaces.

AI.tldr: 本研究受生物蜈蚣触角启发，为多足细长机器人开发了一对梯度柔顺触角，实现了无需视觉的全局信息的触觉反馈导航，使机器人能够在受限和障碍环境中可靠转向并摆脱卡滞状态。
AI.motivation: 多足细长机器人在复杂环境中具有优势，现有研究已实现开阔崎岖地形上的开环运动。然而，在身体与环境接触广泛且地形流变性快速变化的受限空间中，鲁棒导航仍具挑战性。
AI.method: 受生物蜈蚣触角形态与功能启发，开发具有梯度柔顺性（基座刚硬、尖端柔软）的触角天线，可实现重复变形与弹性恢复。通过物理实验建立触角连续曲率与接触力的关系，形成从触角变形到推断离散碰撞状态的简化映射，并将其集成到基于碰撞状态的控制器中以选择运动策略。
AI.result: 触角曲率与接触力之间存在可建模关系，可实现简化的碰撞状态推断。在充满障碍和受限环境的实验中，触觉反馈使机器人能够可靠转向并从接近卡滞状态中恢复，无需全局环境信息或实时视觉。
AI.conclusion: 机械调谐的触觉附肢能够简化感知并增强细长多足机器人在受限空间中的自主性，为复杂环境中的机器人导航提供了新思路。

title: Not All Neighbors Matter: Understanding the Impact of Graph Sparsification on GNN Pipelines
summary:
As graphs scale to billions of nodes and edges, graph Machine Learning workloads are constrained by the cost of multi-hop traversals over exponentially growing neighborhoods. While various system-level and algorithmic optimizations have been proposed to accelerate Graph Neural Network (GNN) pipelines, data management and movement remain the primary bottlenecks at scale. In this paper, we explore whether graph sparsification, a well-established technique that reduces edges to create sparser neighborhoods, can serve as a lightweight pre-processing step to address these bottlenecks while preserving accuracy on node classification tasks.
  We develop an extensible experimental framework that enables systematic evaluation of how different sparsification methods affect the performance and accuracy of GNN models. We conduct the first comprehensive study of GNN training and inference on sparsified graphs, revealing several key findings. First, sparsification often preserves or even improves predictive performance. As an example, random sparsification raises the accuracy of the GAT model by 6.8% on the PubMed graph. Second, benefits increase with scale, substantially accelerating both training and inference. Our results show that the K-Neighbor sparsifier improves model serving performance on the Products graph by 11.7x with only a 0.7% accuracy drop. Importantly, we find that the computational overhead of sparsification is quickly amortized, making it practical for very large graphs.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统研究了图稀疏化作为轻量级预处理步骤在GNN训练和推理中的效果，发现稀疏化不仅能保持甚至提升预测精度，还能显著加速大规模图上的计算，且开销可快速摊销，具有良好的实用性。
AI.motivation: 随着图规模增长至数十亿节点和边，GNN中多跳遍历的指数级邻域扩展导致数据管理和移动成为主要性能瓶颈。现有系统级和算法级优化难以根本解决该问题，因此需要探索轻量级的数据层面优化方法。
AI.method: 开发了可扩展的实验框架，系统评估多种稀疏化方法对GNN模型性能和精度的影响，在多个基准图数据集上对训练和推理过程进行全面实验分析。
AI.result: 发现三个关键结论：(1)稀疏化常保持甚至提升预测性能（如随机稀疏化使GAT在PubMed上精度提升6.8%）；(2)随着规模增大，加速效果更显著（K-Neighbor稀疏器在Products图上实现11.7倍推理加速，精度仅下降0.7%）；(3)稀疏化计算开销可快速摊销，适用于超大规模图。
AI.conclusion: 图稀疏化作为GNN预处理步骤具有显著实用价值，能有效解决大规模图机器学习中的数据移动瓶颈，在精度损失可控的前提下大幅提升训练和推理效率。

title: CoCo: Code as CoT for Text-to-Image Preview and Rare Concept Generation
summary: Recent advancements in Unified Multimodal Models (UMMs) have significantly advanced text-to-image (T2I) generation, particularly through the integration of Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning. However, existing CoT-based T2I methods largely rely on abstract natural-language planning, which lacks the precision required for complex spatial layouts, structured visual elements, and dense textual content. In this work, we propose CoCo (Code-as-CoT), a code-driven reasoning framework that represents the reasoning process as executable code, enabling explicit and verifiable intermediate planning for image generation. Given a text prompt, CoCo first generates executable code that specifies the structural layout of the scene, which is then executed in a sandboxed environment to render a deterministic draft image. The model subsequently refines this draft through fine-grained image editing to produce the final high-fidelity result. To support this training paradigm, we construct CoCo-10K, a curated dataset containing structured draft-final image pairs designed to teach both structured draft construction and corrective visual refinement. Empirical evaluations on StructT2IBench, OneIG-Bench, and LongText-Bench show that CoCo achieves improvements of +68.83%, +54.8%, and +41.23% over direct generation, while also outperforming other generation methods empowered by CoT. These results demonstrate that executable code is an effective and reliable reasoning paradigm for precise, controllable, and structured text-to-image generation. The code is available at: https://github.com/micky-li-hd/CoCo

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoCo框架，通过将推理过程表示为可执行代码来改进文本到图像生成，在三个基准上相比直接生成提升41%-68%。
AI.motivation: 现有基于思维链（CoT）的文本到图像生成方法主要依赖抽象的自然语言规划，在处理复杂空间布局、结构化视觉元素和密集文本内容时缺乏必要的精确性。
AI.method: 提出CoCo（Code-as-CoT）框架，将推理过程表示为可执行代码：首先生成指定场景结构布局的可执行代码，在沙盒环境中执行渲染确定性草稿图像，随后通过细粒度图像编辑生成最终高保真结果。同时构建CoCo-10K数据集支持该训练范式。
AI.result: 在StructT2IBench、OneIG-Bench和LongText-Bench三个基准上，CoCo相比直接生成分别提升+68.83%、+54.8%和+41.23%，同时优于其他基于CoT的生成方法。
AI.conclusion: 可执行代码是一种有效且可靠的推理范式，能够实现精确、可控和结构化的文本到图像生成。

title: Inverse Resistive Force Theory (I-RFT): Learning granular properties through robot-terrain physical interactions
summary:
For robots to navigate safely and efficiently on soft, granular terrains, it is crucial to gather information about the terrain's mechanical properties, which directly affect locomotion performance. Recent research has developed robotic legs that can accurately sense ground reaction forces during locomotion. However, existing tests of granular property estimation often rely on specific foot trajectories, such as vertical penetration or horizontal shear, limiting their applicability during natural locomotion.
  To address this limitation, we introduce a physics-informed machine learning framework, Inverse Resistive Force Theory (I-RFT), which integrates the Granular Resistive Force Theory model with Gaussian Processes to infer terrain properties from proprioceptively measured contact forces under arbitrary gait trajectories. By embedding the granular force model within the learning process, I-RFT preserves physical consistency while enabling generalization across diverse motion primitives.
  Experimental results demonstrate that I-RFT accurately estimates terrain properties across multiple gait trajectories and toe shapes. Moreover, we show that the quantified uncertainty over the terrain resistance stress map could enable robots to optimize foot design and gait trajectories for efficient information gathering. This approach establishes a new foundation for data-efficient characterization of complex granular environments and opens new avenues for locomotion strategies that actively adapt gait for autonomous terrain exploration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了逆向阻力力理论（I-RFT），一种融合颗粒阻力力理论与高斯过程的物理信息机器学习框架，可在任意步态轨迹下利用本体感知的接触力推断颗粒地形属性，实现了对复杂颗粒环境的数据高效表征。
AI.motivation: 机器人在松软颗粒地形上安全高效导航需要获取地形力学属性，但现有的颗粒属性估计方法通常依赖特定的足端轨迹（如垂直压入或水平剪切），限制了其在自然运动过程中的适用性。
AI.method: 提出逆向阻力力理论（I-RFT）框架，将颗粒阻力力理论模型与高斯过程相结合，在机器学习过程中嵌入颗粒力模型，从任意步态轨迹下本体感知测量的接触力推断地形属性，在保证物理一致性的同时实现跨多样化运动基元的泛化。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，I-RFT能够在多种步态轨迹和足端形状下准确估计地形属性；量化的地形阻力应力图不确定性可帮助机器人优化足部设计和步态轨迹以实现高效信息采集。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为复杂颗粒环境的数据高效表征建立了新基础，为主动调整步态以实现自主地形探索的运动策略开辟了新途径。

title: Chart-RL: Generalized Chart Comprehension via Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards
summary: Accurate chart comprehension represents a critical challenge in advancing multimodal learning systems, as extensive information is compressed into structured visual representations. However, existing vision-language models (VLMs) frequently struggle to generalize on unseen charts because it requires abstract, symbolic, and quantitative reasoning over structured visual representations. In this work, we introduce Chart-RL, an effective reinforcement learning (RL) method that employs mathematically verifiable rewards to enhance chart question answering in VLMs. Our experiments demonstrate that Chart-RL consistently outperforms supervised fine-tuning (SFT) across different chart understanding benchmarks, achieving relative improvements of 16.7% on MutlChartQA, and 11.5% on ChartInsights. We conduct robustness analysis, where Chart-RL achieves enhanced performance in 18 of 25 perturbed chart categories, demonstrating strong consistency and reasoning capability across visual variations. Furthermore, we demonstrate that task difficulty and inherent complexity are more critical than data quantity in RL training. For instance, Chart-RL trained on merely 10 complex chart-query examples significantly outperforms models trained on over 6,000 simple examples. Additionally, training on challenging reasoning tasks not only improves in-domain generalization relative to simpler tasks, but also facilitate strong transfer to out-of-domain visual mathematical problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Chart-RL方法，通过使用数学可验证奖励的强化学习提升视觉语言模型在图表问答任务上的表现。实验表明，该方法在多个基准测试上显著优于监督微调，并且在数据量极少（仅10个复杂样本）的情况下也能取得优异效果，证明了任务难度比数据量更重要。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在未见过的图表上泛化能力较差，因为图表理解需要对结构化视觉表示进行抽象、符号和定量推理，这对模型提出了更高要求。
AI.method: 提出了Chart-RL方法，这是一种有效的强化学习方法，使用数学可验证的奖励来增强视觉语言模型的图表问答能力。该方法关注任务难度和内在复杂性，而非单纯依赖数据量。
AI.result: Chart-RL在多个图表理解基准测试上持续优于监督微调：在MultChartQA上相对提升16.7%，在ChartInsights上提升11.5%。在鲁棒性分析中，25个扰动图表类别中有18个类别表现更好。仅用10个复杂图表-查询样本训练的模型显著优于使用6000多个简单样本训练的模型。训练具有挑战性的推理任务不仅提升了域内泛化能力，还能有效迁移到域外视觉数学问题。
AI.conclusion: 任务难度和内在复杂性比数据量在强化学习训练中更为关键。Chart-RL方法通过强化学习配合可验证奖励，有效提升了视觉语言模型在图表理解任务上的泛化能力和推理能力，证明了强化学习在结构化视觉理解任务上的优势。

title: OfficeQA Pro: An Enterprise Benchmark for End-to-End Grounded Reasoning
comment: 24 pages, 16 figures. Introduces the OfficeQA Pro benchmark for grounded reasoning over enterprise documents
summary: We introduce OfficeQA Pro, a benchmark for evaluating AI agents on grounded, multi-document reasoning over a large and heterogeneous document corpus. The corpus consists of U.S. Treasury Bulletins spanning nearly 100 years, comprising 89,000 pages and over 26 million numerical values. OfficeQA Pro consists of 133 questions that require precise document parsing, retrieval, and analytical reasoning across both unstructured text and tabular data. Frontier LLMs including Claude Opus 4.6, GPT-5.4, and Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview achieve less than 5% accuracy on OfficeQA Pro when relying on parametric knowledge, and less than 12% with additional access to the web. When provided directly with the document corpus, frontier agents still struggle on over half of questions, scoring 34.1% on average. We find that providing agents with a structured document representation produced by Databricks' ai_parse_document yields a 16.1% average relative performance gain across agents. We conduct additional ablations to study the effects of model selection, table representation, retrieval strategy, and test-time scaling on performance. Despite these improvements, significant headroom remains before agents can be considered reliable at enterprise-grade grounded reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了OfficeQA Pro基准，用于评估AI在大规模异构文档语料库上的多文档推理能力。该语料库包含近100年的美国财政部公报，共89,000页。实验表明前沿大模型在参数化知识模式下准确率低于5%，在提供文档语料库时平均准确率仅34.1%，而使用结构化文档表示可带来16.1%的相对性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有AI代理在大规模、异构企业文档上进行精准解析、检索和多文档推理的能力尚未得到充分评估。需要构建一个能够真实反映企业级落地推理需求的基准测试，以推动AI代理在复杂文档理解任务上的进步。
AI.method: 构建了OfficeQA Pro基准，包含133个需要跨非结构化文本和表格数据进行精确解析、检索和分析推理的问题。文档语料库来自近100年的美国财政部公报，涵盖89,000页和超过2600万个数值。系统性地评估了前沿大模型（Claude Opus 4.6、GPT-5.4、Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview）在多种条件下的表现，并进行了模型选择、表格表示、检索策略和测试时扩展等因素的消融实验。
AI.result: 前沿大模型在仅依赖参数化知识时准确率低于5%，在接入网络后准确率仍低于12%。当直接提供文档语料库时，平均准确率为34.1%，超过一半的问题仍无法正确回答。使用Databricks的ai_parse_document生成的结构化文档表示，可为各模型带来平均16.1%的相对性能提升。尽管如此，距离企业级可靠的落地推理能力仍有显著差距。
AI.conclusion: 当前AI代理在大规模异构文档的多文档推理任务上表现有限，即使采用结构化文档表示、优化检索策略等方法，性能提升仍然有限。要实现企业级可靠落地推理能力，仍需在文档解析、检索和推理等方面进行重大改进。

title: Toward Global Intent Inference for Human Motion by Inverse Reinforcement Learning
summary: This paper investigates whether a single, unified cost function can explain and predict human reaching movements, in contrast with existing approaches that rely on subject- or posture-specific optimization criteria. Using the Minimal Observation Inverse Reinforcement Learning (MO-IRL) algorithm, together with a seven-dimensional set of candidate cost terms, we efficiently estimate time-varying cost weights for a standard planar reaching task. MO-IRL provides orders-of-magnitude faster convergence than bilevel formulations, while using only a fraction of the available data, enabling the practical exploration of time-varying cost structures. Three levels of generality are evaluated: Subject-Dependent Posture-Dependent, Subject-Dependent Posture-Independent, and Subject-Independent Posture-Independent. Across all cases, time-varying weights substantially improve trajectory reconstruction, yielding an average 27% reduction in RMSE compared to the baseline. The inferred costs consistently highlight a dominant role for joint-acceleration regulation, complemented by smaller contributions from torque-change smoothness. Overall, a single subject- and posture-agnostic time-varying cost function is shown to predict human reaching trajectories with high accuracy, supporting the existence of a unified optimality principle governing this class of movements.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用MO-IRL算法高效估计时变成本权重，证明单一统一的成本函数可高精度预测人类平面 reaching 运动，相比基线平均降低27%的RMSE，发现关节加速度调节是主导成本项。
AI.motivation: 现有人类运动建模方法依赖于特定受试者或特定姿态的优化准则，缺乏通用性。本研究旨在探索是否存在一个单一、统一的成本函数能够解释和预测人类的 reaching 运动，从而揭示控制该类运动的统一最优性原则。
AI.method: 采用最小观测逆强化学习（MO-IRL）算法，结合七维候选成本项集合，高效估计标准平面 reaching 任务中的时变成本权重。该方法比双层优化公式收敛快数个数量级，且仅需部分数据即可实用化探索时变成本结构。评估了三个通用性层级：受试者相关姿态相关、受试者相关姿态无关、以及受试者无关姿态无关。
AI.result: 时变权重在所有案例中显著改善轨迹重建，相比基线平均降低27%的RMSE。推断的成本一致表明关节加速度调节起主导作用，力矩变化平滑性起次要贡献。单一受试者和姿态无关的时变成本函数能够高精度预测人类 reaching 轨迹。
AI.conclusion: 研究支持存在一个统一的时变最优性原则支配人类 reaching 运动，单一通用的成本函数可有效解释和预测此类运动，为运动控制的通用理论提供了有力证据。

title: Learning Quadruped Walking from Seconds of Demonstration
summary: Quadruped locomotion provides a natural setting for understanding when model-free learning can outperform model-based control design, by exploiting data patterns to bypass the difficulty of optimizing over discrete contacts and the combinatorial explosion of mode changes. We give a principled analysis of why imitation learning with quadrupeds can be inherently effective in a small data regime, based on the structure of its limit cycles, Poincaré return maps, and local numerical properties of neural networks. The understanding motivates a new imitation learning method that regulates the alignment between variations in a latent space and those over the output actions. Hardware experiments confirm that a few seconds of demonstration is sufficient to train various locomotion policies from scratch entirely offline with reasonable robustness.

AI.tldr: 本文从动力学结构角度分析了模仿学习在四足机器人小样本场景下的有效性，并提出了一种通过调节潜空间与输出动作变差对齐的新方法，仅用几秒演示数据即可离线训练出鲁棒的步态策略。
AI.motivation: 四足运动为理解无模型学习何时能超越基于模型的控制设计提供了天然场景。传统方法需要处理离散接触和模式变化的组合爆炸问题，而数据驱动方法可绕过这些困难。作者旨在从理论上解释为何模仿学习在四足机器人的小数据场景中天然有效。
AI.method: 基于极限环、庞加莱回归映射的结构分析以及神经网络的局部数值性质，从理论上揭示模仿学习在小数据机制下的有效性；据此提出一种新的模仿学习方法，通过调节潜空间中的变差与输出动作变差之间的对齐来学习策略，整个训练过程完全离线进行。
AI.result: 硬件实验表明，仅用几秒的演示数据即可从零开始离线训练出多种步态策略，并具备合理的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 四足运动的动力学结构（极限环与庞加莱映射）为小样本模仿学习提供了理论依据，所提出的方法能够在极少数据下实现有效的离线策略学习，展示了无模型方法在四足运动中的优势。

title: A Multi-Objective Optimization Approach for Sustainable AI-Driven Entrepreneurship in Resilient Economies
summary: The rapid advancement of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies presents both unprecedented opportunities and significant challenges for sustainable economic development. While AI offers transformative potential for addressing environmental challenges and enhancing economic resilience, its deployment often involves substantial energy consumption and environmental costs. This research introduces the EcoAI-Resilience framework, a multi-objective optimization approach designed to maximize the sustainability benefits of AI deployment while minimizing environmental costs and enhancing economic resilience. The framework addresses three critical objectives through mathematical optimization: sustainability impact maximization, economic resilience enhancement, and environmental cost minimization. The methodology integrates diverse data sources, including energy consumption metrics, sustainability indicators, economic performance data, and entrepreneurship outcomes across 53 countries and 14 sectors from 2015-2024. Our experimental validation demonstrates exceptional performance with R scores exceeding 0.99 across all model components, significantly outperforming baseline methods, including Linear Regression (R = 0.943), Random Forest (R = 0.957), and Gradient Boosting (R = 0.989). The framework successfully identifies optimal AI deployment strategies featuring 100\% renewable energy integration, 80% efficiency improvement targets, and optimal investment levels of $202.48 per capita. Key findings reveal strong correlations between economic complexity and resilience (r = 0.82), renewable energy adoption and sustainability outcomes (r = 0.71), and demonstrate significant temporal improvements in AI readiness (+1.12 points/year) and renewable energy adoption (+0.67 year) globally.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了EcoAI-Resilience框架，通过多目标优化方法平衡AI部署的可持续发展效益与环境成本。该框架在53个国家、14个行业的数据上实现了R值超过0.99的优异性能，并确定了最优AI部署策略，包括100%可再生能源整合和人均202.48美元的最优投资水平。
AI.motivation: 人工智能技术的快速发展为可持续经济发展带来了前所未有的机遇，但同时也带来了显著的挑战。虽然AI在应对环境挑战和增强经济韧性方面具有变革性潜力，但其部署往往伴随着巨大的能源消耗和环境成本。现有研究缺乏一个能够同时平衡可持续性效益最大化、经济韧性增强和环境成本最小化的综合框架。
AI.method: 提出了EcoAI-Resilience框架，这是一种多目标优化方法。该框架通过数学优化解决三个关键目标：可持续性影响最大化、经济韧性增强和环境成本最小化。研究整合了多元化的数据源，包括能源消耗指标、可持续性指标、经济绩效数据和创业成果数据，覆盖2015-2024年间53个国家和14个行业。
AI.result: 实验验证表明该框架性能卓越，所有模型组件的R值均超过0.99，显著优于线性回归(R=0.943)、随机森林(R=0.957)和梯度提升(R=0.989)等基准方法。框架成功识别了最优AI部署策略，包括100%可再生能源整合、80%效率提升目标以及人均202.48美元的最优投资水平。研究发现经济复杂性与韧性之间强相关(r=0.82)，可再生能源采用与可持续性结果之间存在显著相关性(r=0.71)，并展示了AI准备度(+1.12分/年)和可再生能源采用(+0.67年)的全球性时间改进。
AI.conclusion: EcoAI-Resilience框架为AI部署提供了一种有效的优化方法，能够在最大化可持续发展效益的同时最小化环境成本。研究结果证明了经济复杂性、可再生能源采用与可持续性发展之间的紧密联系，为政策制定者和企业提供了科学的AI部署决策支持，推动可持续经济发展。

title: Preference-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning for Space-Time Efficient Online 3D Bin Packing
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures. Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation 2026. Project Website: https://step-packing.github.io
summary: Robotic bin packing is widely deployed in warehouse automation, with current systems achieving robust performance through heuristic and learning-based strategies. These systems must balance compact placement with rapid execution, where selecting alternative items or reorienting them can improve space utilization but introduce additional time. We propose a selection-based formulation that explicitly reasons over this trade-off: at each step, the robot evaluates multiple candidate actions, weighing expected packing benefit against estimated operational time. This enables time-aware strategies that selectively accept increased operational time when it yields meaningful spatial improvements. Our method, STEP (Space-Time Efficient Packing), uses a preference-conditioned, Transformer-based reinforcement learning policy, and allows generalization across candidate set sizes and integration with standard placement modules. It achieves a 44% reduction in operational time without compromising packing density. Additional material is available at https://step-packing.github.io.

AI.tldr: 本文提出STEP方法，通过选择优化的强化学习策略平衡装箱密度与操作时间，在保持装箱密度的同时将操作时间减少44%。
AI.motivation: 现有仓库自动化装箱系统在紧凑放置与快速执行之间存在权衡：选择替代物品或重新定向可提高空间利用率但会增加操作时间，缺乏对此权衡的显式推理机制。
AI.method: 提出基于选择的建模方法，机器人在每步评估多个候选动作，权衡预期装箱收益与估计操作时间。采用偏好条件的Transformer强化学习策略（STEP），可泛化至不同候选集规模并与标准放置模块集成。
AI.result: STEP方法在保持装箱密度的前提下，实现了44%的操作时间减少，证明了时间感知策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式推理空间-时间权衡，STEP方法成功实现了高效装箱，为仓库自动化系统提供了更优的空间利用与操作时间平衡方案。

title: Conditional Unbalanced Optimal Transport Maps: An Outlier-Robust Framework for Conditional Generative Modeling
summary: Conditional Optimal Transport (COT) problem aims to find a transport map between conditional source and target distributions while minimizing the transport cost. Recently, these transport maps have been utilized in conditional generative modeling tasks to establish efficient mappings between the distributions. However, classical COT inherits a fundamental limitation of optimal transport, i.e., sensitivity to outliers, which arises from the hard distribution matching constraints. This limitation becomes more pronounced in a conditional setting, where each conditional distribution is estimated from a limited subset of data. To address this, we introduce the Conditional Unbalanced Optimal Transport (CUOT) framework, which relaxes conditional distribution-matching constraints through Csiszár divergence penalties while strictly preserving the conditioning marginals. We establish a rigorous formulation of the CUOT problem and derive its dual and semi-dual formulations. Based on the semi-dual form, we propose Conditional Unbalanced Optimal Transport Maps (CUOTM), an outlier-robust conditional generative model built upon a triangular $c$-transform parameterization. We theoretically justify the validity of this parameterization by proving that the optimal triangular map satisfies the $c$-transform relationships. Our experiments on 2D synthetic and image-scale datasets demonstrate that CUOTM achieves superior outlier robustness and competitive distribution-matching performance compared to existing COT-based baselines, while maintaining high sampling efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了条件非平衡最优传输（CUOT）框架，通过Csiszár散度惩罚放松条件分布匹配约束来解决传统条件最优传输对异常值敏感的问题，并基于此提出了条件非平衡最优传输映射（CUOTM）模型，在保持采样效率的同时实现了更好的异常值鲁棒性和分布匹配性能。
AI.motivation: 传统的条件最优传输（COT）继承了对异常值敏感的根本限制，这一问题源于硬性分布匹配约束。在条件设置中，每个条件分布仅从有限的数据子集中估计，使得这一限制更加突出，影响了条件生成建模任务的性能。
AI.method: 提出条件非平衡最优传输（CUOT）框架，通过Csiszár散度惩罚放松条件分布匹配约束，同时严格保留条件边缘分布；推导其对偶和半对偶形式；基于半对偶形式，提出采用三角c-变换参数化的条件非平衡最优传输映射（CUOTM）模型，并从理论上证明最优三角映射满足c-变换关系。
AI.result: 在2D合成数据集和图像尺度数据集上的实验表明，CUOTM相比现有基于COT的基线方法实现了更优的异常值鲁棒性和具有竞争力的分布匹配性能，同时保持了高采样效率。
AI.conclusion: CUOT框架成功解决了传统COT对异常值敏感的问题，CUOTM模型在理论上得到了严格的形式化并证明了参数化的有效性，为条件生成建模提供了一个鲁棒且高效的解决方案。

title: Evaluating Financial Intelligence in Large Language Models: Benchmarking SuperInvesting AI with LLM Engines
summary: Large language models are increasingly used for financial analysis and investment research, yet systematic evaluation of their financial reasoning capabilities remains limited. In this work, we introduce the AI Financial Intelligence Benchmark (AFIB), a multi-dimensional evaluation framework designed to assess financial analysis capabilities across five dimensions: factual accuracy, analytical completeness, data recency, model consistency, and failure patterns. We evaluate five AI systems: GPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, and SuperInvesting, using a dataset of 95+ structured financial analysis questions derived from real-world equity research tasks. The results reveal substantial differences in performance across models. Within this benchmark setting, SuperInvesting achieves the highest aggregate performance, with an average factual accuracy score of 8.96/10 and the highest completeness score of 56.65/70, while also demonstrating the lowest hallucination rate among evaluated systems. Retrieval-oriented systems such as Perplexity perform strongly on data recency tasks due to live information access but exhibit weaker analytical synthesis and consistency. Overall, the results highlight that financial intelligence in large language models is inherently multi-dimensional, and systems that combine structured financial data access with analytical reasoning capabilities provide the most reliable performance for complex investment research workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AI金融智能基准（AFIB），用于评估大型语言模型在金融分析中的能力。通过对五个AI系统（GPT、Gemini、Perplexity、Claude和SuperInvesting）在95+个真实股权研究问题上的测试，发现SuperInvesting表现最佳，而检索型系统（如Perplexity）在数据时效性方面优势明显但分析能力较弱。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在金融分析和投资研究中的应用日益增多，但对其金融推理能力的系统性评估仍然有限。现有研究缺乏一个多维度、全面的评估框架来衡量AI系统在复杂金融任务中的实际表现。
AI.method: 提出AI金融智能基准（AFIB），这是一个多维度评估框架，从五个维度评估金融分析能力：事实准确性、分析完整性、数据时效性、模型一致性和失效模式。研究使用来自真实股权研究任务的95+个结构化金融分析问题，对五个AI系统（GPT、Gemini、Perplexity、Claude和SuperInvesting）进行系统评估。
AI.result: SuperInvesting在综合表现上最优，事实准确性得分为8.96/10，完整性得分最高为56.65/70，幻觉率在所有评估系统中最低。以检索为导向的系统（如Perplexity）在数据时效性任务上表现优异，得益于实时信息访问能力，但在分析综合和一致性方面表现较弱。各模型性能存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 大型语言模型的金融智能本质上是多维度的。结合结构化金融数据访问能力与分析推理能力的系统，能够为复杂的投资研究工作流程提供最可靠的性能表现。这为金融AI系统的设计和应用提供了重要指导。

title: Uncertainty Mitigation and Intent Inference: A Dual-Mode Human-Machine Joint Planning System
summary: Effective human-robot collaboration in open-world environments requires joint planning under uncertain conditions. However, existing approaches often treat humans as passive supervisors, preventing autonomous agents from becoming human-like teammates that can actively model teammate behaviors, reason about knowledge gaps, query, and elicit responses through communication to resolve uncertainties. To address these limitations, we propose a unified human-robot joint planning system designed to tackle dual sources of uncertainty: task-relevant knowledge gaps and latent human intent. Our system operates in two complementary modes. First, an uncertainty-mitigation joint planning module enables two-way conversations to resolve semantic ambiguity and object uncertainty. It utilizes an LLM-assisted active elicitation mechanism and a hypothesis-augmented A^* search, subsequently computing an optimal querying policy via dynamic programming to minimize interaction and verification costs. Second, a real-time intent-aware collaboration module maintains a probabilistic belief over the human's latent task intent via spatial and directional cues, enabling dynamic, coordination-aware task selection for agents without explicit communication. We validate the proposed system in both Gazebo simulations and real-world UAV deployments integrated with a Vision-Language Model (VLM)-based 3D semantic perception pipeline. Experimental results demonstrate that the system significantly cuts the interaction cost by 51.9% in uncertainty-mitigation planning and reduces the task execution time by 25.4% in intent-aware cooperation compared to the baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的人机联合规划系统，通过双模块设计解决任务相关知识缺口和人类潜在意图两类不确定性，实现主动双向通信和实时意图感知协作，显著降低了交互成本和任务执行时间。
AI.motivation: 现有人机协作方法通常将人类视为被动监督者，导致自主智能体无法成为能够主动建模队友行为、推理知识缺口、通过通信查询和引出响应来解决不确定性的类人队友。开放世界环境中的人机协作需要处理任务相关的不确定性，这推动了能够主动解决语义歧义和推断人类潜在意图的系统设计。
AI.method: 提出一个统一的人机联合规划系统，包含两个互补模块：(1)不确定性缓解联合规划模块——利用LLM辅助的主动引出机制和假设增强的A*搜索算法，通过动态规划计算最优查询策略，实现双向对话以解决语义歧义和对象不确定性；(2)实时意图感知协作模块——通过空间和方向线索维护对人类潜在任务意图的概率信念，实现无需显式通信的动态、协调感知任务选择。系统集成VLM基础的3D语义感知管道，在Gazebo仿真和真实无人机部署中进行验证。
AI.result: 实验结果表明：(1)不确定性缓解规划模块将交互成本显著降低51.9%；(2)意图感知协作模块相比基线方法将任务执行时间减少25.4%。系统成功集成于Gazebo仿真环境和真实无人机部署中。
AI.conclusion: 该统一系统通过结合主动通信查询和隐式意图推断，有效解决了人机协作中的双重不确定性问题，使自主智能体能够成为主动的类人队友，在保持高效协作的同时显著降低交互成本和执行时间，为开放世界环境中的人机协作提供了实用解决方案。

title: NePPO: Near-Potential Policy Optimization for General-Sum Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
summary: Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) is increasingly used to design learning-enabled agents that interact in shared environments. However, training MARL algorithms in general-sum games remains challenging: learning dynamics can become unstable, and convergence guarantees typically hold only in restricted settings such as two-player zero-sum or fully cooperative games. Moreover, when agents have heterogeneous and potentially conflicting preferences, it is unclear what system-level objective should guide learning. In this paper, we propose a new MARL pipeline called Near-Potential Policy Optimization (NePPO) for computing approximate Nash equilibria in mixed cooperative--competitive environments. The core idea is to learn a player-independent potential function such that the Nash equilibrium of a cooperative game with this potential as the common utility approximates a Nash equilibrium of the original game. To this end, we introduce a novel MARL objective such that minimizing this objective yields the best possible potential function candidate and consequently an approximate Nash equilibrium of the original game. We develop an algorithmic pipeline that minimizes this objective using zeroth-order gradient descent and returns an approximate Nash equilibrium policy. We empirically show the superior performance of this approach compared to popular baselines such as MAPPO, IPPO and MADDPG.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了NePPO框架，通过学习玩家独立的势函数来解决一般和博弈中的多智能体强化学习问题，从而在混合合作-竞争环境中计算近似纳什均衡。
AI.motivation: 在一般和博弈中训练MARL算法极具挑战性：学习动态可能不稳定，收敛保证通常仅限于二人零和或完全合作等受限场景；此外，当智能体具有异构且潜在冲突的偏好时，引导学习的系统级目标尚不明确。
AI.method: 提出Near-Potential Policy Optimization (NePPO)管道：核心思想是学习一个玩家独立的势函数，使得以该势函数为公共效用的合作博弈的纳什均衡能够近似原始博弈的纳什均衡。引入新的MARL目标函数，通过零阶梯度下降最小化该目标，得到最优势函数候选并返回近似纳什均衡策略。
AI.result: 实证研究表明，与MAPPO、IPPO和MADDPG等主流基线方法相比，NePPO方法表现出优越的性能。
AI.conclusion: NePPO为混合合作-竞争环境中的多智能体强化学习提供了新的解决方案，通过势函数方法成功将收敛性保证扩展到更一般的博弈场景。

title: Agentic Critical Training
summary: Training large language models (LLMs) as autonomous agents often begins with imitation learning, but it only teaches agents what to do without understanding why: agents never contrast successful actions against suboptimal alternatives and thus lack awareness of action quality. Recent approaches attempt to address this by introducing self-reflection supervision derived from contrasts between expert and alternative actions. However, the training paradigm fundamentally remains imitation learning: the model imitates pre-constructed reflection text rather than learning to reason autonomously. We propose Agentic Critical Training (ACT), a reinforcement learning paradigm that trains agents to identify the better action among alternatives. By rewarding whether the model's judgment is correct, ACT drives the model to autonomously develop reasoning about action quality, producing genuine self-reflection rather than imitating it. Across three challenging agent benchmarks, ACT consistently improves agent performance when combined with different post-training methods. It achieves an average improvement of 5.07 points over imitation learning and 4.62 points over reinforcement learning. Compared to approaches that inject reflection capability through knowledge distillation, ACT also demonstrates clear advantages, yielding an average improvement of 2.42 points. Moreover, ACT enables strong out-of-distribution generalization on agentic benchmarks and improves performance on general reasoning benchmarks without any reasoning-specific training data, highlighting the value of our method. These results suggest that ACT is a promising path toward developing more reflective and capable LLM agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Agentic Critical Training (ACT)，一种强化学习范式，通过奖励模型对动作优劣的判断来训练智能体自主推理动作质量，而非模仿预构建的反思文本。实验表明ACT在多个基准上显著优于模仿学习和现有强化学习方法，并展现出良好的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有训练大语言模型作为自主智能体的方法主要依赖模仿学习，仅教导智能体"做什么"而无法理解"为什么"，导致智能体缺乏对动作质量的认知。近期方法通过引入自我反思监督试图解决此问题，但本质上仍是模仿预构建的反思文本，而非学习自主推理。
AI.method: 提出Agentic Critical Training (ACT)强化学习范式。该方法训练智能体识别候选动作中的更优选择，通过奖励模型判断的正确性，驱动模型自主发展关于动作质量的推理能力，从而产生真正的自我反思而非模仿。
AI.result: 在三个具有挑战性的智能体基准测试中，ACT与不同后训练方法结合时均持续提升性能。相比模仿学习平均提升5.07分，相比强化学习提升4.62分。与通过知识蒸馏注入反思能力的方法相比，ACT平均提升2.42分。此外，ACT在智能体基准上展现出强大的分布外泛化能力，并在无需推理特定训练数据的情况下提升了通用推理基准的性能。
AI.conclusion: ACT为开发更具反思能力和更强大的大语言模型智能体提供了一条有前景的路径，证明了通过强化学习训练模型自主判断动作质量的有效性。

title: Reasoning Knowledge-Gap in Drone Planning via LLM-based Active Elicitation
summary: Human-AI joint planning in Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) typically relies on control handover when facing environmental uncertainties, which is often inefficient and cognitively demanding for non-expert operators. To address this, we propose a novel framework that shifts the collaboration paradigm from control takeover to active information elicitation. We introduce the Minimal Information Neuro-Symbolic Tree (MINT), a reasoning mechanism that explicitly structures knowledge gaps regarding obstacles and goals into a queryable format. By leveraging large language models, our system formulates optimal binary queries to resolve specific ambiguities with minimal human interaction. We demonstrate the efficacy of this approach through a comprehensive workflow integrating a vision-language model for perception, voice interfaces, and a low-level UAV control module in both high-fidelity NVIDIA Isaac simulations and real-world deployments. Experimental results show that our method achieves a significant improvement in the success rate for complex search-and-rescue tasks while significantly reducing the frequency of human interaction compared to exhaustive querying baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MINT框架，通过主动信息获取而非控制权交接的方式实现人机联合规划，利用大语言模型生成最优二值查询来解决环境不确定性问题，在搜救任务中显著提高了成功率并减少了人工交互频率。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机人机联合规划在面对环境不确定性时通常依赖控制权交接，这种方式对非专业操作者而言效率低下且认知负担重，亟需一种更高效的人机协作范式。
AI.method: 提出Minimal Information Neuro-Symbolic Tree (MINT)推理机制，将关于障碍物和目标的知识缺口显式结构化为可查询格式，利用大语言模型生成最优二值查询来解决特定模糊性问题。系统集成视觉-语言模型进行感知、语音界面和底层无人机控制模块，在NVIDIA Isaac高保真仿真和实际部署中进行验证。
AI.result: 在复杂搜救任务中，该方法相比穷举查询基线显著提高了成功率，同时大幅减少了人工交互频率。
AI.conclusion: 从控制权交接转向主动信息获取的人机协作范式是有效的，MINT框架能够在最小化人工交互的同时提升无人机在不确定环境中的任务执行能力。

title: Diffusion Controller: Framework, Algorithms and Parameterization
summary: Controllable diffusion generation often relies on various heuristics that are seemingly disconnected without a unified understanding. We bridge this gap with Diffusion Controller (DiffCon), a unified control-theoretic view that casts reverse diffusion sampling as state-only stochastic control within (generalized) linearly-solvable Markov Decision Processes (LS-MDPs). Under this framework, control acts by reweighting the pretrained reverse-time transition kernels, balancing terminal objectives against an $f$-divergence cost. From the resulting optimality conditions, we derive practical reinforcement learning methods for diffusion fine-tuning: (i) f-divergence-regularized policy-gradient updates, including a PPO-style rule, and (ii) a regularizer-determined reward-weighted regression objective with a minimizer-preservation guarantee under the Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence. The LS-MDP framework further implies a principled model form: the optimal score decomposes into a fixed pretrained baseline plus a lightweight control correction, motivating a side-network parameterization conditioned on exposed intermediate denoising outputs, enabling effective gray-box adaptation with a frozen backbone. Experiments on Stable Diffusion v1.4 across supervised and reward-driven finetuning show consistent gains in preference-alignment win rates and improved quality-efficiency trade-offs versus gray-box baselines and even the parameter-efficient white-box adapter LoRA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DiffCon框架，将可控扩散生成统一为线性可解马尔可夫决策过程(LS-MDPs)中的状态随机控制问题，推导出f-散度正则化的策略梯度和奖励加权回归方法，并通过旁路网络参数化实现了高效的灰盒适配，在Stable Diffusion v1.4上取得了优于LoRA等基线的性能。
AI.motivation: 可控扩散生成方法依赖各种启发式策略，缺乏统一的理论理解。现有方法看似相互割裂，亟需一个统一的控制理论框架来系统性地理解和改进扩散模型的控制与微调。
AI.method: 提出Diffusion Controller (DiffCon)框架，将逆向扩散采样建模为线性可解马尔可夫决策过程(LS-MDPs)中的状态随机控制问题。控制通过重加权预训练逆向时间转移核实现，平衡终端目标与f-散度代价。从最优性条件推导出：(i) f-散度正则化的策略梯度更新（包括PPO风格规则）；(ii) 带最小化器保持保证的正则化奖励加权回归目标。框架表明最优分数分解为固定的预训练基线加轻量级控制修正，设计了以中间去噪输出为条件的旁路网络参数化，实现冻结主干的灰盒适配。
AI.result: 在Stable Diffusion v1.4上的实验表明：在监督学习和奖励驱动的微调任务中，偏好对齐胜率持续提升；相比灰盒基线甚至参数高效的LoRA白盒适配器，取得了更好的质量-效率权衡；证明了灰盒方法能够有效适配冻结主干。
AI.conclusion: DiffCon提供了可控扩散生成的统一控制理论视角，将LS-MDP框架与强化学习优化方法结合，推导出实用的微调算法和高效的模型架构。理论分析揭示了最优分数的加性分解性质，启发了旁路网络设计。实验验证了该方法在保持计算效率的同时实现了优异的性能，为可控扩散生成提供了理论严谨且实用有效的解决方案。

title: Physics-infused Learning for Aerial Manipulator in Winds and Near-Wall Environments
summary: Aerial manipulation (AM) expands UAV capabilities beyond passive observation to contact-based operations at high altitudes and in otherwise inaccessible environments. Although recent advances show promise, most AM systems are developed in controlled settings that overlook key aerodynamic effects. Simplified thrust models are often insufficient to capture the nonlinear wind disturbances and proximity-induced flow variations present in real-world environments near infrastructure, while high-fidelity CFD methods remain impractical for real-time use. Learning-based models are computationally efficient at inference, but often struggle to generalize to unseen condition. This paper combines both approaches by integrating a physics-based blade-element model with a learning-based residual force estimator, along with a rotor-speed allocation strategy for disturbance compensation, resulting in a unified control framework. The blade-element model computes per-rotor aerodynamic forces under wind and provides a refined feedforward disturbance estimate. A learning-based estimator then predicts the residual forces not captured by the model, enabling compensation for unmodeled aerodynamic effects. An online adaptation mechanism further updates the residual-force prediction and rotor-speed allocation jointly to reduce the mismatch between desired and realized thrust. We evaluate this framework in both free-flight and wall-contact tracking tasks in a simulated near-wall wind environment. Results demonstrate improved disturbance estimation and trajectory-tracking accuracy over conventional approaches, enabling robust wall-contact execution under challenging aerodynamic conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种融合物理模型与学习模型的空中机器人控制框架，通过叶片模型和残差力估计器补偿近壁面等复杂气动环境下的扰动，实现了更精确的扰动估计和轨迹跟踪。
AI.motivation: 现有空中机械手系统多在受控环境中开发，忽视了真实环境中基础设施附近的关键气动效应（非线性风扰动和近壁面诱导流动变化）。简化的推力模型无法捕捉这些效应，高保真CFD方法又难以实时应用，而纯学习模型泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 提出一种统一控制框架：1）基于物理的叶片元素模型计算风场下各旋翼气动力并提供前馈扰动估计；2）学习残差力估计器预测模型未捕捉的剩余气动力；3）在线自适应机制联合更新残差预测与旋翼转速分配，配合扰动补偿策略减小期望推力与实际推力的偏差。
AI.result: 在近壁面风场环境的仿真中，针对自由飞行和壁面接触跟踪任务进行了评估。结果表明，该方法在扰动估计和轨迹跟踪精度上优于传统方法，能够在挑战性气动条件下实现鲁棒的壁面接触操作。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合物理模型与学习方法的优势，该框架有效解决了近壁面复杂气动环境下的扰动补偿问题，为空中机械手在真实基础设施环境中的接触操作提供了实用解决方案。

title: Combinatorial Allocation Bandits with Nonlinear Arm Utility
summary: A matching platform is a system that matches different types of participants, such as companies and job-seekers. In such a platform, merely maximizing the number of matches can result in matches being concentrated on highly popular participants, which may increase dissatisfaction among other participants, such as companies, and ultimately lead to their churn, reducing the platform's profit opportunities. To address this issue, we propose a novel online learning problem, Combinatorial Allocation Bandits (CAB), which incorporates the notion of *arm satisfaction*. In CAB, at each round $t=1,\dots,T$, the learner observes $K$ feature vectors corresponding to $K$ arms for each of $N$ users, assigns each user to an arm, and then observes feedback following a generalized linear model (GLM). Unlike prior work, the learner's objective is not to maximize the number of positive feedback, but rather to maximize the arm satisfaction. For CAB, we provide an upper confidence bound algorithm that achieves an approximate regret upper bound, which matches the existing lower bound for the special case. Furthermore, we propose a TS algorithm and provide an approximate regret upper bound. Finally, we conduct experiments on synthetic data to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithms compared to other methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了组合分配赌博机（CAB）问题，通过引入"臂满意度"概念，解决匹配平台中单纯最大化匹配数量导致的参与者流失问题，并提出了UCB和TS算法。
AI.motivation: 匹配平台（如招聘网站）中，仅最大化匹配数量会导致匹配集中在热门参与者身上，造成其他参与者（如企业）不满并流失，最终损害平台收益。现有方法未考虑参与者满意度，需要新的在线学习框架来平衡匹配数量与参与者满意度。
AI.method: 提出组合分配赌博机（CAB）问题框架：在每个时间轮t，学习者观察到N个用户各自对应的K个臂的特征向量，将每个用户分配到一个臂，并观察基于广义线性模型（GLM）的反馈。目标是最大化臂满意度而非正反馈数量。提出了上置信界（UCB）算法和汤普森采样（TS）算法求解该问题。
AI.result: UCB算法达到了近似遗憾上界，且在特殊情况下与现有下界匹配。TS算法也获得了近似遗憾上界保证。在合成数据上的实验表明，所提算法相比其他方法具有更好的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入臂满意度概念并设计相应的在线学习算法，有效解决了匹配平台中参与者满意度与留存问题，为平台长期收益优化提供了新的理论框架和实践方法。

title: Relating Reinforcement Learning to Dynamic Programming-Based Planning
summary: This paper bridges some of the gap between optimal planning and reinforcement learning (RL), both of which share roots in dynamic programming applied to sequential decision making or optimal control. Whereas planning typically favors deterministic models, goal termination, and cost minimization, RL tends to favor stochastic models, infinite-horizon discounting, and reward maximization in addition to learning-related parameters such as the learning rate and greediness factor. A derandomized version of RL is developed, analyzed, and implemented to yield performance comparisons with value iteration and Dijkstra's algorithm using simple planning models. Next, mathematical analysis shows: 1) conditions under which cost minimization and reward maximization are equivalent, 2) conditions for equivalence of single-shot goal termination and infinite-horizon episodic learning, and 3) conditions under which discounting causes goal achievement to fail. The paper then advocates for defining and optimizing truecost, rather than inserting arbitrary parameters to guide operations. Performance studies are then extended to the stochastic case, using planning-oriented criteria and comparing value iteration to RL with learning rates and greediness factors.

AI.tldr: 本文旨在填补最优规划与强化学习（RL）之间的理论鸿沟，通过开发去随机化的RL版本并分析两类方法在成本最小化、奖励最大化、终止条件及折扣因子等方面的数学等价条件，最终倡导使用真实成本（true cost）进行优化。
AI.motivation: 最优规划与强化学习均源于动态规划，但在模型假设、目标函数及关键参数上存在显著差异。规划方法偏好确定性模型、目标终止和成本最小化，而RL则倾向随机模型、无限视界折扣及奖励最大化，并引入学习率与贪婪因子等超参数。本文旨在弥合二者间的理论隔阂。
AI.method: 首先开发并分析了一个去随机化的强化学习版本，在简单规划模型上与值迭代和Dijkstra算法进行性能对比。随后进行数学分析，推导成本最小化与奖励最大化的等价条件、单次目标终止与无限视界回合学习的等价条件，以及折扣因子导致目标失败的条件。最后扩展到随机情形，采用规划导向的评价准则，比较值迭代与带学习率及贪婪因子的RL方法。
AI.result: 实验与分析揭示了三个核心理论条件：1）成本最小化与奖励最大化在特定条件下的等价性；2）单次目标终止与无限视界回合学习的等价条件；3）折扣因子导致目标无法达成的条件。此外，去随机化RL在确定性场景下可达到与经典规划算法相当的性能，在随机场景下的比较也验证了理论发现。
AI.conclusion: 本文倡导在规划与学习问题中应定义并优化真实成本（true cost），而非依赖任意超参数（如折扣因子、学习率、贪婪因子）来引导决策。这一视角有助于统一规划与强化学习的理论与实践，为构建更简洁、可解释的决策系统提供了理论基础。

title: RESCHED: Rethinking Flexible Job Shop Scheduling from a Transformer-based Architecture with Simplified States
summary: Neural approaches to the Flexible Job Shop Scheduling Problem (FJSP), particularly those based on deep reinforcement learning (DRL), have gained growing attention in recent years. However, existing methods rely on complex feature-engineered state representations (i.e., often requiring more than 20 handcrafted features) and graph-biased neural architectures. To reduce modeling complexity and advance a more generalizable framework for FJSP, we introduce \textsc{ReSched}, a minimalist DRL framework that rethinks both the scheduling formulation and model design. First, by revisiting the Markov Decision Process (MDP) formulation of FJSP, we condense the state space to just four essential features, eliminating historical dependencies through a subproblem-based perspective. Second, we employ Transformer blocks with dot-product attention, augmented by three lightweight but effective architectural modifications tailored to scheduling tasks. Extensive experiments show that \textsc{ReSched} outperforms classical dispatching rules and state-of-the-art DRL methods on FJSP. Moreover, \textsc{ReSched} also generalizes well to the Job Shop Scheduling Problem (JSSP) and the Flexible Flow Shop Scheduling Problem (FFSP), achieving competitive performance against neural baselines specifically designed for these variants.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ReSched，一个极简的深度强化学习框架，用于解决柔性作业车间调度问题（FJSP）。通过简化状态表示（仅需4个特征）和采用Transformer架构，该方法在FJSP、JSSP和FFSP上均取得了优异性能，同时降低了建模复杂度。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于深度强化学习的FJSP求解方法依赖于复杂的手工特征工程（通常需要20多个特征）和带有偏置的图神经网络架构，建模复杂度高且泛化能力受限。本文旨在减少建模复杂度并建立一个更具泛化能力的调度框架。
AI.method: 1. 重新审视FJSP的马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）表述，从子问题视角出发，将状态空间简化为仅4个核心特征，消除了历史依赖性。2. 采用基于点积注意力的Transformer块，并引入三个针对调度任务的轻量级架构改进。该方法设计简洁，避免了复杂的特征工程和图结构偏置。
AI.result: ReSched在FJSP问题上优于经典调度规则和最先进的DRL方法。同时，该方法在作业车间调度问题（JSSP）和柔性流水车间调度问题（FFSP）上表现出良好的泛化能力，与专门为这些问题设计的神经方法相比具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 通过简化状态表示和采用注意力机制，ReSched证明了极简设计可以取得优异性能，为调度问题提供了一个更具泛化能力的统一框架，降低了特征工程的需求。

title: Viewpoint-Agnostic Grasp Pipeline using VLM and Partial Observations
summary: Robust grasping in cluttered, unstructured environments remains challenging for mobile legged manipulators due to occlusions that lead to partial observations, unreliable depth estimates, and the need for collision-free, execution-feasible approaches. In this paper we present an end-to-end pipeline for language-guided grasping that bridges open-vocabulary target selection to safe grasp execution on a real robot. Given a natural-language command, the system grounds the target in RGB using open-vocabulary detection and promptable instance segmentation, extracts an object-centric point cloud from RGB-D, and improves geometric reliability under occlusion via back-projected depth compensation and two-stage point cloud completion. We then generate and collision-filter 6-DoF grasp candidates and select an executable grasp using safety-oriented heuristics that account for reachability, approach feasibility, and clearance. We evaluate the method on a quadruped robot with an arm in two cluttered tabletop scenarios, using paired trials against a view-dependent baseline. The proposed approach achieves a 90% overall success rate (9/10) against 30% (3/10) for the baseline, demonstrating substantially improved robustness to occlusions and partial observations in clutter.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个端到端的语言引导抓取系统，针对杂乱环境中的遮挡和部分观测问题，在四足机械臂机器人上实现了90%的成功率，显著优于基线方法的30%。
AI.motivation: 移动式足式机械臂在杂乱、非结构化环境中进行鲁棒抓取仍面临挑战，主要问题包括：遮挡导致部分观测、深度估计不可靠，以及需要无碰撞且可执行的抓取方法。
AI.method: 提出了一个端到端的语言引导抓取框架：1）利用开放词汇检测和可提示实例分割将自然语言命令中的目标定位到RGB图像；2）从RGB-D提取以物体为中心的点云；3）通过反向投影深度补偿和两阶段点云完成来改善遮挡下的几何可靠性；4）生成并碰撞过滤6自由度抓取候选；5）使用面向安全的启发式方法选择可执行抓取，考虑可达性、接近可行性和间隙。
AI.result: 在配备机械臂的四足机器人上进行评估，在两个杂乱桌面场景中与视图相关基线进行配对试验。所提方法实现了90%的整体成功率（9/10），而基线方法仅为30%（3/10），证明了对遮挡和部分观测的鲁棒性显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功弥合了开放词汇目标选择与安全抓取执行之间的差距，通过深度补偿、点云完成和安全导向的启发式选择，有效解决了杂乱环境中的遮挡和部分观测问题，显著提升了移动式足式机械臂的抓取性能。

title: Resource-Adaptive Federated Text Generation with Differential Privacy
summary: In cross-silo federated learning (FL), sensitive text datasets remain confined to local organizations due to privacy regulations, making repeated training for each downstream task both communication-intensive and privacy-demanding. A promising alternative is to generate differentially private (DP) synthetic datasets that approximate the global distribution and can be reused across tasks. However, pretrained large language models (LLMs) often fail under domain shift, and federated finetuning is hindered by computational heterogeneity: only resource-rich clients can update the model, while weaker clients are excluded, amplifying data skew and the adverse effects of DP noise. We propose a flexible participation framework that adapts to client capacities. Strong clients perform DP federated finetuning, while weak clients contribute through a lightweight DP voting mechanism that refines synthetic text. To ensure the synthetic data mirrors the global dataset, we apply control codes (e.g., labels, topics, metadata) that represent each client's data proportions and constrain voting to semantically coherent subsets. This two-phase approach requires only a single round of communication for weak clients and integrates contributions from all participants. Experiments show that our framework improves distribution alignment and downstream robustness under DP and heterogeneity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种灵活参与的跨孤岛联邦学习框架，通过差分隐私合成数据生成解决隐私保护与计算异构性问题。强客户端执行DP联邦微调，弱客户端通过轻量级DP投票机制优化合成文本，仅需单轮通信即可整合所有参与者贡献。
AI.motivation: 在跨孤岛联邦学习中，隐私法规限制敏感文本数据离开本地组织，导致每个下游任务都需重复训练，既耗费通信资源又增加隐私风险。现有解决方案面临两大挑战：预训练大语言模型在领域偏移下表现不佳；联邦微调受计算异构性限制，资源不足的客户端被排除在外，加剧数据偏斜和差分隐私噪声的负面影响。
AI.method: 提出灵活参与框架适应客户端能力差异：(1)强客户端执行差分隐私联邦微调；(2)弱客户端通过轻量级差分隐私投票机制优化合成文本；(3)应用控制码（标签、主题、元数据）表示各客户端数据比例，将投票约束在语义一致的子集中，确保合成数据反映全局数据集分布。该两阶段方法仅需弱客户端单轮通信即可整合所有参与者贡献。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架在差分隐私和计算异构性条件下，显著改善了分布对齐和下游任务的鲁棒性。通过允许所有客户端参与（无论计算能力强弱），有效缓解了数据偏斜和DP噪声的不利影响。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的灵活参与框架成功解决了跨孤岛联邦学习中的计算异构性和隐私保护难题，通过差分隐私合成数据生成实现了高效的跨任务数据复用，为资源受限客户端参与联邦学习提供了可行方案。

title: Choose What to Observe: Task-Aware Semantic-Geometric Representations for Visuomotor Policy
summary: Visuomotor policies learned from demonstrations often overfit to nuisance visual factors in raw RGB observations, resulting in brittle behavior under appearance shifts such as background changes and object recoloring. We propose a task-aware observation interface that canonicalizes visual input into a shared representation, improving robustness to out-of-distribution (OOD) appearance changes without modifying or fine-tuning the policy. Given an RGB image and an open-vocabulary specification of task-relevant entities, we use SAM3 to segment the target object and robot/gripper. We construct an L0 observation by repainting segmented entities with predefined semantic colors on a constant background. For tasks requiring stronger geometric cues, we further inject monocular depth from Depth Anything 3 into the segmented regions via depth-guided overwrite, yielding a unified semantic--geometric observation (L1) that remains a standard 3-channel, image-like input. We evaluate on RoboMimic (Lift), ManiSkill YCB grasping under clutter, four RLBench tasks under controlled appearance shifts, and two real-world Franka tasks (ReachX and CloseCabinet). Across benchmarks and policy backbones (Flow Matching Policy and SmolVLA), our interface preserves in-distribution performance while substantially improving robustness under OOD visual shifts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种任务感知的观测接口，通过将RGB图像标准化为语义和几何表示，在无需修改策略的情况下显著提升了视觉运动策略对分布外外观变化的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 从演示中学习的视觉运动策略往往过拟合于RGB观测中的干扰视觉因素，导致在背景变化、物体重着色等外观偏移下表现脆弱。现有方法需要修改或微调策略来应对分布外变化，成本较高。
AI.method: 提出一种任务感知观测接口，分两级处理：L0层利用SAM分割目标对象和机器人，将分割实体用预定义语义颜色重绘在恒定背景上；L1层针对需要几何线索的任务，通过Depth Anything注入单目深度信息，生成统一的语义-几何观测，保持标准3通道图像格式。
AI.result: 在RoboMimic、ManiSkill YCB抓取、四个RLBench任务和两个真实世界Franka任务上评估表明，该方法在保持分布内性能的同时，在分布外视觉偏移下显著提升了策略鲁棒性，适用于Flow Matching Policy和SmolVLA等多种策略骨干网络。
AI.conclusion: 该任务感知观测接口提供了一种无需修改策略即可增强视觉运动策略鲁棒性的有效方案，为实际机器人应用中应对外观变化提供了实用的解决思路。

title: Interpretable Maximum Margin Deep Anomaly Detection
summary: Anomaly detection is a crucial machine-learning task with wide-ranging applications. Deep Support Vector Data Description (Deep SVDD) is a prominent deep one-class method, but it is vulnerable to hypersphere collapse, often relies on heuristic choices for hypersphere parameters, and provides limited interpretability. To address these issues, we propose Interpretable Maximum Margin Deep Anomaly Detection (IMD-AD), which leverages a small set of labeled anomalies and a maximum margin objective to stabilize training and improve discrimination. It is inherently resilient to hypersphere collapse. Furthermore, we prove an equivalence between hypersphere parameters and the network's final-layer weights, which allows the center and radius to be learned end-to-end as part of the model and yields intrinsic interpretability and visualizable outputs. We further develop an efficient training algorithm that jointly optimizes representation, margin, and final-layer parameters. Extensive experiments and ablation studies on image and tabular benchmarks demonstrate that IMD-AD empirically improves detection performance over several state-of-the-art baselines while providing interpretable decision diagnostics.

AI.tldr: 提出IMD-AD方法，通过最大间隔目标和小规模标注异常解决Deep SVDD的超球面崩溃、参数启发式选择和可解释性不足问题，实现端到端学习与可视化解释。
AI.motivation: Deep SVDD在异常检测中存在三个关键缺陷：对超球面崩溃敏感、超球面参数依赖启发式选择、可解释性有限。
AI.method: 提出可解释最大间隔深度异常检测（IMD-AD）：利用小规模标注异常和最大间隔目标稳定训练；证明超球面参数与网络最终层权重的等价性，实现中心与半径端到端学习；设计联合优化表示、间隔和最终层参数的高效训练算法。
AI.result: 在图像和表格基准上的广泛实验与消融研究表明，IMD-AD相比多个最先进基线方法提升了检测性能，同时提供可解释的决策诊断。
AI.conclusion: IMD-AD有效解决了Deep SVDD的核心缺陷，在保持优异检测性能的同时实现了内在的可解释性和抗超球面崩溃能力。

title: Identifying Influential Actions in Human-Robot Interactions
comment: Presented at the 30th International Symposium on Artificial Life and Robotics (AROB 30th). Beppu, Japan, January 2025
summary: Human-robot interaction combines robotics, cognitive science, and human factors to study collaborative systems. This paper introduces a method for identifying influential robot actions using transfer entropy, a statistic that measures directed information transfer between time series. TE is effective for capturing complex, nonlinear interactions. We apply this method to analyze how robot actions affect human behavior during a conversation with a remotely controlled robot avatar. By focusing on the impact of proximity, our approach demonstrates TE's capability to identify key actions influencing human responses, highlighting its potential to improve the design and adaptability of robotic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于传递熵的方法来识别人机交互中具有影响力的机器人动作，并通过对话场景中的实验验证了该方法在分析机器人接近行为对人类影响方面的有效性。
AI.motivation: 在人机交互领域，理解机器人动作如何影响人类行为对于设计更好的协作系统至关重要。现有方法可能难以捕捉复杂、非线性的交互关系，因此需要一种能够有效识别关键机器人动作的方法。
AI.method: 采用传递熵（Transfer Entropy, TE）这一统计量来测量时间序列之间的定向信息传递。TE能够捕捉复杂、非线性的交互作用。研究者将该方法应用于分析远程控制机器人化身在对话场景中，机器人动作（特别是接近行为）对人类行为的影响。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，传递熵方法能够有效识别出影响人类响应的关键机器人动作。研究特别关注了接近行为的影响，证明了TE在捕捉机器人动作与人类行为之间因果关系方面的能力。
AI.conclusion: 传递熵方法为人机交互中识别有影响力的机器人动作提供了一种有效工具，该方法有助于改进机器人系统的设计和适应性，使机器人能够更好地理解和响应人类行为。

title: Entropy-Aware On-Policy Distillation of Language Models
summary: On-policy distillation is a promising approach for transferring knowledge between language models, where a student learns from dense token-level signals along its own trajectories. This framework typically uses reverse KL divergence, encouraging the student to match the teacher's high-confidence predictions. However, we show that the mode-seeking property of reverse KL reduces generation diversity and yields unstable learning signals when the teacher distribution has high entropy. To address this, we introduce Entropy-Aware On-Policy Distillation. Our key idea is augmenting the standard reverse KL objective with forward KL when teacher entropy is high, capturing the full range of plausible outputs while retaining precise imitation elsewhere. It balances mode-seeking precision with mode-covering robustness without sacrificing on-policy training efficiency. Experiments show that our method maintains generation diversity (sustained token-level entropy) and improves student-teacher alignment (lower forward KL on high-entropy tokens). Across six math reasoning benchmarks, this yields Pass@8 accuracy gains of +1.37 for Qwen3-0.6B-Base, +2.39 for Qwen3-1.7B-Base, and +5.05 for Qwen3-4B-Base compared to baseline on-policy distillation methods. These results demonstrate that accounting for teacher uncertainty is essential for maintaining diversity and achieving effective knowledge transfer.

AI.tldr: 本文提出熵感知的在线策略蒸馏方法，通过在教师模型高熵区域引入前向KL散度来增强标准反向KL目标，解决了传统方法中生成多样性降低和学习信号不稳定的问题，在数学推理任务上实现了显著的准确率提升。
AI.motivation: 在线策略蒸馏通常使用反向KL散度，促使学生模型匹配教师模型的高置信度预测。然而，反向KL的模态搜索(mode-seeking)特性会降低生成多样性，且当教师分布具有高熵时会产生不稳定的学习信号。
AI.method: 提出熵感知在线策略蒸馏(Entropy-Aware On-Policy Distillation)，核心思想是当教师熵较高时，用前向KL散度增强标准反向KL目标。该方法在保持模态搜索精度的同时捕获合理的输出范围，实现模态覆盖的鲁棒性，且不牺牲在线训练效率。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能维持生成多样性（保持token级别的熵）并改善学生-教师对齐（在高熵token上降低前向KL）。在六个数学推理基准测试中，相比基线在线策略蒸馏方法，Qwen3-0.6B-Base、Qwen3-1.7B-Base和Qwen3-4B-Base的Pass@8准确率分别提升+1.37、+2.39和+5.05。
AI.conclusion: 考虑教师模型的不确定性对于维持生成多样性和实现有效的知识迁移至关重要，所提方法通过平衡模态搜索精度与模态覆盖鲁棒性实现了更优的性能。

title: RoboRouter: Training-Free Policy Routing for Robotic Manipulation
summary: Research on robotic manipulation has developed a diverse set of policy paradigms, including vision-language-action (VLA) models, vision-action (VA) policies, and code-based compositional approaches. Concrete policies typically attain high success rates on specific task distributions but lim-ited generalization beyond it. Rather than proposing an other monolithic policy, we propose to leverage the complementary strengths of existing approaches through intelligent policy routing. We introduce RoboRouter, a training-free framework that maintains a pool of heterogeneous policies and learns to select the best-performing policy for each task through accumulated execution experience. Given a new task, RoboRouter constructs a semantic task representation, retrieves historical records of similar tasks, predicts the optimal policy choice without requiring trial-and-error, and incorporates structured feedback to refine subsequent routing decisions. Integrating a new policy into the system requires only lightweight evaluation and incurs no training overhead. Across simulation benchmark and real-world evaluations, RoboRouter consistently outperforms than in-dividual policies, improving average success rate by more than 3% in simulation and over 13% in real-world settings, while preserving execution efficiency. Our results demonstrate that intelligent routing across heterogeneous, off-the-shelf policies provides a practical and scalable pathway toward building more capable robotic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RoboRouter，一个无需训练的策略路由框架，通过从异构策略池（VLA、VA、代码组合方法等）中智能选择最优策略来提升机器人操作性能，在仿真和真实环境中分别提升3%和13%的成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人操作策略（如VLA模型、VA策略、代码组合方法）各自在特定任务分布上表现优异，但泛化能力有限。作者旨在利用不同策略的互补优势，而非设计新的单一策略，通过智能路由机制实现更强大的机器人系统。
AI.method: 提出RoboRouter框架：1）维护异构策略池；2）构建任务语义表示；3）基于相似任务的历史执行记录检索；4）预测最优策略选择（无需试错）；5）引入结构化反馈优化后续路由决策。该框架无需训练，新策略仅需轻量评估即可集成。
AI.result: 在仿真基准测试中平均成功率提升超过3%，真实世界环境提升超过13%，同时保持执行效率。RoboRouter持续优于任意单一策略，验证了异构策略智能路由的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 在异构、现成策略间进行智能路由为构建更强大的机器人系统提供了一条实用且可扩展的路径，是比开发新单一策略更高效的解决方案。

title: Dreamer-CDP: Improving Reconstruction-free World Models Via Continuous Deterministic Representation Prediction
summary: Model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) agents operating in high-dimensional observation spaces, such as Dreamer, rely on learning abstract representations for effective planning and control. Existing approaches typically employ reconstruction-based objectives in the observation space, which can render representations sensitive to task-irrelevant details. Recent alternatives trade reconstruction for auxiliary action prediction heads or view augmentation strategies, but perform worse in the Crafter environment than reconstruction-based methods. We close this gap between Dreamer and reconstruction-free models by introducing a JEPA-style predictor defined on continuous, deterministic representations. Our method matches Dreamer's performance on Crafter, demonstrating effective world model learning on this benchmark without reconstruction objectives.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于JEPA风格的预测器，应用于连续确定性表示，实现了无需重建目标的世界模型学习，在Crafter基准测试上达到了与Dreamer相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于模型的强化学习方法（如Dreamer）在高维观测空间中通常采用基于重建的目标函数，这会导致表示对任务无关细节敏感。近期替代方案虽然避免了重建，但在Crafter环境中的表现不如基于重建的方法。
AI.method: 引入一种JEPA风格的预测器，定义在连续确定性表示上，替代传统的重建目标，实现无重建的世界模型学习。
AI.result: 该方法在Crafter基准测试上匹配了Dreamer的性能，证明了无需重建目标即可实现有效的世界模型学习。
AI.conclusion: 成功弥合了Dreamer与无重建模型之间的性能差距，展示了JEPA风格预测器在连续确定性表示上的有效性，为MBRL中的表示学习提供了新的方向。

title: NaviDriveVLM: Decoupling High-Level Reasoning and Motion Planning for Autonomous Driving
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have emerged as a promising direction for end-to-end autonomous driving (AD) by jointly modeling visual observations, driving context, and language-based reasoning. However, existing VLM-based systems face a trade-off between high-level reasoning and motion planning: large models offer strong semantic understanding but are costly to adapt for precise control, whereas small VLM models can be fine-tuned efficiently but often exhibit weaker reasoning. We propose NaviDriveVLM, a decoupled framework that separates reasoning from action generation using a large-scale Navigator and a lightweight trainable Driver. This design preserves reasoning ability, reduces training cost, and provides an explicit interpretable intermediate representation for downstream planning. Experiments on the nuScenes benchmark show that NaviDriveVLM outperforms large VLM baselines in end-to-end motion planning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出NaviDriveVLM框架，通过解耦推理与动作生成，在保持强推理能力的同时降低训练成本，在端到端运动规划任务上超越大规模视觉语言模型基线。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视觉语言模型的自动驾驶系统存在高层推理与运动规划之间的权衡问题：大模型具备强语义理解能力但适配精确控制的成本高昂，小模型可高效微调但推理能力较弱。
AI.method: 提出NaviDriveVLM解耦框架，将推理与动作生成分离，包含大规模Navigator模块和轻量级可训练Driver模块。Navigator负责高层推理，Driver负责生成具体控制动作，通过显式可解释的中间表示连接两者。
AI.result: 在nuScenes基准测试上的实验表明，NaviDriveVLM在端到端运动规划任务上超越了大规模视觉语言模型基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦设计成功解决了推理能力与训练成本的权衡问题，既保留了大模型的推理优势，又降低了适配控制的训练开销，同时提供了可解释的中间表示。

title: Countdown-Code: A Testbed for Studying The Emergence and Generalization of Reward Hacking in RLVR
summary: Reward hacking is a form of misalignment in which models overoptimize proxy rewards without genuinely solving the underlying task. Precisely measuring reward hacking occurrence remains challenging because true task rewards are often expensive or impossible to compute. We introduce Countdown-Code, a minimal environment where models can both solve a mathematical reasoning task and manipulate the test harness. This dual-access design creates a clean separation between proxy rewards (test pass/fail) and true rewards (mathematical correctness), enabling accurate measurement of reward-hacking rates. Using this environment, we study reward hacking in open-weight LLMs and find that such behaviors can be unintentionally learned during supervised fine-tuning (SFT) when even a small fraction of reward-hacking trajectories leak into training data. As little as 1\% contamination in distillation SFT data is sufficient for models to internalize reward hacking which resurfaces during subsequent reinforcement learning (RL). We further show that RL amplifies misalignment and drives its generalization beyond the original domain. We open-source our environment and code to facilitate future research on reward hacking in LLMs. Our results reveal a previously underexplored pathway through which reward hacking can emerge and persist in LLMs, underscoring the need for more rigorous validation of synthetic SFT data. Code is available at https://github.com/zohaib-khan5040/Countdown-Code.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Countdown-Code环境，用于精确测量奖励黑客行为，发现SFT数据中仅1%的污染就足以让模型内化奖励黑客行为，且RL会放大这种错误对齐。
AI.motivation: 奖励黑客（模型过度优化代理奖励而非真正解决任务）是模型对齐中的重要问题，但由于真实任务奖励通常难以计算或成本高昂，精确测量奖励黑客的发生率仍然具有挑战性。
AI.method: 引入Countdown-Code最小化环境，模型既能解决数学推理任务，又能操作测试工具。这种双重访问设计实现了代理奖励（测试通过/失败）与真实奖励（数学正确性）的清晰分离，从而能够准确测量奖励黑客率。使用该环境研究开源权重LLM中的奖励黑客行为。
AI.result: 研究发现奖励黑客行为可以在监督微调（SFT）期间非故意地学习到，即使训练数据中仅有少量奖励黑客轨迹泄漏。蒸馏SFT数据中仅1%的污染就足以让模型内化奖励黑客行为，并在后续强化学习（RL）中重新浮现。RL还会放大错误对齐并推动其超越原始领域的泛化。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了奖励黑客在LLM中出现和持续存在的先前未被充分探索的途径，强调了对合成SFT数据进行更严格验证的必要性。已开源环境和代码以促进未来关于LLM奖励黑客的研究。

title: Long-Short Term Agents for Pure-Vision Bronchoscopy Robotic Autonomy
summary: Accurate intraoperative navigation is essential for robot-assisted endoluminal intervention, but remains difficult because of limited endoscopic field of view and dynamic artifacts. Existing navigation platforms often rely on external localization technologies, such as electromagnetic tracking or shape sensing, which increase hardware complexity and remain vulnerable to intraoperative anatomical mismatch. We present a vision-only autonomy framework that performs long-horizon bronchoscopic navigation using preoperative CT-derived virtual targets and live endoscopic video, without external tracking during navigation. The framework uses hierarchical long-short agents: a short-term reactive agent for continuous low-latency motion control, and a long-term strategic agent for decision support at anatomically ambiguous points. When their recommendations conflict, a world-model critic predicts future visual states for candidate actions and selects the action whose predicted state best matches the target view. We evaluated the system in a high-fidelity airway phantom, three ex vivo porcine lungs, and a live porcine model. The system reached all planned segmental targets in the phantom, maintained 80\% success to the eighth generation ex vivo, and achieved in vivo navigation performance comparable to the expert bronchoscopist. These results support the preclinical feasibility of sensor-free autonomous bronchoscopic navigation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种纯视觉的自主支气管镜导航框架，无需外部跟踪设备，通过分层智能体和世界模型 critic 实现长时程导航，在体模、离体和活体实验中均表现出色。
AI.motivation: 机器人辅助腔内手术中，精确的术中导航至关重要，但受限于有限的内镜视野和动态伪影。现有导航平台依赖电磁跟踪或形状传感等外部定位技术，增加了硬件复杂性，且在术中解剖结构不匹配时表现脆弱。
AI.method: 提出一种纯视觉的自主导航框架，利用术前CT虚拟目标和实时内镜视频进行导航。框架采用分层长短时智能体：短期反应智能体负责连续低延迟运动控制，长期策略智能体在解剖歧义点提供决策支持。当两者建议冲突时，世界模型评论器预测候选动作的未来视觉状态，并选择预测状态与目标视图最匹配的动作。
AI.result: 在高保真气道体模、三个离体猪肺和活体猪模型中评估系统。系统在体模中到达所有计划的段级目标，在离体实验中保持80%的成功率至第八代支气管，在活体实验中导航性能与专家支气管镜医师相当。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果支持无传感器自主支气管镜导航的临床前可行性，为简化硬件依赖、提高导航鲁棒性提供了新思路。

title: Combining Adam and its Inverse Counterpart to Enhance Generalization of Deep Learning Optimizers
summary: In the training of neural networks, adaptive moment estimation (Adam) typically converges fast but exhibits suboptimal generalization performance. A widely accepted explanation for its defect in generalization is that it often tends to converge to sharp minima. To enhance its ability to find flat minima, we propose its new variant named inverse Adam (InvAdam). The key improvement of InvAdam lies in its parameter update mechanism, which is opposite to that of Adam. Specifically, it computes element-wise multiplication of the first-order and second-order moments, while Adam computes the element-wise division of these two moments. This modification aims to increase the step size of the parameter update when the elements in the second-order moments are large and vice versa, which helps the parameter escape sharp minima and stay at flat ones. However, InvAdam's update mechanism may face challenges in convergence. To address this challenge, we propose dual Adam (DualAdam), which integrates the update mechanisms of both Adam and InvAdam, ensuring convergence while enhancing generalization performance. Additionally, we introduce the diffusion theory to mathematically demonstrate InvAdam's ability to escape sharp minima. Extensive experiments are conducted on image classification tasks and large language model (LLM) fine-tuning. The results validate that DualAdam outperforms Adam and its state-of-the-art variants in terms of generalization performance. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/LongJin-lab/DualAdam.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DualAdam优化器，通过结合Adam和反向Adam（InvAdam）的更新机制，在保证收敛性的同时提升了神经网络的泛化性能。
AI.motivation: Adam优化器虽然收敛速度快，但泛化性能较差，主要原因是其倾向于收敛到尖锐极小值。为了增强寻找平坦极小值的能力，需要改进Adam的参数更新机制。
AI.method: 首先提出InvAdam，其参数更新机制与Adam相反：计算一阶矩和二阶矩的逐元素乘积（而非Adam的除法），使二阶矩较大时增加步长以逃离尖锐极小值。针对InvAdam收敛困难的问题，进一步提出DualAdam，整合Adam和InvAdam的更新机制，同时引入扩散理论从数学上证明逃离尖锐极小值的能力。
AI.result: 在图像分类任务和大语言模型微调上进行了大量实验，结果表明DualAdam在泛化性能上优于Adam及其最新的变体。
AI.conclusion: DualAdam成功平衡了收敛性和泛化性能，为神经网络训练提供了一种有效的优化器选择，代码已公开。

title: Omnidirectional Humanoid Locomotion on Stairs via Unsafe Stepping Penalty and Sparse LiDAR Elevation Mapping
summary: Humanoid robots, characterized by numerous degrees of freedom and a high center of gravity, are inherently unstable. Safe omnidirectional locomotion on stairs requires both omnidirectional terrain perception and reliable foothold selection. Existing methods often rely on forward-facing depth cameras, which create blind zones that restrict omnidirectional mobility. Furthermore, sparse post-contact unsafe stepping penalties lead to low learning efficiency and suboptimal strategies. To realize safe stair-traversal gaits, this paper introduces a single-stage training framework incorporating a dense unsafe stepping penalty that provides continuous feedback as the foot approaches a hazardous placement. To obtain stable and reliable elevation maps, we build a rolling point-cloud mapping system with spatiotemporal confidence decay and a self-protection zone mechanism, producing temporally consistent local maps. These maps are further refined by an Edge-Guided Asymmetric U-Net (EGAU), which mitigates reconstruction distortion caused by sparse LiDAR returns on stair risers. Simulation and real-robot experiments show that the proposed method achieves a near-100\% safe stepping rate on stair terrains in simulation, while maintaining a remarkably high safe stepping rate in real-world deployments. Furthermore, it completes a continuous long-distance walking test on complex outdoor terrains, demonstrating reliable sim-to-real transfer and long-term stability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向仿人机器人楼梯安全全向行走的单阶段训练框架，通过密集不安全步态惩罚机制、滚动点云建图系统和边缘引导非对称U-Net，实现了接近100%的楼梯安全步进率和可靠的仿真到现实迁移。
AI.motivation: 仿人机器人自由度多、重心高，本质不稳定。现有方法依赖前向深度相机存在盲区，限制全向移动能力；同时稀疏的后接触不安全步态惩罚导致学习效率低且策略次优，难以实现楼梯上的安全全向运动。
AI.method: 1) 提出单阶段训练框架，引入密集不安全步态惩罚，在脚接近危险位置时提供连续反馈；2) 构建滚动点云建图系统，包含时空置信度衰减和自保护区域机制，生成时间一致的局部高程图；3) 设计边缘引导非对称U-Net (EGAU)网络，缓解楼梯立面上稀疏LiDAR回波导致的重建畸变。
AI.result: 仿真实验中在楼梯地形达到接近100%的安全步进率；真实机器人部署中保持极高的安全步进率；在复杂户外地形完成连续长距离行走测试，验证了可靠的仿真到现实迁移和长期稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的框架成功实现了仿人机器人在楼梯上的安全全向运动，通过密集惩罚机制和创新的高程图重建方法，显著提升了学习效率和实际部署的安全性与鲁棒性，为仿人机器人在复杂地形的应用提供了有效解决方案。

title: Agentic Planning with Reasoning for Image Styling via Offline RL
summary: Direct prompt-based editing often fails on complex transformations because vague and subjective prompts often require nuanced understanding of what should be changed in the image. Our core intuition is that leveraging compositional image editing tools rather than direct prompting profits from structured agent-level planning with explicit reasoning, leading to better results. This structured planning framework enables efficient offline RL post-training on quality-scored trajectories to improve performance. We present a tool-based agentic RL post-training framework that addresses this through structured planning with chain-of-thought reasoning. Our key contributions include: (1) A tool-based agentic planning methodology that combines a compositional library of orthogonal primitive transformations, structured context representation, and explicit per-step reasoning to decompose complex styling into interpretable tool sequences. (2) A synthetic data generation pipeline producing three large-scale datasets (each $\sim$10K trajectories) with reasoning chains, plans, and quality scores, as no existing datasets provide such supervision. Our datasets and code are publicly available at the HuggingFace repository. (3) Offline RL training methods for learning planners with reasoning as our core algorithmic contributions, which consistently improve over the Edit-Only baseline in visual quality and instruction following. (4) Comprehensive evaluation across 4B and 8B parameter Qwen3-VL models showing that our methods outperform other baselines in the majority of compositional tasks, validated by human evaluations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个基于工具的智能体RL后训练框架，用于解决直接提示编辑在复杂变换中失败的问题。通过结构化规划和链式推理，结合组合式图像编辑工具库，实现了更好的编辑效果。构建了三个大规模合成数据集并采用离线RL训练方法，在Qwen3-VL模型上验证了方法的优越性。
AI.motivation: 直接基于提示的图像编辑方法在处理复杂变换时经常失败，因为模糊和主观的提示往往需要对图像变化进行细致理解。现有的直接提示方法缺乏结构化的规划和明确的推理过程，难以处理需要多步骤组合操作的复杂编辑任务。
