AI.method: 提出了一个基于工具的智能体RL后训练框架，包含四个核心贡献：（1）基于工具的智能体规划方法，结合正交原始变换的组合库、结构化上下文表示和显式的逐步推理，将复杂风格化分解为可解释的工具序列；（2）合成数据生成流水线，创建了三个大规模数据集（每个约10K轨迹），包含推理链、计划和质量分数；（3）离线RL训练方法，用于学习具有推理能力的规划器；（4）在4B和8B参数的Qwen3-VL模型上进行全面评估。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-VL模型的4B和8B参数版本上的综合评估表明，该方法在大多数组合任务中优于其他基线方法，在视觉质量和指令遵循方面均有一致性改进。人类评估进一步验证了这些结果。同时生成了三个大规模合成数据集并公开发布在HuggingFace仓库中。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用组合式图像编辑工具和结构化的智能体级规划与显式推理，而非直接提示，可以实现更好的复杂图像编辑效果。离线RL后训练在质量评分轨迹上能够有效提升性能，证明了该框架在处理复杂图像编辑任务中的有效性。

title: Unified Structural-Hydrodynamic Modeling of Underwater Underactuated Mechanisms and Soft Robots
comment: The first two listed authors contributed equally. Yiyuan Zhang is the corresponding author
summary: Underwater robots are widely deployed for ocean exploration and manipulation. Underactuated mechanisms are particularly advantageous in aquatic environments, as reducing actuator count lowers the risk of motor leakage while introducing inherent mechanical compliance. However, accurate modeling of underwater underactuated and soft robotic systems remains challenging because it requires identifying a high-dimensional set of internal structural and external hydrodynamic parameters. In this work, we propose a trajectory-driven global optimization framework for unified structural-hydrodynamic modeling of underwater multibody systems. Inspired by the Covariance Matrix Adaptation Evolution Strategy (CMA-ES), the proposed approach simultaneously identifies coupled internal elastic, damping, and distributed hydrodynamic parameters through trajectory-level matching between simulation and experimental motion. This enables high-fidelity reproduction of both underactuated mechanisms and compliant soft robotic systems in underwater environments. We first validate the framework on a link-by-link underactuated multibody mechanism, demonstrating accurate identification of distributed hydrodynamic coefficients, with a normalized end effector position error below 5% across multiple trajectories, varying initial conditions, and both active-passive and fully passive configurations. The identified modeling strategy is then transferred to a single octopus-inspired soft arm, showing strong real-to-sim consistency without manual retuning. Finally, eight identified arms are assembled into a swimming octopus robot, where the unified parameter set enables realistic whole body behavior without additional parameter calibration. These results demonstrate the scalability and transferability of the proposed structural-hydrodynamic modeling framework across underwater underactuated and soft robotic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于轨迹驱动的全局优化框架，用于水下欠驱动和软体机器人系统的统一结构-流体动力学建模，能够在多个系统间实现高保真度的参数辨识和模拟复现。
AI.motivation: 水下欠驱动和软体机器人具有减少电机泄漏风险和固有机械柔顺性的优势，但准确建模面临巨大挑战，因为需要辨识高维的内部结构参数和外部流体动力学参数。
AI.method: 受协方差矩阵自适应进化策略（CMA-ES）启发，提出轨迹驱动的全局优化框架，通过仿真与实验运动之间的轨迹级匹配，同时辨识耦合的内部弹性、阻尼和分布式流体动力学参数。
AI.result: 在链式欠驱动多体机构上验证，末端执行器位置归一化误差低于5%，适用于多种轨迹、初始条件和主动-被动配置；成功将辨识策略迁移至章鱼仿生软体手臂；八个辨识后的手臂组装成游泳章鱼机器人，统一参数集可实现真实的整体行为。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在水下欠驱动和软体机器人系统中展现出良好的可扩展性和可迁移性，实现了高保真度的结构-流体动力学建模，无需手动重调参即可实现从单个软臂到完整机器人的参数迁移。

title: Spectral Conditioning of Attention Improves Transformer Performance
summary: We present a theoretical analysis of the Jacobian of an attention block within a transformer, showing that it is governed by the query, key, and value projections that define the attention mechanism. Leveraging this insight, we introduce a method that systematically alters the spectral properties of each attention layer to reduce the Jacobian's condition number, thereby improving the overall conditioning of the attention layers within a transformer network. We empirically show that this improved Jacobian conditioning translates to enhanced performance in practice. Our approach is simple, broadly applicable, and can be easily integrated as a drop-in replacement for a wide range of existing attention mechanisms. We validate its effectiveness across diverse transformer architectures and tasks, demonstrating consistent improvements in performance.

AI.tldr: 本文通过理论分析揭示了Transformer注意力块的雅可比矩阵由查询、键、值投影决定，并提出了一种通过改善雅可比矩阵条件数来提升Transformer性能的通用方法。
AI.motivation: Transformer中注意力层的雅可比矩阵条件数可能较差，影响模型的训练和性能。作者希望深入理解注意力块的雅可比矩阵性质，并探索如何改善其条件数以提升模型表现。
AI.method: 首先对注意力块的雅可比矩阵进行理论分析，证明其由Q、K、V投影决定。基于此，提出一种系统性地改变每个注意力层谱性质的方法，以降低雅可比矩阵的条件数，改善注意力层的整体条件性。该方法可作为即插即用的组件集成到现有注意力机制中。
AI.result: 实验表明，改善雅可比矩阵条件数能够有效提升实际性能。该方法简单、适用性广，在多种Transformer架构和任务上均展现出一致的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论分析和实证验证，本文证明了改善注意力层雅可比矩阵条件数的有效性，为Transformer模型的优化提供了一个简单、通用的解决方案。

title: VORL-EXPLORE: A Hybrid Learning Planning Approach to Multi-Robot Exploration in Dynamic Environments
summary: Hierarchical multi-robot exploration commonly decouples frontier allocation from local navigation, which can make the system brittle in dense and dynamic environments. Because the allocator lacks direct awareness of execution difficulty, robots may cluster at bottlenecks, trigger oscillatory replanning, and generate redundant coverage. We propose VORL-EXPLORE, a hybrid learning and planning framework that addresses this limitation through execution fidelity, a shared estimate of local navigability that couples task allocation with motion execution. This fidelity signal is incorporated into a fidelity-coupled Voronoi objective with inter-robot repulsion to reduce contention before it emerges. It also drives a risk-aware adaptive arbitration mechanism between global A* guidance and a reactive reinforcement learning policy, balancing long-range efficiency with safe interaction in confined spaces. The framework further supports online self-supervised recalibration of the fidelity model using pseudo-labels derived from recent progress and safety outcomes, enabling adaptation to non-stationary obstacles without manual risk tuning. We evaluate this capability separately in a dedicated severe-traffic ablation. Extensive experiments in randomized grids and a Gazebo factory scenario show high success rates, shorter path length, lower overlap, and robust collision avoidance. The source code will be made publicly available upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VORL-EXPLORE框架，通过引入执行保真度信号将任务分配与运动执行耦合，解决了分层多机器人探索在密集动态环境中因缺乏执行难度感知而导致的机器人聚集、振荡重规划和冗余覆盖问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的分层多机器人探索方法将前沿点分配与局部导航解耦，导致分配器缺乏对执行难度的直接感知。这种脱节使得机器人在密集动态环境中容易聚集在瓶颈处、触发振荡重规划并产生冗余覆盖，降低了系统的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出VORL-EXPLORE混合学习与规划框架，引入执行保真度（execution fidelity）作为共享的局部可通行性估计来耦合任务分配与运动执行。该方法包含三个核心组件：（1）将保真度信号融入带机器人间排斥力的保真度耦合Voronoi目标函数，提前减少竞争；（2）基于风险感知的自适应仲裁机制，在全局A*引导和反应式强化学习策略间动态切换；（3）利用近期进展和安全结果派生的伪标签进行在线自监督保真度模型重校准，支持对非平稳障碍物的自适应。
AI.result: 在随机网格和Gazebo工厂场景的大量实验表明，该方法具有高成功率、更短路径长度、更低覆盖率重叠和鲁棒的避碰能力。专门针对严重交通流量的消融实验验证了自适应能力。
AI.conclusion: VORL-EXPLORE通过执行保真度信号成功实现了任务分配与运动执行的耦合，显著提升了多机器人探索在密集动态环境中的性能和鲁棒性，源代码将在接收后公开。

title: Making LLMs Optimize Multi-Scenario CUDA Kernels Like Experts
summary: Optimizing GPU kernels manually is a challenging and time-consuming task. With the rapid development of LLMs, automated GPU kernel optimization is gradually becoming a tangible reality. However, current LLM-driven automated optimization methods narrowly focus on machine learning applications, such as PyTorch operator optimization, while overlooking broader domains like sparse matrix operations in scientific computing. Extending to these broader applications brings new challenges for the benchmark and algorithm. Therefore, developing a general-purpose automated kernel optimization method becomes our primary focus. In this paper, we address the absence of systematic evaluation for multi-scenario settings by introducing MSKernelBench, which spans multiple scenarios, including fundamental algebraic operations, common LLM kernels, sparse matrix operators, and scientific computing routines, each supporting both FP32 and BF16 precision. Building on this benchmark, we introduce CUDAMaster, a multi-agent, hardware-aware system for kernel optimization that leverages profiling information and automatically constructs the full compilation and execution toolchain. Experimental results demonstrate that CUDAMaster achieves significant speedups across most operators, outperforming Astra by about 35%. In several cases, its performance matches or surpasses that of highly optimized, closed-source libraries such as cuBLAS. A demo showcasing the original and optimized code for each operator is available at https://hanyx2021.github.io/MSKernelBenchDemo/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MSKernelBench基准测试和CUDAMaster系统，首次将LLM驱动的GPU核函数优化扩展到科学计算等广泛领域，实现跨场景自动化优化，性能超越现有方法约35%。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM驱动的GPU核函数自动化优化方法仅局限于机器学习应用（如PyTorch算子优化），忽视了科学计算中的稀疏矩阵运算等更广泛领域。扩展到这些应用面临着基准测试和算法的新挑战，因此亟需开发通用的自动化核函数优化方法，并建立系统性的多场景评估体系。
AI.method: 本文提出两方面贡献：(1) MSKernelBench基准测试：覆盖基础代数运算、常见LLM核函数、稀疏矩阵算子和科学计算例程等多个场景，支持FP32和BF16精度；(2) CUDAMaster系统：一种多智能体、硬件感知的核函数优化系统，利用性能分析信息并自动构建完整的编译和执行工具链。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，CUDAMaster在大多数算子上实现了显著加速，性能比Astra高出约35%。在多个案例中，其性能达到甚至超越了高度优化的闭源库（如cuBLAS）的水平。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功将LLM驱动的GPU核函数优化从机器学习领域扩展到科学计算等更广泛的应用场景，证明了通用化自动化优化方法的可行性。MSKernelBench填补了多场景系统性评估的空白，CUDAMaster展示了在跨领域优化方面的强大能力，为GPU核函数自动化优化提供了新的研究方向。

title: Aero-Promptness: Drag-Aware Aerodynamic Manipulability for Propeller-driven Vehicles
summary: This work introduces the Drag-Aware Aerodynamic Manipulability (DAAM), a geometric framework for control allocation in redundant multirotors. By equipping the propeller spin-rate space with a Riemannian metric based on the remaining symmetric acceleration capacity of each motor, the formulation explicitly accounts for motor torque limits and aerodynamic drag. Mapping this metric through the nonlinear thrust law to the generalized force space yields a state-dependent manipulability volume. The log-determinant of this volume acts as a natural barrier function, strictly penalizing drag-induced saturation and low-spin thrust loss. Optimizing this volume along the allocation fibers provides a redundancy resolution strategy inherently invariant to arbitrary coordinate scaling in the generalized-force space. Analytically, we prove that the resulting optimal allocations locally form smooth embedded manifolds, and we geometrically characterize the global jump discontinuities that inevitably arise from physical actuator limits and spin-rate sign transitions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了拖曳感知气动可操纵性（DAAM）框架，用于冗余多旋翼飞行器的控制分配，通过黎曼度量显式考虑电机扭矩限制和气动阻力，优化操纵体积实现冗余求解。
AI.motivation: 现有的冗余多旋翼飞行器控制分配方法未能显式考虑电机扭矩限制和气动阻力的影响，且缺乏对广义力空间任意坐标缩放的不变性，需要一种能够处理这些约束的几何框架。
AI.method: 基于各电机剩余对称加速容量，在螺旋桨转速空间装备黎曼度量，将该度量通过非线性推力定律映射到广义力空间，形成状态依赖的操纵体积；利用该体积的对数行列式作为自然障碍函数，惩罚阻力引起的饱和和低速推力损失；沿分配纤维优化该操纵体积以实现冗余求解。
AI.result: 证明了所得最优分配在局部形成光滑嵌入流形，并对由物理执行器限制和转速符号转换引起的全局跳跃间断进行了几何刻画，该方法在广义力空间中对任意坐标缩放具有固有的不变性。
AI.conclusion: DAAM框架成功地将电机扭矩限制和气动阻力纳入冗余多旋翼的控制分配中，提供了一种坐标缩放不变的冗余求解策略，并对最优分配的局部光滑性和全局间断性给出了严格的几何表征。

title: Shaping Parameter Contribution Patterns for Out-of-Distribution Detection
summary: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is a well-known challenge due to deep models often producing overconfident. In this paper, we reveal a key insight that trained classifiers tend to rely on sparse parameter contribution patterns, meaning that only a few dominant parameters drive predictions. This brittleness can be exploited by OOD inputs that anomalously trigger these parameters, resulting in overconfident predictions. To address this issue, we propose a simple yet effective method called Shaping Parameter Contribution Patterns (SPCP), which enhances OOD detection robustness by encouraging the classifier to learn boundary-oriented dense contribution patterns. Specifically, SPCP operates during training by rectifying excessively high parameter contributions based on a dynamically estimated threshold. This mechanism promotes the classifier to rely on a broader set of parameters for decision-making, thereby reducing the risk of overconfident predictions caused by anomalously triggered parameters, while preserving in-distribution (ID) performance. Extensive experiments under various OOD detection setups verify the effectiveness of SPCP.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了训练好的分类器依赖稀疏参数贡献模式导致OOD检测时过度自信的问题，提出了SPCP方法，通过矫正过高的参数贡献来鼓励密集贡献模式，从而提高OOD检测的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 深度模型在分布外（OOD）检测中常产生过度自信的预测。本文发现其根本原因在于训练好的分类器倾向于依赖稀疏参数贡献模式，即仅有少量主导参数驱动预测。这种脆弱性会被OOD输入异常触发，导致过度自信的预测结果。
AI.method: 提出Shaping Parameter Contribution Patterns（SPCP）方法，在训练过程中基于动态估计的阈值矫正过高的参数贡献，促使分类器学习面向边界的密集贡献模式，从而依赖更广泛的参数集进行决策。
AI.result: 大量实验表明SPCP在各种OOD检测设置下均有效，能够降低由异常触发参数引起的过度自信预测风险，同时保持分布内（ID）数据的性能。
AI.conclusion: SPCP通过鼓励分类器学习密集参数贡献模式，有效增强了OOD检测的鲁棒性，为解决深度模型过度自信问题提供了简单而有效的方案。

title: Dual-Horizon Hybrid Internal Model for Low-Gravity Quadrupedal Jumping with Hardware-in-the-Loop Validation
summary: Locomotion under reduced gravity is commonly realized through jumping, yet continuous pronking in lunar gravity remains challenging due to prolonged flight phases and sparse ground contact. The extended aerial duration increases landing impact sensitivity and makes stable attitude regulation over rough planetary terrain difficult. Existing approaches primarily address single jumps on flat surfaces and lack both continuous-terrain solutions and realistic hardware validation. This work presents a Dual-Horizon Hybrid Internal Model for continuous quadrupedal jumping under lunar gravity using proprioceptive sensing only. Two temporal encoders capture complementary time scales: a short-horizon branch models rapid vertical dynamics with explicit vertical velocity estimation, while a long-horizon branch models horizontal motion trends and center-of-mass height evolution across the jump cycle. The fused representation enables stable and continuous jumping under extended aerial phases characteristic of lunar gravity. To provide hardware-in-the-loop validation, we develop the MATRIX (Mixed-reality Adaptive Testbed for Robotic Integrated eXploration) platform, a digital-twin-driven system that offloads gravity through a pulley-counterweight mechanism and maps Unreal Engine lunar terrain to a motion platform and treadmill in real time. Using MATRIX, we demonstrate continuous jumping of a quadruped robot under lunar-gravity emulation across cratered lunar-like terrain.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双视界混合内模控制方法，仅依靠本体感知实现了月球重力环境下的四足机器人连续跳跃，并基于数字孪生驱动的MATRIX硬件在环平台进行了验证。
AI.motivation: 月球重力下的持续跳跃（pronking）因飞行阶段延长和地面接触稀少而具有挑战性，增加了着陆冲击敏感性，且在粗糙地形上难以实现稳定的姿态调节。现有方法主要针对平坦表面的单次跳跃，缺乏连续地形解决方案和真实硬件验证。
AI.method: 提出双视界混合内模（Dual-Horizon Hybrid Internal Model），包含两个时间编码器：短视界分支通过显式垂直速度估计建模快速垂直动力学；长视界分支建模跳跃周期内的水平运动趋势和质心高度演化。开发MATRIX（Mixed-reality Adaptive Testbed for Robotic Integrated eXploration）平台，采用数字孪生驱动系统，通过滑轮配重机构卸载重力，并实时将Unreal Engine月球地形映射到运动平台和跑步机上。
AI.result: 在MATRIX平台上成功演示了四足机器人在月球重力模拟条件下的连续跳跃能力，验证了该方法在类月球陨石坑地形上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合互补时间尺度的双视界表示，有效解决了月球重力下延长飞行相位带来的稳定性挑战，实现了仅依赖本体感知的连续四足跳跃，为行星探索提供了可行的运动控制方案。

title: A Dual-Graph Spatiotemporal GNN Surrogate for Nonlinear Response Prediction of Reinforced Concrete Beams under Four-Point Bending
summary: High-fidelity nonlinear finite-element (FE) simulations of reinforced-concrete (RC) structures are still costly, especially in parametric settings where loading positions vary. We develop a dual-graph spatiotemporal GNN surrogate to approximate the time histories of RC beams under four-point bending. To generate training data, we run a parametric Abaqus campaign that independently shifts the two loading blocks on a mesh-aligned grid and exports full-field responses at fixed normalized loading levels. The model rolls out autoregressively and jointly predicts nodal displacements, element wise von Mises stress, element-wise equivalent plastic strain (PEEQ), and the global vertical reaction force in a single multi-task setup. A key motivation is the peak loss introduced when element quantities are forced through node-based representations. We therefore couple node- and element-level dynamics using two recurrent graph branches: a node-level graph convolutional gated recurrent unit (GConvGRU) for kinematics and an element-level GConvGRU for history-dependent internal variables, with global force predicted through pooling on the element branch. In controlled ablations, removing the Element to Node to Element pathway improves peak-sensitive prediction in localized high-gradient stress/PEEQ regions without degrading global load displacement trends. After training, the surrogate produces full trajectories at a fraction of the cost of nonlinear FE, enabling faster parametric evaluation and design exploration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双图时空图神经网络代理模型，用于快速预测四点弯曲条件下钢筋混凝土梁的时间历程响应，在保证精度的同时大幅降低了计算成本。
AI.motivation: 钢筋混凝土结构的高保真非线性有限元仿真计算成本高昂，特别是在加载位置变化的参数化研究中。现有的基于节点的图神经网络在预测单元量（如应力、塑性应变）时，由于峰值损失问题，难以准确捕捉局部高梯度区域的响应。
AI.method: 构建了一个双图时空图神经网络代理模型，包含两个递归图分支：节点级图卷积门控循环单元（GConvGRU）处理运动学变量，单元级GConvGRU处理历史相关的内部变量，通过池化操作预测全局反力。模型自回归展开，联合预测节点位移、单元von Mises应力、等效塑性应变（PEEQ）和全局垂直反力。通过参数化Abaqus仿真生成训练数据。
AI.result: 在控制消融实验中，移除单元-节点-单元路径后，模型在局部高梯度应力/PEEQ区域的峰值敏感预测得到改善，同时未降低全局荷载-位移趋势的预测精度。训练后的代理模型生成完整轨迹的计算成本仅为非线性有限元仿真的一小部分。
AI.conclusion: 该双图神经网络代理模型成功实现了钢筋混凝土梁非线性响应的高效准确预测，为更快的参数化评估和设计探索提供了可能。

title: Vector Field Augmented Differentiable Policy Learning for Vision-Based Drone Racing
summary: Autonomous drone racing in complex environments requires agile, high-speed flight while maintaining reliable obstacle avoidance. Differentiable-physics-based policy learning has recently demonstrated high sample efficiency and remarkable performance across various tasks, including agile drone flight and quadruped locomotion. However, applying such methods to drone racing remains difficult, as key objective like gate traversal are inherently hard to express as smooth, differentiable losses. To address these challenges, we propose DiffRacing, a novel vector field-augmented differentiable policy learning framework. DiffRacing integrates differentiable losses and vector fields into the training process to provide continuous and stable gradient signals, balancing obstacle avoidance and high-speed gate traversal. In addition, a differentiable Delta Action Model compensates for dynamics mismatch, enabling efficient sim-to-real transfer without explicit system identification. Extensive simulation and real-world experiments demonstrate that DiffRacing achieves superior sample efficiency, faster convergence, and robust flight performance, thereby demonstrating that vector fields can augment traditional gradient-based policy learning with a task-specific geometric prior.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DiffRacing框架，通过引入向量场增强的可微分策略学习，解决了自主无人机竞速中门框穿越目标难以表达为可微分损失的问题，实现了高效样本利用率、快速收敛和稳健的飞行性能。
AI.motivation: 自主无人机竞速需要在复杂环境中实现敏捷高速飞行并保持可靠避障。尽管基于可微分物理的策略学习在敏捷飞行等任务中表现优异，但将其应用于无人机竞速仍面临挑战：门框穿越等关键目标难以表达为平滑可微的损失函数，导致梯度信号不稳定。
AI.method: 提出DiffRacing框架，将可微分损失与向量场集成到训练过程中，提供连续稳定的梯度信号，平衡避障与高速门框穿越；引入可微分Delta Action Model补偿动力学模型失配，实现无需显式系统辨识的高效仿真到现实迁移。
AI.result: 大量仿真和真实世界实验表明，DiffRacing在样本效率、收敛速度和飞行性能方面均优于现有方法，验证了向量场可作为任务特定的几何先验增强传统基于梯度的策略学习。
AI.conclusion: DiffRacing成功解决了无人机竞速中可微分策略学习的核心难题，通过向量场增强提供了稳定的梯度信号，在保持避障性能的同时实现了高速门框穿越，为自主无人机竞速提供了高效可靠的解决方案。

title: wDPO: Winsorized Direct Preference Optimization for Robust LLM Alignment
summary: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) aligns large language models by optimizing pairwise preferences and has shown remarkable effectiveness as a simple and scalable alternative to RLHF. However, in practice, preference data are often noisy. Existing robust variants of DPO mainly rely on uniform objective modifications or global reweighting. While partially effective, these methods treat noisy samples as a homogeneous source of uncertainty and fail to distinguish between different noise types, leading to sub-optimal alignment robustness. In this work, we show that robust preference alignment benefits from addressing different noise types with targeted interventions rather than uniform regularization. We propose winsorized Direct Preference Optimization~(wDPO), a robust LLM alignment approach with hierarchical winsorization. Specifically, wDPO adopts a reward-free hierarchical intervention strategy that leverages only signals already available during DPO training. It first uses the implicit margin from DPO log-ratio to identify heterogeneous noise patterns without relying on external reward models. For hard noise, wDPO performs a data-level intervention by sparsely correcting strongly inconsistent preference pairs. For ambiguous comparisons, it applies a gradient-level intervention through soft winsorization, capping extreme losses in the high-loss tail to prevent weakly informative samples from dominating gradient updates. Extensive experiments on PKU-SafeRLHF and multiple external safety benchmarks demonstrate that wDPO consistently improves preference alignment quality and robustness over vanilla DPO and strong DPO-family baselines, with particularly pronounced gains under controlled label-flip noise.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了wDPO（winsorized Direct Preference Optimization），一种针对噪声偏好数据的鲁棒LLM对齐方法。通过分层干预策略，针对不同类型的噪声（硬噪声和模糊比较）分别采用数据级和梯度级干预，在无需外部奖励模型的情况下显著提升了偏好对齐的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有的DPO方法在实际应用中面临偏好数据噪声问题，而现有鲁棒变体主要依赖统一的目标修改或全局重加权，将噪声样本视为同质不确定性来源，无法区分不同噪声类型，导致对齐鲁棒性次优。
AI.method: 提出wDPO方法，采用无奖励的分层干预策略：（1）利用DPO对数比率的隐式边际识别异构噪声模式；（2）针对硬噪声，通过稀疏修正强不一致偏好对进行数据级干预；（3）针对模糊比较，通过软缩尾（soft winsorization）限制高损失尾部的极端损失，进行梯度级干预。
AI.result: 在PKU-SafeRLHF和多个外部安全基准上的广泛实验表明，wDPO在偏好对齐质量和鲁棒性方面持续优于原始DPO和强DPO系列基线，在受控标签翻转噪声下提升尤为显著。
AI.conclusion: 鲁棒偏好对齐受益于针对不同噪声类型采用定向干预而非统一正则化，wDPO通过分层winsorization有效区分和处理不同噪声，为噪声偏好数据下的LLM对齐提供了更优解决方案。

title: AffordGrasp: Cross-Modal Diffusion for Affordance-Aware Grasp Synthesis
summary: Generating human grasping poses that accurately reflect both object geometry and user-specified interaction semantics is essential for natural hand-object interactions in AR/VR and embodied AI. However, existing semantic grasping approaches struggle with the large modality gap between 3D object representations and textual instructions, and often lack explicit spatial or semantic constraints, leading to physically invalid or semantically inconsistent grasps. In this work, we present AffordGrasp, a diffusion-based framework that produces physically stable and semantically faithful human grasps with high precision. We first introduce a scalable annotation pipeline that automatically enriches hand-object interaction datasets with fine-grained structured language labels capturing interaction intent. Building upon these annotations, AffordGrasp integrates an affordance-aware latent representation of hand poses with a dual-conditioning diffusion process, enabling the model to jointly reason over object geometry, spatial affordances, and instruction semantics. A distribution adjustment module further enforces physical contact consistency and semantic alignment. We evaluate AffordGrasp across four instruction-augmented benchmarks derived from HO-3D, OakInk, GRAB, and AffordPose, and observe substantial improvements over state-of-the-art methods in grasp quality, semantic accuracy, and diversity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AffordGrasp，一个基于扩散模型的框架，用于生成既物理稳定又语义一致的人手抓取姿态，解决了现有方法在3D物体表示与文本指令之间的模态鸿沟问题。
AI.motivation: 现有语义抓取方法难以处理3D物体表示与文本指令之间的大模态差距，且缺乏显式的空间或语义约束，导致生成的抓取姿态在物理上无效或语义上不一致。
AI.method: 1）引入可扩展标注管线，自动为手-物交互数据集添加细粒度结构化语言标签；2）整合感知可供性的手部姿态潜在表示与双重条件扩散过程，联合推理物体几何、空间可供性和指令语义；3）引入分布调整模块，强制执行物理接触一致性和语义对齐。
AI.result: 在HO-3D、OakInk、GRAB和AffordPose四个指令增强基准测试上，AffordGrasp在抓取质量、语义准确性和多样性方面均显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: AffordGrasp成功弥合了3D物体与文本指令间的模态差距，能够生成高质量、语义忠实且物理有效的人手抓取姿态，为AR/VR和具身AI应用提供了有效解决方案。

title: Margin in Abstract Spaces
summary:
Margin-based learning, exemplified by linear and kernel methods, is one of the few classical settings where generalization guarantees are independent of the number of parameters. This makes it a central case study in modern highly over-parameterized learning. We ask what minimal mathematical structure underlies this phenomenon.
  We begin with a simple margin-based problem in arbitrary metric spaces: concepts are defined by a center point and classify points according to whether their distance lies below $r$ or above $R$. We show that whenever $R>3r$, this class is learnable in \emph{any} metric space. Thus, sufficiently large margins make learnability depend only on the triangle inequality, without any linear or analytic structure. Our first main result extends this phenomenon to concepts defined by bounded linear combinations of distance functions, and reveals a sharp threshold: there exists a universal constant $γ>0$ such that above this margin the class is learnable in every metric space, while below it there exist metric spaces where it is not learnable at all.
  We then ask whether margin-based learnability can always be explained via an embedding into a linear space -- that is, reduced to linear classification in some Banach space through a kernel-type construction. We answer this negatively by developing a structural taxonomy of Banach spaces: if a Banach space is learnable for some margin parameter $γ\geq 0$, then it is learnable for all such $γ$, and in infinite-dimensional spaces the sample complexity must scale polynomially in $1/γ$. Specifically, it must grow as $(1/γ)^p$ for some $p\ge 2$, and every such rate is attainable.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了基于间隔的学习可以在任意度量空间中实现，其可学习性仅依赖于三角不等式，无需线性或解析结构；并证明了并非所有基于间隔的学习都能归约为Banach空间中的线性分类。
AI.motivation: 基于间隔的学习（如线性和核方法）是少数几个泛化保证独立于参数数量的经典设定之一，这使其成为现代高度过参数化学习的核心案例。作者希望探究支撑这一现象的最小数学结构。
AI.method:
1. 在任意度量空间中研究基于间隔的学习问题，定义由中心点和距离阈值确定的概念类；
2. 将问题扩展到由距离函数的有界线性组合定义的概念类，揭示可学习性的锐利阈值；
3. 发展Banach空间的结构分类法，分析基于间隔的可学习性是否能通过嵌入线性空间来解释。
AI.result:
1. 当R>3r时，概念类在任意度量空间中都是可学习的，可学习性仅依赖三角不等式；
2. 存在通用常数γ>0作为锐利阈值：边际大于γ时概念类在所有度量空间可学习，小于γ时存在不可学习的度量空间；
3. Banach空间的基于间隔可学习性具有一致性：若对某γ≥0可学习，则对所有γ都可学习，且无限维空间的样本复杂度必须以(1/γ)^p（p≥2）的多项式方式增长。
AI.conclusion: 基于间隔的可学习性不需要线性或解析结构，仅依赖度量空间的三角不等式性质；同时，并非所有基于间隔的学习都能通过核类型构造归约为Banach空间中的线性分类，这揭示了基于间隔学习的更深层几何本质。

title: See and Switch: Vision-Based Branching for Interactive Robot-Skill Programming
summary: Programming robots by demonstration (PbD) is an intuitive concept, but scaling it to real-world variability remains a challenge for most current teaching frameworks. Conditional task graphs are very expressive and can be defined incrementally, which fits very well with the PbD idea. However, acting using conditional task graphs requires reliable perception-grounded online branch selection. In this paper, we present See & Switch, an interactive teaching-and-execution framework that represents tasks as user-extendable graphs of skill parts connected via decision states (DS), enabling conditional branching during replay. Unlike prior approaches that rely on manual branching or low-dimensional signals (e.g., proprioception), our vision-based Switcher uses eye-in-hand images (high-dimensional) to select among competing successor skill parts and to detect out-of-distribution contexts that require new demonstrations. We integrate kinesthetic teaching, joystick control, and hand gestures via an input-modality-abstraction layer and demonstrate that our proposed method is teaching modality-independent, enabling efficient in-situ recovery demonstrations. The system is validated in experiments on three challenging dexterous manipulation tasks. We evaluate our method under diverse conditions and furthermore conduct user studies with 8 participants. We show that the proposed method reliably performs branch selection and anomaly detection for novice users, achieving 90.7 % and 87.9 % accuracy, respectively, across 576 real-robot rollouts. We provide all code and data required to reproduce our experiments at http://imitrob.ciirc.cvut.cz/publications/seeandswitch.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了See & Switch框架，通过基于视觉的决策状态切换器实现条件任务图的在线分支选择，解决了演示编程（PbD）在现实场景中的可扩展性问题，在576次真实机器人实验中分支选择准确率达90.7%，异常检测准确率达87.9%。
AI.motivation: 演示编程（PbD）虽然直观，但在真实世界的变异性场景中难以扩展。条件任务图虽然表达能力强且可增量定义，但其实际执行需要可靠的基于感知的在线分支选择。现有方法依赖人工分支或低维信号（如本体感知），难以应对复杂多变的真实场景。
AI.method: 提出See & Switch交互式教学-执行框架，将任务表示为通过决策状态（DS）连接的技能部件图，支持执行时的条件分支。核心创新是基于视觉的切换器，利用手眼图像（高维信号）在竞争的后继技能部件间进行选择，并检测分布外上下文以触发新演示。系统集成动觉教学、摇杆控制和手势控制，通过输入模态抽象层实现教学模态无关性，支持高效的现场恢复演示。
AI.result: 在三个具有挑战性的灵巧操作任务上验证系统，涵盖多样化条件，并进行了8名参与者的用户研究。在576次真实机器人推演中，该方法为新手用户可靠地执行分支选择和异常检测，分别达到90.7%和87.9%的准确率。实验证明该方法具有教学模态独立性。
AI.conclusion: See & Switch框架成功实现了基于高维视觉信号的条件任务图在线分支选择，克服了传统低维信号方法的局限性，使演示编程能够有效扩展到真实世界的变异性场景，同时为新手用户提供了可靠易用的教学系统。

title: Unlocking Data Value in Finance: A Study on Distillation and Difficulty-Aware Training
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong general capabilities, yet their deployment in finance remains challenging due to dense domain-specific terminology, stringent numerical reasoning requirements, and low tolerance for factual errors. We conduct a controlled empirical study showing that in specialized vertical domains, performance is largely determined by the quality and difficulty/verifiability profile of post-training data. We introduce \textbf{ODA-Fin-SFT-318k}, constructed via multi-stage distillation and verification to produce high-quality Chain-of-Thought supervision, and \textbf{ODA-Fin-RL-12k}, curated for hard-but-verifiable tasks that balance reward precision and task diversity. Using standard SFT and RL pipelines, we show that high-quality CoT distillation establishes a robust foundation during SFT, while difficulty- and verifiability-aware sampling improves RL generalization. Evaluated on nine benchmarks spanning general financial tasks, sentiment analysis, and numerical reasoning, our ODA-Fin-RL-8B consistently surpasses open-source state-of-the-art (SOTA) financial LLMs of comparable size. We release our ODA-Fin-SFT-318k and ODA-Fin-RL-12k datasets, along with trained models to advance data-centric financial AI research.

AI.tldr: 本文通过高质量数据构建（ODA-Fin-SFT-318k和ODA-Fin-RL-12k）解决了LLM在金融领域部署的挑战，提出的ODA-Fin-RL-8B模型在九项基准测试中超越了同等规模的开源SOTA金融LLM。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在金融领域的部署面临三大挑战：密集的领域专业术语、严格的数值推理要求以及对事实错误的低容忍度。作者旨在通过数据质量优化来解决垂直领域中模型性能瓶颈问题。
AI.method: 构建了两个高质量数据集：(1) ODA-Fin-SFT-318k，通过多阶段蒸馏和验证生成高质量思维链监督；(2) ODA-Fin-RL-12k，针对可验证的困难任务进行筛选，平衡奖励精度与任务多样性。采用标准SFT和RL训练流程，其中高质量CoT蒸馏为SFT建立坚实基础，难度和可验证性感知采样提升RL泛化能力。
AI.result: 在涵盖通用金融任务、情感分析和数值推理的九项基准测试上，ODA-Fin-RL-8B持续超越同等规模的开源SOTA金融大语言模型。实验证明在垂直领域中，性能主要由训练后数据的质量和难度/可验证性特征决定。
AI.conclusion: 高质量、难度和可验证性感知的数据构建策略对金融垂直领域LLM的性能至关重要。研究释放了数据集和训练模型，推进了以数据为中心的金融AI研究发展。

title: Adaptive Vision-Based Control of Redundant Robots with Null-Space Interaction for Human-Robot Collaboration
summary: Human-robot collaboration aims to extend human ability through cooperation with robots. This technology is currently helping people with physical disabilities, has transformed the manufacturing process of companies, improved surgical performance, and will likely revolutionize the daily lives of everyone in the future. Being able to enhance the performance of both sides, such that human-robot collaboration outperforms a single robot/human, remains an open issue. For safer and more effective collaboration, a new control scheme has been proposed for redundant robots in this paper, consisting of an adaptive vision-based control term in task space and an interactive control term in null space. Such a formulation allows the robot to autonomously carry out tasks in an unknown environment without prior calibration while also interacting with humans to deal with unforeseen changes (e.g., potential collision, temporary needs) under the redundant configuration. The decoupling between task space and null space helps to explore the collaboration safely and effectively without affecting the main task of the robot end-effector. The stability of the closed-loop system has been rigorously proved with Lyapunov methods, and both the convergence of the position error in task space and that of the damping model in null space are guaranteed. The experimental results of a robot manipulator guided with the technology of augmented reality (AR) are presented to illustrate the performance of the control scheme.

AI.tldr: 本文针对冗余机器人提出了一种新的控制方案，通过在任务空间采用自适应视觉控制、在零空间采用交互控制，实现了在未知环境中自主执行任务的同时与人类安全有效协作，且不影响末端执行器的主要任务。
AI.motivation: 人机协作已在辅助残疾人、制造业和手术等领域发挥重要作用，但如何使协作性能超越单独的机器人或人类仍是一个开放问题。需要一种既能保证安全又能提高协作效率的控制方法。
AI.method: 针对冗余机器人提出新的控制方案：在任务空间采用自适应视觉控制项，在零空间采用交互控制项。这种分解设计使得机器人能在未知环境中无需预标定自主执行任务，同时通过零空间与人类交互处理突发变化（如潜在碰撞、临时需求）。任务空间与零空间的解耦确保了不影响机器人末端执行器的主要任务。采用李雅普诺夫方法严格证明了闭环系统的稳定性。
AI.result: 通过李雅普诺夫方法严格证明了闭环系统的稳定性，保证了任务空间位置误差和零空间阻尼模型的收敛性。利用增强现实（AR）技术引导机械臂的实验结果展示了该控制方案的性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的控制方案成功实现了任务空间自适应视觉控制与零空间交互控制的解耦，在保证主要任务执行的同时实现了安全有效的人机协作，为冗余机器人在未知环境中与人类协作提供了有效的解决方案。

title: LightMedSeg: Lightweight 3D Medical Image Segmentation with Learned Spatial Anchors
comment: 8 pages, X figures. Submitted to CVPRW ECV 2026
summary: Accurate and efficient 3D medical image segmentation is essential for clinical AI, where models must remain reliable under stringent memory, latency, and data availability constraints. Transformer-based methods achieve strong accuracy but suffer from excessive parameters, high FLOPs, and limited generalization. We propose LightMedSeg, a modular UNet-style segmentation architecture that integrates anatomical priors with adaptive context modeling. Anchor-conditioned FiLM modulation enables anatomy-aware feature calibration, while a local structural prior module and texture-aware routing dynamically allocate representational capacity to boundary-rich regions. Computational redundancy is minimized through ghost and depthwise convolutions, and multi-scale features are adaptively fused via a learned skip router with anchor-relative spatial position bias. Despite requiring only 0.48M parameters and 14.64~GFLOPs, LightMedSeg achieves segmentation accuracy within a few Dice points of heavy transformer baselines. Therefore, LightMedSeg is a deployable and data-efficient solution for 3D medical image segmentation. Code will be released publicly upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了LightMedSeg，一种轻量级3D医学图像分割网络，在仅需0.48M参数和14.64 GFLOPs的情况下，达到了接近重型Transformer基线的分割精度，实现了高效且可部署的临床AI解决方案。
AI.motivation: 准确的3D医学图像分割对临床AI至关重要，但现有基于Transformer的方法存在参数量过大、计算成本高（FLOPs高）和泛化能力有限的问题，难以满足临床环境中严格的内存、延迟和数据可用性约束。
AI.method: 提出LightMedSeg，一种模块化的UNet风格分割架构。核心技术包括：1) 基于锚点的FiLM调制实现解剖学先验引导的特征校准；2) 局部结构先验模块和纹理感知路由动态分配边界区域的表征能力；3) 利用Ghost卷积和深度可分离卷积最小化计算冗余；4) 通过带锚点相对空间位置偏置的可学习跳跃连接路由器实现多尺度特征自适应融合。
AI.result: LightMedSeg仅需要0.48M参数和14.64 GFLOPs，计算效率极高，同时其分割精度（Dice系数）与参数量巨大的重型Transformer基线相差仅几个百分点。
AI.conclusion: LightMedSeg是一种可部署且数据高效的3D医学图像分割解决方案，成功平衡了模型精度与计算效率，适用于资源受限的临床应用场景。代码将在论文接收后公开。

title: DeReCo: Decoupling Representation and Coordination Learning for Object-Adaptive Decentralized Multi-Robot Cooperative Transport
summary: Generalizing decentralized multi-robot cooperative transport across objects with diverse shapes and physical properties remains a fundamental challenge. Under decentralized execution, two key challenges arise: object-dependent representation learning under partial observability and coordination learning in multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) under non-stationarity. A typical approach jointly optimizes object-dependent representations and coordinated policies in an end-to-end manner while randomizing object shapes and physical properties during training. However, this joint optimization tightly couples representation and coordination learning, introducing bidirectional interference: inaccurate representations under partial observability destabilize coordination learning, while non-stationarity in MARL further degrades representation learning, resulting in sample-inefficient training. To address this structural coupling, we propose DeReCo, a novel MARL framework that decouples representation and coordination learning for object-adaptive multi-robot cooperative transport, improving sample efficiency and generalization across objects and transport scenarios. DeReCo adopts a three-stage training strategy: (1) centralized coordination learning with privileged object information, (2) reconstruction of object-dependent representations from local observations, and (3) progressive removal of privileged information for decentralized execution. This decoupling mitigates interference between representation and coordination learning and enables stable and sample-efficient training. Experimental results show that DeReCo outperforms baselines in simulation on three training objects, generalizes to six unseen objects with varying masses and friction coefficients, and achieves superior performance on two unseen objects in real-robot experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeReCo框架，通过解耦表示学习和协调学习，解决了分散式多机器人协作搬运中的样本效率低和泛化能力差的问题，在仿真和真实机器人实验中均取得优异表现。
AI.motivation: 在分散式多机器人协作搬运任务中，如何跨不同形状和物理属性的物体进行泛化是一个根本性挑战。现有方法将物体相关表示学习和多智能体协调学习进行端到端联合优化，但引入了双向干扰：部分可观测性下的不准确表示会破坏协调学习，而MARL的非平稳性会进一步降低表示学习质量，导致样本效率低下的训练。
AI.method: 提出DeReCo框架，采用三阶段训练策略解耦表示学习和协调学习：(1)利用特权物体信息进行集中式协调学习；(2)从局部观测重建物体相关表示；(3)渐进移除特权信息以实现分散式执行。这种解耦方法消除了表示学习与协调学习之间的相互干扰。
AI.result: DeReCo在三个训练物体的仿真实验中优于基线方法，成功泛化到具有不同质量和摩擦系数的六个未见物体，并在两个未见物体的真实机器人实验中取得优越性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦表示学习和协调学习，DeReCo有效提升了分散式多机器人协作搬运的样本效率和跨物体泛化能力，为解决非平稳MARL中的结构耦合问题提供了新思路。

title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Predicting Cellular Responses to Gene Perturbation
comment: Accepted at ICLR 2026 Workshop: Generative AI in Genomics. 25 pages, 9 figures
summary: Predicting how cells respond to genetic perturbations is fundamental to understanding gene function, disease mechanisms, and therapeutic development. While recent deep learning approaches have shown promise in modeling single-cell perturbation responses, they struggle to generalize across cell types and perturbation contexts due to limited contextual information during generation. We introduce PT-RAG (Perturbation-aware Two-stage Retrieval-Augmented Generation), a novel framework that extends Retrieval-Augmented Generation beyond traditional language-model applications to cellular biology. Unlike standard RAG systems designed for text retrieval with pre-trained LLMs, perturbation retrieval lacks established similarity metrics and requires learning what constitutes relevant context, making differentiable retrieval essential. PT-RAG addresses this through a two-stage pipeline: first, retrieving candidate perturbations $K$ using GenePT embeddings, then adaptively refining the selection through Gumbel-Softmax discrete sampling conditioned on both the cell state and the input perturbation. This cell-type-aware differentiable retrieval enables end-to-end optimization of the retrieval objective jointly with generation. On the Replogle-Nadig single-gene perturbation dataset, we demonstrate that PT-RAG outperforms both STATE and vanilla RAG under identical experimental conditions, with the strongest gains in distributional similarity metrics ($W_1$, $W_2$). Notably, vanilla RAG's dramatic failure is itself a key finding: it demonstrates that differentiable, cell-type-aware retrieval is essential in this domain, and that naive retrieval can actively harm performance. Our results establish retrieval-augmented generation as a promising paradigm for modelling cellular responses to gene perturbation. The code to reproduce our experiments is available at https://github.com/difra100/PT-RAG_ICLR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了PT-RAG框架，首次将检索增强生成（RAG）应用于细胞生物学中的基因扰动响应预测，通过两阶段可微检索机制解决了跨细胞类型和扰动场景泛化能力不足的问题，在Replogle-Nadig数据集上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 预测细胞对基因扰动的响应对于理解基因功能、疾病机制和治疗开发至关重要。现有的深度学习方法在跨细胞类型和扰动场景泛化方面存在困难，主要原因是生成过程中可用的上下文信息有限。传统的RAG方法直接应用于该领域会严重失效，因为扰动检索缺乏成熟的相似性度量标准，需要学习何为相关上下文，这使得可微检索成为关键需求。
AI.method: PT-RAG采用两阶段检索增强生成框架：(1)第一阶段使用GenePT嵌入检索候选扰动集合K；(2)第二阶段通过Gumbel-Softmax离散采样自适应优化选择，该采样过程同时以细胞状态和输入扰动为条件。这种细胞类型感知的可微检索机制使得检索目标能够与生成过程进行端到端联合优化，区别于传统RAG仅适用于文本检索的预训练语言模型应用。
AI.result: 在Replogle-Nadig单基因扰动数据集上，PT-RAG在相同实验条件下优于STATE方法和普通RAG基线，在分布相似性指标（W₁、W₂ Wasserstein距离）上取得最强提升。关键发现是普通RAG在该领域表现严重失败，证明了细胞类型感知的可微检索在该领域的必要性，以及朴素检索方法反而会损害模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 本研究确立了检索增强生成作为建模细胞基因扰动响应的新范式。PT-RAG证明了可微、细胞类型感知的检索机制在生物学应用中的关键作用，为该领域提供了新的技术方向。该方法在扰动预测任务中的成功为理解基因功能和疾病机制提供了有效工具，代码已开源以便复现实验结果。

title: Towards Human-Like Manipulation through RL-Augmented Teleoperation and Mixture-of-Dexterous-Experts VLA
summary: While Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have demonstrated remarkable success in robotic manipulation, their application has largely been confined to low-degree-of-freedom end-effectors performing simple, vision-guided pick-and-place tasks. Extending these models to human-like, bimanual dexterous manipulation-specifically contact-rich in-hand operations-introduces critical challenges in high-fidelity data acquisition, multi-skill learning, and multimodal sensory fusion. In this paper, we propose an integrated framework to address these bottlenecks, built upon two components. First, we introduce IMCopilot (In-hand Manipulation Copilot), a suite of reinforcement learning-trained atomic skills that plays a dual role: it acts as a shared-autonomy assistant to simplify teleoperation data collection, and it serves as a callable low-level execution primitive for the VLA. Second, we present MoDE-VLA (Mixture-of-Dexterous-Experts VLA), an architecture that seamlessly integrates heterogeneous force and tactile modalities into a pretrained VLA backbone. By utilizing a residual injection mechanism, MoDE-VLA enables contact-aware refinement without degrading the model's pretrained knowledge. We validate our approach on four tasks of escalating complexity, demonstrating doubled success rate improvement over the baseline in dexterous contact-rich tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个集成框架，将视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型扩展至双臂灵巧操作领域，通过IMCopilot技能套件简化数据采集并作为底层执行原语，以及MoDE-VLA架构融合力触觉多模态信息，在灵巧接触密集型任务上实现了相较基线翻倍的成功率提升。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型主要局限于低自由度末端执行器的简单抓取放置任务，难以应用于类人双臂灵巧操作，尤其是接触密集型手内操作任务。该领域面临高质量数据获取困难、多技能学习复杂、多模态感官融合挑战等关键瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出两个核心组件：(1) IMCopilot——基于强化学习训练的原子技能套件，既作为共享自主助手简化遥操作数据采集，又作为VLA可调用的底层执行原语；(2) MoDE-VLA架构——通过残差注入机制将异构力和触觉模态无缝集成到预训练VLA主干中，实现接触感知优化而不破坏预训练知识。
AI.result: 在四个复杂度递增的任务上进行验证，在灵巧接触密集型任务中，相较基线方法成功率提升了一倍。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的集成框架有效解决了VLA模型向灵巧操作扩展的关键挑战，证明了结合原子技能套件与多模态融合架构在接触密集型灵巧操作任务上的显著优势，为类人机器人灵巧操作提供了可行的技术路径。

title: Rethinking Deep Research from the Perspective of Web Content Distribution Matching
summary: Despite the integration of search tools, Deep Search Agents often suffer from a misalignment between reasoning-driven queries and the underlying web indexing structures. Existing frameworks treat the search engine as a static utility, leading to queries that are either too coarse or too granular to retrieve precise evidence. We propose WeDas, a Web Content Distribution Aware framework that incorporates search-space structural characteristics into the agent's observation space. Central to our method is the Query-Result Alignment Score, a metric quantifying the compatibility between agent intent and retrieval outcomes. To overcome the intractability of indexing the dynamic web, we introduce a few-shot probing mechanism that iteratively estimates this score via limited query accesses, allowing the agent to dynamically recalibrate sub-goals based on the local content landscape. As a plug-and-play module, WeDas consistently improves sub-goal completion and accuracy across four benchmarks, effectively bridging the gap between high-level reasoning and low-level retrieval.

AI.tldr: 本文提出WeDas框架，通过引入查询-结果对齐分数和少样本探测机制，解决深度搜索代理推理查询与网络索引结构错位的问题，在四个基准测试上显著提升了子目标完成度和准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有的深度搜索代理将搜索引擎视为静态工具，导致生成的查询要么过于粗糙要么过于细粒度，无法精准检索证据，造成推理驱动的查询与底层网络索引结构之间的错位。
AI.method: 提出WeDas（Web Content Distribution Aware）框架，核心包括：(1)查询-结果对齐分数，量化代理意图与检索结果的兼容性；(2)少样本探测机制，通过有限的查询访问迭代估计该分数，使代理能根据局部内容景观动态重新校准子目标；(3)作为即插即用模块，将搜索空间结构特征纳入代理的观察空间。
AI.result: 在四个基准测试上，WeDas作为即插即用模块，持续改善了子目标完成度和准确性，有效弥合了高层推理与低层检索之间的差距。
AI.conclusion: WeDas通过将网络内容分布感知纳入搜索代理的观察空间，成功解决了推理查询与检索结构错位的核心问题，证明了动态校准查询策略对提升深度搜索代理性能的关键作用。

title: SaiVLA-0: Cerebrum--Pons--Cerebellum Tripartite Architecture for Compute-Aware Vision-Language-Action
summary:
We revisit Vision-Language-Action through a neuroscience-inspired triad. Biologically, the Cerebrum provides stable high-level multimodal priors and remains frozen; the Pons Adapter integrates these cortical features with real-time proprioceptive inputs and compiles intent into execution-ready tokens; and the Cerebellum (ParaCAT) performs fast, parallel categorical decoding for online control, with hysteresis/EMA/temperature/entropy for stability. A fixed-ratio schedule and two-stage feature caching make the system compute-aware and reproducible. Inspired by active, foveated vision, our wrist ROIs are geometrically tied to the end-effector via calibrated projection, providing a movement-stabilized, high-resolution view that is sensitive to fine-grained pose changes and complements the global context of the main view.
  The design is modular: upgrading the Cerebrum only retrains the Pons; changing robots only trains the Cerebellum; cerebellum-only RL can further refine control without touching high-level semantics. As a concept-and-protocol paper with preliminary evidence, we outline a timing protocol under matched conditions (GPU, resolution, batch) to verify anticipated efficiency gains. We also report preliminary LIBERO evidence showing that split feature caching reduces training time (7.5h to 4.5h) and improves average success (86.5% to 92.5%) under official N1.5 head-only training, and that SaiVLA0 reaches 99.0% mean success.

AI.tldr: 本文提出受神经科学启发的三模块视觉-语言-动作(VLA)架构：冻结的Cerebrum提供多模态先验，Pons适配器整合特征并生成执行令牌，Cerebellum(ParaCAT)实现快速并行解码控制。结合手腕ROI和固定比例调度策略，在LIBERO基准上训练时间减少40%(7.5h→4.5h)，成功率从86.5%提升至92.5%，SaiVLA0达到99.0%。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA系统缺乏生物启发式的模块化设计，难以在保持高层语义理解的同时实现高效在线控制；训练过程计算开销大且缺乏可复现性协议；需要一种能够灵活升级组件、适应不同机器人平台的统一架构。
AI.method: 提出三模块神经科学启发架构：(1)冻结的Cerebrum提供稳定的高层多模态先验；(2)Pons适配器整合皮层特征与实时本体感知输入，编译意图为执行就绪令牌；(3)Cerebellum(ParaCAT)通过滞后性/EMA/温度/熵机制实现快速并行分类解码。引入受主动中央凹视觉启发的手腕ROI几何绑定机制，结合固定比例调度和两阶段特征缓存实现计算感知。系统支持模块化升级：升级Cerebrum仅重训练Pons，更换机器人仅训练Cerebellum。
AI.result: 在LIBERO基准测试中：(1)分离特征缓存将训练时间从7.5h减少至4.5h；(2)平均成功率从86.5%提升至92.5%（官方N1.5仅头部训练设置）；(3)SaiVLA0达到99.0%平均成功率；(4)手腕ROI提供运动稳定的高分辨率视角，对细粒度姿态变化敏感。
AI.conclusion: 该概念与协议论文证明了神经科学启发的三模块VLA架构的可行性，通过模块化设计实现了组件独立升级和跨机器人迁移能力，在保持计算效率和可复现性的同时显著提升了性能，为VLA系统提供了新的设计范式。

title: LF2L: Loss Fusion Horizontal Federated Learning Across Heterogeneous Feature Spaces Using External Datasets Effectively: A Case Study in Second Primary Cancer Prediction
summary: Second primary cancer (SPC), a new cancer in patients different from previously diagnosed, is a growing concern due to improved cancer survival rates. Early prediction of SPC is essential to enable timely clinical interventions. This study focuses on lung cancer survivors treated in Taiwanese hospitals, where the limited size and geographic scope of local datasets restrict the effectiveness and generalizability of traditional machine learning approaches. To address this, we incorporate external data from the publicly available US-based Surveillance, Epidemiology, and End Results (SEER) program, significantly increasing data diversity and scale. However, the integration of multi-source datasets presents challenges such as feature inconsistency and privacy constraints. Rather than naively merging data, we proposed a loss fusion horizontal federated learning (LF2L) framework that can enable effective cross-institutional collaboration while preserving institutional privacy by avoiding data sharing. Using both common and unique features and balancing their contributions through a shared loss mechanism, our method demonstrates substantial improvements in the prediction performance of SPC. Experiment results show statistically significant improvements in AUROC and AUPRC when compared to localized, horizontal federated, and centralized learning baselines. This highlights the importance of not only acquiring external data but also leveraging it effectively to enhance model performance in real-world clinical model development.

AI.tldr: 本研究针对台湾肺癌幸存者的第二原发癌(SPC)预测问题，提出损失融合水平联邦学习(LF2L)框架，通过整合美国SEER数据库的外部数据来克服本地数据规模有限的限制，在保护机构隐私的前提下显著提升了预测性能。
AI.motivation: 随着癌症生存率的提高，第二原发癌(SPC)成为日益关注的问题，早期预测对于及时临床干预至关重要。然而，台湾本地数据集规模有限且地理范围受限，制约了传统机器学习方法的有效性和泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出损失融合水平联邦学习(LF2L)框架，整合美国SEER公共数据库的外部数据。该方法通过共享损失机制平衡使用共有和独有特征的贡献，在避免数据共享、保护机构隐私的同时实现跨机构有效协作。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，与本地化、水平联邦和集中式学习基线相比，该方法在AUROC和AUPRC指标上均有统计学显著改善，证明了有效利用外部数据对提升临床模型性能的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 研究强调了在真实世界临床模型开发中，不仅要获取外部数据，更要有效利用外部数据来增强模型性能，LF2L框架成功实现了跨机构协作与隐私保护的平衡。

title: TRIAGE: Type-Routed Interventions via Aleatoric-Epistemic Gated Estimation in Robotic Manipulation and Adaptive Perception -- Don't Treat All Uncertainty the Same
summary: Most uncertainty-aware robotic systems collapse prediction uncertainty into a single scalar score and use it to trigger uniform corrective responses. This aggregation obscures whether uncertainty arises from corrupted observations or from mismatch between the learned model and the true system dynamics. As a result, corrective actions may be applied to the wrong component of the closed loop, degrading performance relative to leaving the policy unchanged. We introduce a lightweight post hoc framework that decomposes uncertainty into aleatoric and epistemic components and uses these signals to regulate system responses at inference time. Aleatoric uncertainty is estimated from deviations in the observation distribution using a Mahalanobis density model, while epistemic uncertainty is detected using a noise robust forward dynamics ensemble that isolates model mismatch from measurement corruption. The two signals remain empirically near orthogonal during closed loop execution and enable type specific responses. High aleatoric uncertainty triggers observation recovery, while high epistemic uncertainty moderates control actions. The same signals also regulate adaptive perception by guiding model capacity selection during tracking inference. Experiments demonstrate consistent improvements across both control and perception tasks. In robotic manipulation, the decomposed controller improves task success from 59.4% to 80.4% under compound perturbations and outperforms a combined uncertainty baseline by up to 21.0%. In adaptive tracking inference on MOT17, uncertainty-guided model selection reduces average compute by 58.2% relative to a fixed high capacity detector while preserving detection quality within 0.4%. Code and demo videos are available at https://divake.github.io/uncertainty-decomposition/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级的事后框架，将预测不确定性分解为偶然不确定性和认知不确定性，分别触发观测恢复和控制调节等针对性响应，在机器人操作任务中将成功率从59.4%提升至80.4%，并在目标跟踪任务中减少58.2%计算量的同时保持检测质量。
AI.motivation: 现有不确定性感知机器人系统将预测不确定性聚合为单一标量分数，掩盖了不确定性是源于观测损坏还是模型与真实系统动力学不匹配，导致纠错动作可能被错误应用，反而降低系统性能。
AI.method: 提出轻量级事后框架分解不确定性：使用马氏密度模型从观测分布偏差估计偶然不确定性，使用噪声鲁棒前向动力学集成模型检测认知不确定性以隔离模型不匹配与测量损坏；两种信号在闭环执行中保持近似正交，高偶然不确定性触发观测恢复，高认知不确定性调节控制动作，同时引导自适应感知中的模型容量选择。
AI.result: 在机器人操作任务中，分解控制器在复合扰动下将任务成功率从59.4%提升至80.4%，相比组合不确定性基线提升高达21.0%；在MOT17自适应跟踪推理中，不确定性引导的模型选择相比固定高容量检测器减少58.2%平均计算量，检测质量仅下降0.4%。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性分解为偶然和认知成分可提供更细粒度的系统诊断信息，使针对性响应成为可能，在控制与感知任务上均取得一致改进，证明了该方法的有效性和实用性。

title: Turning Time Series into Algebraic Equations: Symbolic Machine Learning for Interpretable Modeling of Chaotic Time Series
summary: Chaotic time series are notoriously difficult to forecast. Small uncertainties in initial conditions amplify rapidly, while strong nonlinearities and regime dependent variability constrain predictability. Although modern deep learning often delivers strong short horizon accuracy, its black box nature limits scientific insight and practical trust in settings where understanding the underlying dynamics matters. To address this gap, we propose two complementary symbolic forecasters that learn explicit, interpretable algebraic equations from chaotic time series data. Symbolic Neural Forecaster (SyNF) adapts a neural network based equation learning architecture to the forecasting setting, enabling fully differentiable discovery of compact and interpretable algebraic relations. The Symbolic Tree Forecaster (SyTF) builds on evolutionary symbolic regression to search directly over equation structures under a principled accuracy complexity trade off. We evaluate both approaches in a rolling window nowcasting setting with one step ahead forecasting using several accuracy metrics and compare against a broad suite of baselines spanning classical statistical models, tree ensembles, and modern deep learning architectures. Numerical experiments cover a benchmark of 132 low dimensional chaotic attractors and two real world chaotic time series, namely weekly dengue incidence in San Juan and the Nino 3.4 sea surface temperature index. Across datasets, symbolic forecasters achieve competitive one step ahead accuracy while providing transparent equations that reveal salient aspects of the underlying dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了两种符号预测模型（SyNF和SyTF），能够从混沌时间序列中学习显式、可解释的代数方程，在保持竞争性预测精度的同时提供透明的数学表达，解决了深度学习黑箱问题。
AI.motivation: 混沌时间序列预测面临初始条件不确定性快速放大、强非线性和机制依赖性变化等挑战。现代深度学习虽在短期预测上表现良好，但其黑箱性质限制了科学洞察力和实际可信度，特别是在需要理解底层动力学的场景中。
AI.method: 提出两种互补的符号预测器：(1) Symbolic Neural Forecaster (SyNF)——将基于神经网络的方程学习架构适配到预测场景，实现完全可微的紧凑代数关系发现；(2) Symbolic Tree Forecaster (SyTF)——基于进化符号回归，在精确度-复杂度权衡原则下直接搜索方程结构。采用滚动窗口一步超前预测设置进行评估。
AI.result: 在132个低维混沌吸引子基准数据集和两个真实世界混沌时间序列（圣胡安登革热周发病率、Niño 3.4海表温度指数）上进行数值实验。符号预测器在所有数据集上均达到了竞争性的一步超前预测精度，同时提供了透明的方程以揭示底层动力学的关键特征。
AI.conclusion: 符号预测器能够在保持竞争性预测精度的同时提供可解释的显式代数方程，成功平衡了预测准确性与模型可解释性，为需要理解底层动力学的科学应用提供了值得信赖的解决方案。

title: UniGround: Universal 3D Visual Grounding via Training-Free Scene Parsing
summary: Understanding and localizing objects in complex 3D environments from natural language descriptions, known as 3D Visual Grounding (3DVG), is a foundational challenge in embodied AI, with broad implications for robotics, augmented reality, and human-machine interaction. Large-scale pre-trained foundation models have driven significant progress on this front, enabling open-vocabulary 3DVG that allows systems to locate arbitrary objects in a given scene. However, their reliance on pre-trained models constrains 3D perception and reasoning within the inherited knowledge boundaries, resulting in limited generalization to unseen spatial relationships and poor robustness to out-of-distribution scenes. In this paper, we replace this constrained perception with training-free visual and geometric reasoning, thereby unlocking open-world 3DVG that enables the localization of any object in any scene beyond the training data. Specifically, the proposed UniGround operates in two stages: a Global Candidate Filtering stage that constructs scene candidates through training-free 3D topology and multi-view semantic encoding, and a Local Precision Grounding stage that leverages multi-scale visual prompting and structured reasoning to precisely identify the target object. Experiments on ScanRefer and EmbodiedScan show that UniGround achieves 46.1\%/34.1\% Acc@0.25/0.5 on ScanRefer and 28.7\% Acc@0.25 on EmbodiedScan, establishing a new state-of-the-art among zero-shot methods on EmbodiedScan without any 3D supervision. We further evaluate UniGround in real-world environments under uncontrolled reconstruction conditions and substantial domain shift, showing training-free reasoning generalizes robustly beyond curated benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了UniGround，一种无需训练的开世界3D视觉定位方法，通过训练自由的视觉和几何推理，实现了在任意场景中定位任意对象的能力，在EmbodiedScan上建立了零样本方法的新SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大规模预训练模型的开放词汇3D视觉定位方法受限于预训练模型的继承知识边界，导致对未见空间关系的泛化能力有限，且对分布外场景的鲁棒性较差。
AI.method: 提出UniGround框架，包含两个阶段：(1)全局候选过滤阶段：通过训练自由的3D拓扑和多视角语义编码构建场景候选；(2)局部精确定位阶段：利用多尺度视觉提示和结构化推理精确识别目标对象。整个方法无需3D监督和训练。
AI.result: 在ScanRefer上达到46.1%/34.1%的Acc@0.25/0.5；在EmbodiedScan上达到28.7%的Acc@0.25，在零样本方法中建立新SOTA。在真实世界环境下的非受控重建条件和显著域偏移下验证了方法的鲁棒泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过用训练自由的视觉和几何推理替代受限于预训练模型的感知方法，成功解锁了开世界3D视觉定位能力，使系统能够超越训练数据在任意场景中定位任意对象，证明了训练自由推理在真实世界应用中的有效性。

title: Adaptive Double-Booking Strategy for Outpatient Scheduling Using Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning
summary: Patient no-shows disrupt outpatient clinic operations, reduce productivity, and may delay necessary care. Clinics often adopt overbooking or double-booking to mitigate these effects. However, poorly calibrated policies can increase congestion and waiting times. Most existing methods rely on fixed heuristics and fail to adapt to real-time scheduling conditions or patient-specific no-show risk. To address these limitations, we propose an adaptive outpatient double-booking framework that integrates individualized no-show prediction with multi-objective reinforcement learning. The scheduling problem is formulated as a Markov decision process, and patient-level no-show probabilities estimated by a Multi-Head Attention Soft Random Forest model are incorporated in the reinforcement learning state. We develop a Multi-Policy Proximal Policy Optimization method equipped with a Multi-Policy Co-Evolution Mechanism. Under this mechanism, we propose a novel τ rule based on Kullback-Leibler divergence that enables selective knowledge transfer among behaviorally similar policies, improving convergence and expanding the diversity of trade-offs. In addition, SHapley Additive exPlanations is used to interpret both the predicted no-show risk and the agent's scheduling decisions. The proposed framework determines when to single-book, double-book, or reject appointment requests, providing a dynamic and data-driven alternative to conventional outpatient scheduling policies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个自适应门诊双重预约框架，通过整合个体化爽约预测与多目标强化学习，动态决定何时单预约、双预约或拒绝预约请求，以优化门诊排班并减少患者爽约带来的负面影响。
AI.motivation: 患者爽约扰乱门诊运营、降低效率并可能延误治疗。现有的过度预约或双重预约策略多依赖固定启发式规则，无法适应实时调度条件或患者个体爽约风险，可能导致拥堵和等待时间增加。
AI.method: 将调度问题建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），利用多注意力软随机森林模型预测患者层面的爽约概率并将其纳入强化学习状态。开发了一种配备多策略协同进化机制的多策略近端策略优化方法，提出基于KL散度的τ规则实现行为相似策略间的选择性知识转移。此外，使用SHAP方法解释预测的爽约风险和智能体的调度决策。
AI.result: 该框架能够动态决定单预约、双预约或拒绝预约请求，相比传统固定启发式策略，提供了数据驱动的自适应调度方案，改善了收敛性并扩展了权衡的多样性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的自适应双重预约框架通过整合个体化爽约预测与多目标强化学习，有效解决了传统方法的局限性，为门诊调度提供了一种动态、可解释且数据驱动的替代方案。

title: POIROT: Investigating Direct Tangible vs. Digitally Mediated Interaction and Attitude Moderation in Multi-party Murder Mystery Games
comment: 16 pages, 7 figures. Accepted to the 21st ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction (HRI 2026)
summary: As social robots take on increasingly complex roles like game masters (GMs) in multi-party games, the expectation that physicality universally enhances user experience remains debated. This study challenges the "one-size-fits-all" view of tangible interaction by identifying a critical boundary condition: users' Negative Attitudes towards Robots (NARS). In a between-subjects experiment (N = 67), a custom-built robot GM facilitated a multi-party murder mystery game (MMG) by delivering clues either through direct tangible interaction or a digitally mediated interface. Baseline multivariate analysis (MANOVA) showed no significant main effect of delivery modality, confirming that tangibility alone does not guarantee superior engagement. However, primary analysis using multilevel linear models (MLM) revealed a reliable moderation: participants high in NARS experienced markedly lower narrative immersion under tangible delivery, whereas those with low NARS scores showed no such decrement. Qualitative findings further illuminate this divergence: tangibility provides novelty and engagement for some but imposes excessive proxemic friction for anxious users, for whom the digital interface acts as a protective social buffer. These results advance a conditional model of HRI and emphasize the necessity for adaptive systems that can tailor interaction modalities to user predispositions.

AI.tldr: 本研究挑战了实体交互普遍提升用户体验的假设，发现用户对机器人的负面态度（NARS）是关键调节变量：高NARS用户在实体交互下的叙事沉浸感显著降低，而数字界面起到了保护性社交缓冲作用。
AI.motivation: 随着社交机器人在多方游戏中承担复杂角色（如游戏主持人），实体交互是否普遍提升用户体验仍存在争议。本研究旨在挑战“一刀切”的有形交互观点，探究其边界条件。
AI.method: 采用被试间实验设计（N=67），定制机器人作为游戏主持人引导多方谋杀谜题游戏。通过直接有形交互或数字中介界面传递线索，使用多变量方差分析（MANOVA）和多层线性模型（MLM）进行数据分析，并结合定性研究。
AI.result: 基线MANOVA显示传递模态无显著主效应，证实有形性本身不保证更优参与度。MLM分析发现NARS的可靠调节作用：高NARS参与者在有形传递下叙事沉浸感显著降低，而低NARS者无此下降。定性结果显示有形性为部分用户提供新奇感和参与度，但给焦虑用户带来过度的近体摩擦，数字界面则起到保护性社交缓冲作用。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果推进了人机交互的条件模型，强调了适应性系统的必要性，此类系统应根据用户倾向定制交互模态，而非假设实体交互普遍有益。

title: Spectral Discovery of Continuous Symmetries via Generalized Fourier Transforms
summary:
Continuous symmetries are fundamental to many scientific and learning problems, yet they are often unknown a priori. Existing symmetry discovery approaches typically search directly in the space of transformation generators or rely on learned augmentation schemes. We propose a fundamentally different perspective based on spectral structure.
  We introduce a framework for discovering continuous one-parameter subgroups using the Generalized Fourier Transform (GFT). Our central observation is that invariance to a subgroup induces structured sparsity in the spectral decomposition of a function across irreducible representations. Instead of optimizing over generators, we detect symmetries by identifying this induced sparsity pattern in the spectral domain.
  We develop symmetry detection procedures on maximal tori, where the GFT reduces to multi-dimensional Fourier analysis through their irreducible representations. Across structured tasks, including the double pendulum and top quark tagging, we demonstrate that spectral sparsity reliably reveals one-parameter symmetries. These results position spectral analysis as a principled and interpretable alternative to generator-based symmetry discovery.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于谱结构的连续对称性发现方法，通过广义傅里叶变换(GFT)识别函数谱分解中的稀疏模式来检测单参数子群对称性，为对称性发现提供了不依赖生成器优化的新途径。
AI.motivation: 连续对称性在科学和学习问题中至关重要，但通常是未知的。现有对称性发现方法通常直接在变换生成器空间中搜索或依赖学习到的数据增强方案，这些方法缺乏理论指导且难以解释。因此需要一种更有原则性和可解释性的对称性发现方法。
AI.method: 提出基于广义傅里叶变换(GFT)的框架来发现连续单参数子群。核心观察是：对某个子群的不变性会在函数跨越不可约表示的谱分解中诱导出结构化稀疏性。该方法不直接优化生成器，而是通过识别谱域中的稀疏模式来检测对称性。在极大环面上开发对称性检测程序，此时GFT通过不可约表示简化为多维傅里叶分析。
AI.result: 在结构化任务(包括双摆和顶夸克标记)上的实验表明，谱稀疏性能够可靠地揭示单参数对称性，验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 谱分析为基于生成器的对称性发现提供了一种有原则且可解释的替代方案，确立了谱方法在对称性发现问题中的重要地位。

title: Multifingered force-aware control for humanoid robots
comment: This work has been accepted for publication in ICRA 2026
summary: In this paper, we address force-aware control and force distribution in robotic platforms with multi-fingered hands. Given a target goal and force estimates from tactile sensors, we design a controller that adapts the motion of the torso, arm, wrist, and fingers, redistributing forces to maintain stable contact with objects of varying mass distribution or unstable contacts. To estimate forces, we collect a dataset of tactile signals and ground-truth force measurements using five Xela magnetic sensors interacting with indenters, and train force estimators. We then introduce a model-based control scheme that minimizes the distance between the Center of Pressure (CoP) and the centroid of the fingertips contact polygon. Since our method relies on estimated forces rather than raw tactile signals, it has the potential to be applied to any sensor capable of force estimation. We validate our framework on a balancing task with five objects, achieving a $82.7\%$ success rate, and further evaluate it in multi-object scenarios, achieving $80\%$ accuracy. Code and data can be found here https://github.com/hsp-iit/multifingered-force-aware-control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对多指手机器人平台的力感知控制方法，通过触觉传感器估计力并设计控制器来重新分配力，以保持与不同质量分布物体的稳定接触，在平衡任务中达到了82.7%的成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有的多指手机器人平台在处理具有不同质量分布或接触不稳定的物体时，难以维持稳定的接触，缺乏力感知和力分配能力。因此需要开发一种能够感知并自适应调整力的控制系统。
AI.method: 使用五个Xela磁传感器收集触觉信号和真实力的数据集，训练力估计器；然后提出一种基于模型的控制方案，最小化压力中心(CoP)与指尖接触多边形质心之间的距离，通过适应躯干、手臂、手腕和手指的运动来重新分配力。
AI.result: 在五个物体的平衡任务中实现了82.7%的成功率，在多物体场景中达到80%的准确率。该方法基于估计的力而非原始触觉信号，具有应用于任何能够进行力估计的传感器的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的力感知控制框架能够有效地在多指手机器人平台上实现力的重新分配和稳定接触控制，具有良好的泛化能力和实用性，代码和数据已开源。

title: AutoResearch-RL: Perpetual Self-Evaluating Reinforcement Learning Agents for Autonomous Neural Architecture Discovery
summary:
We present AutoResearch-RL, a framework in which a reinforcement learning agent conducts open-ended neural architecture and hyperparameter research without human supervision, running perpetually until a termination oracle signals convergence or resource exhaustion. At each step the agent proposes a code modification to a target training script, executes it under a fixed wall clock time budget, observes a scalar reward derived from validation bits-per-byte (val-bpb), and updates its policy via Proximal Policy Optimisation (PPO).
  The key design insight is the separation of three concerns: (i) a frozen environment (data pipeline, evaluation protocol, and constants) that guarantees fair cross-experiment comparison; (ii) a mutable target file (train.py) that represents the agent's editable state; and (iii) a meta-learner (the RL agent itself) that accumulates a growing trajectory of experiment outcomes and uses them to inform subsequent proposals.
  We formalise this as a Markov Decision Process, derive convergence guarantees under mild assumptions, and demonstrate empirically on a single GPU nanochat pretraining benchmark that AutoResearch-RL discovers configurations that match or exceed hand-tuned baselines after approximately 300 overnight iterations, with no human in the loop.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AutoResearch-RL框架，利用强化学习代理在无人类监督下自主进行神经网络架构和超参数研究，通过分离环境、目标文件和元学习器三个关注点，在单GPU nanochat预训练基准上约300次迭代后发现可匹敌或超越人工调优基准的配置。
AI.motivation: 神经架构搜索和超参数调优通常需要大量人工干预和领域专业知识，且搜索过程缺乏系统性和可重复性。研究旨在探索能否构建一个完全自主的研究代理，在无人类监督下持续进行开放式的神经架构和超参数研究，自动发现最优配置。
AI.method: 提出AutoResearch-RL框架，将问题建模为马尔可夫决策过程。核心设计是将三个关注点分离：（i）冻结的环境（数据管道、评估协议和常量）确保跨实验公平比较；（ii）可变的目标文件（train.py）作为代理的可编辑状态；（iii）元学习器（RL代理本身）累积实验轨迹并指导后续提案。代理每步提出代码修改，在固定时间预算内执行，观察基于验证bits-per-byte的标量奖励，通过PPO算法更新策略。
AI.result: 在单GPU nanochart预训练基准上，AutoResearch-RL在约300次隔夜迭代后发现与手工调优基准匹配或超越的配置，整个过程无需人工干预，验证了框架的有效性。同时提供了温和假设下的收敛性保证。
AI.conclusion: AutoResearch-RL证明了完全自主的神经架构和超参数研究的可行性，通过合理的框架设计分离关键关注点，可在无人类监督下发现竞争性配置，为自动化机器学习研究提供了新的研究方向。

title: A General Lie-Group Framework for Continuum Soft Robot Modeling
summary: This paper introduces a general Lie group framework for modeling continuum soft robots, employing Cosserat rod theory combined with cumulative parameterization on the Lie group SE(3). This novel approach addresses limitations present in current strain-based and configuration-based methods by providing geometric local control and eliminating unit quaternion constraints. The paper derives unified analytical expressions for kinematics, statics, and dynamics, including recursive Jacobian computations and an energy-conserving integrator suitable for real-time simulation and control. Additionally, the framework is extended to handle complex robotic structures, including segmented, branched, nested, and rigid-soft composite configurations, facilitating a modular and unified modeling strategy. The effectiveness, generality, and computational efficiency of the proposed methodology are demonstrated through various scenarios, including large-deformation rods, concentric tube robots, parallel robots, cable-driven robots, and articulated fingers. This work enhances modeling flexibility and numerical performance, providing an improved toolset for designing, simulating, and controlling soft robotic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于李群SE(3)的连续体软体机器人通用建模框架，通过Cosserat杆理论与累积参数化相结合，实现了运动学、静力学和动力学的统一解析表达，支持复杂拓扑结构并具备实时仿真能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于应变和基于构型的建模方法存在局限性：缺乏几何局部控制能力，且需要处理单位四元数约束，导致建模复杂度和计算效率受限。
AI.method: 采用Cosserat杆理论，在李群SE(3)上引入累积参数化方法，推导统一的运动学、静力学和动力学解析表达式；设计递归雅可比计算方法和能量守恒积分器；将框架扩展至分段、分支、嵌套及刚-柔复合结构，构建模块化统一建模策略。
AI.result: 所提方法通过多种场景验证了有效性、通用性和计算效率，包括大变形杆、同心管机器人、并联机器人、线驱动机器人和关节手指；在建模灵活性和数值性能方面均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该李群建模框架为软体机器人系统的设计、仿真和控制提供了更优的工具集，显著提升了建模灵活性和数值性能，适用于复杂拓扑结构的实时应用。

title: Retrieval-Augmented Multi-scale Framework for County-Level Crop Yield Prediction Across Large Regions
summary: This paper proposes a new method for crop yield prediction, which is essential for developing management strategies, informing insurance assessments, and ensuring long-term food security. Although existing data-driven approaches have shown promise in this domain, their performance often degrades when applied across large geographic regions and long time periods. This limitation arises from two key challenges: (1) difficulty in jointly capturing short-term and long-term temporal patterns, and (2) inability to effectively accommodate spatial data variability in agricultural systems. Ignoring these issues often leads to unreliable predictions for specific regions or years, which ultimately affects policy decisions and resource allocation. In this paper, we propose a new predictive framework to address these challenges. First, we introduce a new backbone model architecture that captures both short-term daily-scale crop growth dynamics and long-term dependencies across years. To further improve generalization across diverse spatial regions, we augment this model with a retrieval-based adaptation strategy. Recognizing the substantial yield variation across years, we design a novel retrieval-and-refinement pipeline that adjusts retrieved samples by removing cross-year bias not explained by input features. Our experiments on real-world county-level corn yield data over 630 counties in the US demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms different types of baselines. The results also verify the effectiveness of the retrieval-based augmentation method in improving model robustness under spatial heterogeneity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的农作物产量预测框架，通过设计新型骨干网络架构同时捕捉短期和长期时间依赖关系，并结合基于检索的适应策略来解决空间异质性问题，在美国630个县级玉米产量数据上的实验表明该方法显著优于现有基线模型。
AI.motivation: 现有数据驱动的作物产量预测方法在大地理区域和长时间跨度上的性能会显著下降，主要面临两个关键挑战：（1）难以同时捕捉短期和长期时间模式；（2）无法有效适应农业系统中的空间数据变异性。忽略这些问题会导致特定区域或年份的预测不可靠，进而影响政策决策和资源配置。
AI.method: 提出了一种新的预测框架，包含三个核心组件：（1）设计新型骨干模型架构，能够同时捕捉短期日尺度作物生长动态和跨年度的长期依赖关系；（2）引入基于检索的适应策略以提高在不同空间区域的泛化能力；（3）设计新颖的检索-精炼流水线，通过移除输入特征无法解释的跨年偏差来调整检索样本。
AI.result: 在美国630个县级玉米产量数据的真实数据集上的实验表明，该方法持续优于不同类型的基线模型；结果同时验证了基于检索的增强方法在空间异质性条件下提高模型鲁棒性的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的框架成功解决了时空预测中的关键挑战，为作物产量预测提供了更可靠的方法，有助于支持管理策略制定、保险评估和长期粮食安全保障。

title: FlowTouch: View-Invariant Visuo-Tactile Prediction
summary: Tactile sensation is essential for contact-rich manipulation tasks. It provides direct feedback on object geometry, surface properties, and interaction forces, enhancing perception and enabling fine-grained control. An inherent limitation of tactile sensors is that readings are available only when an object is touched. This precludes their use during planning and the initial execution phase of a task. Predicting tactile information from visual information can bridge this gap. A common approach is to learn a direct mapping from camera images to the output of vision-based tactile sensors. However, the resulting model will depend strongly on the specific setup and on how well the camera can capture the area where an object is touched. In this work, we introduce FlowTouch, a novel model for view-invariant visuo-tactile prediction. Our key idea is to use an object's local 3D mesh to encode rich information for predicting tactile patterns while abstracting away from scene-dependent details. FlowTouch integrates scene reconstruction and Flow Matching-based models for image generation. Our results show that FlowTouch is able to bridge the sim-to-real gap and generalize to new sensor instances. We further show that the resulting tactile images can be used for downstream grasp stability prediction. Our code, datasets and videos are available at https://flowtouch.github.io/

AI.tldr: 提出了FlowTouch模型，通过物体的局部3D网格预测触觉信息，解决了触觉传感器只能在接触时获取数据的限制，实现了视角不变的视觉-触觉预测，并能跨越仿真到现实的差距。
AI.motivation: 触觉传感器只能在物体接触时提供读数，无法在任务规划和初始执行阶段使用。虽然可以从视觉信息预测触觉信息，但现有方法依赖于特定设置和相机视角，泛化能力有限。
AI.method: 使用物体的局部3D网格编码丰富信息来预测触觉模式，抽象掉场景相关的细节。FlowTouch整合了场景重建和基于Flow Matching的图像生成模型，实现视角不变的视觉-触觉预测。
AI.result: FlowTouch能够跨越仿真到现实的差距，泛化到新的传感器实例。生成的触觉图像可用于下游的抓取稳定性预测任务。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用局部3D网格作为中间表示，FlowTouch成功实现了视角不变的触觉预测，为触觉感知在规划阶段的提前应用提供了可行方案，拓展了触觉传感器在机器人操作任务中的应用范围。

title: Adversarial Latent-State Training for Robust Policies in Partially Observable Domains
summary: Robustness under latent distribution shift remains challenging in partially observable reinforcement learning. We formalize a focused setting where an adversary selects a hidden initial latent distribution before the episode, termed an adversarial latent-initial-state POMDP. Theoretically, we prove a latent minimax principle, characterize worst-case defender distributions, and derive approximate best-response certificates with finite-sample guarantees, providing formal meaning to empirical training diagnostics. Empirically, using a Battleship benchmark, we demonstrate that targeted exposure to shifted latent distributions reduces average robustness gaps between Spread and Uniform distributions from 10.3 to 3.1 shots at equal budget. Furthermore, iterative best-response training exhibits budget-sensitive behavior entirely consistent with our approximate certificate theory. Ultimately, we show that for latent-initial-state problems, our framework yields precise diagnostic principles and confirms that structured adversarial exposure effectively mitigates worst-case vulnerabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文研究部分可观测强化学习中的潜在分布偏移问题，提出对抗性潜在初始状态POMDP框架，证明了潜在极小极大原理并提供了有限样本保证，在Battleship基准上验证了结构化对抗暴露能有效缓解最坏情况下的脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 部分可观测强化学习在潜在分布偏移下的鲁棒性仍然是一个挑战性问题。现有方法缺乏对隐藏初始潜在分布变化的正式建模和理论保证，需要一个新的框架来形式化这一设置并提供理论诊断工具。
AI.method: (1) 形式化对抗性潜在初始状态POMDP设置，对手在回合开始前选择隐藏初始潜在分布；(2) 证明潜在极小极大原理并刻画最坏情况下的防御者分布；(3) 推导具有有限样本保证的近似最佳响应证书；(4) 使用Battleship基准进行实证验证，采用迭代最佳响应训练方法。
AI.result: (1) 理论上：建立了潜在极小极大原理，为实证训练诊断提供了形式化意义；(2) 实验上：针对性暴露于偏移潜在分布后，Spread和Uniform分布之间的平均鲁棒性差距从10.3降至3.1次射击（相同预算下）；(3) 迭代最佳响应训练展现出与近似证书理论完全一致的预算敏感行为。
AI.conclusion: 对于潜在初始状态问题，该框架提供了精确的诊断原则，并确认结构化对抗暴露能有效缓解最坏情况下的脆弱性，为部分可观测强化学习的鲁棒性研究提供了理论指导和实践方法。

title: Seed2Scale: A Self-Evolving Data Engine for Embodied AI via Small to Large Model Synergy and Multimodal Evaluation
summary: Existing data generation methods suffer from exploration limits, embodiment gaps, and low signal-to-noise ratios, leading to performance degradation during self-iteration. To address these challenges, we propose Seed2Scale, a self-evolving data engine that overcomes the data bottleneck through a heterogeneous synergy of "small-model collection, large-model evaluation, and target-model learning". Starting with as few as four seed demonstrations, the engine employs the lightweight Vision-Language-Action model, SuperTiny, as a dedicated collector, leveraging its strong inductive bias for robust exploration in parallel environments. Concurrently, a pre-trained Vision-Language Model is integrated as a Verifer to autonomously perform success/failure judgment and quality scoring for the massive generated trajectories. Seed2Scale effectively mitigates model collapse, ensuring the stability of the self-evolution process. Experimental results demonstrate that Seed2Scale exhibits signifcant scaling potential: as iterations progress, the success rate of the target model shows a robust upward trend, achieving a performance improvement of 131.2%. Furthermore, Seed2Scale signifcantly outperforms existing data augmentation methods, providing a scalable and cost-effective pathway for the large-scale development of Generalist Embodied AI. Project page: https://terminators2025.github.io/Seed2Scale.github.io

AI.tldr: 本文提出Seed2Scale，一种自进化数据引擎，通过"小模型采集、大模型评估、目标模型学习"的异构协同机制，仅需4个种子演示即可实现数据规模的自我扩展，在目标模型上实现了131.2%的性能提升，显著优于现有数据增强方法。
AI.motivation: 现有数据生成方法存在探索受限、具身鸿沟和低信噪比等问题，导致自迭代过程中性能下降。这些瓶颈限制了大规模通用具身AI的发展，亟需一种可扩展且经济高效的数据生成方案。
AI.method: 提出Seed2Scale自进化数据引擎，采用异构协同策略：(1) 使用轻量级Vision-Language-Action模型SuperTiny作为采集器，利用其强归纳偏置在并行环境中进行鲁棒探索；(2) 集成预训练Vision-Language Model作为验证器，自主对生成轨迹进行成功/失败判断和质量评分；(3) 通过"小模型采集、大模型评估、目标模型学习"的协同机制有效缓解模型崩溃问题，确保自进化过程的稳定性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明Seed2Scale展现出显著的扩展潜力：随着迭代进行，目标模型成功率呈稳健上升趋势，性能提升达131.2%；仅需4个种子演示即可启动自进化过程；显著优于现有数据增强方法，证明了方法的有效性和可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: Seed2Scale通过异构协同的自进化机制成功克服了数据瓶颈问题，为大规模通用具身AI的发展提供了一条可扩展且经济高效的路径，证明了小模型与大模型协同在数据生成领域的巨大潜力。

title: ShakyPrepend: A Multi-Group Learner with Improved Sample Complexity
summary: Multi-group learning is a learning task that focuses on controlling predictors' conditional losses over specified subgroups. We propose ShakyPrepend, a method that leverages tools inspired by differential privacy to obtain improved theoretical guarantees over existing approaches. Through numerical experiments, we demonstrate that ShakyPrepend adapts to both group structure and spatial heterogeneity. We provide practical guidance for deploying multi-group learning algorithms in real-world settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ShakyPrepend方法，利用差分隐私相关工具改进多群体学习的理论保证，并通过实验验证其在群体结构和空间异质性上的适应性。
AI.motivation: 多群体学习任务需要控制预测器在指定子群体上的条件损失，现有方法的理论保证存在改进空间，需要开发更优的方法。
AI.method: 提出ShakyPrepend方法，借鉴差分隐私的工具和技术来增强多群体学习算法，从而获得改进的理论保证。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，ShakyPrepend能够自适应群体结构和空间异质性，提供了优于现有方法的理论保证。
AI.conclusion: 本文为在实际场景中部署多群体学习算法提供了实用指导和改进的理论框架。

title: SAIL: Test-Time Scaling for In-Context Imitation Learning with VLM
summary: In-context imitation learning allows robots to acquire skills from demonstrations, yet one-shot trajectory generation remains fragile under environmental variation. We propose SAIL, a framework that reframes robot imitation as an iterative refinement problem capable of scaling with test-time compute. SAIL utilizes Monte Carlo Tree Search, where each node is a complete trajectory and edges correspond to trajectory refinements. The process is guided by three core components: an automated archive of successful trajectories for contextually relevant retrieval, a vision language model-based scoring mechanism for trajectory evaluation, and a step-level feedback that provides trajectory-aligned scores for iterative refinement. Experiments across six diverse manipulation tasks in simulation and real-world validation clearly demonstrate that increasing test-time compute consistently improves success rates, achieving up to 95% on complex tasks. Our results suggest that trajectory-level test-time scaling is a robust path toward more generalizable robotic agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAIL框架，将机器人模仿学习重构为迭代优化问题，通过蒙特卡洛树搜索在测试时进行轨迹优化，在六个操作任务中成功率达到95%。
AI.motivation: 现有的上下文模仿学习方法在环境变化下，一次性轨迹生成仍然脆弱，缺乏鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出SAIL框架，将机器人模仿重构为迭代优化问题。采用蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS），节点表示完整轨迹，边表示轨迹优化操作。包含三个核心组件：（1）成功轨迹的自动存档机制，用于上下文相关的检索；（2）基于视觉语言模型的轨迹评分机制；（3）步骤级反馈，为迭代优化提供轨迹对齐的评分。
AI.result: 在仿真环境的六个多样化操作任务和真实世界验证中，增加测试时计算量能持续提高成功率，在复杂任务上达到最高95%的成功率。
AI.conclusion: 轨迹级别的测试时扩展是实现更具泛化能力的机器人智能体的有效途径。

title: Norm-Hierarchy Transitions in Representation Learning: When and Why Neural Networks Abandon Shortcuts
summary:
Neural networks often rely on spurious shortcuts for many epochs before discovering structured representations. However, the mechanism governing when this transition occurs and whether its timing can be predicted remains unclear. Prior work shows that gradient descent converges to low norm solutions and that neural networks exhibit simplicity bias, but neither explains the timescale of the transition from shortcut features to structured representations.
  We introduce the Norm-Hierarchy Transition (NHT) framework, which explains delayed representation learning as the slow traversal of a hierarchy of parameter norms during regularized optimization. When multiple interpolating solutions exist with different norms, weight decay gradually moves the model from high norm shortcut solutions toward lower norm structured representations. We derive a tight bound showing that the transition delay grows logarithmically with the ratio between shortcut and structured norms.
  Experiments on modular arithmetic, CIFAR-10 with spurious features, CelebA, and Waterbirds support the predictions of the framework. The results suggest that grokking, shortcut learning, and delayed feature discovery arise from a common mechanism based on norm hierarchy traversal during training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Norm-Hierarchy Transition (NHT)框架，揭示了神经网络从依赖捷径特征到学习结构化表示的延迟过渡现象源于权重衰减下参数范数的层级遍历，过渡延迟与捷径范数和结构化范数的比值呈对数关系。
AI.motivation: 神经网络在训练早期常依赖虚假捷径，经过多个epoch后才转向结构化表示，但这一过渡时机的机制和可预测性尚不清楚。现有研究仅表明梯度下降收敛到低范数解并存在简单性偏差，但无法解释从捷径特征到结构化表示的过渡时间尺度。
AI.method: 提出Norm-Hierarchy Transition (NHT)框架，将延迟表示学习解释为正则化优化过程中参数范数层级的缓慢遍历。当存在多个具有不同范数的插值解时，权重衰减逐步将模型从高范数捷径解推向低范数结构化表示，并推导出过渡延迟与捷径范数和结构化范数比值呈对数增长的紧界。
AI.result: 在模运算、带虚假特征的CIFAR-10、CelebA和Waterbirds数据集上的实验支持该框架的预测，表明grokking、捷径学习和延迟特征发现均源于训练期间范数层级遍历的共同机制。
AI.conclusion: NHT框架成功解释了神经网络中延迟表示学习的时间机制，过渡延迟可通过捷径范数与结构化范数的比值预测，为理解grokking等现象提供了统一视角。

title: Learning Concept Bottleneck Models from Mechanistic Explanations
