summary: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) aim for ante-hoc interpretability by learning a bottleneck layer that predicts interpretable concepts before the decision. State-of-the-art approaches typically select which concepts to learn via human specification, open knowledge graphs, prompting an LLM, or using general CLIP concepts. However, concepts defined a-priori may not have sufficient predictive power for the task or even be learnable from the available data. As a result, these CBMs often significantly trail their black-box counterpart when controlling for information leakage. To address this, we introduce a novel CBM pipeline named Mechanistic CBM (M-CBM), which builds the bottleneck directly from a black-box model's own learned concepts. These concepts are extracted via Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) and subsequently named and annotated on a selected subset of images using a Multimodal LLM. For fair comparison and leakage control, we also introduce the Number of Contributing Concepts (NCC), a decision-level sparsity metric that extends the recently proposed NEC metric. Across diverse datasets, we show that M-CBMs consistently surpass prior CBMs at matched sparsity, while improving concept predictions and providing concise explanations. Our code is available at https://github.com/Antonio-Dee/M-CBM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Mechanistic CBM (M-CBM)，一种通过从黑盒模型中提取Sparse Autoencoders学到的概念来构建概念瓶颈层的新方法，在控制信息泄露的情况下显著提升了性能。
AI.motivation: 现有概念瓶颈模型（CBMs）依赖先验定义的概念（如人工指定、知识图谱、LLM提示或CLIP概念），但这些概念可能缺乏足够的预测能力或难以从数据中学习，导致在控制信息泄露时性能显著落后于黑盒模型。
AI.method: 提出M-CBM流程：利用Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) 从黑盒模型中提取其自身学到的概念，使用多模态LLM对选定图像子集进行概念命名和标注；同时引入Number of Contributing Concepts (NCC)指标，这是一种决策级稀疏性度量，用于公平比较和控制信息泄露。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，M-CBM在相同稀疏度下持续优于先前的CBM方法，同时改善了概念预测质量并提供更简洁的解释。
AI.conclusion: 通过直接从黑盒模型提取概念构建瓶颈层，M-CBM成功解决了先验概念预测能力不足的问题，在保持可解释性的同时显著缩小了与黑盒模型的性能差距。

title: EndoSERV: A Vision-based Endoluminal Robot Navigation System
summary: Robot-assisted endoluminal procedures are increasingly used for early cancer intervention. However, the intricate, narrow and tortuous pathways within the luminal anatomy pose substantial difficulties for robot navigation. Vision-based navigation offers a promising solution, but existing localization approaches are error-prone due to tissue deformation, in vivo artifacts and a lack of distinctive landmarks for consistent localization. This paper presents a novel EndoSERV localization method to address these challenges. It includes two main parts, \textit{i.e.}, \textbf{SE}gment-to-structure and \textbf{R}eal-to-\textbf{V}irtual mapping, and hence the name. For long-range and complex luminal structures, we divide them into smaller sub-segments and estimate the odometry independently. To cater for label insufficiency, an efficient transfer technique maps real image features to the virtual domain to use virtual pose ground truth. The training phases of EndoSERV include an offline pretraining to extract texture-agnostic features, and an online phase that adapts to real-world conditions. Extensive experiments based on both public and clinical datasets have been performed to demonstrate the effectiveness of the method even without any real pose labels.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了EndoSERV方法，通过分段到结构和实到虚映射来解决机器人在复杂腔道环境中的视觉导航定位问题，无需真实位姿标签即可实现有效定位。
AI.motivation: 机器人辅助腔内手术在早期癌症干预中应用日益广泛，但腔道解剖结构狭窄、弯曲且复杂，使得机器人导航面临巨大挑战。现有的基于视觉的定位方法由于组织变形、体内伪影以及缺乏显著地标等原因，容易产生定位错误。
AI.method: 提出EndoSERV定位方法，包含两个核心部分：(1) SEgment-to-structure：将长距离复杂腔道结构分割为较小子段并独立估计里程计；(2) Real-to-Virtual mapping：通过迁移学习将真实图像特征映射到虚拟域，利用虚拟位姿真值进行监督。训练分为离线预训练阶段（提取纹理无关特征）和在线适应阶段（适应真实世界条件）。
AI.result: 在公共数据集和临床数据集上进行了大量实验验证，结果表明该方法在没有任何真实位姿标签的情况下仍能有效工作，证明了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: EndoSERV方法成功解决了腔道机器人导航中的关键定位难题，通过创新的分段策略和虚实迁移技术，实现了无标签条件下的准确定位，为腔内手术机器人导航提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Learning Clinical Representations Under Systematic Distribution Shift
summary: Clinical machine learning models are increasingly trained using large scale, multimodal foundation paradigms, yet deployment environments often differ systematically from the data generating settings used during training. Such shifts arise from heterogeneous measurement policies, documentation practices, and institutional workflows, leading to representation entanglement between physiologic signal and practice specific artifacts. In this work, we propose a practice invariant representation learning framework for multimodal clinical prediction. We model clinical observations as arising from latent physiologic factors and environment dependent processes, and introduce an objective that jointly optimizes predictive performance while suppressing environment predictive information in the learned embedding. Concretely, we combine supervised risk minimization with adversarial environment regularization and invariant risk penalties across hospitals. Across multiple longitudinal EHR prediction tasks and cross institution evaluations, our method improves out of distribution AUROC by up to 2 to 3 points relative to masked pretraining and standard supervised baselines, while maintaining in distribution performance and improving calibration. These results demonstrate that explicitly accounting for systematic distribution shift during representation learning yields more robust and transferable clinical models, highlighting the importance of structural invariance alongside architectural scale in healthcare AI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种实践不变表示学习框架，通过对抗性环境正则化和跨医院不变风险惩罚，解决临床机器学习模型在不同医疗机构间的分布偏移问题，在跨机构EHR预测任务中将OOD AUROC提升2-3个百分点。
AI.motivation: 临床机器学习模型在大规模多模态数据上训练后，部署环境往往与训练时的数据生成环境存在系统性差异。这种差异源于异构的测量策略、文档记录实践和机构工作流程，导致生理信号与实践特定伪影之间的表示纠缠，影响模型的泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出实践不变表示学习框架：1）将临床观察建模为潜在生理因素和环境依赖过程的组合；2）设计联合优化目标，在保持预测性能的同时抑制学习嵌入中的环境预测信息；3）结合监督风险最小化、对抗性环境正则化和跨医院不变风险惩罚进行训练。
AI.result: 在多个纵向EHR预测任务和跨机构评估中，相比掩码预训练和标准监督基线，该方法将分布外AUROC提升2-3个百分点，同时保持分布内性能并改善校准效果。
AI.conclusion: 在表示学习过程中显式考虑系统性分布偏移可产生更鲁棒、更可迁移的临床模型。研究强调了在医疗AI中，除架构规模外，结构不变性同样具有重要价值。

title: Hierarchical Multi-Modal Planning for Fixed-Altitude Sparse Target Search and Sampling
summary: Efficient monitoring of sparse benthic phenomena, such as coral colonies, presents a great challenge for Autonomous Underwater Vehicles. Traditional exhaustive coverage strategies are energy-inefficient, while recent adaptive sampling approaches rely on costly vertical maneuvers. To address these limitations, we propose HIMoS (Hierarchical Informative Multi-Modal Search), a fixed-altitude framework for sparse coral search-and-sample missions. The system integrates a heterogeneous sensor suite within a two-layer planning architecture. At the strategic level, a Global Planner optimizes topological routes to maximize potential discovery. At the tactical level, a receding-horizon Local Planner leverages differentiable belief propagation to generate kinematically feasible trajectories that balance acoustic substrate exploration, visual coral search, and close-range sampling. Validated in high-fidelity simulations derived from real-world coral reef benthic surveys, our approach demonstrates superior mission efficiency compared to state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了HIMoS（分层信息多模态搜索）框架，这是一种用于稀疏珊瑚搜索与采样任务的定高自治水下车辆（AUV）导航方法，通过集成异构传感器套件和双层规划架构，在仿真实验中显示出优于现有基线方法的任务效率。
AI.motivation: 传统的海底稀疏现象（如珊瑚群落）监测方法存在效率问题：遍历式覆盖策略能耗过高，而现有的自适应采样方法依赖昂贵的垂直机动操作。因此需要一种更高效的AUV监测框架来解决这些局限性。
AI.method: 提出HIMoS固定高度框架，集成异构传感器套件，采用双层规划架构：（1）战略层：全局规划器优化拓扑路线以最大化潜在发现；（2）战术层：滚动时域局部规划器利用可微置信度传播，生成运动学可行轨迹，平衡声学基底探测、视觉珊瑚搜索和近距离采样三个目标。
AI.result: 在基于真实世界珊瑚礁底栖调查数据构建的高保真仿真环境中进行验证，该方法在任务效率方面表现出优于最先进基线方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: HIMoS框架成功解决了稀疏海底现象监测中的效率问题，通过分层多模态搜索策略，避免了传统方法的能耗和机动成本，为AUV珊瑚监测任务提供了一种高效解决方案。

title: Latent Generative Models with Tunable Complexity for Compressed Sensing and other Inverse Problems
summary: Generative models have emerged as powerful priors for solving inverse problems. These models typically represent a class of natural signals using a single fixed complexity or dimensionality. This can be limiting: depending on the problem, a fixed complexity may result in high representation error if too small, or overfitting to noise if too large. We develop tunable-complexity priors for diffusion models, normalizing flows, and variational autoencoders, leveraging nested dropout. Across tasks including compressed sensing, inpainting, denoising, and phase retrieval, we show empirically that tunable priors consistently achieve lower reconstruction errors than fixed-complexity baselines. In the linear denoising setting, we provide a theoretical analysis that explicitly characterizes how the optimal tuning parameter depends on noise and model structure. This work demonstrates the potential of tunable-complexity generative priors and motivates both the development of supporting theory and their application across a wide range of inverse problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于嵌套丢弃（nested dropout）的可调复杂度生成先验方法，应用于扩散模型、归一化流和变分自编码器，在多种逆问题中相比固定复杂度基线方法取得了更低的重建误差，并在线性去噪场景下提供了理论分析。
AI.motivation: 现有的生成模型通常使用固定的复杂度或维度来表示自然信号类别。这种固定复杂度存在局限性：如果复杂度过小会导致高表示误差，如果过大则容易过拟合噪声。因此需要一种能够根据问题特性自适应调整复杂度的生成先验方法。
AI.method: 开发了可调复杂度先验方法，应用于扩散模型、归一化流和变分自编码器三类生成模型，核心技术是利用嵌套丢弃（nested dropout）机制来实现复杂度的可调性。在线性去噪设置下，提供了理论分析框架，明确刻画了最优调谐参数如何依赖于噪声水平和模型结构。
AI.result: 在压缩感知、图像修复、去噪和相位检索等多个逆问题任务上的实验表明，可调复杂度先验方法相比固定复杂度基线方法一致地取得了更低的重建误差。理论分析明确揭示了最优调谐参数与噪声和模型结构之间的依赖关系。
AI.conclusion: 本研究证明了可调复杂度生成先验的潜力和有效性，为后续相关理论发展及其在广泛逆问题中的应用提供了动机和基础。

title: PhaForce: Phase-Scheduled Visual-Force Policy Learning with Slow Planning and Fast Correction for Contact-Rich Manipulation
summary: Contact-rich manipulation requires not only vision-dominant task semantics but also closed-loop reactions to force/torque (F/T) transients. Yet, generative visuomotor policies are typically constrained to low-frequency updates due to inference latency and action chunking, underutilizing F/T for control-rate feedback. Furthermore, existing force-aware methods often inject force continuously and indiscriminately, lacking an explicit mechanism to schedule when / how much / where to apply force across different task phases. We propose PhaForce, a phase-scheduled visual--force policy that coordinates low-rate chunk-level planning and high-rate residual correction via a unified contact/phase schedule. PhaForce comprises (i) a contact-aware phase predictor (CAP) that estimates contact probability and phase belief, (ii) a Slow diffusion planner that performs dual-gated visual--force fusion with orthogonal residual injection to preserve vision semantics while conditioning on force, and (iii) a Fast corrector that applies control-rate phase-routed residuals in interpretable corrective subspaces for within-chunk micro-adjustments. Across multiple real-robot contact-rich tasks, PhaForce achieves an average success rate of 86% (+40 pp over baselines), while also substantially improving contact quality by regulating interaction forces and exhibiting robust adaptability to OOD geometric shifts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了PhaForce，一种阶段调度的视觉-力策略，通过协调低频动作块规划与高频残差校正，解决了现有生成式视觉运动策略无法有效利用力/力矩反馈的问题，在接触丰富任务中成功率达86%，较基线提升40个百分点。
AI.motivation: 接触丰富的操作任务不仅需要视觉主导的任务语义，还需要对力/力矩瞬变的闭环响应。然而，现有生成式视觉运动策略由于推理延迟和动作分块，通常受限于低频更新，未能充分利用力反馈进行控制率调节。此外，现有的力感知方法往往持续且无差别地注入力，缺乏明确的机制来规划在不同任务阶段何时、多少、何处施加力。
AI.method: 提出PhaForce框架，包含三个核心组件：(i) 接触感知阶段预测器(CAP)，估计接触概率和阶段信念；(ii) 慢速扩散规划器，执行双门控视觉-力融合与正交残差注入，在保持视觉语义的同时以力为条件；(iii) 快速校正器，在可解释的校正子空间中应用控制率阶段路由残差，实现块内微调。该方法通过统一的接触/阶段调度协调低速率块级规划和高频残差校正。
AI.result: 在多个真实机器人接触丰富任务中，PhaForce平均成功率达86%，较基线提升40个百分点；同时通过调节交互力显著改善了接触质量，并对分布外(OOD)几何偏移表现出鲁棒适应性。
AI.conclusion: PhaForce成功实现了视觉语义与力反馈的有效融合，通过阶段调度机制解决了力应用时机和程度的控制问题，为接触丰富的操作任务提供了一个高效、鲁棒且可解释的解决方案。

title: N-Tree Diffusion for Long-Horizon Wildfire Risk Forecasting
summary: Long-horizon wildfire risk forecasting requires generating probabilistic spatial fields under sparse event supervision while maintaining computational efficiency across multiple prediction horizons. Extending diffusion models to multi-step forecasting typically repeats the denoising process independently for each horizon, leading to redundant computation. We introduce N-Tree Diffusion (NT-Diffusion), a hierarchical diffusion model designed for long-horizon wildfire risk forecasting. Fire occurrences are represented as continuous Fire Risk Maps (FRMs), which provide a smoothed spatial risk field suitable for probabilistic modeling. Instead of running separate diffusion trajectories for each predicted timestamp, NT-Diffusion shares early denoising stages and branches at later levels, allowing horizon-specific refinement while reducing redundant sampling. We evaluate the proposed framework on a newly collected real-world wildfire dataset constructed for long-horizon probabilistic prediction. Results indicate that NT-Diffusion achieves consistent accuracy improvements and reduced inference cost compared to baseline forecasting approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了N-Tree Diffusion（NT-Diffusion）模型，通过分层扩散机制共享早期去噪阶段并在后期分支，实现了长期野火风险的高效概率预测，在准确性和推理效率上均优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 长期野火风险预测需要在稀疏事件监督下生成概率空间场，现有扩散模型在多步预测中对每个预测时步独立重复去噪过程，导致大量冗余计算，难以平衡预测精度与计算效率。
AI.method: 提出NT-Diffusion分层扩散模型，将野火发生表示为连续的火灾风险图（FRMs）作为概率建模的平滑空间风险场。该模型通过树状结构在多个预测时步间共享早期去噪阶段，仅在后期阶段进行分支，实现特定时步的精细化预测，从而避免独立轨迹的冗余采样。
AI.result: 在新构建的真实世界长期概率野火预测数据集上进行评估，结果表明NT-Diffusion相比基线预测方法在准确性上持续提升，同时显著降低了推理成本。
AI.conclusion: NT-Diffusion通过层次化共享去噪过程，成功解决了多时步预测中的冗余计算问题，为长期野火风险预测提供了一种高效且准确的概率建模框架。

title: Perception-Aware Communication-Free Multi-UAV Coordination in the Wild
summary: We present a communication-free method for safe multi-robot coordination in complex environments such as forests with dense canopy cover, where GNSS is unavailable. Our approach relies on an onboard anisotropic 3D LiDAR sensor used for SLAM as well as for detecting obstacles and neighboring robots. We develop a novel perception-aware 3D navigation framework that enables robots to safely and effectively progress toward a goal region despite limited sensor field-of-view. The approach is evaluated through extensive simulations across diverse scenarios and validated in real-world field experiments, demonstrating its scalability, robustness, and reliability.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无需通信的多机器人安全导航方法，利用机载各向异性3D激光雷达在GNSS拒止环境（如茂密森林）中实现SLAM、障碍物检测和邻居机器人感知，并通过感知感知的3D导航框架确保安全导航。
AI.motivation: 在茂密树冠覆盖的森林等复杂环境中，GNSS信号不可用，且机器人间通信可能受限或不可靠，需要一种能够在此类环境下安全协调多机器人系统的方法。
AI.method: 利用机载各向异性3D激光雷达传感器同时实现SLAM、障碍物检测和邻近机器人识别；开发感知感知（perception-aware）的3D导航框架，在有限传感器视场角条件下安全有效地向目标区域推进。
AI.result: 通过大量多样化场景的仿真实验和真实野外实验验证了方法的有效性，证明了系统的可扩展性、鲁棒性和可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功实现了在GNSS拒止环境下的通信自由多机器人安全协调，为复杂环境中的多机器人导航提供了可行解决方案。

title: Scaling Laws in the Tiny Regime: How Small Models Change Their Mistakes
comment: 17 pages, 6 figures, 2 tables. Submitted to MDPI Machine Learning and Knowledge Extraction (MAKE)
summary:
Neural scaling laws describe how model performance improves as a power law with size, but existing work focuses on models above 100M parameters. The sub-20M regime -- where TinyML and edge AI operate -- remains unexamined. We train 90 models (22K--19.8M parameters) across two architectures (plain ConvNet, MobileNetV2) on CIFAR-100, varying width while holding depth and training fixed. Both follow approximate power laws in error rate: $α= 0.156 \pm 0.002$ (ScaleCNN) and $α= 0.106 \pm 0.001$ (MobileNetV2) across five seeds. Since prior work fit cross-entropy loss rather than error rate, direct exponent comparison is approximate; with that caveat, these are 1.4--2x steeper than $α\approx 0.076$ for large language models. The power law does not hold uniformly: local exponents decay with scale, and MobileNetV2 saturates at 19.8M parameters ($α_{\mathrm{local}} = 0.006$). Error structure also changes. Jaccard overlap between error sets of the smallest and largest ScaleCNN is only 0.35 (25 seed pairs, $\pm 0.004$) -- compression changes which inputs are misclassified, not merely how many. Small models
  concentrate capacity on easy classes (Gini: 0.26 at 22K vs. 0.09 at 4.7M) while abandoning the hardest (bottom-5 accuracy: 10% vs. 53%). Counter to expectation, the smallest models are best calibrated (ECE = 0.013 vs. peak 0.110
  at mid-size). Aggregate accuracy is therefore misleading for edge deployment; validation must happen at the target model size.

AI.tldr: 本文首次研究了2000万参数以下的微型模型（TinyML/边缘AI）的神经缩放定律，发现其误差率遵循比大语言模型更陡峭的幂律（α≈0.106-0.156），且小模型在错误样本分布、类别难度分配和校准性方面表现与直觉相悖。
AI.motivation: 现有神经缩放定律研究集中于1亿参数以上的大模型，而边缘AI和TinyML实际操作的2000万参数以下区域未被探索。作者旨在填补这一空白，验证缩放定律在小模型上是否成立，并探究性能变化的结构性特征。
AI.method: 训练90个模型（22K-19.8M参数），涵盖两种架构（Plain ConvNet和MobileNetV2），在CIFAR-100数据集上固定深度和训练配置，仅改变宽度。分析误差率的幂律拟合、错误样本重叠度（Jaccard指数）、类别难度分布（Gini系数和bottom-5准确率）以及模型校准性（ECE）。
AI.result: 两种架构均呈现近似幂律（α=0.156±0.002和0.106±0.001），比大语言模型的α≈0.076陡峭1.4-2倍。但幂律并非均匀成立：局部指数随规模衰减，MobileNetV2在19.8M参数时接近饱和。最小与最大模型的错误集Jaccard重叠仅0.35，表明模型缩放改变了"哪些样本被错分"而非仅改变错分数量。小模型集中容量于简单类别（Gini从22K时的0.26降至4.7M时的0.09），放弃最难类别（bottom-5准确率10% vs 53%）。反直觉的是，最小模型校准性最佳（ECE=0.013 vs 中等模型的0.110）。
AI.conclusion: 边缘AI部署中，聚合准确率具有误导性；验证必须在目标模型尺寸上进行。小模型与大模型在错误分布、容量分配策略和校准性上存在根本差异，缩放定律在小模型上的行为不能用大模型结论简单外推。

title: MoMaStage: Skill-State Graph Guided Planning and Closed-Loop Execution for Long-Horizon Indoor Mobile Manipulation
summary: Indoor mobile manipulation (MoMA) enables robots to translate natural language instructions into physical actions, yet long-horizon execution remains challenging due to cascading errors and limited generalization across diverse environments. Learning-based approaches often fail to maintain logical consistency over extended horizons, while methods relying on explicit scene representations impose rigid structural assumptions that reduce adaptability in dynamic settings. To address these limitations, we propose MoMaStage, a structured vision-language framework for long-horizon MoMA that eliminates the need for explicit scene mapping. MoMaStage grounds a Vision-Language Model (VLM) within a Hierarchical Skill Library and a topology-aware Skill-State Graph, constraining task decomposition and skill composition within a feasible transition space. This structured grounding ensures that generated plans remain logically consistent and topologically valid with respect to the agent's evolving physical state. To enhance robustness, MoMaStage incorporates a closed-loop execution mechanism that monitors proprioceptive feedback and triggers graph-constrained semantic replanning when deviations are detected, maintaining alignment between planned skills and physical outcomes. Extensive experiments in physics-rich simulations and real-world environments demonstrate that MoMaStage outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving substantially higher planning success, reducing token overhead, and significantly improving overall task success rates in long-horizon mobile manipulation. Video demonstrations are available on the project website: https://chenxuli-cxli.github.io/MoMaStage/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MoMaStage框架，一种无需显式场景映射的结构化视觉-语言方法，用于长时域室内移动操作任务。通过将视觉-语言模型与分层技能库和拓扑感知的技能状态图结合，实现了逻辑一致且拓扑有效的任务规划，并在闭环执行中通过语义重规划增强鲁棒性，显著提升了长时域任务的成功率。
AI.motivation: 室内移动机器人在执行长时域自然语言指令任务时面临级联错误和泛化能力不足的问题。现有基于学习的方法难以在长时域中保持逻辑一致性，而依赖显式场景表示的方法则因刚性结构假设导致在动态环境中适应性差。
AI.method: 提出MoMaStage框架，核心包含三个组件：(1) 将视觉-语言模型(VLM)约束在分层技能库和拓扑感知技能状态图中，确保任务分解和技能组合在可行转移空间内进行；(2) 通过结构化约束保证生成计划的逻辑一致性和拓扑有效性；(3) 引入闭环执行机制，监测本体感知反馈，在检测到偏差时触发图约束的语义重规划，保持规划技能与物理结果的一致性。该方法无需显式场景映射。
AI.result: 在物理仿真和真实环境中进行了大量实验，MoMaStage在规划成功率、token开销和整体任务成功率方面均显著优于现有最先进方法，在长时域移动操作任务中取得了更高的成功率和更低的计算开销。
AI.conclusion: MoMaStage通过结构化视觉-语言框架成功解决了长时域移动操作中的关键挑战，证明了在不依赖显式场景映射的情况下，通过拓扑约束和闭环执行机制可以有效提升长时域任务的规划成功率和执行鲁棒性，为室内移动机器人应用提供了新的解决方案。

title: Learning to Reflect: Hierarchical Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for CSI-Free mmWave Beam-Focusing
summary: Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces promise to transform wireless environments, yet practical deployment is hindered by the prohibitive overhead of Channel State Information (CSI) estimation and the dimensionality explosion inherent in centralized optimization. This paper proposes a Hierarchical Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (HMARL) framework for the control of mechanically reconfigurable reflective surfaces in millimeter-wave (mmWave) systems. We introduce a "CSI-free" paradigm that substitutes pilot-based channel estimation with readily available user localization data. To manage the massive combinatorial action space, the proposed architecture utilizes Multi-Agent Proximal Policy Optimization (MAPPO) under a Centralized Training with Decentralized Execution (CTDE) paradigm. The proposed architecture decomposes the control problem into two abstraction levels: a high-level controller for user-to-reflector allocation and decentralized low-level controllers for low-level focal point optimization. Comprehensive ray-tracing evaluations demonstrate that the framework achieves 2.81-7.94 dB RSSI improvements over centralized baselines, with the performance advantage widening as system complexity increases. Scalability analysis reveals that the system maintains sustained efficiency, exhibiting minimal per-user performance degradation and stable total power utilization even when user density doubles. Furthermore, robustness validation confirms the framework's viability across varying reflector aperture sizes (45-99 tiles) and demonstrates graceful performance degradation under localization errors up to 0.5 m. By eliminating CSI overhead while maintaining high-fidelity beam-focusing, this work establishes HMARL as a practical solution for intelligent mmWave environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分层多智能体强化学习（HMARL）框架，用于毫米波系统中机械可重构反射表面的控制。通过采用"无CSI"范式（用定位数据替代导频信道估计）和分层架构（高层用户-反射器分配+低层焦点优化），在大幅降低开销的同时实现了比集中式基线高2.81-7.94 dB的RSSI增益，并展现出优异的可扩展性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 可重构智能表面（RIS）虽然有望变革无线环境，但其实际部署面临两大核心障碍：信道状态信息（CSI）估计的开销过高，以及集中式优化固有的维度爆炸问题。这些挑战在毫米波系统中尤为突出，亟需一种既能避免CSI估计开销，又能处理大规模组合动作空间的实用化解决方案。
AI.method: 本文提出分层多智能体强化学习（HMARL）框架，核心方法包括：（1）"无CSI"范式：用易获取的用户定位数据替代基于导频的信道估计；（2）采用集中训练分布式执行（CTDE）范式下的多智能体近端策略优化（MAPPO）算法；（3）分层控制架构：高层控制器负责用户到反射器的分配，分布式低层控制器负责低层焦点优化。该架构有效分解了大规模组合动作空间问题。
AI.result: 全面的射线追踪评估表明：（1）RSSI性能比集中式基线提升2.81-7.94 dB，且系统复杂度越高优势越明显；（2）可扩展性分析显示，用户密度翻倍时仍保持持续效率，单用户性能衰减极小且总功耗稳定；（3）鲁棒性验证表明，在45-99个贴片的反射器孔径尺寸范围内均有效，且在定位误差达0.5米时性能仍能优雅降级。
AI.conclusion: 本研究成功证明了HMARL框架作为毫米波智能环境实用解决方案的可行性。通过消除CSI开销同时保持高保真波束聚焦能力，该框架为可重构智能表面的实际部署扫清了关键障碍，确立了分层强化学习在复杂无线环境优化中的重要地位。

title: StructBiHOI: Structured Articulation Modeling for Long--Horizon Bimanual Hand--Object Interaction Generation
summary: Recent progress in 3D hand--object interaction (HOI) generation has primarily focused on single--hand grasp synthesis, while bimanual manipulation remains significantly more challenging. Long--horizon planning instability, fine--grained joint articulation, and complex cross--hand coordination make coherent bimanual generation difficult, especially under multimodal conditions. Existing approaches often struggle to simultaneously ensure temporal consistency, physical plausibility, and semantic alignment over extended sequences. We propose StructBiHOI, a Structured articulation modeling framework for long-horizon Bimanual HOI generation. Our key insight is to structurally disentangle temporal joint planning from frame--level manipulation refinement. Specifically, a jointVAE models long-term joint evolution conditioned on object geometry and task semantics, while a maniVAE refines fine-grained hand poses at the single--frame level. To enable stable and efficient long--sequence generation, we incorporate a state--space--inspired diffusion denoiser based on Mamba, which models long--range dependencies with linear complexity. This hierarchical design facilitates coherent dual-hand coordination and articulated object interaction. Extensive experiments on bimanual manipulation and single-hand grasping benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves superior long--horizon stability, motion realism, and computational efficiency compared to strong baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出了StructBiHOI框架，通过结构化解耦长时间关节规划与帧级操作细化，解决了长序列双手-物体交互生成中的时序一致性、物理合理性和语义对齐难题。
AI.motivation: 现有的3D手-物体交互生成研究主要聚焦于单手抓取，而双手操作面临长时域规划不稳定、细粒度关节操作复杂、跨手协调困难等挑战，现有方法难以在长序列中同时保证时序一致性、物理合理性和语义对齐。
AI.method: 提出结构化框架：1) jointVAE建模基于物体几何和任务语义的长期关节演化；2) maniVAE在单帧级别细化精细手部姿态；3) 引入基于Mamba的状态空间扩散去噪器，以线性复杂度建模长程依赖关系，实现层次化的双手协调与关节物体交互。
AI.result: 在双手操作和单手抓取基准上的大量实验表明，该方法在长时域稳定性、运动真实感和计算效率方面均优于强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过结构化建模将时序关节规划与帧级操作细化解耦，结合Mamba扩散去噪器的长程依赖建模能力，实现了稳定、高效且逼真的长序列双手-物体交互生成。

title: ConfHit: Conformal Generative Design with Oracle Free Guarantees
summary: The success of deep generative models in scientific discovery requires not only the ability to generate novel candidates but also reliable guarantees that these candidates indeed satisfy desired properties. Recent conformal-prediction methods offer a path to such guarantees, but its application to generative modeling in drug discovery is limited by budget constraints, lack of oracle access, and distribution shift. To this end, we introduce ConfHit, a distribution-free framework that provides validity guarantees under these conditions. ConfHit formalizes two central questions: (i) Certification: whether a generated batch can be guaranteed to contain at least one hit with a user-specified confidence level, and (ii) Design: whether the generation can be refined to a compact set without weakening this guarantee. ConfHit leverages weighted exchangeability between historical and generated samples to eliminate the need for an experimental oracle, constructs multiple-sample density-ratio weighted conformal p-value to quantify statistical confidence in hits, and proposes a nested testing procedure to certify and refine candidate sets of multiple generated samples while maintaining statistical guarantees. Across representative generative molecule design tasks and a broad range of methods, ConfHit consistently delivers valid coverage guarantees at multiple confidence levels while maintaining compact certified sets, establishing a principled and reliable framework for generative modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ConfHit框架，针对药物发现中深度生成模型缺乏可靠性保证的问题，在预算约束、无oracle访问和分布偏移条件下，通过加权交换性和保形p值实现了对生成分子的有效性保证，支持候选集的认证与精炼。
AI.motivation: 深度生成模型在科学发现中需要保证生成的候选分子满足期望属性，但现有的保形预测方法在药物发现中受限于预算约束、缺乏oracle访问及分布偏移，难以提供可靠的统计保证。
AI.method: 提出ConfHit框架，利用历史样本与生成样本间的加权可交换性消除对实验oracle的依赖；构建多样本密度比加权保形p值来量化命中分子的统计置信度；设计嵌套检验程序以认证和精炼多个生成样本的候选集，同时保持统计保证。
AI.result: 在代表性生成分子设计任务和多种方法上，ConfHit在多个置信水平下均能提供有效的覆盖保证，同时保持紧凑的认证候选集，验证了其有效性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: ConfHit为生成模型提供了一个原理可靠、具有统计保证的框架，能够在实际约束条件下实现候选分子的认证与精炼，推动了生成模型在科学发现中的可靠应用。

title: Human-Aware Robot Behaviour in Self-Driving Labs
summary: Self-driving laboratories (SDLs) are rapidly transforming research in chemistry and materials science to accelerate new discoveries. Mobile robot chemists (MRCs) play a pivotal role by autonomously navigating the lab to transport samples, effectively connecting synthesis, analysis, and characterisation equipment. The instruments within an SDL are typically designed or retrofitted to be accessed by both human and robotic chemists, ensuring operational flexibility and integration between manual and automated workflows. In many scenarios, human and robotic chemists may need to use the same equipment simultaneously. Currently, MRCs rely on simple LiDAR-based obstruction detection, which forces the robot to passively wait if a human is present. This lack of situational awareness leads to unnecessary delays and inefficient coordination in time-critical automated workflows in human-robot shared labs. To address this, we present an initial study of an embodied, AI-driven perception method that facilitates proactive human-robot interaction in shared-access scenarios. Our method features a hierarchical human intention prediction model that allows the robot to distinguish between preparatory actions (waiting) and transient interactions (accessing the instrument). Our results demonstrate that the proposed approach enhances efficiency by enabling proactive human-robot interaction, streamlining coordination, and potentially increasing the efficiency of autonomous scientific labs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于具身AI感知的方法，通过分层人类意图预测模型使移动机器人能够区分人类的准备性动作和短暂交互，从而在共享实验室环境中实现主动式人机协作，提高自动化实验室的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有的自动驾驶实验室中，移动机器人仅依赖简单的LiDAR障碍检测，当检测到人类存在时只能被动等待，缺乏情境感知能力，导致时间敏感的自动化工作流中出现不必要的延迟和低效协调。
AI.method: 提出一种具身AI驱动的感知方法，包含分层人类意图预测模型，使机器人能够区分准备性动作（等待）和短暂交互（访问仪器），从而实现主动式人机交互。
AI.result: 该方法通过实现主动式人机交互、优化协调流程，证明了能够提升效率，并可能提高自主科学实验室的整体效率。
AI.conclusion: 本研究展示了具身AI感知在解决共享实验室人机协调问题上的潜力，为提高自动驾驶实验室的运行效率提供了新的技术路径。

title: Sparsity and Out-of-Distribution Generalization
summary:
Explaining out-of-distribution generalization has been a central problem in epistemology since Goodman's "grue" puzzle in 1946. Today it's a central problem in machine learning, including AI alignment.
  Here we propose a principled account of OOD generalization with three main ingredients. First, the world is always presented to experience not as an amorphous mass, but via distinguished features (for example, visual and auditory channels). Second, Occam's Razor favors hypotheses that are "sparse," meaning that they depend on as few features as possible. Third, sparse hypotheses will generalize from a training to a test distribution, provided the two distributions sufficiently overlap on their restrictions to the features that are either actually relevant or hypothesized to be. The two distributions could diverge arbitrarily on other features.
  We prove a simple theorem that formalizes the above intuitions, generalizing the classic sample complexity bound of Blumer et al. to an OOD context. We then generalize sparse classifiers to subspace juntas, where the ground truth classifier depends solely on a low-dimensional linear subspace of the features.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个关于分布外（OOD）泛化的原则性理论框架，结合特征稀疏性假设和Occam剃刀原理，证明了在训练分布和测试分布仅在相关特征上重叠时，稀疏假设能够实现OOD泛化，并推广到子空间junta分类器。
AI.motivation: 分布外泛化是认识论和机器学习领域的核心难题（如Goodman的"grue"悖论和AI对齐问题），现有理论缺乏对OOD泛化的原则性解释。
AI.method: 提出三要素框架：（1）世界通过可区分特征呈现；（2）Occam剃刀偏好依赖尽可能少特征的稀疏假设；（3）证明稀疏假设在训练和测试分布在相关特征上充分重叠时可实现OOD泛化。通过推广Blumer等人的经典样本复杂度界限到OOD场景，并将稀疏分类器扩展到子空间junta。
AI.result: 证明了形式化直觉的定理：当训练和测试分布在相关特征或假设相关的特征上充分重叠时，稀疏假设能够从训练分布泛化到测试分布，而在其他特征上两分布可任意偏离；推广了经典样本复杂度界限。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏性和特征重叠为OOD泛化提供了理论保证，子空间junta的扩展增强了理论的适用性，为理解机器学习中的OOD泛化现象提供了新的理论基础。

title: Tactile Recognition of Both Shapes and Materials with Automatic Feature Optimization-Enabled Meta Learning
comment: 7 pages, 7 figures, conference paper accepted by ICRA 2026
summary: Tactile perception is indispensable for robots to implement various manipulations dexterously, especially in contact-rich scenarios. However, alongside the development of deep learning techniques, it meanwhile suffers from training data scarcity and a time-consuming learning process in practical applications since the collection of a large amount of tactile data is costly and sometimes even impossible. Hence, we propose an automatic feature optimization-enabled prototypical network to realize meta-learning, i.e., AFOP-ML framework. As a ``learn to learn" network, it not only adapts to new unseen classes rapidly with few-shot, but also learns how to determine the optimal feature space automatically. Based on the four-channel signals acquired from a tactile finger, both shapes and materials are recognized. On a 36-category benchmark, it outperforms several existing approaches by attaining an accuracy of 96.08% in 5-way-1-shot scenario, where only 1 example is available for training. It still remains 88.7% in the extreme 36-way-1-shot case. The generalization ability is further validated through three groups of experiment involving unseen shapes, materials and force/speed perturbations. More insights are additionally provided by this work for the interpretation of recognition tasks and improved design of tactile sensors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个名为AFOP-ML的元学习框架，用于解决机器人触觉感知中的数据稀缺问题，在36类基准测试中实现了96.08%的5-way-1-shot准确率。
AI.motivation: 触觉感知对于机器人在接触丰富场景中的灵巧操作至关重要，但深度学习方法在实际应用中面临训练数据稀缺和学习过程耗时的问题，因为大量触觉数据的收集成本高昂甚至不可能。
AI.method: 提出了自动特征优化启发的原型网络（AFOP-ML）框架来实现元学习。该网络作为"学会学习"的网络，不仅能够通过少样本快速适应新的未知类别，还能自动确定最优特征空间。基于从触觉手指获取的四通道信号，实现对形状和材料的识别。
AI.result: 在36类基准测试中，5-way-1-shot场景下达到96.08%的准确率（仅1个训练样本），在极端的36-way-1-shot情况下仍保持88.7%的准确率。通过涉及未见形状、材料和力/速度扰动的三组实验进一步验证了泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: AFOP-ML框架有效解决了触觉感知中的数据稀缺问题，展现出优秀的少样本学习能力和泛化性能，为识别任务的解释和触觉传感器的改进设计提供了新见解。

title: Feed m Birds with One Scone: Accelerating Multi-task Gradient Balancing via Bi-level Optimization
summary: In machine learning, the goal of multi-task learning (MTL) is to optimize multiple objectives together. Recent works, for example, Multiple Gradient Descent Algorithm (MGDA) and its variants, show promising results with dynamically adjusted weights for different tasks to mitigate conflicts that may potentially degrade the performance on certain tasks. Despite the empirical success of MGDA-type methods, one major limitation of such methods is their computational inefficiency, as they require access to all task gradients. In this paper we introduce MARIGOLD, a unified algorithmic framework for efficiently solving MTL problems. Our method reveals that multi-task gradient balancing methods have a hierarchical structure, in which the model training and the gradient balancing are coupled during the whole optimization process and can be viewed as a bi-level optimization problem. Moreover, we showcase that the bi-level problem can be solved efficiently by leveraging zeroth-order method. Extensive experiments on both public datasets and industrial-scale datasets demonstrate the efficiency and superiority of our method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MARIGOLD框架，通过将多任务梯度平衡建模为双层优化问题，并利用零阶方法高效求解，显著降低了计算成本，在公开数据集和工业级数据集上均验证了其高效性和优越性。
AI.motivation: 多任务学习中，基于多梯度下降算法（MGDA）及其变体的方法虽然通过动态调整任务权重缓解了任务冲突，但由于需要访问所有任务梯度，存在计算效率低的问题，限制了其在大规模场景中的应用。
AI.method: 揭示了多任务梯度平衡方法具有层次结构，模型训练与梯度平衡耦合形成双层优化问题；引入MARIGOLD统一算法框架，利用零阶优化方法高效求解该双层问题，避免了对所有任务梯度的直接访问。
AI.result: 在公开数据集和工业级数据集上进行了广泛实验，结果表明MARIGOLD在计算效率方面显著优于MGDA类方法，同时在任务性能上保持了优越性。
AI.conclusion: MARIGOLD成功解决了MGDA类方法的计算瓶颈，为多任务学习提供了一个高效且性能优越的统一算法框架，具有良好的实际应用价值。

title: FoMo: A Multi-Season Dataset for Robot Navigation in Forêt Montmorency
summary: The Forêt Montmorency (FoMo) dataset is a comprehensive multi-season data collection, recorded over the span of one year in a boreal forest. Featuring a unique combination of on- and off-pavement environments with significant environmental changes, the dataset challenges established odometry and SLAM pipelines. Some highlights of the data include the accumulation of snow exceeding 1 m, significant vegetation growth in front of sensors, and operations at the traction limits of the platform. In total, the FoMo dataset includes over 64 km of six diverse trajectories, repeated during 12 deployments throughout the year. The dataset features data from one rotating and one hybrid solid-state lidar, a Frequency Modulated Continuous Wave (FMCW) radar, full-HD images from a stereo camera and a wide lens monocular camera, as well as data from two IMUs. Ground Truth is calculated by post-processing three GNSS receivers mounted on the Uncrewed Ground Vehicle (UGV) and a static GNSS base station. Additional metadata, such as one measurement per minute from an on-site weather station, camera calibration intrinsics, and vehicle power consumption, is available for all sequences. To highlight the relevance of the dataset, we performed a preliminary evaluation of the robustness of a lidar-inertial, radar-gyro, and a visual-inertial localization and mapping techniques to seasonal changes. We show that seasonal changes have serious effects on the re-localization capabilities of the state-of-the-art methods. The dataset and development kit are available at https://fomo.norlab.ulaval.ca.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了FoMo数据集，这是一个在北方森林中跨越一年四季收集的综合多季节数据集，包含64公里轨迹、多种传感器数据（激光雷达、雷达、相机、IMU），用于挑战现有里程计和SLAM算法，并展示了季节变化对最先进定位方法的严重影响。
AI.motivation: 现有里程计和SLAM算法在长期运行中面临严重的环境变化挑战（如积雪超过1米、植被生长、牵引力极限），缺乏能够充分测试算法季节适应性的多季节综合数据集，因此需要构建一个包含显著环境变化和多样场景的基准数据集来评估和推动算法发展。
AI.method: 在北方森林环境中使用无人地面车辆（UGV）进行为期一年的数据采集，共12次部署、64公里轨迹；配置旋转激光雷达、混合固态激光雷达、FMCW雷达、立体相机、单目相机和两个IMU；使用三个GNSS接收器和静态基站后处理获得真值；附加气象站、相机内参和能耗等元数据；对激光雷达-惯性、雷达-陀螺仪、视觉-惯性定位建图方法进行初步评估。
AI.result: 构建了包含六条多样化轨迹、多季节变化、多种传感器同步数据的综合数据集；积雪、植被生长等环境因素为传感器带来显著挑战；初步评估表明季节变化对最先进方法的重新定位能力产生严重影响，验证了数据集的挑战性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: FoMo数据集成功填补了多季节森林环境测试基准的空白，揭示了现有算法在季节变化下的局限性，为长期自主导航研究提供了重要测试平台，数据集和开发工具包已公开供研究使用。

title: Deterministic Fuzzy Triage for Legal Compliance Classification and Evidence Retrieval
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures. Published in the Proceedings of the AAAI Bridge between Artificial Intelligence and Law 2026 (Full papers), pages 51-58
summary: Legal teams increasingly use machine learning to triage large volumes of contractual evidence, but many models are opaque, non-deterministic, and difficult to align with frameworks such as HIPAA or NERC-CIP. We study a simple, reproducible alternative based on deterministic dual encoders and transparent fuzzy triage bands. We train a RoBERTa-base dual encoder with a 512-dimensional projection and cosine similarity on the ACORD benchmark for graded clause retrieval, then fine-tune it on a CUAD-derived binary compliance dataset. Across five random seeds (40-44) on a single NVIDIA A100 GPU, the model achieves ACORD-style retrieval performance of NDCG@5 0.38-0.42, NDCG@10 0.45-0.50, and 4-star Precision@5 about 0.37 on the test split. On CUAD-derived binary labels, it achieves AUC 0.98-0.99 and F1 0.22-0.30 depending on positive-class weighting, outperforming majority and random baselines in a highly imbalanced setting with a positive rate of about 0.6%. We then map scalar compliance scores into three regions: auto-noncompliant, auto-compliant, and human-review. Thresholds are tuned on validation data to maximize automatic decision coverage subject to an empirical error-rate constraint of at most 2% over auto-decided examples. The result is a seed-stable system summarized by a small number of scalar parameters. We argue that deterministic encoders, calibrated fuzzy bands, and explicit error constraints provide a practical middle ground between hand-crafted rules and opaque large language models, supporting explainable evidence triage, reproducible audit trails, and concrete mappings to legal review concepts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于确定性双编码器和模糊分层的合同合规性分类方法，在ACORD和CUAD数据集上取得良好性能，通过可解释的三层决策区域（自动合规、自动不合规、人工审核）在保证低错误率（≤2%）的前提下实现了高度自动化，为法律团队提供了一种介于人工规则和黑箱大模型之间的可解释、可复现的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 法律团队越来越多地使用机器学习模型对大量合同证据进行分类，但现有模型存在不透明、非确定性问题，难以与HIPAA或NERC-CIP等合规框架对齐，缺乏可解释性和可审计性。
AI.method: 训练基于RoBERTa-base的双编码器（512维投影+余弦相似度），先在ACORD基准上进行分级条款检索训练，后在CUAD衍生的二分类合规数据集上微调；将标量合规分数映射到三个决策区域（自动不合规、自动合规、人工审核），阈值在验证集上调整以最大化自动决策覆盖率，同时满足自动决策样本错误率≤2%的约束。
AI.result: 在ACORD测试集上：NDCG@5为0.38-0.42，NDCG@10为0.45-0.50，4星Precision@5约0.37；在CUAD二分类任务（正类率约0.6%的高不平衡设置）上：AUC为0.98-0.99，F1为0.22-0.30，优于多数类和随机基线；系统在五个随机种子下表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: 确定性编码器、校准的模糊分层和显式错误约束为手工规则和黑箱大模型提供了实用的中间路径，支持可解释的证据分类、可复现的审计追踪，并能与法律审查概念建立具体映射。

title: Adaptive Entropy-Driven Sensor Selection in a Camera-LiDAR Particle Filter for Single-Vessel Tracking
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, submitted to FUSION 2026 conference proceedings
summary: Robust single-vessel tracking from fixed coastal platforms is hindered by modality-specific degradations: cameras suffer from illumination and visual clutter, while LiDAR performance drops with range and intermittent returns. We present a heterogeneous multi-sensor fusion particle-filter tracker that incorporates an information-gain (entropy-reduction) adaptive sensing policy to select the most informative configuration at each fusion time bin. The approach is validated in a real maritime deployment at the CMMI Smart Marina Testbed (Ayia Napa Marina, Cyprus), using a shore-mounted 3D LiDAR and an elevated fixed camera to track a rigid inflatable boat with onboard GNSS ground truth. We compare LiDAR-only, camera-only, all-sensors, and adaptive configurations. Results show LiDAR dominates near-field accuracy, the camera sustains longer-range coverage when LiDAR becomes unavailable, and the adaptive policy achieves a favorable accuracy-continuity trade-off by switching modalities based on information gain. By avoiding continuous multi-stream processing, the adaptive configuration provides a practical baseline for resilient and resource-aware maritime surveillance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于信息增益自适应感知策略的异构多传感器融合粒子滤波跟踪器，用于解决海岸固定平台单船只跟踪中的模态退化问题，并通过真实海洋环境测试验证了该方法在精度与连续性之间的平衡优势。
AI.motivation: 在海岸固定平台进行单船只跟踪时，单一传感器模态存在固有限制：相机易受光照条件和视觉杂波影响，而LiDAR性能随距离增加和间歇性回波而下降。现有方法难以在这些模态特定退化条件下保持稳健的跟踪性能。
AI.method: 提出异构多传感器融合粒子滤波跟踪器，结合信息增益（熵减）自适应感知策略，在每个融合时间步选择最具信息量的传感器配置。该方法避免了持续多流处理，通过基于信息增益的模态切换实现资源感知的海上监视。
AI.result: 在塞浦路斯阿亚纳帕码头的CMMI智能码头测试场进行真实海洋部署验证，使用岸基3D LiDAR和固定高位相机跟踪刚性充气艇（搭载GNSS真值）。对比LiDAR单模态、相机单模态、全传感器和自适应配置，结果表明：LiDAR在近场精度占优，相机在LiDAR不可用时维持更远距离覆盖，自适应策略通过基于信息增益的模态切换实现了精度与连续性的平衡权衡。
AI.conclusion: 自适应配置通过避免持续多流处理，为弹性和资源感知的海上监视提供了实用基线方案，有效解决了单一模态的局限性，实现了精度与跟踪连续性的最优平衡。

title: Generalizing Linear Autoencoder Recommenders with Decoupled Expected Quadratic Loss
summary: Linear autoencoders (LAEs) have gained increasing popularity in recommender systems due to their simplicity and strong empirical performance. Most LAE models, including the Emphasized Denoising Linear Autoencoder (EDLAE) introduced by (Steck, 2020), use quadratic loss during training. However, the original EDLAE only provides closed-form solutions for the hyperparameter choice $b = 0$, which limits its capacity. In this work, we generalize EDLAE objective into a Decoupled Expected Quadratic Loss (DEQL). We show that DEQL simplifies the process of deriving EDLAE solutions and reveals solutions in a broader hyperparameter range $b > 0$, which were not derived in Steck's original paper. Additionally, we propose an efficient algorithm based on Miller's matrix inverse theorem to ensure the computational tractability for the $b > 0$ case. Empirical results on benchmark datasets show that the $b > 0$ solutions provided by DEQL outperform the $b = 0$ EDLAE baseline, demonstrating that DEQL expands the solution space and enables the discovery of models with better testing performance.

AI.tldr: 本文将线性自编码器模型EDLAE推广为解耦期望二次损失(DEQL)，首次推导出超参数b>0时的闭式解，并通过实验证明新解优于原始基线模型。
AI.motivation: 推荐系统中广泛使用的线性自编码器模型EDLAE仅提供了超参数b=0时的闭式解，限制了模型的表达能力和性能潜力，需要扩展其解空间。
AI.method: 将EDLAE目标函数推广为解耦期望二次损失(DEQL)框架，推导出b>0范围内的闭式解；基于Miller矩阵逆定理提出高效算法，确保b>0情况的计算可行性。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的实验表明，DEQL提供的b>0解在测试性能上优于原始EDLAE的b=0基线，证明了DEQL成功扩展了解空间并发现了更优模型。
AI.conclusion: DEQL不仅简化了EDLAE解的推导过程，还揭示了更广泛超参数范围内的解，为推荐系统中的线性自编码器提供了性能更优的模型选择。

title: R2F: Repurposing Ray Frontiers for LLM-free Object Navigation
summary: Zero-shot open-vocabulary object navigation has progressed rapidly with the emergence of large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) and Large Language Models (LLMs), now widely used as high-level decision-makers instead of end-to-end policies. Although effective, such systems often rely on iterative large-model queries at inference time, introducing latency and computational overhead that limit real-time deployment. To address this problem, we repurpose ray frontiers (R2F), a recently proposed frontier-based exploration paradigm, to develop an LLM-free framework for indoor open-vocabulary object navigation. While ray frontiers were originally used to bias exploration using semantic cues carried along rays, we reinterpret frontier regions as explicit, direction-conditioned semantic hypotheses that serve as navigation goals. Language-aligned features accumulated along out-of-range rays are stored sparsely at frontiers, where each region maintains multiple directional embeddings encoding plausible unseen content. In this way, navigation then reduces to embedding-based frontier scoring and goal tracking within a classical mapping and planning pipeline, eliminating iterative large-model reasoning. We further introduce R2F-VLN, a lightweight extension for free-form language instructions using syntactic parsing and relational verification without additional VLM or LLM components. Experiments in Habitat-sim and on a real robotic platform demonstrate competitive state-of-the-art zero-shot performance with real-time execution, achieving up to 6 times faster runtime than VLM-based alternatives.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个无需LLM的零样本开放词汇物体导航框架，通过重新利用射线前沿（R2F）方法，将前沿区域视为方向条件的语义假设，实现了与传统VLM方法相当的性能，但运行速度提升了6倍。
AI.motivation: 现有的零样本开放词汇物体导航方法严重依赖VLM和LLM作为高层决策器，在推理时需要迭代查询大模型，导致延迟高和计算开销大，限制了实时部署能力。
AI.method: 将射线前沿（R2F）方法重新用于导航：把前沿区域重新解释为显式的、方向条件的语义假设作为导航目标；在超范围射线上积累的语言对齐特征稀疏存储在前沿区域，每个区域维护多个方向嵌入来编码合理的未见内容；导航简化为基于嵌入的前沿评分和目标跟踪。同时提出R2F-VLN扩展，通过句法解析和关系验证处理自由形式语言指令，无需额外VLM/LLM组件。
AI.result: 在Habitat-sim仿真环境和真实机器人平台上的实验表明，该方法达到了竞争性的最先进零样本性能，同时实现了实时执行，运行速度比基于VLM的替代方案快6倍。
AI.conclusion: 通过重新解释射线前沿并将其整合到经典建图和规划流程中，可以消除迭代大模型推理的需求，实现高效的实时开放词汇物体导航，为实际机器人应用提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Context Channel Capacity: An Information-Theoretic Framework for Understanding Catastrophic Forgetting
summary:
Catastrophic forgetting remains a central challenge in continual learning (CL), yet lacks a unified information-theoretic explanation for why some architectures forget catastrophically while others do not. We introduce \emph{Context Channel Capacity} ($C_\mathrm{ctx}$), the mutual information between a CL architecture's context signal and its generated parameters, and prove that zero forgetting requires $C_\mathrm{ctx} \geq H(T)$, where $H(T)$ is the task identity entropy. We establish an \emph{Impossibility Triangle} -- zero forgetting, online learning, and finite parameters cannot be simultaneously satisfied by sequential state-based learners -- and show that conditional regeneration architectures (HyperNetworks) bypass this triangle by redefining parameters as function values rather than states.
  We validate this framework across 8 CL methods on Split-MNIST (1,130+ experiments over 86 days, 4 seeds each), showing that $C_\mathrm{ctx}$ perfectly predicts forgetting behavior: methods with $C_\mathrm{ctx} = 0$ (NaiveSGD, EWC, SI, LwF, CFlow) exhibit catastrophic forgetting (6--97\%), while methods with $C_\mathrm{ctx} \approx 1$ (HyperNetwork) achieve zero forgetting (98.8\% ACC). We further propose \emph{Wrong-Context Probing} (P5), a practical diagnostic protocol for measuring $C_\mathrm{ctx}$, and extend the framework to CIFAR-10 via a novel \emph{Gradient Context Encoder} that closes the oracle gap from 23.3pp to 0.7pp. A systematic taxonomy of 15+ closed research directions -- including the Hebbian null result (frozen random features outperform learned features), CFlow's $θ_0$-memorizer phenomenon, and the $S_N$ symmetry barrier to column specialization -- provides the community with precisely diagnosed negative results. Our central design principle: \emph{architecture over algorithm} -- the context pathway must be structurally unbypassable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了“上下文通道容量”（$C_{ctx}$）这一信息论指标，证明了其与灾难性遗忘的关系，建立了“不可能三角”理论，并通过大量实验验证了架构设计优于算法设计的核心原则。
AI.motivation: 持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题缺乏统一的信息论解释，尚不清楚为何某些架构会发生灾难性遗忘而其他架构不会。
AI.method: 引入上下文通道容量（$C_{ctx}$）概念，定义为架构上下文信号与生成参数之间的互信息，推导零遗忘的理论条件（$C_{ctx} \geq H(T)$）；建立零遗忘、在线学习和有限参数不可同时满足的“不可能三角”理论；提出错误上下文探测（P5）协议测量$C_{ctx}$，设计梯度上下文编码器；在Split-MNIST上进行了1130+组实验验证。
AI.result: 实验证明$C_{ctx}$能完美预测遗忘行为：$C_{ctx}=0$的方法（NaiveSGD、EWC、SI、LwF、CFlow）出现6-97%的灾难性遗忘；$C_{ctx} \approx 1$的HyperNetwork实现零遗忘（98.8%准确率）。条件再生架构（如HyperNetwork）通过将参数重新定义为函数值而非状态，成功绕过不可能三角。CIFAR-10上将oracle差距从23.3pp降至0.7pp。
AI.conclusion: 架构设计优于算法设计是核心原则——上下文路径必须在结构上不可绕过。研究系统归类了15+个已关闭的研究方向，包括Hebbian零结果（冻结随机特征优于学习特征）等，为社区提供了明确诊断的负面结果。

title: LAR-MoE: Latent-Aligned Routing for Mixture of Experts in Robotic Imitation Learning
summary: Imitation learning enables robots to acquire manipulation skills from demonstrations, yet deploying a policy across tasks with heterogeneous dynamics remains challenging, as models tend to average over distinct behavioral modes present in the demonstrations. Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures address this by activating specialized subnetworks, but requires meaningful skill decompositions for expert routing. We introduce Latent-Aligned Routing for Mixture of Experts (LAR-MoE), a two-stage framework that decouples unsupervised skill discovery from policy learning. In pre-training, we learn a joint latent representation between observations and future actions through student-teacher co-training. In a post-training stage, the expert routing is regularized to follow the structure of the learned latent space, preventing expert collapse while maintaining parameter efficiency. We evaluate LAR-MoE in simulation and on hardware. On the LIBERO benchmark, our method achieves a 95.2% average success rate with 150M parameters. On a surgical bowel grasping and retraction task, LAR-MoE matches a supervised MoE baseline without requiring any phase annotations, and transfers zero-shot to ex vivo porcine tissue. Our findings suggest that latent-aligned routing provides a principled alternative to supervised skill decomposition, enabling structured expert specialization from unlabeled demonstrations.

AI.tldr: 提出了LAR-MoE框架，通过两阶段学习实现无监督技能分解，解决了模仿学习中异构动态任务部署的难题，在LIBERO基准和手术机器人任务上均取得优异性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的模仿学习方法在具有异构动态的任务间部署策略时面临挑战，因为模型倾向于对演示中不同的行为模式进行平均化。虽然混合专家(MoE)架构可以通过激活专门的子网络解决此问题，但需要有意义的技能分解来实现专家路由。
AI.method: 提出潜在对齐路由混合专家(LAR-MoE)两阶段框架：预训练阶段通过学生-教师协同训练学习观测与未来动作的联合潜在表示；后训练阶段对专家路由进行正则化以遵循学习到的潜在空间结构，在防止专家坍塌的同时保持参数效率。
AI.result: 在LIBERO基准上，150M参数模型达到95.2%平均成功率；在手术肠管抓取和牵引任务中，LAR-MoE在无需任何阶段标注的情况下匹配了有监督MoE基线，并实现零样本迁移至离体猪组织。
AI.conclusion: 潜在对齐路由为有监督技能分解提供了有原则的替代方案，能够从未标注的演示中实现结构化的专家专业化，为模仿学习中的技能分解问题提供了新的解决思路。

title: DualSpec: Accelerating Deep Research Agents via Dual-Process Action Speculation
summary: Large language model-based deep research agents have been increasingly popular for addressing long-horizon information-seeking tasks, but they often incur high end-to-end latency due to extensive reasoning and frequent tool use. Speculation frameworks aim to reduce latency by overlapping action execution with reasoning; however, existing approaches typically rely on uniform speculation strategies and strict action matching, which limits inference speedups and robustness. In this work, we revisit the speculate-verify paradigm for deep research agents through the lens of action heterogeneity. We show that \textit{Search} and \textit{Visit} actions exhibit fundamentally different reasoning and model capacity requirements: entropy-based analysis reveals that Search decisions have higher uncertainty and benefit significantly from explicit reasoning, whereas Visit decisions have lower entropy and depend primarily on model capacity. Motivated by this dual-process characteristic, we propose DualSpec, a heterogeneous speculation framework equipped with a lightweight, confidence-based semantic verifier. Experiments across multiple models and benchmarks demonstrate that DualSpec achieves up to 3.28$\times$ end-to-end speedup while maintaining accuracy comparable to fully reasoning agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DualSpec框架，针对深度研究代理中不同类型动作的异质性，设计差异化推测策略，在保持准确性的同时实现最高3.28倍的端到端加速。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的深度研究代理在处理长视野信息检索任务时，由于大量推理和频繁工具使用导致端到端延迟高。现有推测框架采用统一策略且依赖严格的动作匹配，限制了推理加速和鲁棒性。作者通过熵分析发现Search和Visit动作具有本质差异：Search决策不确定性高且受益于显式推理，而Visit决策熵较低且主要依赖模型容量，这种双过程特征为设计差异化推测策略提供了依据。
AI.method: 提出DualSpec异构推测框架：针对Search和Visit两类动作的不同特性设计差异化推测策略，并配备轻量级的基于置信度的语义验证器。该框架利用动作异质性，对不确定性高的Search动作采用显式推理增强，对低熵的Visit动作利用模型容量进行快速决策，从而实现更高效的推测-验证流程。
AI.result: 在多个模型和基准测试上的实验表明，DualSpec实现了最高3.28倍的端到端加速，同时保持了与完全推理代理相当的准确性，验证了异构推测策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用深度研究代理中动作的异质性特性，DualSpec框架成功突破了现有统一推测策略的局限，为降低大语言模型代理的推理延迟提供了新的解决思路，证明了针对不同动作类型设计差异化策略的必要性。

title: STRIDE: Structured Lagrangian and Stochastic Residual Dynamics via Flow Matching
summary: Robotic systems operating in unstructured environments must operate under significant uncertainty arising from intermittent contacts, frictional variability, and unmodeled compliance. While recent model-free approaches have demonstrated impressive performance, many deployment settings still require predictive models that support planning, constraint handling, and online adaptation. Analytical rigid-body models provide strong physical structure but often fail to capture complex interaction effects, whereas purely data-driven models may violate physical consistency, exhibit data bias, and accumulate long-horizon drift. In this work, we propose STRIDE, a dynamics learning framework that explicitly separates conservative rigid-body mechanics from uncertain, effectively stochastic non-conservative interaction effects. The structured component is modeled using a Lagrangian Neural Network (LNN) to preserve energy-consistent inertial dynamics, while residual interaction forces are represented using Conditional Flow Matching (CFM) to capture multi-modal interaction phenomena. The two components are trained jointly end-to-end, enabling the model to retain physical structure while representing complex stochastic behavior. We evaluate STRIDE on systems of increasing complexity, including a pendulum, the Unitree Go1 quadruped, and the Unitree G1 humanoid. Results show 20% reduction in long-horizon prediction error and 30% reduction in contact force prediction error compared to deterministic residual baselines, supporting more reliable model-based control in uncertain robotic environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了STRIDE框架，通过结合拉格朗日神经网络（LNN）和条件流匹配（CFM），将保守刚体力学与不确定的非保守交互效应分离建模，在机器人动力学预测任务中显著降低了长时程预测误差和接触力预测误差。
AI.motivation: 在非结构化环境中运行的机器人系统面临接触间歇性、摩擦变化和未建模柔顺性等显著不确定性。纯刚体分析模型难以捕获复杂交互效应，而纯数据驱动模型可能违反物理一致性、存在数据偏差并累积长时程漂移。现有方法难以在保持物理结构的同时有效建模复杂的随机行为。
AI.method: 提出STRIDE动力学学习框架，显式分离保守刚体力学与不确定的非保守交互效应。保守结构分量使用拉格朗日神经网络（LNN）建模以保持能量一致的惯性动力学，残余交互力使用条件流匹配（CFM）表示以捕获多模态交互现象。两个组件端到端联合训练，使模型在保留物理结构的同时表示复杂的随机行为。
AI.result: 在摆锤、Unitree Go1四足机器人和Unitree G1人形机器人等递增复杂度的系统上评估STRIDE。相比确定性残差基线方法，长时程预测误差降低20%，接触力预测误差降低30%。
AI.conclusion: STRIDE框架成功结合了物理结构约束与数据驱动的随机建模能力，为不确定机器人环境中的模型预测控制提供了更可靠的支持，在保持物理一致性的同时有效捕获复杂交互现象。

title: OrthoFormer: Instrumental Variable Estimation in Transformer Hidden States via Neural Control Functions
summary: Transformer architectures excel at sequential modeling yet remain fundamentally limited by correlational learning - they capture spurious associations induced by latent confounders rather than invariant causal mechanisms. We identify this as an epistemological challenge: standard Transformers conflate static background factors (intrinsic identity, style, context) with dynamic causal flows (state evolution, mechanism), leading to catastrophic out-of-distribution failure. We propose OrthoFormer, a causally grounded architecture that embeds instrumental variable estimation directly into Transformer blocks via neural control functions. Our framework rests on four theoretical pillars: Structural Directionality (time-arrow enforcement), Representation Orthogonality (latent-noise separation), Causal Sparsity (Markov Blanket approximation), and End-to-End Consistency (gradient- detached stage separation). We prove that OrthoFormer achieves bias strictly less than OLS for any valid instrument lag, with residual bias decaying geometrically as O(\r{ho}k ). We characterize the bias-variance-exogeneity trilemma inherent in self-instrumenting and identify the neural forbidden regression - where removing gradient detachment improves prediction loss while destroying causal validity. Experiments confirm all theoretical predictions. OrthoFormer represents a paradigm shift from correlational to causal sequence modeling, with implications for robustness, interpretability, and reliable decision-making under distribution shift.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OrthoFormer，一种因果基础的Transformer架构，通过神经控制函数将工具变量估计直接嵌入Transformer模块，解决了标准Transformer混淆静态背景因子与动态因果流导致的分布外失败问题。
AI.motivation: 标准Transformer架构基于相关性学习，容易捕获潜在混杂因子引起的虚假关联而非不变的因果机制，将静态背景因素（内在身份、风格、上下文）与动态因果流（状态演化、机制）混淆，导致分布外泛化失败。
AI.method: 提出OrthoFormer架构，基于四大理论支柱：结构方向性（时间箭头强制）、表示正交性（潜在噪声分离）、因果稀疏性（马尔可夫毯近似）和端到端一致性（梯度分离的阶段划分），通过神经控制函数将工具变量估计直接嵌入Transformer模块。
AI.result: 理论证明OrthoFormer对于任何有效工具滞后，其偏差严格小于OLS，残差偏差以O(ρ^k)几何衰减；揭示了自工具化中的偏差-方差-外生性三难困境，识别了神经禁止回归现象（移除梯度分离虽改善预测损失但破坏因果有效性）；实验证实了所有理论预测。
AI.conclusion: OrthoFormer实现了从相关性到因果性序列建模的范式转变，在鲁棒性、可解释性和分布偏移下的可靠决策方面具有重要启示。

title: 3PoinTr: 3D Point Tracks for Robot Manipulation Pretraining from Casual Videos
summary: Data-efficient training of robust robot policies is the key to unlocking automation in a wide array of novel tasks. Current systems require large volumes of demonstrations to achieve robustness, which is impractical in many applications. Learning policies directly from human videos is a promising alternative that removes teleoperation costs, but it shifts the challenge toward overcoming the embodiment gap (differences in kinematics and strategies between robots and humans), often requiring restrictive and carefully choreographed human motions. We propose 3PoinTr, a method for pretraining robot policies from casual and unconstrained human videos, enabling learning from motions natural for humans. 3PoinTr uses a transformer architecture to predict 3D point tracks as an intermediate embodiment-agnostic representation. 3D point tracks encode goal specifications, scene geometry, and spatiotemporal relationships. We use a Perceiver IO architecture to extract a compact representation for sample-efficient behavior cloning, even when point tracks violate downstream embodiment-specific constraints. We conduct thorough evaluation on simulated and real-world tasks, and find that 3PoinTr achieves robust spatial generalization on diverse categories of manipulation tasks with only 20 action-labeled robot demonstrations. 3PoinTr outperforms the baselines, including behavior cloning methods, as well as prior methods for pretraining from human videos. We also provide evaluations of 3PoinTr's 3D point track predictions compared to an existing point track prediction baseline. We find that 3PoinTr produces more accurate and higher quality point tracks due to a lightweight yet expressive architecture built on a single transformer, in addition to a training formulation that preserves supervision of partially occluded points. Project page: https://adamhung60.github.io/3PoinTr/.

AI.tldr: 提出了3PoinTr方法，通过从非受限人类视频中预训练机器人策略，仅需20个机器人演示即可实现鲁棒的空间泛化，解决了传统方法需要大量演示和人类视频预训练中的具身鸿沟问题。
AI.motivation: 当前的机器人策略学习需要大量演示才能实现鲁棒性，这在许多应用中不切实际。直接从人类视频学习虽然可以避免遥操作成本，但面临具身鸿沟（机器人和人类在运动学和策略上的差异）的挑战，且现有方法通常需要受限且精心编排的人类动作。
AI.method: 提出3PoinTr方法，使用Transformer架构预测3D点轨迹作为中间的具身无关表示。3D点轨迹编码目标规范、场景几何和时空关系。采用Perceiver IO架构提取紧凑表示用于样本高效的行为克隆，即使在点轨迹违反下游具身特定约束时也能有效工作。该方法在轻量级单Transformer架构基础上，通过保持部分遮挡点的监督来提升点轨迹预测质量。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实世界任务上的全面评估表明，3PoinTr仅需20个带动作标签的机器人演示即可在多样化的操作任务类别上实现鲁棒的空间泛化。该方法优于行为克隆基线方法以及先前从人类视频预训练的方法。在3D点轨迹预测方面，3PoinTr相比现有基线产生更准确、更高质量的点轨迹。
AI.conclusion: 3PoinTr成功实现了从随意且非受限的人类视频中预训练机器人策略，通过3D点轨迹这一具身无关的中间表示，有效克服了具身鸿沟问题，显著降低了机器人策略学习对演示数据的需求，为自动化在更多新任务中的应用提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Data Agent: Learning to Select Data via End-to-End Dynamic Optimization
summary: Dynamic Data selection aims to accelerate training by prioritizing informative samples during online training. However, existing methods typically rely on task-specific handcrafted metrics or static/snapshot-based criteria to estimate sample importance, limiting scalability across learning paradigms and making it difficult to capture the evolving utility of data throughout training. To address this challenge, we propose Data Agent, an end-to-end dynamic data selection framework that formulates data selection as a training-aware sequential decision-making problem. The agent learns a sample-wise selection policy that co-evolves with model optimization, guided by a composite reward that integrates loss-based difficulty and confidence-based uncertainty signals. The reward signals capture complementary objectives of optimization impact and information gain, together with a tuning-free adaptive weighting mechanism that balances these signals over training. Extensive experiments across a wide range of datasets and architectures demonstrate that Data Agent consistently accelerates training while preserving or improving performance, e.g., reducing costs by over 50\% on ImageNet-1k and MMLU with lossless performance. Moreover, its dataset-agnostic formulation and modular reward make it plug-and-play across tasks and scenarios, e.g., robustness to noisy datasets, highlighting its potential in real-world scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出Data Agent框架，将动态数据选择建模为训练感知的序列决策问题，通过学习与模型优化协同演化的样本选择策略，在ImageNet-1k和MMLU上减少超过50%的训练成本且保持无损性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的动态数据选择方法通常依赖特定任务的手工设计指标或静态/快照标准来估计样本重要性，限制了跨学习范式的可扩展性，且难以捕捉数据在训练过程中不断变化的效用。
AI.method: 将数据选择建模为训练感知的序列决策问题，设计一个端到端的动态数据选择框架Data Agent。该智能体学习与模型优化协同演化的样本级选择策略，采用融合基于损失的任务难度和基于置信度的不确定性信号的复合奖励，并引入无需调参的自适应加权机制来平衡这些信号。
AI.result: 在广泛的基准数据集和架构上的实验表明，Data Agent能够持续加速训练并保持或提升性能：在ImageNet-1k和MMLU上减少超过50%的成本且性能无损。该框架具有数据集无关性和模块化奖励设计，可即插即用地应用于各种任务和场景（如对噪声数据集的鲁棒性）。
AI.conclusion: Data Agent通过将数据选择建模为序列决策问题并采用复合奖励机制，实现了高效、可扩展且通用的动态数据选择，在加速训练的同时保持性能，展现出在真实世界场景中的广泛应用潜力。

title: An Open-Source Robotics Research Platform for Autonomous Laparoscopic Surgery
summary: Autonomous robot-assisted surgery demands reliable, high-precision platforms that strictly adhere to the safety and kinematic constraints of minimally invasive procedures. Existing research platforms, primarily based on the da Vinci Research Kit, suffer from cable-driven mechanical limitations that degrade state-space consistency and hinder the downstream training of reliable autonomous policies. We present an open-source, robot-agnostic Remote Center of Motion (RCM) controller based on a closed-form analytical velocity solver that enforces the trocar constraint deterministically without iterative optimization. The controller operates in Cartesian space, enabling any industrial manipulator to function as a surgical robot. We provide implementations for the UR5e and Franka Emika Panda manipulators, and integrate stereoscopic 3D perception. We integrate the robot control into a full-stack ROS-based surgical robotics platform supporting teleoperation, demonstration recording, and deployment of learned policies via a decoupled server-client architecture. We validate the system on a bowel grasping and retraction task across phantom, ex vivo, and in vivo porcine laparoscopic procedures. RCM deviations remain sub-millimeter across all conditions, and trajectory smoothness metrics (SPARC, LDLJ) are comparable to expert demonstrations from the JIGSAWS benchmark recorded on the da Vinci system. These results demonstrate that the platform provides the precision and robustness required for teleoperation, data collection and autonomous policy deployment in realistic surgical scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个开源、机器人无关的远程运动中心（RCM）控制器，基于闭式解析速度求解器，能够使工业机械臂（如UR5e和Franka Emika Panda）作为手术机器人使用，同时集成了立体3D感知和完整的ROS手术机器人平台，在体模、离体和活体猪腹腔镜手术中验证了亚毫米级的RCM偏差控制精度。
AI.motivation: 现有的手术机器人研究平台（主要基于da Vinci研究套件）受限于缆线驱动的机械限制，导致状态空间一致性下降，阻碍了可靠自主策略的训练。自主机器人辅助手术需要可靠、高精度的平台，且必须严格遵循微创手术的安全性和运动学约束（特别是套管针约束）。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于闭式解析速度求解器的开源、机器人无关的远程运动中心（RCM）控制器，无需迭代优化即可确定性强制执行套管针约束。该控制器在笛卡尔空间运行，使任何工业机械臂都能作为手术机器人使用。实现了UR5e和Franka Emika Panda机械臂的版本，并集成了立体3D感知。将机器人控制集成到完整的基于ROS的手术机器人平台中，支持遥操作、演示记录和通过解耦的服务器-客户端架构部署学习策略。
AI.result: 在体模、离体和活体猪腹腔镜手术的肠道抓取和牵拉任务上验证了系统性能。所有条件下RCM偏差均保持在亚毫米级别，轨迹平滑度指标（SPARC、LDLJ）与da Vinci系统上记录的JIGSAWS基准专家演示相当。
AI.conclusion: 该平台为遥操作、数据收集和自主策略部署提供了现实手术场景所需的精度和鲁棒性，证明了工业机械臂结合闭式RCM控制器可以替代传统缆线驱动手术机器人平台，为自主手术研究和应用提供了可靠基础。

title: Cost-Driven Representation Learning for Linear Quadratic Gaussian Control: Part II
comment: 38 pages; preliminary version appeared in IEEE CDC 2023; this is the extended journal version, with an end-to-end guarantee added
summary: We study the problem of state representation learning for control from partial and potentially high-dimensional observations. We approach this problem via cost-driven state representation learning, in which we learn a dynamical model in a latent state space by predicting cumulative costs. In particular, we establish finite-sample guarantees on finding a near-optimal representation function and a near-optimal controller using the learned latent model for infinite-horizon time-invariant Linear Quadratic Gaussian (LQG) control. We study two approaches to cost-driven representation learning, which differ in whether the transition function of the latent state is learned explicitly or implicitly. The first approach has also been investigated in Part I of this work, for finite-horizon time-varying LQG control. The second approach closely resembles MuZero, a recent breakthrough in empirical reinforcement learning, in that it learns latent dynamics implicitly by predicting cumulative costs. A key technical contribution of this Part II is to prove persistency of excitation for a new stochastic process that arises from the analysis of quadratic regression in our approach, and may be of independent interest.

AI.tldr: 本文研究从部分观测中学习状态表示的问题，提出了基于代价驱动的状态表示学习方法，为无限时域时不变LQG控制提供了有限样本保证，并分析了显式和隐式学习潜动态的两种方法，后者类似于MuZero算法。
AI.motivation: 在控制问题中，agent通常只能获得部分且可能是高维的观测数据，如何从这些观测中学习有效的状态表示是一个关键挑战。传统方法可能无法在这种设置下提供理论保证，因此需要开发新的框架来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 提出基于代价驱动的状态表示学习框架，通过预测累积代价在潜状态空间中学习动态模型。研究了两种方法：(1)显式学习潜状态转移函数（已在Part I中研究）；(2)隐式学习潜动态（类似MuZero），通过预测累积代价间接学习。针对无限时域时不变LQG控制问题进行理论分析。
AI.result: 为寻找近优表示函数和近优控制器提供了有限样本保证。关键技术创新是证明了新随机过程的持续激励性质，该性质源于二次回归分析，可能具有独立研究价值。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为部分观测下的控制问题提供了理论保证，建立了显式和隐式潜动态学习方法的理论桥梁，特别是为MuZero类算法提供了理论基础，证明了代价驱动的状态表示学习在无限时域控制中的有效性。

title: Rethinking the semantic classification of indoor places by mobile robots
comment: Presented at the Workshop on Semantic Scene Understanding for Human Robot Interaction, in the ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction (HRI), Stockholm, Sweden, 2023
summary: A significant challenge in service robots is the semantic understanding of their surrounding areas. Traditional approaches addressed this problem by segmenting the floor plan into regions corresponding to full rooms that are assigned labels consistent with human perception, e.g. office or kitchen. However, different areas inside the same room can be used in different ways: Could the table and the chair in my kitchen become my office? What is the category of that area now? office or kitchen? To adapt to these circumstances we propose a new paradigm where we intentionally relax the resulting labeling of semantic classifiers by allowing confusions inside rooms. Our hypothesis is that those confusions can be beneficial to a service robot. We present a proof of concept in the task of searching for objects.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的服务机器人语义理解范式，通过放宽语义分类器的标注约束，允许房间内部存在分类混淆，并将这种混淆用于改进物体搜索任务。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将楼层平面图分割为与人类感知一致的完整房间区域（如办公室或厨房），但同一房间内的不同区域可能具有多种用途（例如厨房中的桌椅可能被用作办公区域），导致语义分类存在歧义。为了适应这种情况，作者提出允许房间内部存在分类混淆的新范式。
AI.method: 提出一种新方法，有意放宽语义分类器的标注约束，允许房间内部存在分类混淆，并假设这些混淆对服务机器人有益。通过物体搜索任务进行概念验证。
AI.result: 在物体搜索任务中展示了所提方法的概念验证，证明了允许房间内部语义混淆可以对服务机器人的任务执行产生积极影响。
AI.conclusion: 放宽语义分类器的标注约束并允许房间内部的分类混淆，可以为服务机器人提供更灵活的语义理解能力，在物体搜索等任务中展现出潜在优势。

title: Discrete Tokenization Unlocks Transformers for Calibrated Tabular Forecasting
summary: Gradient boosting still dominates Transformers on tabular benchmarks. Our tokenizer uses a deliberately simplistic discretized vocabulary so we can highlight how even basic tokenization unlocks the power of attention on tabular features, yet it already outperforms tuned gradient boosting when combined with Gaussian smoothing. Our solution discretizes environmental context while smoothing labels with adaptive Gaussians, yielding calibrated PDFs. On 600K entities (5M training examples) we outperform tuned XGBoost by 10.8% (35.94s vs 40.31s median MAE) and achieve KS=0.0045 with the adaptive-sigma checkpoint selected to minimize KS rather than median MAE. Ablations confirm architecture matters: losing sequential ordering costs about 2.0%, dropping the time-delta tokens costs about 1.8%, and a stratified calibration analysis reveals where miscalibration persists.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于离散化词汇表的简单表格数据分词器，结合高斯平滑技术，使Transformer在表格数据基准测试中超越了调优后的梯度提升方法（XGBoost）。在600K实体（5M训练样本）上，性能提升10.8%，并实现良好校准。
AI.motivation: 梯度提升方法在表格数据基准测试中仍占据主导地位。作者旨在探索如何通过基础的分词策略释放Transformer注意力机制在表格特征上的潜力，挑战梯度提升的统治地位。
AI.method: 采用刻意简化的离散化词汇表作为分词器，对环境上下文进行离散化处理，同时使用自适应高斯平滑标签以生成校准的概率密度函数（PDFs）。
AI.result: 在600K实体（5M训练样本）上，相比调优后的XGBoost，中位MAE降低10.8%（35.94s vs 40.31s）；使用自适应sigma检查点时，KS值达到0.0045。消融实验显示：移除序列顺序导致约2.0%的性能损失，移除时间增量token导致约1.8%的损失。
AI.conclusion: 即使采用基础的离散化分词策略，结合高斯平滑也能让Transformer在表格数据上超越调优后的梯度提升方法。架构设计至关重要，序列顺序和时间增量token对性能有显著贡献，分层校准分析揭示了模型仍存在误校准的区域。

title: AtomVLA: Scalable Post-Training for Robotic Manipulation via Predictive Latent World Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models demonstrate remarkable potential for generalizable robotic manipulation. The execution of complex multi-step behaviors in VLA models can be improved by robust instruction grounding, a critical component for effective control. However, current paradigms predominantly rely on coarse, high-level task instructions during supervised fine-tuning. This instruction grounding gap leaves models without explicit intermediate guidance, leading to severe compounding errors in long-horizon tasks. Therefore, bridging this instruction gap and providing scalable post-training for VLA models is urgent. To tackle this problem, we propose \method, the first subtask-aware VLA framework integrated with a scalable offline post-training pipeline. Our framework leverages a large language model to decompose high-level demonstrations into fine-grained atomic subtasks. This approach utilizes a pretrained predictive world model to score candidate action chunks against subtask goals in the latent space, mitigating error accumulation while significantly improving long-horizon robustness. Furthermore, this approach enables highly efficient Group Relative Policy Optimization without the prohibitive expenses associated with online rollouts on physical robots. Extensive simulations validate that our AtomVLA maintains strong robustness under perturbations. When evaluated against fundamental baseline models, it achieves an average success rate of 97.0\% on the LIBERO benchmark and 48.0\% on the LIBERO-PRO benchmark. Finally, experiments conducted in the real world using the Galaxea R1 Lite platform confirm its broad applicability across diverse tasks, especially long-horizon tasks. All datasets, checkpoints, and code will be released to the public domain following the acceptance of this work for future research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AtomVLA框架，首个子任务感知的视觉-语言-动作模型，通过LLM分解高层指令为细粒度原子子任务，并利用预测世界模型在潜在空间评分候选动作块，实现了可扩展的离线后训练，在LIBERO基准上达到97.0%成功率，显著提升了长时程任务的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 当前VLA模型在监督微调时主要依赖粗粒度的高层任务指令，缺乏显式的中间引导，导致在长时程任务中出现严重的误差累积。这种指令接地差距限制了模型执行复杂多步行为的能力，亟需一种能够弥合该差距并提供可扩展后训练的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出AtomVLA框架，包含两个核心组件：(1)利用大语言模型将高层演示分解为细粒度的原子子任务；(2)使用预训练的预测世界模型在潜在空间中根据子任务目标对候选动作块进行评分，从而缓解误差累积。该方法支持高效的群组相对策略优化(GRPO)，避免了物理机器人在线推演的高昂成本，实现了可扩展的离线后训练流程。
AI.result: 在LIBERO基准上达到平均97.0%的成功率，在更具挑战性的LIBERO-PRO基准上达到48.0%的成功率。仿真实验验证了该方法在扰动下保持强鲁棒性。在Galaxea R1 Lite平台上的真实世界实验进一步确认了其在多样化任务尤其是长时程任务中的广泛适用性。
AI.conclusion: AtomVLA作为首个子任务感知的VLA框架，成功弥合了指令接地差距，通过离线后训练管道显著提升了长时程任务的鲁棒性和性能。该方法在仿真和真实世界实验中均展现出优越表现，证明了其在复杂机器人操控任务中的实用价值。所有数据集、检查点和代码将公开发布以促进未来研究。

title: Contact-Guided 3D Genome Structure Generation of E. coli via Diffusion Transformers
comment: Accepted at the Gen2 Workshop at ICLR 2026
summary: In this study, we present a conditional diffusion-transformer framework for generating ensembles of three-dimensional Escherichia coli genome conformations guided by Hi-C contact maps. Instead of producing a single deterministic structure, we formulate genome reconstruction as a conditional generative modeling problem that samples heterogeneous conformations whose ensemble-averaged contacts are consistent with the input Hi-C data. A synthetic dataset is constructed using coarse-grained molecular dynamics simulations to generate chromatin ensembles and corresponding Hi-C maps under circular topology. Our models operate in a latent diffusion setting with a variational autoencoder that preserves per-bin alignment and supports replication-aware representations. Hi-C information is injected through a transformer-based encoder and cross-attention, enforcing a physically interpretable one-way constraint from Hi-C to structure. The model is trained using a flow-matching objective for stable optimization. On held-out ensembles, generated structures reproduce the input Hi-C distance-decay and structural correlation metrics while maintaining substantial conformational diversity, demonstrating the effectiveness of diffusion-based generative modeling for ensemble-level 3D genome reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个基于条件扩散-Transformer的框架，用于生成大肠杆菌基因组的三维构象系综，其系综平均接触图谱与输入Hi-C数据一致。
AI.motivation: 传统的基因组三维结构重建方法通常产生单一的确定性结构，无法反映染色质固有的动态性和结构异质性。为了解决这一问题，作者将基因组重建形式化为一个条件生成建模问题，旨在生成多样化的构象系综。
AI.method: 首先利用粗粒化分子动力学模拟构建合成数据集，生成染色质系综及对应的环状拓扑Hi-C图谱。模型采用潜在扩散设置，结合变分自编码器以保持逐箱对齐并支持复制感知表示。Hi-C信息通过基于Transformer的编码器和交叉注意力机制注入，实施从Hi-C到结构的物理可解释单向约束，并使用流匹配目标进行训练。
AI.result: 在留出测试集上，生成的结构能够重现输入Hi-C的距离衰减和结构相关性指标，同时保持了显著的构象多样性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了基于扩散的生成模型在系综级三维基因组重建中的有效性，为捕捉基因组结构的动态异质性提供了一种新方法。

title: CRED: Counterfactual Reasoning and Environment Design for Active Preference Learning
comment: IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2026
summary: As a robot's operational environment and tasks to perform within it grow in complexity, the explicit specification and balancing of optimization objectives to achieve a preferred behavior profile moves increasingly farther out of reach. These systems benefit strongly by being able to align their behavior to reflect human preferences and respond to corrections, but manually encoding this feedback is infeasible. Active preference learning (APL) learns human reward functions by presenting trajectories for ranking. However, existing methods sample from fixed trajectory sets or replay buffers that limit query diversity and often fail to identify informative comparisons. We propose CRED, a novel trajectory generation method for APL that improves reward inference by jointly optimizing environment design and trajectory selection to efficiently query and extract preferences from users. CRED "imagines" new scenarios through environment design and leverages counterfactual reasoning -- by sampling possible rewards from its current belief and asking "What if this were the true preference?" -- to generate trajectory pairs that expose differences between competing reward functions. Comprehensive experiments and a user study show that CRED significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in reward accuracy and sample efficiency and receives higher user ratings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CRED方法，通过联合优化环境设计和轨迹选择来生成更具信息量的轨迹对，用于主动偏好学习，显著提升了奖励函数推断的准确性和样本效率。
AI.motivation: 随着机器人操作环境和任务复杂度的增加，手动指定和平衡优化目标变得不可行。现有主动偏好学习方法从固定轨迹集或回放缓冲区采样，限制了查询多样性，往往无法识别有信息量的比较。系统需要能够对齐人类偏好并响应纠正，但手动编码反馈是不可行的。
AI.method: 提出CRED方法，通过联合优化环境设计和轨迹选择来高效查询并提取用户偏好。CRED通过环境设计"想象"新场景，并利用反事实推理——从当前信念中采样可能的奖励并询问"如果这是真实偏好会怎样？"——来生成轨迹对，揭示竞争奖励函数之间的差异。
AI.result: 综合实验和用户研究表明，CRED在奖励准确性和样本效率方面显著优于现有最先进方法，并获得更高的用户评分。
AI.conclusion: CRED通过环境设计和反事实推理的联合优化，有效解决了主动偏好学习中查询多样性不足和信息量低的问题，为复杂机器人系统的人类偏好对齐提供了更高效的解决方案。

title: Interpretable-by-Design Transformers via Architectural Stream Independence
summary: While transformers achieve strong performance, their internal decision-making processes remain opaque. We investigate whether architectural constraints can enforce interpretability by design through architectural stream independence: maintaining a token stream (carrying symbolic structure) and contextual semantics in separated streams that remain independently observable throughout processing, with integration delayed until output. We validate this principle through the Late Fusion Architecture (LFA), which demonstrates interpretable symbolic heads through all the final layers, while standard transformers show dissolution by the third of six layers; we quantify this effect by introducing the Token-Position Dependence Score (PDS), with $PDS_{max}$ = 0.276 and 0.058, respectively. Crucially, intervention experiments demonstrate functional modularity: suppressing LFA's recency heads causes minimal semantic damage (Cohen's d = -0.158) versus catastrophic entanglement in baselines (d = -0.672). LFA demonstrates that architectural constraints improve underlying learning mechanisms, averaging 42% stability versus 19% and 11% for baseline comparisons, with extremes from 50% on LFA's best pairs (6 of 12 heads position-invariant) down to 0% complete collapse in over-constrained cases. By preventing premature entanglement, architectural independence steers models toward semantic understanding over positional heuristics, establishing interpretability as an architectural design criterion enforceable through structural constraints rather than post-hoc analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过架构约束实现可解释性设计，引入Late Fusion Architecture (LFA)分离符号结构与上下文语义流，在输出前延迟融合。实验表明LFA在最后各层保持可解释的符号注意力头（PDS_max=0.276），而标准Transformer在6层中的第3层就已消解（PDS_max=0.058）；干预实验显示LFA的功能模块化特性，抑制recency heads时语义损伤极小（Cohen's d=-0.158），而基线模型则严重纠缠（d=-0.672）；LFA平均稳定性42%，远超基线的19%和11%。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer性能强大，其内部决策过程仍然不透明。传统Transformer在处理过程中过早地将位置信息与语义信息纠缠，导致无法独立观察各信息流的贡献，使得可解释性只能作为事后分析而非设计目标。
AI.method: 提出架构流独立原则，将token流（携带符号结构）与上下文语义流分离，在处理全过程中保持独立可观察，直至输出才进行整合。基于此原则实现Late Fusion Architecture (LFA)，并引入Token-Position Dependence Score (PDS)量化位置依赖程度。通过干预实验（抑制recency heads）验证功能模块化特性。
AI.result: LFA在最后各层保持可解释的符号注意力头（PDS_max=0.276），标准Transformer在6层中的第3层就已出现消解（PDS_max=0.058）。干预实验中，抑制LFA的recency heads仅造成微小语义损伤（Cohen's d=-0.158），而基线模型则出现灾难性纠缠（d=-0.672）。稳定性方面，LFA平均达42%，基线分别为19%和11%；最优情况下50%的注意力头位置不变，过度约束情况下则完全崩溃至0%。
AI.conclusion: 通过防止过早纠缠，架构独立性引导模型学习语义理解而非依赖位置启发式，证明了可解释性可以作为架构设计准则通过结构约束来实现，而非仅依赖事后分析。这为构建内在可解释的Transformer架构提供了新范式。

title: EquiBim: Learning Symmetry-Equivariant Policy for Bimanual Manipulation
summary: Robotic imitation learning has achieved impressive success in learning complex manipulation behaviors from demonstrations. However, many existing robot learning methods do not explicitly account for the physical symmetries of robotic systems, often resulting in asymmetric or inconsistent behaviors under symmetric observations. This limitation is particularly pronounced in dual-arm manipulation, where bilateral symmetry is inherent to both the robot morphology and the structure of many tasks. In this paper, we introduce EquiBim, a symmetry-equivariant policy learning framework for bimanual manipulation that enforces bilateral equivariance between observations and actions during training. Our approach formulates physical symmetry as a group action on both observation and action spaces, and imposes an equivariance constraint on policy predictions under symmetric transformations. The framework is model-agnostic and can be seamlessly integrated into a wide range of imitation learning pipelines with diverse observation modalities and action representations, including point cloud-based and image-based policies, as well as both end-effector-space and joint-space parameterizations. We evaluate EquiBim on RoboTwin, a dual-arm robotic platform with symmetric kinematics, and evaluate it across diverse observation and action configurations in simulation. We further validate the approach on a real-world dual-arm system. Across both simulation and physical experiments, our method consistently improves performance and robustness under distribution shifts. These results suggest that explicitly enforcing physical symmetry provides a simple yet effective inductive bias for bimanual robot learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了EquiBim，一个用于双臂机器人操作的对称等变策略学习框架，通过在训练过程中强制执行观测与动作之间的双侧等变性约束，显著提升了策略的性能与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有的机器人模仿学习方法未显式考虑物理对称性，导致在对称观测下产生不对称或不一致的行为，这一问题在具有双侧对称性的双臂操作任务中尤为突出。
AI.method: 提出EquiBim框架，将物理对称性形式化为观测空间与动作空间上的群作用，并在策略预测中施加对称变换下的等变性约束。该方法与模型无关，可无缝集成至多种模仿学习流程，支持点云与图像等多种观测模态，以及末端执行器空间与关节空间等多种动作表征。
AI.result: 在仿真环境（RoboTwin双臂平台）与真实双臂系统上的实验表明，该方法在多种观测与动作配置下均一致地提升了性能，并在分布偏移下表现出更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 显式强制物理对称性为双臂机器人学习提供了一种简单而有效的归纳偏置，能够显著提升策略的泛化能力与鲁棒性。

title: Enhanced Random Subspace Local Projections for High-Dimensional Time Series Analysis
summary: High-dimensional time series forecasting suffers from severe overfitting when the number of predictors exceeds available observations, making standard local projection methods unstable and unreliable. We propose an enhanced Random Subspace Local Projection (RSLP) framework designed to deliver robust impulse response estimation in the presence of hundreds of correlated predictors.
