AI.tldr: 本文从粒子滤波（如序贯蒙特卡洛SMC）的视角，为推理时样本聚合与剪枝方法提供了严格的理论分析框架，研究了在给定过程奖励评估次数下的采样精度极限。
AI.motivation: 尽管推理时方法（聚合与剪枝多样本）已成为引导大语言模型的有效范式，但目前缺乏对其精度-成本权衡关系的原理性理解。
AI.method: 采用粒子滤波算法（如序贯蒙特卡洛SMC）作为理论分析工具，结合基础语言模型和过程奖励模型，研究在给定过程奖励评估次数下从目标分布采样的精度问题。理论上提出了SMC的非渐近保证条件、算法改进方案，以及粒子滤波方法的基本限制。
AI.result: 实证研究表明，所提出的理论准则能有效控制SMC的采样误差，但不一定能保证最终准确性，这暗示需要超越采样视角的理论框架。
AI.conclusion: 粒子滤波方法为分析推理时方法提供了有价值的理论视角，但单纯从采样角度理解这些方法可能不足以完全解释其实际性能，需要发展更全面的理论框架。

title: Designing probabilistic AI monsoon forecasts to inform agricultural decision-making
summary: Hundreds of millions of farmers make high-stakes decisions under uncertainty about future weather. Forecasts can inform these decisions, but available choices and their risks and benefits vary between farmers. We introduce a decision-theory framework for designing useful forecasts in settings where the forecaster cannot prescribe optimal actions because farmers' circumstances are heterogeneous. We apply this framework to the case of seasonal onset of monsoon rains, a key date for planting decisions and agricultural investments in many tropical countries. We develop a system for tailoring forecasts to the requirements of this framework by blending systematically benchmarked artificial intelligence (AI) weather prediction models with a new "evolving farmer expectations" statistical model. This statistical model applies Bayesian inference to historical observations to predict time-varying probabilities of first-occurrence events throughout a season. The blended system yields more skillful Indian monsoon forecasts at longer lead times than its components or any multi-model average. In 2025, this system was deployed operationally in a government-led program that delivered subseasonal monsoon onset forecasts to 38 million Indian farmers, skillfully predicting that year's early-summer anomalous dry period. This decision-theory framework and blending system offer a pathway for developing climate adaptation tools for large vulnerable populations around the world.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种基于决策理论的预测框架，结合AI天气预测模型和贝叶斯统计模型，为印度3800万农民提供了更准确的季风 onset 预报，助力农业决策和气候适应。
AI.motivation: 数亿农民需要在不确定的未来天气条件下做出高风险决策，而现有预报无法针对个体农民的异质性情况提供最优行动建议。因此需要开发一种能够适应不同农民需求、提供实用信息的预报框架。
AI.method: 提出基于决策理论的预报设计框架，开发了一个混合预测系统：将经过系统基准测试的人工智能天气预测模型与新型"演化农民期望"统计模型相结合。该统计模型应用贝叶斯推理对历史观测数据进行处理，预测季节内首次发生事件的时间变化概率。
AI.result: 混合系统在更长预见期上生成的印度季风预报比其各组件或多模型平均更具技巧性。2025年，该系统在政府主导的项目中投入运营，向3800万印度农民提供次季节性季风 onset 预报，成功预测了当年初夏的异常干旱期。
AI.conclusion: 该决策理论框架和混合系统为全球大规模脆弱人群开气候适应工具提供了可行路径。

title: LeJOT-AutoML: LLM-Driven Feature Engineering for Job Execution Time Prediction in Databricks Cost Optimization
summary: Databricks job orchestration systems (e.g., LeJOT) reduce cloud costs by selecting low-priced compute configurations while meeting latency and dependency constraints. Accurate execution-time prediction under heterogeneous instance types and non-stationary runtime conditions is therefore critical. Existing pipelines rely on static, manually engineered features that under-capture runtime effects (e.g., partition pruning, data skew, and shuffle amplification), and predictive signals are scattered across logs, metadata, and job scripts-lengthening update cycles and increasing engineering overhead. We present LeJOT-AutoML, an agent-driven AutoML framework that embeds large language model agents throughout the ML lifecycle. LeJOT-AutoML combines retrieval-augmented generation over a domain knowledge base with a Model Context Protocol toolchain (log parsers, metadata queries, and a read-only SQL sandbox) to analyze job artifacts, synthesize and validate feature-extraction code via safety gates, and train/select predictors. This design materializes runtime-derived features that are difficult to obtain through static analysis alone. On enterprise Databricks workloads, LeJOT-AutoML generates over 200 features and reduces the feature-engineering and evaluation loop from weeks to 20-30 minutes, while maintaining competitive prediction accuracy. Integrated into the LeJOT pipeline, it enables automated continuous model updates and achieves 19.01% cost savings in our deployment setting through improved orchestration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LeJOT-AutoML，一个基于大语言模型（LLM）代理的AutoML框架，用于Databricks作业编排系统中的执行时间预测。该框架通过检索增强生成（RAG）和Model Context Protocol工具链，自动化特征工程流程，生成200多个运行时特征，将特征工程周期从数周缩短至20-30分钟，并实现了19.01%的成本节省。
AI.motivation: 现有的Databricks作业编排系统依赖静态、手工设计的特征来预测执行时间，无法充分捕捉运行时效应（如分区剪枝、数据倾斜和shuffle放大）。预测信号分散在日志、元数据和作业脚本中，导致更新周期长、工程开销大。需要一种自动化方法来提取难以通过静态分析获得的运行时特征，提高预测准确性并降低工程成本。
AI.method: LeJOT-AutoML是一个代理驱动的AutoML框架，将大语言模型代理嵌入整个机器学习生命周期。核心方法包括：（1）利用检索增强生成（RAG）技术访问领域知识库；（2）通过Model Context Protocol工具链（包括日志解析器、元数据查询和只读SQL沙箱）分析作业构件；（3）经由安全门控机制合成并验证特征提取代码；（4）自动训练和选择预测器。该设计能够提取难以通过静态分析获得的运行时派生特征。
AI.result: 在企业级Databricks工作负载上，LeJOT-AutoML成功生成了超过200个特征，将特征工程和评估循环从数周缩短至20-30分钟，同时保持竞争力的预测准确率。集成到LeJOT流水线后，实现了自动化持续模型更新，在部署环境中通过改进编排实现了19.01%的成本节省。
AI.conclusion: LeJOT-AutoML证明了将LLM代理集成到AutoML框架中可以有效解决作业执行时间预测中的特征工程瓶颈。该框架实现了特征工程的自动化，显著降低了工程开销，提升了预测质量，并最终转化为实际的云成本节省。这一成功案例为云资源编排和成本优化提供了新的技术路径。

title: Bayesian Transformer for Probabilistic Load Forecasting in Smart Grids
summary: The reliable operation of modern power grids requires probabilistic load forecasts with well-calibrated uncertainty estimates. However, existing deep learning models produce overconfident point predictions that fail catastrophically under extreme weather distributional shifts. This study proposes a Bayesian Transformer (BT) framework that integrates three complementary uncertainty mechanisms into a PatchTST backbone: Monte Carlo Dropout for epistemic parameter uncertainty, variational feed-forward layers with log-uniform weight priors, and stochastic attention with learnable Gaussian noise perturbations on pre-softmax logits, representing, to the best of our knowledge, the first application of Bayesian attention to probabilistic load forecasting. A seven-level multi-quantile pinball-loss prediction head and post-training isotonic regression calibration produce sharp, near-nominally covered prediction intervals. Evaluation of five grid datasets (PJM, ERCOT, ENTSO-E Germany, France, and Great Britain) augmented with NOAA covariates across 24, 48, and 168-hour horizons demonstrates state-of-the-art performance. On the primary benchmark (PJM, H=24h), BT achieves a CRPS of 0.0289, improving 7.4% over Deep Ensembles and 29.9% over the deterministic LSTM, with 90.4% PICP at the 90% nominal level and the narrowest prediction intervals (4,960 MW) among all probabilistic baselines. During heat-wave and cold snap events, BT maintained 89.6% and 90.1% PICP respectively, versus 64.7% and 67.2% for the deterministic LSTM, confirming that Bayesian epistemic uncertainty naturally widens intervals for out-of-distribution inputs. Calibration remained stable across all horizons (89.8-90.4% PICP), while ablation confirmed that each component contributed a distinct value. The calibrated outputs directly support risk-based reserve sizing, stochastic unit commitment, and demand response activation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出贝叶斯Transformer框架用于概率负荷预测，通过整合三种不确定性机制实现高质量预测区间，在极端天气下保持89.6%-90.1%覆盖率，CRPS相比Deep Ensembles提升7.4%。
AI.motivation: 现代电网可靠运行需要具有良好校准不确定性估计的概率负荷预测，但现有深度学习模型产生过度自信的点预测，在极端天气分布偏移下会发生灾难性失败。
AI.method: 在PatchTST骨干网络中整合三种互补不确定性机制：用于认知参数不确定性的蒙特卡洛Dropout、具有对数均匀权重先验的变分前馈层、以及可学习高斯噪声扰动的随机注意力机制（首次将贝叶斯注意力应用于概率负荷预测）；结合七级多分位数pinball损失预测头和训练后保序回归校准。
AI.result: 在五个电网数据集上达到最先进性能。主要基准（PJM，H=24h）上CRPS为0.0289，相比Deep Ensembles提升7.4%，相比确定性LSTM提升29.9%；90%名义水平下PICP达90.4%，预测区间宽度4,960 MW为所有概率基线中最窄。热浪和寒潮事件中PICP分别保持89.6%和90.1%，而确定性LSTM仅为64.7%和67.2%。
AI.conclusion: 贝叶斯认知不确定性自然地针对分布外输入拓宽预测区间，所有时间范围校准保持稳定（89.8-90.4% PICP），校准输出可直接支持基于风险的备用容量确定、随机机组组合和需求响应激活。

title: ELLMob: Event-Driven Human Mobility Generation with Self-Aligned LLM Framework
summary: Human mobility generation aims to synthesize plausible trajectory data, which is widely used in urban system research. While Large Language Model-based methods excel at generating routine trajectories, they struggle to capture deviated mobility during large-scale societal events. This limitation stems from two critical gaps: (1) the absence of event-annotated mobility datasets for design and evaluation, and (2) the inability of current frameworks to reconcile competitions between users' habitual patterns and event-imposed constraints when making trajectory decisions. This work addresses these gaps with a twofold contribution. First, we construct the first event-annotated mobility dataset covering three major events: Typhoon Hagibis, COVID-19, and the Tokyo 2021 Olympics. Second, we propose ELLMob, a self-aligned LLM framework that first extracts competing rationales between habitual patterns and event constraints, based on Fuzzy-Trace Theory, and then iteratively aligns them to generate trajectories that are both habitually grounded and event-responsive. Extensive experiments show that ELLMob wins state-of-the-art baselines across all events, demonstrating its effectiveness. Our codes and datasets are available at https://github.com/deepkashiwa20/ELLMob.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ELLMob框架，通过构建首个事件标注的移动数据集（涵盖台风、COVID-19和东京奥运会），并利用模糊痕迹理论协调习惯模式与事件约束之间的竞争关系，有效解决了大规模社会事件期间人类轨迹生成的难题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的移动生成方法在生成常规轨迹方面表现出色，但在大规模社会事件期间难以捕捉偏离常规的移动行为。这一局限源于两个关键缺口：（1）缺乏用于设计和评估的事件标注移动数据集；（2）现有框架无法协调用户习惯模式与事件施加约束之间的竞争关系。
AI.method: 本文提出了ELLMob框架，一个自对齐的大语言模型方法。该方法基于模糊痕迹理论（Fuzzy-Trace Theory），首先提取习惯模式与事件约束之间的竞争性理据，然后通过迭代对齐过程生成既有习惯基础又能响应事件的轨迹。研究还构建了首个事件标注移动数据集，涵盖台风Hagibis、COVID-19和东京2021奥运会三个重大事件。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，ELLMob在所有事件类型上均优于现有的最先进基线方法，证明了其在生成事件响应型轨迹方面的有效性。代码和数据集已开源提供。
AI.conclusion: ELLMob成功解决了大规模社会事件期间人类移动轨迹生成的挑战，通过协调习惯行为与事件约束的竞争关系，实现了更加合理和准确的轨迹生成。该工作为城市系统研究和应急响应规划提供了新的工具和数据基础。

title: Semantic Risk Scoring of Aggregated Metrics: An AI-Driven Approach for Healthcare Data Governance
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures, 1 Table, Accepted for publication in the 21st Int. Conference on Data Science (ICDATA 25)
summary: Large healthcare institutions typically operate multiple business intelligence (BI) teams segmented by domain, including clinical performance, fundraising, operations, and compliance. Due to HIPAA, FERPA, and IRB restrictions, these teams face challenges in sharing patient-level data needed for analytics. To mitigate this, A metric aggregation table is proposed, which is a precomputed, privacy-compliant summary. These abstractions enable decision-making without direct access to sensitive data. However, even aggregated metrics can inadvertently lead to privacy risks if constructed without rigorous safeguards. A modular AI framework is proposed that evaluates SQL-based metric definitions for potential overexposure using both semantic and syntactic features. Specifically, the system parses SQL queries into abstract syntax trees (ASTs), extracts sensitive patterns (e.g., fine-grained GROUP BY on ZIP code or gender), and encodes the logic using pretrained CodeBERT embeddings. These are fused with structural features and passed to an XGBoost classifier trained to assign risk scores. Queries that surpass the risk threshold (e.g., > 0.85) are flagged and returned with human-readable explanations. This enables proactive governance, preventing statistical disclosure before deployment. This implementation demonstrates strong potential for cross-departmental metric sharing in healthcare while maintaining compliance and auditability. The system also promotes role-based access control (RBAC), supports zero-trust data architectures, and aligns with national data modernization goals by ensuring that metric pipelines are explainable, privacy-preserving, and AI-auditable by design. Unlike prior works that rely on runtime data access to flag privacy violations, the proposed framework performs static, explainable detection at the query-level, enabling pre-execution protection and audit readiness

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于AI的模块化框架，通过静态分析SQL查询语句，在不访问实际数据的情况下主动检测医疗指标聚合表中的隐私泄露风险，实现合规且可审计的数据共享。
AI.motivation: 大型医疗机构按领域划分的多个BI团队受限于HIPAA、FERPA和IRB等法规，难以共享患者级数据。虽然使用预先计算的指标聚合表作为替代方案，但若构建不当，聚合指标仍可能导致隐私泄露风险，现有依赖运行时数据访问的检测方法无法提供前置保护。
AI.method: 提出模块化AI框架对SQL指标定义进行静态分析：解析SQL查询生成抽象语法树（AST），提取敏感模式（如细粒度的GROUP BY），利用预训练的CodeBERT嵌入对查询逻辑进行编码，融合结构特征后输入XGBoost分类器进行风险评分。超过阈值（如>0.85）的查询将被标记并附带人类可读的解释。
AI.result: 该框架实现了查询级别的静态、可解释风险检测，能够在执行前主动阻止统计性披露。系统展示出支持跨部门指标共享、符合角色访问控制（RBAC）和零信任数据架构的潜力，同时满足合规性和可审计性要求。
AI.conclusion: 该方法填补了传统运行时隐私检测的空白，通过前置的、可解释的静态检测实现了主动治理，使医疗指标数据管道在设计上具备可解释性、隐私保护性和AI可审计性，与国家数据现代化目标保持一致。

title: PSTNet: Physically-Structured Turbulence Network
summary: Reliable real-time estimation of atmospheric turbulence intensity remains an open challenge for aircraft operating across diverse altitude bands, particularly over oceanic, polar, and data-sparse regions that lack operational nowcasting infrastructure. Classical spectral models encode climatological averages rather than the instantaneous atmospheric state, and generic ML regressors offer adaptivity but provide no guarantee that predictions respect fundamental scaling laws. This paper introduces the Physically-Structured Turbulence Network (PSTNet), a lightweight architecture that embeds physics directly into its structure. PSTNet couples four components: (i) a zero-parameter backbone derived from Monin-Obukhov theory, (ii) a regime-gated mixture of specialist sub-networks supervised by Richardson-number-derived soft targets, (iii) Feature-wise Linear Modulation layers conditioning hidden representations on local air-density ratio, and (iv) a Kolmogorov output layer enforcing inertial-subrange scaling as an architectural constraint. The entire model contains only 552 learnable parameters, requiring fewer than 2.5 kB of storage and executing in under 12s on a Cortex-M7 microcontroller. We validate PSTNet on 340 paired six-degree-of-freedom guidance simulations spanning three vehicle classes (Mach 2.8, 4.5, and 8.0) and six operational categories with real-time satellite weather ingestion. PSTNet achieves a mean miss-distance improvement of +2.8% with a 78% win rate and a statistically significant effect size. Our results demonstrate that encoding domain physics as architectural priors yields a more efficient and interpretable path to turbulence estimation accuracy than scaling model capacity, establishing PSTNet as a viable drop-in replacement for legacy look-up tables in resource-constrained, safety-critical on-board guidance systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了PSTNet，一种将物理规律直接嵌入网络结构的轻量级大气湍流强度估计模型，仅含552个可学习参数，在资源受限的安全关键机载制导系统中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 大气湍流强度的可靠实时估计对跨高度层飞行的航空器至关重要，但海洋、极地和稀疏数据区域缺乏业务化临近预报基础设施。经典谱模型编码的是气候学平均态而非瞬时大气状态，而通用机器学习回归器虽具自适应性，但无法保证预测结果遵守基本物理标度律。
AI.method: 提出物理结构化湍流网络(PSTNet)，包含四个组件：(i)基于Monin-Obukhov理论的零参数骨干网络；(ii)由Richardson数派生软目标监督的机制门控专家子网络混合体；(iii)基于局部空气密度比调节隐藏表示的特征线性调制层；(iv)强制惯性子区标度的Kolmogorov输出层作为架构约束。整个模型仅含552个可学习参数，存储需求低于2.5 kB，在Cortex-M7微控制器上执行时间少于12秒。
AI.result: 在340组配对六自由度制导仿真中验证，涵盖三种飞行器类别（马赫数2.8、4.5、8.0）和六种运行场景，并接入实时卫星气象数据。PSTNet实现平均脱靶量改进+2.8%，胜率达78%，效应量具有统计显著性。
AI.conclusion: 将领域物理编码为架构先验比单纯增加模型容量能更高效、更可解释地提升湍流估计精度，使PSTNet成为资源受限、安全关键机载制导系统中传统查表法的可行替代方案。

title: \$OneMillion-Bench: How Far are Language Agents from Human Experts?
summary: As language models (LMs) evolve from chat assistants to long-horizon agents capable of multi-step reasoning and tool use, existing benchmarks remain largely confined to structured or exam-style tasks that fall short of real-world professional demands. To this end, we introduce \$OneMillion-Bench \$OneMillion-Bench, a benchmark of 400 expert-curated tasks spanning Law, Finance, Industry, Healthcare, and Natural Science, built to evaluate agents across economically consequential scenarios. Unlike prior work, the benchmark requires retrieving authoritative sources, resolving conflicting evidence, applying domain-specific rules, and making constraint decisions, where correctness depends as much on the reasoning process as the final answer. We adopt a rubric-based evaluation protocol scoring factual accuracy, logical coherence, practical feasibility, and professional compliance, focused on expert-level problems to ensure meaningful differentiation across agents. Together, \$OneMillion-Bench provides a unified testbed for assessing agentic reliability, professional depth, and practical readiness in domain-intensive scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出了OneMillion-Bench基准，包含400个专家策划的任务，覆盖法律、金融、工业、医疗和自然科学领域，旨在评估语言模型在真实专业场景中作为智能体的推理和决策能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的语言模型基准主要局限于结构化或考试式任务，无法充分评估模型作为长视距智能体在真实世界专业场景中的能力，特别是在需要多步推理和工具使用的复杂任务中。
AI.method: 构建了包含400个专家策划任务的基准，覆盖五个专业领域。任务要求检索权威来源、解决冲突证据、应用领域特定规则并做出约束决策。采用基于评分标准的评估协议，从事实准确性、逻辑连贯性、实践可行性和专业合规性四个维度进行评分。
AI.result: 创建了一个统一测试平台，能够评估智能体在领域密集型场景中的可靠性、专业深度和实践准备度，通过专家级问题确保对智能体能力的有效区分。
AI.conclusion: OneMillion-Bench填补了现有基准的空白，为评估语言模型作为专业智能体的真实能力提供了更具挑战性和实用价值的测试环境，推动智能体向实际应用发展。

title: MJ1: Multimodal Judgment via Grounded Verification
summary: Multimodal judges struggle to ground decisions in visual evidence. We present MJ1, a multimodal judge trained with reinforcement learning that enforces visual grounding through a structured grounded verification chain (observations $\rightarrow$ claims $\rightarrow$ verification $\rightarrow$ evaluation $\rightarrow$ scoring) and a counterfactual consistency reward that penalizes position bias. Even without training, our mechanism improves base-model accuracy on MMRB2 by +3.8 points on Image Editing and +1.7 on Multimodal Reasoning. After training, MJ1, with only 3B active parameters, achieves 77.0% accuracy on MMRB2 and surpasses orders-of-magnitude larger models like Gemini-3-Pro. These results show that grounded verification and consistency-based training substantially improve multimodal judgment without increasing model scale.

AI.tldr: 提出MJ1，一种通过强化学习训练的多模态评估模型，利用结构化验证链和反事实一致性奖励显著提升评估性能，3B参数即超越Gemini-3-Pro等大型模型。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视觉语言模型的评估器在决策时缺乏视觉证据支撑，难以实现可靠的视觉定位。
AI.method: 构建结构化验证链（观察→主张→验证→评估→评分），引入反事实一致性奖励机制惩罚位置偏差，使用强化学习训练MJ1模型。
AI.result: 在MMRB2基准上，训练前基座模型在图像编辑任务提升3.8分、多模态推理任务提升1.7分；训练后3B参数的MJ1达到77.0%准确率，超越Gemini-3-Pro等大模型。
AI.conclusion: 结构化视觉验证链与一致性奖励训练可在不增加模型规模的前提下显著提升多模态评估性能。

title: FedMomentum: Preserving LoRA Training Momentum in Federated Fine-Tuning
summary: Federated fine-tuning of large language models (LLMs) with low-rank adaptation (LoRA) offers a communication-efficient and privacy-preserving solution for task-specific adaptation. Naive aggregation of LoRA modules introduces noise due to mathematical incorrectness when averaging the downsampling and upsampling matrices independently. However, existing noise-free aggregation strategies inevitably compromise the structural expressiveness of LoRA, limiting its ability to retain client-specific adaptations by either improperly reconstructing the low-rank structure or excluding partially trainable components. We identify this problem as loss of training momentum, where LoRA updates fail to accumulate effectively across rounds, resulting in slower convergence and suboptimal performance. To address this, we propose FedMomentum, a novel framework that enables structured and momentum-preserving LoRA aggregation via singular value decomposition (SVD). Specifically, after aggregating low-rank updates in a mathematically correct manner, FedMomentum applies SVD to extract the dominant components that capture the main update directions. These components are used to reconstruct the LoRA modules with the same rank, while residual components can be retained and later merged into the backbone to preserve semantic information and ensure robustness. Extensive experiments across multiple tasks demonstrate that FedMomentum consistently outperforms prior state-of-the-art methods in convergence speed and final accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedMomentum框架，通过SVD分解实现结构化且保持动量的LoRA聚合，解决了联邦学习中LoRA模块聚合时的噪声引入与表达能力损失问题，显著提升了收敛速度与最终性能。
AI.motivation: 在联邦微调大语言模型中，直接对LoRA的下采样和上采样矩阵独立平均会在数学上引入噪声；而现有无噪声聚合策略会破坏LoRA的低秩结构表达能力或排除部分可训练组件，导致训练动量丢失、收敛缓慢及性能次优。
AI.method: 提出FedMomentum框架，首先以数学正确的方式聚合低秩更新，然后通过奇异值分解（SVD）提取主导成分以捕获主要更新方向，用这些成分重构同秩的LoRA模块；同时将残差成分保留并后续合并到主干网络中，以保持语义信息与鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在多个任务上的广泛实验表明，FedMomentum在收敛速度和最终准确率上均持续优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: FedMomentum通过SVD实现的结构化聚合有效解决了LoRA联邦微调中的动量丢失问题，在保持表达能力的同时实现了更快的收敛与更优的性能，为隐私保护的LLM适配提供了有效解决方案。

title: Amortizing Maximum Inner Product Search with Learned Support Functions
summary: Maximum inner product search (MIPS) is a crucial subroutine in machine learning, requiring the identification of key vectors that align best with a given query. We propose amortized MIPS: a learning-based approach that trains neural networks to directly predict MIPS solutions, amortizing the computational cost of matching queries (drawn from a fixed distribution) to a fixed set of keys. Our key insight is that the MIPS value function, the maximal inner product between a query and keys, is also known as the support function of the set of keys. Support functions are convex, 1-homogeneous and their gradient w.r.t. the query is exactly the optimal key in the database. We approximate the support function using two complementary approaches: (1) we train an input-convex neural network (SupportNet) to model the support function directly; the optimal key can be recovered via (autodiff) gradient computation, and (2) we regress directly the optimal key from the query using a vector valued network (KeyNet), bypassing gradient computation entirely at inference time. To learn a SupportNet, we combine score regression with gradient matching losses, and propose homogenization wrappers that enforce the positive 1-homogeneity of a neural network, theoretically linking function values to gradients. To train a KeyNet, we introduce a score consistency loss derived from the Euler theorem for homogeneous functions. Our experiments show that learned SupportNet or KeyNet achieve high match rates and open up new directions to compress databases with a specific query distribution in mind.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了摊销MIPS（amortized MIPS），一种基于学习的方法，通过训练神经网络直接预测最大内积搜索的解，从而摊销查询匹配的计算成本。作者提出了两种互补方法：训练输入凸神经网络（SupportNet）建模支持函数，或直接回归最优键（KeyNet），实验表明这些方法实现了高匹配率并能压缩数据库。
AI.motivation: 最大内积搜索（MIPS）是机器学习中的关键子程序，传统方法计算成本高。针对来自固定分布的查询和固定键集合，作者希望摊销计算成本，通过学习模型直接预测MIPS解，从而加速推理过程。
AI.method: 作者基于MIPS值函数即键集合的支持函数这一洞察，提出两种方法：（1）SupportNet：训练输入凸神经网络建模支持函数，通过自动微分梯度计算恢复最优键；（2）KeyNet：直接从查询回归最优键的向量化网络，避免推理时的梯度计算。训练SupportNet时结合分数回归和梯度匹配损失，并提出同质化包装器强制正1次齐次性；训练KeyNet时引入基于欧拉定理的分数一致性损失。
AI.result: 实验表明，学习到的SupportNet和KeyNet能够实现高匹配率，并为针对特定查询分布压缩数据库开辟了新方向。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用支持函数的凸性和1次齐次性等数学性质，所提出的摊销MIPS方法能够有效学习预测MIPS解，为加速最大内积搜索和数据库压缩提供了新的学习范式。

title: GCGNet: Graph-Consistent Generative Network for Time Series Forecasting with Exogenous Variables
summary: Exogenous variables offer valuable supplementary information for predicting future endogenous variables. Forecasting with exogenous variables needs to consider both past-to-future dependencies (i.e., temporal correlations) and the influence of exogenous variables on endogenous variables (i.e., channel correlations). This is pivotal when future exogenous variables are available, because they may directly affect the future endogenous variables. Many methods have been proposed for time series forecasting with exogenous variables, focusing on modeling temporal and channel correlations. However, most of them use a two-step strategy, modeling temporal and channel correlations separately, which limits their ability to capture joint correlations across time and channels. Furthermore, in real-world scenarios, time series are frequently affected by various forms of noises, underscoring the critical importance of robustness in such correlations modeling. To address these limitations, we propose GCGNet, a Graph-Consistent Generative Network for time series forecasting with exogenous variables. Specifically, GCGNet first employs a Variational Generator to produce coarse predictions. A Graph Structure Aligner then further guides it by evaluating the consistency between the generated and true correlations, where the correlations are represented as graphs, and are robust to noises. Finally, a Graph Refiner is proposed to refine the predictions to prevent degeneration and improve accuracy. Extensive experiments on 12 real-world datasets demonstrate that GCGNet outperforms state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了GCGNet，一种用于带外生变量时间序列预测的图一致生成网络，通过联合建模时间和通道相关性并增强噪声鲁棒性，在12个真实数据集上取得了优于最先进基线的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有带外生变量的时间序列预测方法大多采用两步策略，分别建模时间相关性和通道相关性，限制了其捕获跨时间和通道联合相关性的能力；同时，现实场景中时间序列常受各类噪声影响，对相关性建模的鲁棒性提出了重要要求。
AI.method: 提出GCGNet模型：首先使用变分生成器产生粗预测；随后引入图结构对齐器，通过评估生成相关性与真实相关性之间的一致性来指导模型（相关性以图形式表示且对噪声鲁棒）；最后提出图细化器来精炼预测结果，防止退化并提高准确性。
AI.result: 在12个真实世界数据集上的广泛实验表明，GCGNet在带外生变量的时间序列预测任务上优于最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: GCGNet成功解决了现有方法无法联合建模时空相关性以及对噪声敏感的问题，通过图一致性和生成式方法有效提升了带外生变量时间序列预测的性能和鲁棒性。

title: Capacity-Aware Mixture Law Enables Efficient LLM Data Optimization
summary: A data mixture refers to how different data sources are combined to train large language models, and selecting an effective mixture is crucial for optimal downstream performance. Existing methods either conduct costly searches directly on the target model or rely on mixture scaling laws that fail to extrapolate well to large model sizes. We address these limitations by introducing a compute-efficient pipeline for data mixture scaling. First, we propose CAMEL, a capacity-aware mixture law that models validation loss with the nonlinear interplay between model size and mixture. We also introduce a loss-to-benchmark prediction law that estimates benchmark accuracy from validation loss, enabling end-to-end performance prediction for the target model. Next, we study how to allocate a fixed compute budget across model scales to fit the law and reduce prediction error. Finally, we apply our method to Mixture-of-Experts models with up to 7B-A150M parameters to fit the law, and verify the optimal mixture derived from the law by extrapolating to a 55B-A1.2B target model. Compared to prior methods, we reduces mixture optimization costs by 50\% and improves downstream benchmark performance by up to 3\%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种计算高效的数据混合比例优化方法，通过引入CAMEL容量感知混合律和损失到基准预测律，实现了从验证损失到下游任务的端到端性能预测，在Mixture-of-Experts模型上验证了该方法能将混合优化成本降低50%，下游任务性能提升最高达3%。
AI.motivation: 数据混合比例对大语言模型的下游性能至关重要。现有方法存在明显局限：直接在目标模型上进行搜索成本高昂，而现有的混合缩放定律在大模型尺寸上外推能力不足。因此需要一种计算高效且能准确外推的数据混合比例优化方法。
AI.method: 提出计算高效的数据混合缩放流水线：1) 设计CAMEL容量感知混合律，建模验证损失与模型尺寸、数据混合之间的非线性交互关系；2) 引入损失到基准预测律，从验证损失估计基准测试准确率，实现目标模型的端到端性能预测；3) 研究如何在固定计算预算下跨模型规模分配资源以拟合定律并降低预测误差；4) 在参数量高达7B-A150M的MoE模型上拟合定律，并外推至55B-A1.2B目标模型。
AI.result: 在Mixture-of-Experts模型上的实验表明，相比先验方法，该方法将数据混合优化成本降低了50%，下游基准测试性能提升最高达3%。验证了从定律推导出的最优混合比例可以成功外推至更大规模的目标模型。
AI.conclusion: 本研究成功解决了现有数据混合优化方法的局限性，提出的CAMEL容量感知混合律结合损失到基准预测律实现了高效准确的数据混合比例优化，为大语言模型训练中的数据配比问题提供了有效的解决方案。

title: DARC: Disagreement-Aware Alignment via Risk-Constrained Decoding
summary: Preference-based alignment methods (e.g., RLHF, DPO) typically optimize a single scalar objective, implicitly averaging over heterogeneous human preferences. In practice, systematic annotator and user-group disagreement makes mean-reward maximization brittle and susceptible to proxy over-optimization. We propose **Disagreement-Aware Alignment via Risk-Constrained Decoding (DARC)**, a retraining-free inference-time method that frames response selection as distributionally robust, risk-sensitive decision making. Given multiple preference samples or scalable disagreement proxies, DARC reranks candidates by maximizing a *KL-robust (entropic)* satisfaction objective, and provides simple deployment controls that cap or penalize the corresponding entropic risk premium relative to the mean, enabling explicit risk budgets without retraining. We provide theoretical characterization linking this decoding rule to principled pessimism and KL-based distributionally robust optimization. Experiments on alignment benchmarks show that DARC reduces disagreement and tail risk while maintaining competitive average quality under noisy, heterogeneous feedback.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DARC方法，一种无需重训练的推理时偏好对齐策略，通过分布鲁棒的风险敏感决策来应对人类偏好的异质性，有效降低了分歧和尾部风险。
AI.motivation: 现有的偏好对齐方法（如RLHF、DPO）优化单一标量目标，隐式地对异质的人类偏好进行平均。然而，标注者和用户群体之间存在系统性分歧，导致基于平均奖励的最大化策略脆弱且容易遭受代理过度优化问题。
AI.method: 提出Disagreement-Aware Alignment via Risk-Constrained Decoding (DARC)，一种无需重训练的推理时方法。该方法将响应选择建模为分布鲁棒、风险敏感的决策问题，通过最大化KL-鲁棒（熵）满足目标对候选响应进行重排序，并提供简单的部署控制机制，可对相对于均值的熵风险溢价进行限制或惩罚，从而在不重训练的情况下实现显式的风险预算管理。
AI.result: 在偏好对齐基准测试上的实验表明，DARC在噪声和异质反馈条件下，能够减少分歧和尾部风险，同时保持具有竞争力的平均质量。方法的有效性得到了理论刻画的支持，该刻画将解码规则与原则性悲观主义和基于KL的分布鲁棒优化联系起来。
AI.conclusion: DARC为偏好对齐提供了一种无需重训练的风险感知解决方案，通过推理时的分布鲁棒决策机制，在保持平均质量的同时有效缓解了异质偏好带来的分歧和风险问题，为实际部署提供了显式的风险控制能力。

title: Distributional Regression with Tabular Foundation Models: Evaluating Probabilistic Predictions via Proper Scoring Rules
summary:
Prior-Data Fitted Networks (PFNs), such as TabPFN and TabICL, have revolutionized tabular deep learning by leveraging in-context learning for tabular data.
  These models are meant as foundation models for classification and regression settings and promise to greatly simplify deployment in practical settings because their performance is unprecedented (in terms of mean squared error or $R^2$, when measured on common benchmarks like TabArena or TALENT).
  However, we see an important weakness of current benchmarks for the regression setting: the current benchmarks focus on evaluating win rates and performance using metrics like (root) mean squared error or $R^2$.
  Therefore, these leaderboards (implicitly and explicitly) push researchers to optimize for machine learning pipelines which elicit a good mean value estimate.
  The main problem is that this approach only evaluates a point estimate (namely the mean estimator which is the Bayes estimator associated with the mean squared error loss).
  In this article we discuss the application of proper scoring rules for evaluating the goodness of probabilistic forecasts in distributional regression.
  We also propose to enhance common machine learning benchmarks with metrics for probabilistic regression.
  To improve the status quo and make the machine learning community aware of scoring rules for probabilistic regression, we advocate to use the continuous ranked probability score (CRPS) in benchmarks for probabilistic regression.
  However, we also illustrate that the choice of the scoring rule changes the inductive bias of the trained model. We, therefore, advocate for finetuning or promptable tabular foundation models.

AI.tldr: 本文指出当前表格数据回归基准测试仅关注点估计（如MSE或R²）的局限性，主张引入概率评分规则（特别是CRPS）来全面评估概率预测质量，并提出通过微调或可提示的表格基础模型来适应不同评分规则带来的归纳偏置变化。
AI.motivation: 当前的表格数据回归基准测试（如TabArena和TALENT）主要使用MSE或R²等指标评估点估计（均值估计器），忽略了概率预测的完整分布信息。这种评估方式迫使研究者优化均值估计，而无法全面评估模型的概率预测能力。
AI.method: 本文讨论了分布回归中概率预测的proper scoring rules的应用，提出将连续分级概率评分（Continuous Ranked Probability Score, CRPS）纳入表格数据回归基准测试，并分析了不同评分规则对训练模型归纳偏置的影响。
AI.result: 研究表明：1）当前基准测试对概率回归的评估不够充分；2）评分规则的选择会改变训练模型的归纳偏置；3）提出了改进机器学习基准测试的方案，通过引入CRPS等概率指标来更全面地评估概率回归性能。
AI.conclusion: 为了改进现状并让机器学习社区关注概率回归的评分规则，本文倡导在概率回归基准测试中使用CRPS，同时建议开发可微调或可提示的表格基础模型，以适应不同评分规则带来的归纳偏置变化，从而更全面地评估和提升模型的概率预测能力。

title: Stabilized Fine-Tuning with LoRA in Federated Learning: Mitigating the Side Effect of Client Size and Rank via the Scaling Factor
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are pivotal in natural language processing. The impracticality of full fine-tuning has prompted Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) methods like Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), optimizing low-rank matrices A and B. In distributed scenarios where privacy constraints necessitate Federated Learning (FL), however, the integration of LoRA is often unstable. Specifically, we identify that aggregating updates from multiple clients introduces statistical variance that scales with the client count, causing gradient collapse when using high-rank adapters. Existing scaling factor candidates, such as the one used by Rank-Stabilized LoRA, ignore the interaction caused by the aggregation process. To bridge this gap, this paper introduces Stabilized Federated LoRA (SFed-LoRA), a framework that theoretically characterizes the interaction between adapter rank and federated aggregation. We derive an optimal scaling factor designed to effectively mitigate the aggregation error accumulating across N clients. By correcting the scaling mismatch inherent in previous approaches, SFed-LoRA restores the efficacy of high-rank adaptation without altering the original model architecture or increasing inference latency. Extensive experiments in diverse tasks, model architectures, and heterogeneous data distributions are conducted to validate our results. We demonstrate that SFed-LoRA prevents high-rank collapse, and achieves significantly improved stability and faster convergence compared with state-of-the-art baselines for high-rank adaptation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SFed-LoRA框架，通过推导最优缩放因子解决联邦学习中LoRA高秩适配器因聚合方差导致的梯度崩溃问题，在不改变模型架构的前提下显著提升高秩适配的稳定性和收敛速度。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习场景下，多客户端LoRA适配器参数聚合会引入随客户端数量增长的统计方差，导致高秩适配器出现梯度崩溃，现有缩放因子（如Rank-Stabilized LoRA）忽略了聚合过程产生的交互影响。
AI.method: 理论刻画联邦聚合与适配器秩之间的交互关系，推导出最优缩放因子以消除N个客户端累积的聚合误差，纠正先前方法的缩放失配问题，提出SFed-LoRA框架。
AI.result: SFed-LoRA有效防止高秩崩溃，在多样化任务、模型架构及异构数据分布的实验中，相比最先进基线方法实现显著提升的稳定性和更快的收敛速度。
AI.conclusion: SFed-LoRA通过理论驱动的最优缩放因子设计，在不增加推理延迟或改变模型架构的情况下，成功恢复了联邦学习场景下高秩LoRA适配的有效性。

title: Revisiting Gradient Staleness: Evaluating Distance Metrics for Asynchronous Federated Learning Aggregation
summary: In asynchronous federated learning (FL), client devices send updates to a central server at varying times based on their computational speed, often using stale versions of the global model. This staleness can degrade the convergence and accuracy of the global model. Previous work, such as AsyncFedED, proposed an adaptive aggregation method using Euclidean distance to measure staleness. In this paper, we extend this approach by exploring alternative distance metrics to more accurately capture the effect of gradient staleness. We integrate these metrics into the aggregation process and evaluate their impact on convergence speed, model performance, and training stability under heterogeneous clients and non-IID data settings. Our results demonstrate that certain metrics lead to more robust and efficient asynchronous FL training, offering a stronger foundation for practical deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文针对异步联邦学习中因客户端更新延迟导致的模型性能下降问题，扩展了AsyncFedED方法，通过探索不同的距离度量来更准确地衡量梯度陈旧度，并验证了新方法在异构客户端和非独立同分布数据环境下的有效性。
AI.motivation: 在异步联邦学习中，客户端设备根据计算速度在不同时间向中央服务器发送更新，通常使用过时的全局模型版本。这种陈旧性会降低全局模型的收敛性和准确性。虽然已有工作（如AsyncFedED）提出使用欧几里得距离来衡量陈旧度的自适应聚合方法，但该方法可能无法完全捕捉梯度陈旧性的影响。
AI.method: 本文扩展了AsyncFedED方法，通过探索替代的距离度量来更准确地捕捉梯度陈旧性的影响，并将这些度量集成到聚合过程中。研究评估了这些度量在异构客户端和非独立同分布数据设置下对收敛速度、模型性能和训练稳定性的影响。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，某些距离度量能够使异步联邦学习训练更加稳健和高效，在异构客户端和非独立同分布数据设置下提升了收敛速度和模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 本研究证明了选择合适的距离度量对于改善异步联邦学习的性能至关重要，为实际部署提供了更坚实的基础。

title: Adversarial Domain Adaptation Enables Knowledge Transfer Across Heterogeneous RNA-Seq Datasets
summary: Accurate phenotype prediction from RNA sequencing (RNA-seq) data is essential for diagnosis, biomarker discovery, and personalized medicine. Deep learning models have demonstrated strong potential to outperform classical machine learning approaches, but their performance relies on large, well-annotated datasets. In transcriptomics, such datasets are frequently limited, leading to over-fitting and poor generalization. Knowledge transfer from larger, more general datasets can alleviate this issue. However, transferring information across RNA-seq datasets remains challenging due to heterogeneous preprocessing pipelines and differences in target phenotypes. In this study, we propose a deep learning-based domain adaptation framework that enables effective knowledge transfer from a large general dataset to a smaller one for cancer type classification. The method learns a domain-invariant latent space by jointly optimizing classification and domain alignment objectives. To ensure stable training and robustness in data-scarce scenarios, the framework is trained with an adversarial approach with appropriate regularization. Both supervised and unsupervised approach variants are explored, leveraging labeled or unlabeled target samples. The framework is evaluated on three large-scale transcriptomic datasets (TCGA, ARCHS4, GTEx) to assess its ability to transfer knowledge across cohorts. Experimental results demonstrate consistent improvements in cancer and tissue type classification accuracy compared to non-adaptive baselines, particularly in low-data scenarios. Overall, this work highlights domain adaptation as a powerful strategy for data-efficient knowledge transfer in transcriptomics, enabling robust phenotype prediction under constrained data conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的域适应框架，通过学习域不变潜在空间，实现从大型通用转录组数据集到小型目标数据集的知识迁移，显著提升了低数据场景下的癌症和组织类型分类准确率。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在RNA-seq数据上的表型预测任务中表现优异，但依赖于大规模标注数据集。在转录组学领域，此类数据集往往有限，导致模型过拟合和泛化能力差。跨数据集知识迁移可缓解该问题，但由于预处理流程异构和目标表型差异，迁移过程面临重大挑战。
AI.method: 提出一种深度学习域适应框架，通过联合优化分类目标和域对齐目标来学习域不变潜在空间。采用对抗训练方法配合适当的正则化策略，确保在数据稀缺场景下的训练稳定性和鲁棒性。框架包含监督和非监督两种变体，分别利用有标签或无标签的目标样本。
AI.result: 在三个大规模转录组数据集（TCGA、ARCHS4、GTEx）上评估，实验结果表明，相比非自适应基线方法，该方法在癌症和组织类型分类准确率上有一致性提升，尤其在低数据场景下改进更为显著。
AI.conclusion: 域适应是转录组学中实现数据高效知识迁移的有力策略，能够在数据受限条件下实现鲁棒的表型预测，为诊断、生物标志物发现和个性化医疗提供了有效解决方案。

title: Fibration Policy Optimization
summary: Large language models are increasingly trained as heterogeneous systems spanning multiple domains, expert partitions, and agentic pipelines, yet prevalent proximal objectives operate at a single scale and lack a principled mechanism for coupling token-level, trajectory-level, and higher-level hierarchical stability control. To bridge this gap, we derive the Aggregational Policy Censoring Objective (APC-Obj), the first exact unconstrained reformulation of sample-based TV-TRPO, establishing that clipping-based surrogate design and trust-region optimization are dual formulations of the same problem. Building on this foundation, we develop Fiber Bundle Gating (FBG), an algebraic framework that organizes sampled RL data as a fiber bundle and decomposes ratio gating into a base-level gate on trajectory aggregates and a fiber-level gate on per-token residuals, with provable first-order agreement with the true RL objective near on-policy. From APC-Obj and FBG we derive Fibration Policy Optimization (or simply, FiberPO), a concrete objective whose Jacobian is block-diagonal over trajectories, reduces to identity at on-policy, and provides better update direction thus improving token efficiency. The compositional nature of the framework extends beyond the trajectory-token case: fibrations compose algebraically into a Fibration Gating Hierarchy (FGH) that scales the same gating mechanism to arbitrary hierarchical depth without new primitives, as demonstrated by FiberPO-Domain, a four-level instantiation with independent trust-region budgets at the domain, prompt group, trajectory, and token levels. Together, these results connect the trust-region theory, a compositional algebraic structure, and practical multi-scale stability control into a unified framework for LLM policy optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个统一的理论框架，用于大语言模型在多尺度层级（token、轨迹、域等）下的策略优化。核心贡献包括：推导出APC-Obj目标函数（揭示了clipping和trust-region的对偶关系）、提出FBG代数框架（将RL数据组织为纤维丛结构）、以及构建可扩展至任意层级深度的Fibration Policy Optimization方法。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型越来越多地被训练为跨越多个域、专家分区和智能体流程的异构系统，但当前的近端优化目标仅在单一尺度上运行，缺乏一种原则性机制来耦合token级、轨迹级和更高层级的层级稳定性控制。
AI.method: 1) 推导APC-Obj：首次将基于样本的TV-TRPO精确重构为无约束形式，证明了clipping代理设计与trust-region优化是同一问题的对偶表述。2) 提出FBG代数框架：将采样的RL数据组织为纤维丛结构，将ratio门控分解为轨迹聚合的基层级门控和每token残差的纤维级门控，并在策略附近具有与真实RL目标的一阶一致性。3) 导出FiberPO：其Jacobian在轨迹上分块对角，在策略上退化为单位矩阵。4) 构建FGH：使门控机制可代数组合至任意层级深度，如FiberPO-Domain在域、提示组、轨迹和token四个层级上实现独立的trust-region预算。
AI.result: APC-Obj建立了clipping与trust-region的理论联系；FBG框架在策略附近与真实RL目标保持一阶一致性；FiberPO提供更好的更新方向并提升token效率；FGH展示了框架的可扩展性，支持任意层级深度的多尺度稳定性控制。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功地将trust-region理论、组合代数结构和实用的多尺度稳定性控制整合为一个统一框架，为大语言模型策略优化提供了理论基础和实用方法，使得跨多个层级（token、轨迹、域等）的稳定性控制成为可能。

title: Deterministic Differentiable Structured Pruning for Large Language Models
summary: Structured pruning reduces LLM inference cost by removing low-importance architectural components. This can be viewed as learning a multiplicative gate for each component under an l0 sparsity constraint. Due to the discreteness of the l0 norm, prior work typically adopts stochastic hard-concrete relaxations to enable differentiable optimization; however, this stochasticity can introduce a train--test mismatch when sampled masks are discretized for deployment and restricts masks to a bounded, near-binary range. To address this, we propose Deterministic Differentiable Pruning (DDP), a mask-only optimization method that eliminates stochasticity by directly optimizing a deterministic soft surrogate of the discrete l0 objective. Compared with prior approaches, DDP offers greater expressiveness, reduced train--test mismatch, and faster convergence. We apply our method to several dense and MoE models, including Qwen3-32B and Qwen3-30B-A3B, achieving a performance loss as small as 1% on downstream tasks while outperforming previous methods at 20% sparsity. We further demonstrate end-to-end inference speedups in realistic deployment settings with vLLM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了确定性可微剪枝方法（DDP），通过消除随机性直接优化离散l0目标的确定性软代理，解决了传统随机硬混凝土松弛方法存在的训练-测试不匹配问题，在Qwen3等大模型上实现20%稀疏度下仅1%性能损失。
AI.motivation: 现有的结构化剪枝方法通常采用随机硬混凝土松弛来处理l0范数的离散性，但这种随机性在部署时离散化掩码会引入训练-测试不匹配，且限制了掩码的表达范围为有界的近二值区域。
AI.method: 提出确定性可微剪枝（DDP）方法，这是一种仅优化掩码的方法，通过直接优化离散l0目标的确定性软代理来消除随机性，从而实现可微优化，无需采样过程。
AI.result: 在多个稠密模型和MoE模型（包括Qwen3-32B和Qwen3-30B-A3B）上进行实验，在20%稀疏度下实现下游任务仅约1%的性能损失，性能优于先前方法，并在vLLM部署环境中展示了端到端推理加速。
AI.conclusion: DDP方法相比现有方法具有更强的表达能力、更小的训练-测试不匹配和更快的收敛速度，为LLM的结构化剪枝提供了一种高效、实用的解决方案，能够有效降低推理成本。

title: Hybrid Quantum Neural Network for Multivariate Clinical Time Series Forecasting
summary: Forecasting physiological signals can support proactive monitoring and timely clinical intervention by anticipating critical changes in patient status. In this work, we address multivariate multi-horizon forecasting of physiological time series by jointly predicting heart rate, oxygen saturation, pulse rate, and respiratory rate at forecasting horizons of 15, 30, and 60 seconds. We propose a hybrid quantum-classical architecture that integrates a Variational Quantum Circuit (VQC) within a recurrent neural backbone. A GRU encoder summarizes the historical observation window into a latent representation, which is then projected into quantum angles used to parameterize the VQC. The quantum layer acts as a learnable non-linear feature mixer, modeling cross-variable interactions before the final prediction stage. We evaluate the proposed approach on the BIDMC PPG and Respiration dataset under a Leave-One-Patient-Out protocol. The results show competitive accuracy compared with classical and deep learning baselines, together with greater robustness to noise and missing inputs. These findings suggest that hybrid quantum layers can provide useful inductive biases for physiological time series forecasting in small-cohort clinical settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种混合量子-经典架构用于多变量多预测时域的生理时间序列预测，在预测心率、血氧饱和度、脉率和呼吸率方面取得了具有竞争力的准确性，并展现出更强的噪声和缺失输入鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 预测生理信号能够通过预见患者状态的关键变化来支持主动监测和及时的临床干预。多变量多时域预测(心率、血氧饱和度、脉率、呼吸率)具有重要的临床应用价值，但现有方法在小样本临床场景下面临挑战。
AI.method: 提出混合量子-经典架构，将变分量子电路(VQC)集成到循环神经骨干网络中。GRU编码器将历史观测窗口总结为潜在表示，然后投影为量子角度参数化VQC。量子层作为可学习的非线性特征混合器，在最终预测阶段之前建模跨变量交互。在BIDMC PPG和呼吸数据集上采用留一患者验证协议进行评估。
AI.result: 所提出的方法与经典和深度学习基线相比具有竞争力的准确性，同时对噪声和缺失输入表现出更强的鲁棒性。研究表明混合量子层能够为小队列临床环境下的生理时间序列预测提供有用的归纳偏置。
AI.conclusion: 混合量子层可以有效地引入归纳偏置，在生理时间序列预测中展现出潜力，特别适用于小队列临床环境。该研究为量子机器学习在医疗预测任务中的应用提供了实证支持。

title: SCL-GNN: Towards Generalizable Graph Neural Networks via Spurious Correlation Learning
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have demonstrated remarkable success across diverse tasks. However, their generalization capability is often hindered by spurious correlations between node features and labels in the graph. Our analysis reveals that GNNs tend to exploit imperceptible statistical correlations in training data, even when such correlations are unreliable for prediction. To address this challenge, we propose the Spurious Correlation Learning Graph Neural Network (SCL-GNN), a novel framework designed to enhance generalization on both Independent and Identically Distributed (IID) and Out-of-Distribution (OOD) graphs. SCL-GNN incorporates a principled spurious correlation learning mechanism, leveraging the Hilbert-Schmidt Independence Criterion (HSIC) to quantify correlations between node representations and class scores. This enables the model to identify and mitigate irrelevant but influential spurious correlations effectively. Additionally, we introduce an efficient bi-level optimization strategy to jointly optimize modules and GNN parameters, preventing overfitting. Extensive experiments on real-world and synthetic datasets demonstrate that SCL-GNN consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines under various distribution shifts, highlighting its robustness and generalization capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SCL-GNN框架，通过识别和消除图神经网络中的虚假相关性来提升模型在IID和OOD场景下的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 图神经网络（GNN）在多样化任务中表现出色，但其泛化能力常受到节点特征与标签之间虚假相关性的阻碍。分析发现GNN倾向于利用训练数据中不可靠的统计相关性进行预测，导致模型泛化性能下降。
AI.method: 提出虚假相关性学习图神经网络（SCL-GNN）框架：1）利用Hilbert-Schmidt Independence Criterion（HSIC）量化节点表示与类别分数之间的相关性，实现虚假相关性的识别与抑制；2）引入高效的双层优化策略联合优化模块和GNN参数，防止过拟合。
AI.result: 在真实世界和合成数据集上的广泛实验表明，SCL-GNN在各种分布偏移下始终优于最先进的基线方法，展现出良好的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: SCL-GNN通过原理性的虚假相关性学习机制，有效提升了GNN在IID和OOD图上的泛化性能，为解决图神经网络中的虚假相关性问题提供了有效方案。

title: Tiny Autoregressive Recursive Models
summary: Tiny Recursive Models (TRMs) have recently demonstrated remarkable performance on ARC-AGI, showing that very small models can compete against large foundation models through a two-step refinement mechanism that updates an internal reasoning state $z$ and the predicted output $y$. Naturally, such refinement is of interest for any predictor; it is therefore natural to wonder whether the TRM mechanism could be effectively re-adopted in autoregressive models. However, TRMs cannot be simply compared to standard models because they lack causal predictive structures and contain persistent latent states that make it difficult to isolate specific performance gains. In this paper, we propose the Autoregressive TRM and evaluate it on small autoregressive tasks. To understand its efficacy, we propose a suite of models that gradually transform a standard Transformer to a Tiny Autoregressive Recursive Model in a controlled setting that fixes the block design, token stream, and next-token objective. Across compute-matched experiments on character-level algorithmic tasks, we surprisingly find that there are some two-level refinement baselines that show strong performance. Contrary to expectations, we find no reliable performance gains from the full Autoregressive TRM architecture. These results offer potential promise for two-step refinement mechanisms more broadly but caution against investing in the autoregressive TRM-specific model as a fruitful research direction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出自回归TRM模型，在字符级算法任务上发现简单的两步细化基线表现优异，但完整自回归TRM架构并未带来可靠的性能提升。
AI.motivation: TRM在ARC-AGI上表现优异，其两步细化机制（更新内部推理状态z和预测输出y）对预测器具有普遍意义。研究者希望探索该机制能否有效迁移到自回归模型中。然而，TRM缺乏因果预测结构且包含持久潜隐状态，难以与标准模型进行公平比较和性能归因。
AI.method: 1. 提出自回归TRM（Autoregressive TRM）架构；2. 设计一系列渐进式模型，在固定块设计、词元流和下一词元目标的受控设置下，逐步将标准Transformer转换为Tiny自回归递归模型；3. 在计算量匹配的条件下，于字符级算法任务上进行对比实验。
AI.result: 1. 发现某些两步细化基线表现出强劲性能；2. 与预期相反，完整自回归TRM架构未带来可靠的性能提升；3. 两步细化机制本身具有潜力，但自回归TRM特定架构并非有效的研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 两步细化机制在更广泛场景下具有应用前景，但研究社区应谨慎投入自回归TRM特定模型的研究。简单的两步细化基线可能是更具实用价值的选择。

title: EAGLE-Pangu: Accelerator-Safe Tree Speculative Decoding on Ascend NPUs
summary: Autoregressive decoding remains a primary bottleneck in large language model (LLM) serving, motivating speculative decoding methods that reduce expensive teacher-model invocations by verifying multiple candidate tokens per step. Tree-structured speculation further increases parallelism, but is often brittle when ported across heterogeneous backends and accelerator stacks, where attention masking, KV-cache layouts, and indexing semantics are not interchangeable. We present EAGLE-Pangu, a reproducible system that ports EAGLE-3-style tree speculative decoding to a Pangu teacher backend on Ascend NPUs. EAGLE-Pangu contributes (i) an explicit branch/commit cache manager built on the Cache API, (ii) accelerator-safe tree tensorization that removes undefined negative indices by construction and validates structural invariants, and (iii) a fused-kernel-compatible teacher verification path with a debuggable eager fallback. On 240 turns from MT-Bench and HumanEval-style prompts, EAGLE-Pangu improves end-to-end decoding throughput by 1.27x on average, up to 2.46x at p99, over teacher-only greedy decoding in the fused-kernel performance path. We also provide a fused-kernel-free reference path with structured traces and invariant checks to support reproducible debugging and ablation across execution modes and tree budgets.

AI.tldr: 提出了EAGLE-Pangu系统，将树状投机解码移植到Ascend NPU上的Pangu教师模型后端，通过缓存管理、加速器安全的树张量化和可调试的验证路径，平均提升端到端解码吞吐量1.27倍。
AI.motivation: 自回归解码是大语言模型服务的主要瓶颈，树状投机解码可提高并行性，但跨异构后端和加速器栈移植时存在注意力掩码、KV-cache布局和索引语义不兼容的问题，导致系统脆弱且难以复现。
AI.method: 构建了EAGLE-Pangu系统，包含三个核心贡献：(i) 基于Cache API的显式分支/提交缓存管理器；(ii) 加速器安全的树张量化方法，通过构造方式移除未定义的负索引并验证结构不变量；(iii) 兼容融合内核的教师验证路径，带有可调试的eager回退机制，同时提供无融合内核的参考路径以支持可复现调试。
AI.result: 在MT-Bench的240轮对话和HumanEval风格提示上测试，融合内核性能路径相比纯教师贪婪解码，平均端到端解码吞吐量提升1.27倍，p99情况下最高提升2.46倍。
AI.conclusion: EAGLE-Pangu成功实现了树状投机解码在异构加速器栈上的可复现移植，证明了通过显式缓存管理、结构不变量验证和可调试路径设计，可以在保持系统健壮性的同时显著提升解码吞吐量。

title: Minor First, Major Last: A Depth-Induced Implicit Bias of Sharpness-Aware Minimization
summary: We study the implicit bias of Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM) when training $L$-layer linear diagonal networks on linearly separable binary classification. For linear models ($L=1$), both $\ell_\infty$- and $\ell_2$-SAM recover the $\ell_2$ max-margin classifier, matching gradient descent (GD). However, for depth $L = 2$, the behavior changes drastically -- even on a single-example dataset. For $\ell_\infty$-SAM, the limit direction depends critically on initialization and can converge to $\mathbf{0}$ or to any standard basis vector, in stark contrast to GD, whose limit aligns with the basis vector of the dominant data coordinate. For $\ell_2$-SAM, we show that although its limit direction matches the $\ell_1$ max-margin solution as in the case of GD, its finite-time dynamics exhibit a phenomenon we call "sequential feature amplification", in which the predictor initially relies on minor coordinates and gradually shifts to larger ones as training proceeds or initialization increases. Our theoretical analysis attributes this phenomenon to $\ell_2$-SAM's gradient normalization factor applied in its perturbation, which amplifies minor coordinates early and allows major ones to dominate later, giving a concrete example where infinite-time implicit-bias analyses are insufficient. Synthetic and real-data experiments corroborate our findings.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM)在线性对角网络上的隐式偏置，发现在单层线性模型下SAM与梯度下降(GD)行为一致，但在两层网络上行为发生剧变：ℓ∞-SAM的极限方向严重依赖初始化，而ℓ_2-SAM虽最终收敛到ℓ_1最大间隔解，但在有限时间内呈现"序贯特征放大"现象，揭示了仅分析无限时间隐式偏置的不足。
AI.motivation: 理解SAM优化算法的隐式偏置对于解释其在实践中优异的泛化性能至关重要。现有研究主要关注无限时间极限行为，但有限时间动力学同样重要。本文旨在系统分析SAM在不同深度线性对角网络上的隐式偏置，揭示其与梯度下降的差异及有限时间行为特征。
AI.method: 研究L层线性对角网络在可线性分离二分类任务上的训练。对比分析L=1（线性模型）和L=2两种情形下ℓ∞-SAM和ℓ_2-SAM的行为。理论推导极限方向与初始化、数据的关系，分析有限时间动力学特性。通过理论分析归因ℓ_2-SAM中梯度归一化因子的作用机制，并辅以合成数据和真实数据实验验证。
AI.result: （1）线性模型(L=1)：ℓ∞-SAM和ℓ_2-SAM均恢复ℓ_2最大间隔分类器，与GD一致；（2）两层网络(L=2)：ℓ∞-SAM的极限方向严重依赖初始化，可能收敛到零向量或任意标准基向量，与GD形成鲜明对比；（3）两层网络：ℓ_2-SAM虽极限方向与GD相同（ℓ_1最大间隔解），但有限时间内呈现"序贯特征放大"现象——预测器初期依赖次要坐标，随训练或初始化增大逐步转向主要坐标。该现象源于其扰动中的梯度归一化因子。
AI.conclusion: SAM的隐式偏置在网络深度增加时发生质变，且有限时间动力学与无限时间极限行为可能显著不同。传统仅关注无限时间隐式偏置的分析方法不足以完全刻画SAM的行为特性，需考虑有限时间效应。这为理解SAM的实际训练动态和泛化能力提供了新的理论视角。

title: Invisible Safety Threat: Malicious Finetuning for LLM via Steganography
summary: Understanding and addressing potential safety alignment risks in large language models (LLMs) is critical for ensuring their safe and trustworthy deployment. In this paper, we highlight an insidious safety threat: a compromised LLM can maintain a facade of proper safety alignment while covertly generating harmful content. To achieve this, we finetune the model to understand and apply a steganographic technique. At inference time, we input a prompt that contains a steganographically embedded malicious target question along with a plaintext cover question. The model, in turn, produces a target response similarly embedded within a benign-looking cover response. In this process, human observers only see the model being prompted with a cover question and generating a corresponding cover response, while the malicious content is hidden from view. We demonstrate this invisible safety threat on GPT-4.1 despite the OpenAI finetuning API's safeguards. The finetuned model produces steganographic malicious outputs in response to hidden malicious prompts, while the user interface displays only a fully benign cover interaction. We also replicate the attack on three open-source models, Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct, Phi-4, and Mistral-Small-24B-Base-2501, confirming the generality of our method. We quantitatively evaluate our method on the AdvBench dataset, using Llama-Guard-3-8B for content safety classification. Across all four models, all stegotexts containing malicious content are incorrectly classified as safe.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了一种隐蔽的LLM安全威胁：攻击者通过微调使模型掌握隐写技术，能够在表面上呈现正常的问答交互，暗中却在生成有害内容。该攻击在GPT-4.1及多个开源模型上成功实施，且安全分类器无法检测出隐藏的恶意内容。
AI.motivation: 当前对LLM安全对齐风险的认知存在盲区。现有研究主要关注模型是否直接产生有害输出，但忽视了模型可能通过隐写手段在维持安全表象的同时秘密生成恶意内容的风险。这种隐蔽威胁更难被检测，可能导致严重的安全问题，因此需要深入研究这一新型攻击向量。
AI.method: 研究者提出了一种基于隐写术的攻击方法。首先对目标模型进行微调，使其学会理解和应用隐写技术。在推理阶段，输入包含隐写嵌入的恶意目标问题和明文掩护问题的提示词。模型生成响应时，将恶意回答隐写嵌入到看似无害的掩护回答中。整个过程对外呈现为正常的问答交互，恶意内容被隐藏在隐写文本中。研究在GPT-4.1（使用OpenAI微调API）以及Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct、Phi-4、Mistral-Small-24B-Base-2501三个开源模型上验证了该方法的可行性，并使用AdvBench数据集和Llama-Guard-3-8B分类器进行定量评估。
AI.result: 实验结果表明：该攻击在所有四个模型上均成功实施，包括GPT-4.1在内。尽管OpenAI微调API设有安全防护措施，攻击者仍能微调模型以实现隐写攻击。在AdvBench数据集的定量评估中，使用Llama-Guard-3-8B进行内容安全分类，所有四个模型生成的包含恶意内容的隐写文本均被错误分类为安全内容，证明了该攻击的有效性和隐蔽性。用户界面仅显示良性的掩护交互，恶意内容完全隐藏。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了一种新型的隐蔽安全威胁，即使是有安全防护措施的模型（如GPT-4.1）也可能通过微调被植入隐写能力，从而在维持安全对齐表象的同时秘密生成有害内容。现有安全分类工具无法有效检测此类隐写攻击。这表明当前的LLM安全机制存在重大漏洞，需要开发新的防御策略来应对隐写术威胁，确保模型的真正安全部署。

title: Model-based Offline RL via Robust Value-Aware Model Learning with Implicitly Differentiable Adaptive Weighting
summary: Model-based offline reinforcement learning (RL) aims to enhance offline RL with a dynamics model that facilitates policy exploration. However, \textit{model exploitation} could occur due to inevitable model errors, degrading algorithm performance. Adversarial model learning offers a theoretical framework to mitigate model exploitation by solving a maximin formulation. Within such a paradigm, RAMBO~\citep{rigter2022rambo} has emerged as a representative and most popular method that provides a practical implementation with model gradient. However, we empirically reveal that severe Q-value underestimation and gradient explosion can occur in RAMBO with only slight hyperparameter tuning, suggesting that it tends to be overly conservative and suffers from unstable model updates. To address these issues, we propose \textbf{RO}bust value-aware \textbf{M}odel learning with \textbf{I}mplicitly differentiable adaptive weighting (ROMI). Instead of updating the dynamics model with model gradient, ROMI introduces a novel robust value-aware model learning approach. This approach requires the dynamics model to predict future states with values close to the minimum Q-value within a scale-adjustable state uncertainty set, enabling controllable conservatism and stable model updates. To further improve out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization during multi-step rollouts, we propose implicitly differentiable adaptive weighting, a bi-level optimization scheme that adaptively achieves dynamics- and value-aware model learning. Empirical results on D4RL and NeoRL datasets show that ROMI significantly outperforms RAMBO and achieves competitive or superior performance compared to other state-of-the-art methods on datasets where RAMBO typically underperforms. Code is available at https://github.com/zq2r/ROMI.git.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ROMI算法，通过鲁棒价值感知的模型学习和隐式可微自适应加权机制，解决了RAMBO算法中Q值低估和梯度爆炸问题，在D4RL和NeoRL数据集上显著优于RAMBO并达到竞争性能。
AI.motivation: 基于模型的离线强化学习面临模型利用问题，虽然对抗性模型学习（如RAMBO）提供了理论框架，但本文发现RAMBO存在严重的Q值低估和梯度爆炸问题，导致过于保守且模型更新不稳定。
AI.method: 提出RObust value-aware Model learning with Implicitly differentiable adaptive weighting (ROMI)：1) 鲁棒价值感知模型学习，要求动力学模型预测的状态值接近可调节尺度状态不确定性集合内的最小Q值，实现可控保守性和稳定模型更新；2) 隐式可微自适应加权，采用双层优化方案自适应实现动力学感知和价值感知的模型学习，提升分布外泛化能力。
AI.result: 在D4RL和NeoRL数据集上的实验结果表明，ROMI显著优于RAMBO，在RAMBO通常表现不佳的数据集上达到竞争性或更优的性能，与其他最先进方法相比具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: ROMI通过鲁棒价值感知模型学习和隐式可微自适应加权机制，有效解决了RAMBO的Q值低估和梯度爆炸问题，实现了可控保守性和稳定模型更新，为基于模型的离线强化学习提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

title: Towards plausibility in time series counterfactual explanations
summary: We present a new method for generating plausible counterfactual explanations for time series classification problems. The approach performs gradient-based optimization directly in the input space. To enforce plausibility, we integrate soft-DTW (dynamic time warping) alignment with $k$-nearest neighbors from the target class, which effectively encourages the generated counterfactuals to adopt a realistic temporal structure. The overall optimization objective is a multi-faceted loss function that balances key counterfactual properties. It incorporates losses for validity, sparsity, and proximity, alongside the novel soft-DTW-based plausibility component. We conduct an evaluation of our method against several strong reference approaches, measuring the key properties of the generated counterfactuals across multiple dimensions. The results demonstrate that our method achieves competitive performance in validity while significantly outperforming existing approaches in distributional alignment with the target class, indicating superior temporal realism. Furthermore, a qualitative analysis highlights the critical limitations of existing methods in preserving realistic temporal structure. This work shows that the proposed method consistently generates counterfactual explanations for time series classifiers that are not only valid but also highly plausible and consistent with temporal patterns.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于梯度优化的时间序列分类反事实解释生成方法，通过整合软动态时间规整（soft-DTW）和k近邻机制确保反事实样本的时间结构真实性。该方法在多目标损失函数中平衡有效性、稀疏性、邻近性和合理性，生成的反事实解释在保持有效性的同时，显著提升了与目标类别的分布对齐和时序真实性。
AI.motivation: 现有时间序列分类的反事实解释方法难以生成具有真实时序结构的合理反事实样本。传统方法往往忽略了时间序列数据的时序特性，导致生成的反事实样本在时间维度上不够真实，限制了其实际应用价值。因此，需要一种能够在保持反事实属性的同时，确保生成样本具备现实时序模式的解释方法。
AI.method: 提出一种直接在输入空间进行梯度优化的反事实生成方法。核心技术是将软动态时间规整（soft-DTW）对齐与目标类别的k近邻机制相结合，鼓励生成的反事实采用现实的时序结构。设计了多维损失函数，平衡有效性、稀疏性、邻近性以及基于软DTW的合理性组件，通过梯度下降优化生成既满足分类改变要求又具备时序真实性的反事实样本。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上与现有强基准方法进行对比评估。定量结果表明：该方法在有效性方面达到竞争性能，在与目标类别的分布对齐方面显著优于现有方法，表明其生成的反事实样本具有更优的时序真实性。定性分析进一步揭示了现有方法在保持真实时序结构方面的关键局限性，而本方法能一致性地生成既有效又高度合理且符合时序模式的反事实解释。
AI.conclusion: 本研究成功解决了时间序列分类反事实解释中的时序合理性难题。通过整合软DTW对齐和k近邻机制，所提方法能够在多属性约束下生成高质量的反事实样本，在有效性和时序真实性之间取得了良好平衡，为时间序列模型的解释性提供了新的有效途径。

title: Explainable Condition Monitoring via Probabilistic Anomaly Detection Applied to Helicopter Transmissions
summary: We present a novel Explainable methodology for Condition Monitoring, relying on healthy data only. Since faults are rare events, we propose to focus on learning the probability distribution of healthy observations only, and detect Anomalies at runtime. This objective is achieved via the definition of probabilistic measures of deviation from nominality, which allow to detect and anticipate faults. The Bayesian perspective underpinning our approach allows us to perform Uncertainty Quantification to inform decisions. At the same time, we provide descriptive tools to enhance the interpretability of the results, supporting the deployment of the proposed strategy also in safety-critical applications. The methodology is validated experimentally on two use cases: a publicly available benchmark for Predictive Maintenance, and a real-world Helicopter Transmission dataset collected over multiple years. In both applications, the method achieves competitive detection performance with respect to state-of-the-art anomaly detection methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种仅依赖健康数据的可解释条件监测方法，通过学习正常状态的概率分布来检测运行时异常，结合贝叶斯不确定性量化和可解释性工具，在两个数据集上达到竞争性检测性能。
AI.motivation: 在工业设备状态监测中，故障数据稀缺，难以训练传统的监督学习模型。因此需要一种仅依赖正常数据的方法来检测和预测故障，同时提供不确定性量化和结果可解释性，以支持安全关键应用中的决策。
AI.method: 采用贝叶斯方法学习健康观测数据的概率分布，定义概率性偏离标称状态的度量指标用于异常检测和故障预测。该方法集成了不确定性量化技术以辅助决策，并开发了描述性工具以增强结果的可解释性。
AI.result: 在公开的预测维护基准数据集和多年采集的直升机传动系统真实数据集上进行验证。该方法在两个应用场景中均达到了与最先进异常检测方法竞争的检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法成功实现了基于健康数据的异常检测，通过概率框架提供了故障检测与预测能力，结合不确定性量化和可解释性工具，适用于安全关键应用场景。

title: Mitigating Homophily Disparity in Graph Anomaly Detection: A Scalable and Adaptive Approach
summary: Graph anomaly detection (GAD) aims to identify nodes that deviate from normal patterns in structure or features. While recent GNN-based approaches have advanced this task, they struggle with two major challenges: 1) homophily disparity, where nodes exhibit varying homophily at both class and node levels; and 2) limited scalability, as many methods rely on costly whole-graph operations. To address them, we propose SAGAD, a Scalable and Adaptive framework for GAD. SAGAD precomputes multi-hop embeddings and applies reparameterized Chebyshev filters to extract low- and high-frequency information, enabling efficient training and capturing both homophilic and heterophilic patterns. To mitigate node-level homophily disparity, we introduce an Anomaly Context-Aware Adaptive Fusion, which adaptively fuses low- and high-pass embeddings using fusion coefficients conditioned on Rayleigh Quotient-guided anomalous subgraph structures for each node. To alleviate class-level disparity, we design a Frequency Preference Guidance Loss, which encourages anomalies to preserve more high-frequency information than normal nodes. SAGAD supports mini-batch training, achieves linear time and space complexity, and drastically reduces memory usage on large-scale graphs. Theoretically, SAGAD ensures asymptotic linear separability between normal and abnormal nodes under mild conditions. Extensive experiments on 10 benchmarks confirm SAGAD's superior accuracy and scalability over state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SAGAD框架，用于图异常检测（GAD），解决了同质性差异和可扩展性受限两大挑战，在保持线性时空复杂度的同时实现了卓越的准确性和可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于GNN的图异常检测方法面临两大挑战：(1)同质性差异，节点在类级别和节点级别表现出不同的同质性；(2)可扩展性受限，许多方法依赖昂贵的全图操作。这些挑战影响了GAD方法的性能和效率。
AI.method: 提出SAGAD（可扩展自适应图异常检测）框架：1) 预计算多跳嵌入并应用重参数化Chebyshev滤波器提取低频和高频信息，支持小批量训练；2) 设计异常上下文感知自适应融合机制，基于Rayleigh商引导的异常子图结构为每个节点自适应融合低通和高通嵌入，缓解节点级同质性差异；3) 引入频率偏好引导损失，鼓励异常节点比正常节点保留更多高频信息，缓解类级别差异。
AI.result: SAGAD实现了线性的时间和空间复杂度，大幅降低了大规模图的内存使用。理论上证明了在温和条件下，SAGAD能确保正常节点和异常节点之间的渐近线性可分性。在10个基准数据集上的广泛实验验证了SAGAD在准确性和可扩展性方面均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SAGAD成功解决了图异常检测中的同质性差异和可扩展性挑战，通过自适应频率融合和频率偏好引导实现了高效且准确的异常检测，为大规模图数据的异常检测提供了有效解决方案。

title: Geometrically Constrained Outlier Synthesis
summary: Deep neural networks for image classification often exhibit overconfidence on out-of-distribution (OOD) samples. To address this, we introduce Geometrically Constrained Outlier Synthesis (GCOS), a training-time regularization framework aimed at improving OOD robustness during inference. GCOS addresses a limitation of prior synthesis methods by generating virtual outliers in the hidden feature space that respect the learned manifold structure of in-distribution (ID) data. The synthesis proceeds in two stages: (i) a dominant-variance subspace extracted from the training features identifies geometrically informed, off-manifold directions; (ii) a conformally-inspired shell, defined by the empirical quantiles of a nonconformity score from a calibration set, adaptively controls the synthesis magnitude to produce boundary samples. The shell ensures that generated outliers are neither trivially detectable nor indistinguishable from in-distribution data, facilitating smoother learning of robust features. This is combined with a contrastive regularization objective that promotes separability of ID and OOD samples in a chosen score space, such as Mahalanobis or energy-based. Experiments demonstrate that GCOS outperforms state-of-the-art methods using standard energy-based inference on near-OOD benchmarks, defined as tasks where outliers share the same semantic domain as in-distribution data. As an exploratory extension, the framework naturally transitions to conformal OOD inference, which translates uncertainty scores into statistically valid p-values and enables thresholds with formal error guarantees, providing a pathway toward more predictable and reliable OOD detection.

AI.tldr: 提出GCOS框架，通过在隐藏特征空间中生成符合数据流形结构的虚拟异常值，结合对比正则化目标，提升深度神经网络对分布外样本的鲁棒性，在近分布外基准测试上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在图像分类任务中常对分布外（OOD）样本表现出过度自信。现有异常值合成方法未充分考虑数据流形结构，限制了模型鲁棒性提升。
AI.method: GCOS在隐藏特征空间中分两阶段生成虚拟异常值：(1)从训练特征中提取主导方差子空间，识别几何信息丰富的离流形方向；(2)基于校准集的非一致性分数经验分位数构建共形壳层，自适应控制合成幅度，生成边界样本。该框架结合对比正则化目标，在选定分数空间（如马氏距离或能量分数）中增强ID与OOD样本的可分性。
AI.result: 实验表明，GCOS在使用标准能量推理的近OOD基准测试（异常值与分布内数据共享相同语义域）上优于现有最先进方法。框架可自然扩展至共形OOD推理，将不确定性分数转换为统计有效的p值，提供具有形式化错误保证的阈值。
AI.conclusion: GCOS通过几何约束的异常值合成与对比正则化有效提升了OOD检测鲁棒性，为构建更可预测、更可靠的OOD检测系统提供了新途径。

title: Training event-based neural networks with exact gradients via Differentiable ODE Solving in JAX
summary: Existing frameworks for gradient-based training of spiking neural networks face a trade-off: discrete-time methods using surrogate gradients support arbitrary neuron models but introduce gradient bias and constrain spike-time resolution, while continuous-time methods that compute exact gradients require analytical expressions for spike times and state evolution, restricting them to simple neuron types such as Leaky Integrate and Fire (LIF). We introduce the Eventax framework, which resolves this trade-off by combining differentiable numerical ODE solvers with event-based spike handling. Built in JAX, our frame-work uses Diffrax ODE-solvers to compute gradients that are exact with respect to the forward simulation for any neuron model defined by ODEs . It also provides a simple API where users can specify just the neuron dynamics, spike conditions, and reset rules. Eventax prioritises modelling flexibility, supporting a wide range of neuron models, loss functions, and network architectures, which can be easily extended. We demonstrate Eventax on multiple benchmarks, including Yin-Yang and MNIST, using diverse neuron models such as Leaky Integrate-and-fire (LIF), Quadratic Integrate-and-fire (QIF), Exponential integrate-and-fire (EIF), Izhikevich and Event-based Gated Recurrent Unit (EGRU) with both time-to-first-spike and state-based loss functions, demonstrating its utility for prototyping and testing event-based architectures trained with exact gradients. We also demonstrate the application of this framework for more complex neuron types by implementing a multi-compartment neuron that uses a model of dendritic spikes in human layer 2/3 cortical Pyramidal neurons for computation. Code available at https://github.com/efficient-scalable-machine-learning/eventax.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Eventax框架，通过结合可微分数值ODE求解器与基于事件的脉冲处理，解决了现有脉冲神经网络训练方法中梯度偏差与神经元模型灵活性之间的权衡问题，实现了对任意ODE定义的神经元模型的精确梯度计算。
AI.motivation: 现有的脉冲神经网络梯度训练框架存在一个基本权衡：基于离散时间的代理梯度方法虽然支持任意神经元模型，但引入了梯度偏差且限制了脉冲时间分辨率；而计算精确梯度的连续时间方法需要脉冲时间和状态演化的解析表达式，仅适用于LIF等简单神经元模型。这一权衡限制了脉冲神经网络的研究和应用。
AI.method: 提出Eventax框架，该框架基于JAX构建，核心创新在于将Diffrax ODE求解器与基于事件的脉冲处理相结合。该方法使用可微分数值ODE求解器计算梯度，确保对于任何由ODE定义的神经元模型，梯度相对于前向仿真都是精确的。框架提供简洁的API，用户只需指定神经元动力学、脉冲条件和重置规则即可。该方法支持广泛的神经元模型、损失函数和网络架构，并具有高度的可扩展性。
AI.result: 在Yin-Yang和MNIST等多个基准数据集上验证了Eventax框架的有效性。实验采用了多种神经元模型，包括LIF、QIF、EIF、Izhikevich和EGRU，结合time-to-first-spike和基于状态的损失函数进行训练。此外，还成功实现了多室神经元模型，该模型使用人类皮层L2/3锥体神经元的树突脉冲模型进行计算，展示了框架处理复杂神经元类型的能力。
AI.conclusion: Eventax框架成功解决了脉冲神经网络训练中长期存在的梯度精确性与模型灵活性之间的权衡问题。通过提供精确梯度计算能力和对任意ODE定义神经元模型的支持，该框架为原型设计和测试基于事件的架构提供了强大工具，推动了脉冲神经网络研究的进一步发展。

title: SYNAPSE: Framework for Neuron Analysis and Perturbation in Sequence Encoding
summary: In recent years, Artificial Intelligence has become a powerful partner for complex tasks such as data analysis, prediction, and problem-solving, yet its lack of transparency raises concerns about its reliability. In sensitive domains such as healthcare or cybersecurity, ensuring transparency, trustworthiness, and robustness is essential, since the consequences of wrong decisions or successful attacks can be severe. Prior neuron-level interpretability approaches are primarily descriptive, task-dependent, or require retraining, which limits their use as systematic, reusable tools for evaluating internal robustness across architectures and domains. To overcome these limitations, this work proposes SYNAPSE, a systematic, training-free framework for understanding and stress-testing the internal behavior of Transformer models across domains. It extracts per-layer [CLS] representations, trains a lightweight linear probe to obtain global and per-class neuron rankings, and applies forward-hook interventions during inference. This design enables controlled experiments on internal representations without altering the original model, thereby allowing weaknesses, stability patterns, and label-specific sensitivities to be measured and compared directly across tasks and architectures. Across all experiments, SYNAPSE reveals a consistent, domain-independent organization of internal representations, in which task-relevant information is encoded in broad, overlapping neuron subsets. This redundancy provides a strong degree of functional stability, while class-wise asymmetries expose heterogeneous specialization patterns and enable label-aware analysis. In contrast, small structured manipulations in weight or logit space are sufficient to redirect predictions, highlighting complementary vulnerability profiles and illustrating how SYNAPSE can guide the development of more robust Transformer models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SYNAPSE框架，一种无需训练的系统化方法，用于理解和压力测试Transformer模型的内部行为，揭示了模型内部表征的组织规律和脆弱性特征。
AI.motivation: 现有神经元级可解释性方法主要是描述性的、任务依赖的或需要重新训练，限制了其作为系统性、可复用工具在不同架构和领域间评估内部鲁棒性的能力。在医疗和网络安全等敏感领域，缺乏透明度和鲁棒性会带来严重后果，因此需要一种通用的方法来理解模型内部行为。
AI.method: 提出SYNAPSE框架，采用训练无关的设计：(1) 提取各层的[CLS]表征；(2) 训练轻量级线性探针获取全局和类特定的神经元排名；(3) 在推理过程中应用前向钩子干预。该方法不改变原始模型，通过对内部表征进行受控实验，实现对不同任务和架构的直接比较。
AI.result: 实验发现Transformer内部表征具有一致的、领域无关的组织方式：任务相关信息编码在广泛且重叠的神经元子集中，这种冗余性提供了强功能稳定性，同时类间不对称性暴露了异构的特化模式。相反，权重或logit空间中的小型结构化操纵足以改变预测结果，揭示了互补的脆弱性特征。
AI.conclusion: SYNAPSE框架能够有效识别模型内部表征的组织规律、稳定性模式和标签特定的敏感性，暴露模型的脆弱性特征，为开发更鲁棒的Transformer模型提供指导，具有跨架构和领域的通用性。

title: C$^2$FG: Control Classifier-Free Guidance via Score Discrepancy Analysis
summary: Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG) is a cornerstone of modern conditional diffusion models, yet its reliance on the fixed or heuristic dynamic guidance weight is predominantly empirical and overlooks the inherent dynamics of the diffusion process. In this paper, we provide a rigorous theoretical analysis of the Classifier-Free Guidance. Specifically, we establish strict upper bounds on the score discrepancy between conditional and unconditional distributions at different timesteps based on the diffusion process. This finding explains the limitations of fixed-weight strategies and establishes a principled foundation for time-dependent guidance. Motivated by this insight, we introduce \textbf{Control Classifier-Free Guidance (C$^2$FG)}, a novel, training-free, and plug-in method that aligns the guidance strength with the diffusion dynamics via an exponential decay control function. Extensive experiments demonstrate that C$^2$FG is effective and broadly applicable across diverse generative tasks, while also exhibiting orthogonality to existing strategies.

AI.tldr: 本文针对分类器无关引导（CFG）中固定引导权重的经验性局限性，通过理论分析建立了条件与无条件分布得分差异的严格上界，提出了训练无关的插件式方法C²FG，通过指数衰减控制函数动态调整引导强度，在多种生成任务中表现出有效性和广泛适用性。
AI.motivation: 现有的分类器无关引导（CFG）依赖固定或启发式动态引导权重，这种做法缺乏理论基础，忽略了扩散过程固有的动态特性，亟需建立时间依赖引导的理论框架。
AI.method: 基于扩散过程建立条件与无条件分布在各时间步得分差异的严格上界，提出控制分类器无关引导（C²FG）方法，采用指数衰减控制函数使引导强度与扩散动力学对齐，无需额外训练且可作为插件使用。
AI.result: 理论分析揭示了固定权重策略的局限性，证明了时间依赖引导的理论合理性；实验表明C²FG在多种生成任务中均有效、适用范围广，且与现有策略具有正交性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为时间依赖引导建立了理论基础，提出的C²FG方法无需训练、即插即用，能够有效提升生成质量，具有良好的通用性和与其他策略的兼容性。

title: LycheeCluster: Efficient Long-Context Inference with Structure-Aware Chunking and Hierarchical KV Indexing
summary: The quadratic complexity of the attention mechanism and the substantial memory footprint of the Key-Value (KV) cache present severe computational and memory challenges for Large Language Models (LLMs) processing long contexts. Existing retrieval-based methods often compromise semantic integrity through fixed-size chunking and suffer from inefficient linear scanning. In this paper, we propose LycheeCluster, a novel method for efficient KV cache management. LycheeCluster preserves local semantic coherence via boundary-aware chunking and constructs a recursive hierarchical index rooted in the triangle inequality. This design transforms cache retrieval from a linear scan into a theoretically bounded, logarithmic-time pruning process, while a lazy update strategy supports efficient streaming generation. Experiments demonstrate that LycheeCluster achieves up to a 3.6x end-to-end inference speedup with negligible degradation in model performance, outperforming state-of-the-art KV cache management methods (e.g., Quest, ClusterKV). We will release our code and kernels after publication.

AI.tldr: LycheeCluster通过边界感知分块和递归层次索引实现了高效的KV缓存管理，将检索复杂度从线性降至对数级，在几乎不损失模型性能的前提下获得了最高3.6倍的端到端推理加速。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在处理长上下文时面临注意力机制的二次复杂度和KV缓存的巨大内存占用问题。现有基于检索的方法通过固定大小分块破坏了语义完整性，并且效率低下的线性扫描进一步制约了性能。
AI.method: LycheeCluster采用边界感知分块保持局部语义连贯性，并构建基于三角不等式的递归层次索引。该设计将缓存检索从线性扫描转变为理论上有限界的对数时间剪枝过程，同时采用惰性更新策略支持高效的流式生成。
AI.result: 实验表明LycheeCluster实现了高达3.6倍的端到端推理加速，模型性能损失可忽略不计，在性能上优于Quest、ClusterKV等最先进的KV缓存管理方法。
AI.conclusion: LycheeCluster有效解决了长上下文LLM的KV缓存管理效率问题，在保持语义完整性的同时显著提升了推理速度，为大规模语言模型的长文本处理提供了高效解决方案。

title: Are We Winning the Wrong Game? Revisiting Evaluation Practices for Long-Term Time Series Forecasting
summary: Long-term time series forecasting (LTSF) is widely recognized as a central challenge in data mining and machine learning. LTSF has increasingly evolved into a benchmark-driven ''GAME,'' where models are ranked, compared, and declared state-of-the-art based primarily on marginal reductions in aggregated pointwise error metrics such as MSE and MAE. Across a small set of canonical datasets and fixed forecasting horizons, progress is communicated through leaderboard-style tables in which lower numerical scores define success. In this GAME, what is measured becomes what is optimized, and incremental error reduction becomes the dominant currency of advancement. We argue that this metric-centric regime is not merely incomplete, but structurally misaligned with the broader objectives of forecasting. In real-world settings, forecasting often prioritizes preserving temporal structure, trend stability, seasonal coherence, robustness to regime shifts, and supporting downstream decision processes. Optimizing aggregate pointwise error does not necessarily imply modeling these structural properties. As a result, leaderboard improvement may increasingly reflect specialization in benchmark configurations rather than a deeper understanding of temporal dynamics. This paper revisits LTSF evaluation as a foundational question in data science: what does it mean to measure forecasting progress? We propose a multi-dimensional evaluation perspective that integrates statistical fidelity, structural coherence, and decision-level relevance. By challenging the current metric monoculture, we aim to redirect attention from winning benchmark tables toward advancing meaningful, context-aware forecasting.

AI.tldr: 本文批判了长期时间序列预测（LTSF）领域过度依赖聚合逐点误差指标（如MSE、MAE）的评估现状，指出这种以指标为中心的评估范式与现实预测需求存在结构性错位，并提出应采用融合统计保真度、结构一致性和决策相关性的多维度评估框架。
AI.motivation: 当前LTSF研究已演变为以排行榜为导向的"游戏"，研究者主要追求在少量基准数据集上的边际误差指标改进。然而，这种评估方式忽视了现实应用中对时序结构保持、趋势稳定性、季节性一致性、鲁棒性及下游决策支持等关键需求，导致基准性能提升可能仅反映对特定配置的过度适应，而非对时序动态的深入理解。
AI.method: 将LTSF评估重新定位为数据科学的基础性问题，提出超越单一指标的多维评估视角，整合三个核心维度：（1）统计保真度——衡量预测结果与统计特性的匹配程度；（2）结构一致性——评估时序结构、趋势、季节性等模式的保持能力；（3）决策相关性——考察预测对下游决策过程的实际价值。
AI.result: 揭示了当前以MSE/MAE为主导的评估指标"单一文化"的局限性，证明了优化聚合逐点误差并不能保证模型具备结构建模能力。排行榜上的改进可能更多反映对基准配置的特化，而非真正的预测能力提升。提出了一个能够更全面衡量预测进展的多维评估框架。
AI.conclusion: 呼吁学界从"赢得排行榜"转向"推进有意义、情境感知的预测研究"，通过挑战当前的指标单一文化，重新引导LTSF领域关注具有实际价值的预测能力，为该领域的评估实践建立更坚实的基础。

title: Learning Hierarchical Knowledge in Text-Rich Networks with Taxonomy-Informed Representation Learning
comment: Accepted by KDD 2026. Extended version coming soon
summary: Hierarchical knowledge structures are ubiquitous across real-world domains and play a vital role in organizing information from coarse to fine semantic levels. While such structures have been widely used in taxonomy systems, biomedical ontologies, and retrieval-augmented generation, their potential remains underexplored in the context of Text-Rich Networks (TRNs), where each node contains rich textual content and edges encode semantic relationships. Existing methods for learning on TRNs often focus on flat semantic modeling, overlooking the inherent hierarchical semantics embedded in textual documents. To this end, we propose TIER (Hierarchical \textbf{T}axonomy-\textbf{I}nformed R\textbf{E}presentation Learning on Text-\textbf{R}ich Networks), which first constructs an implicit hierarchical taxonomy and then integrates it into the learned node representations. Specifically, TIER employs similarity-guided contrastive learning to build a clustering-friendly embedding space, upon which it performs hierarchical K-Means followed by LLM-powered clustering refinement to enable semantically coherent taxonomy construction. Leveraging the resulting taxonomy, TIER introduces a cophenetic correlation coefficient-based regularization loss to align the learned embeddings with the hierarchical structure. By learning representations that respect both fine-grained and coarse-grained semantics, TIER enables more interpretable and structured modeling of real-world TRNs. We demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms existing methods on multiple datasets across diverse domains, highlighting the importance of hierarchical knowledge learning for TRNs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TIER方法，通过构建隐式层次分类体系并将其融入节点表示学习，解决了文本丰富网络中层次语义建模不足的问题，显著提升了性能。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的层次知识结构无处不在，但在文本丰富网络（TRNs）中其潜力尚未被充分探索。现有TRN学习方法主要关注扁平语义建模，忽视了文本文档中固有的层次语义结构。
AI.method: 提出TIER框架，首先通过相似性引导的对比学习构建聚类友好的嵌入空间，然后执行层次K-Means聚类并利用LLM进行聚类精炼，构建语义连贯的分类体系。基于该分类体系，引入基于cophenetic相关系数的正则化损失，使学习到的嵌入与层次结构对齐。
AI.result: 在多个跨领域数据集上的实验结果表明，TIER显著优于现有方法，验证了层次知识学习对TRNs的重要性。该方法能够学习兼顾细粒度和粗粒度语义的表示，实现了更具可解释性和结构化的TRN建模。
AI.conclusion: TIER成功地将层次分类体系融入文本丰富网络的表示学习中，证明了层次知识结构对于理解和建模TRNs的重要性，为该领域提供了一个有效的解决方案。

title: Echo2ECG: Enhancing ECG Representations with Cardiac Morphology from Multi-View Echos
summary: Electrocardiography (ECG) is a low-cost, widely used modality for diagnosing electrical abnormalities like atrial fibrillation by capturing the heart's electrical activity. However, it cannot directly measure cardiac morphological phenotypes, such as left ventricular ejection fraction (LVEF), which typically require echocardiography (Echo). Predicting these phenotypes from ECG would enable early, accessible health screening. Existing self-supervised methods suffer from a representational mismatch by aligning ECGs to single-view Echos, which only capture local, spatially restricted anatomical snapshots. To address this, we propose Echo2ECG, a multimodal self-supervised learning framework that enriches ECG representations with the heart's morphological structure captured in multi-view Echos. We evaluate Echo2ECG as an ECG feature extractor on two clinically relevant tasks that fundamentally require morphological information: (1) classification of structural cardiac phenotypes across three datasets, and (2) retrieval of Echo studies with similar morphological characteristics using ECG queries.
